kuramon.name: Kuramon
kuramon.description: Kuramon is an Unidentified Digimon that suddenly appeared on a computer network. A single Digi-Egg was born from the malice of humans abusing computers and the aggression from conflicts unfolding over networks. The Digi-Egg was the amalgamation of humanity's destructive instincts, and the mysterious Digimon born from it is incredibly dangerous. It multiplies within a computer network like a virus, causing minor network failures. Kuramon uses its special move Glare Eye to produce a frothy substance from its giant eye.

specialSkills.name: Glare Eye
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 35.

choromon.name: Choromon
choromon.description: A super-small Machine Digimon with red eyes that act as photosensors. Choromon's constant restless movements make it seem very cute, but they're just because of its simple programming making it react to bright light. In dark places, it can't move at all. For reasons unknown, it discharges electricity from the tip of its tail when it's in a good mood. It uses its move Jamming Powder to emit metal particles and temporarily confuse its enemy's AI. It then takes advantage of this temporary confusion to flee.

specialSkills.name: Jamming Powder
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 5. 15% chance to apply Confusion.

dodomon.name: Dodomon
dodomon.description: A Slime Digimon covered entirely in a tough material called Mithril Hair. Dodomon exhibits an aggressive nature right from birth, and even though its fangs haven't grown in yet, it likes to threaten foes by opening wide and pretending to bite them. Because of this behavior, these Digimon are often taken out by others, making Dodomon quite rare. When an enemy approaches, Dodomon attacks by shooting Little Iron Beads from its mouth.

specialSkills.name: Little Iron Beads
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 35.

pabumon.name: Pabumon
pabumon.description: This Slime Digimon looks like a mere bit of sea-green froth at first glance, but it's actually a totally autonomous creature with a plethora of expressions. Pabumon's delicate surface means it has practically no defense or prowess in combat. It creates infinite tiny foam clones from the pacifier-like object in its mouth. This ability was originally used to develop computer viruses, but Pabumon's lack of life force made for poor implementation. Life is fleeting for this adorable Digimon baby. It uses Adhesive Bubble Blow to release bubbles from its body to bind enemies, giving Pabumon a chance to escape.

specialSkills.name: Adhesive Bubble Blow
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 100% chance of 10% reduction to SPD for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Googoo, gaga!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Are you angry?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: If that's what ya think, then put your dukes up! Googoo! I'm comin' for ya! Gaga!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Are you hungry?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: If that's what ya think, then feed me! Googoo! Figure out what I wanna eat! Gaga!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Are you having fun?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You guessed it, so now ya gotta babble with me! Googoo! C'mon! Let's sing! Gaga!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Are you in pain?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You guessed it, so now ya gotta say, Pain, pain, go away!" Googoo!"

punimon.name: Punimon
punimon.description: A brand new type of Digimon. Three feelers grow from the top of its gelatinous, red body. Punimon is incapable of fighting, instead relying on Acid Bubbles to threaten enemies.

specialSkills.name: Acid Bubbles
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 100% chance of 10% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Puni, puniii!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Do you wanna go somewhere?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Together, with you!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What's your name?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Me, Punimon!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're a good kid.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Me, good kid!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're so cute!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Me, so happy!

botamon.name: Botamon
botamon.description: A newborn Digital Monster. Dark peach fuzz covers the surface of Botamon's slimy body. This new addition to the Digital World can't fight, but it can spout Acid Bubbles from its mouth to intimidate foes.

specialSkills.name: Acid Bubbles
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 100% chance of 10% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Bloob, bloob!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You wanna help?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Sure! I'll do my best, too!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm trying to study...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Teach me, too.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm counting on you!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm counting on you, too!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let's be friends.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Friends forever!

poyomon.name: Poyomon
poyomon.description: This Digimon baby uses its translucent body to float along the Net Ocean like a jellyfish. Possessing the most primitive structural makeup of any Digimon discovered to date, it garners attention from Digital World anthropologists and Digimon fanatics alike. They hail it as a "missing link," potentially capable of unlocking the mystery behind Digimon generation. To protect itself from foes, Poyomon shoots Acid Bubbles from its mouth.

specialSkills.name: Acid Bubbles
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 35.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Poyo, poyooo!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Pull yourself together!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Me, no lose!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're doing really well.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Me, good 'mon!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Poyomon, was it?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Me, friend!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I love you, Poyomon!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Me, love you, too!

kapurimon.name: Kapurimon
kapurimon.description: A small, In-Training Digimon wearing a metal helmet. The two horns on the helmet contain antennae that can transmit all sorts of radio waves or sounds. Kapurimon has bat-like traits, emitting ultrasonic waves from its mouth and recognizing objects ahead of it from the rebounding waves, instead of relying on its weak eyesight. This allows it to remain active no matter what time of day or night it is. Kapurimon uses its special move Howling Hertz to make its two horns resonate. Anyone hit by this attack has their hearing paralyzed, even large Digimon.

specialSkills.name: Howling Hertz
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 15. 20% chance to apply Paralysis.

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 8 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

koromon.name: Koromon
koromon.description: A small Digimon whose body has grown a size bigger, its peach fuzz having fallen off. Koromon can move around vigorously, but combat is still beyond its capabilities. It blows Bubbles from its mouth to intimidate foes.

specialSkills.name: Bubbles
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water physical attack at power 40.

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 40. 95% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wanna fight, too! Like, right now!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wanna send you into battle soon.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: First, I've gotta Digivolve into a stronger form, right? I'll do my best, so cheer me on!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You oughta watch some battles first.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I've been watching a whole bunch! I'm practically an expert at this point.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Easy does it, now.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: All right. If you say so! Boy, you're a kind person, aren't you!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I don't wanna have you fight just yet.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Fine, then. I'll give up on the idea for now. You really know me pretty well, don't you!

tanemon.name: Tanemon
tanemon.description: A Bulb Digimon with what appears to be a seedling sprouting from its head. Tanemon Digivolved from a Yuramon that landed on the ground after drifting through the air in search of the perfect environment. Extremely skittish, it will use its four legs to quickly dig a hole so it can hide its body at the first sign of a threat. While Tanemon's body is hidden underground, the seedling on its head makes it indistinguishable from a plant, protecting it from harm. That being said, this tactic proves ineffective against herbivorous Digimon.

specialSkills.name: Adhesive Bubble Blow
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 100% chance of 15% reduction to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Crescent Leaf I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant physical attack at power 6 x 7 hits. 95% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Look! Look! My seedling is sprouting!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It's looking a bit dry, actually.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: How rude. Far from being dry, it's full of vitality! You'd do well to learn from it!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Will it end up blooming?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Couldn't say for sure, but I bet it will. Keep a real close eye on it for me, okay?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What kind of seedling is it?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Couldn't tell you, but I'm sure it'll be key to my Digivolution! Keep a close eye on me!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Want me to water it?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Aw, how kind! Still, don't worry. I'm sure I'll Digivolve beautifully no matter what!

tsunomon.name: Tsunomon
tsunomon.description: A small Digimon with a single horn on its head, formed by hardening one of Punimon's feelers. Having Digivolved to be more animalistic than Punimon, Tsunomon is covered in soft fur. Filled with a playful spirit, Tsunomon loves to pull pranks, and has yet to develop its instinct for conflict.

specialSkills.name: Acid Bubbles
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water physical attack at power 40.

attachmentSkills.name: Comet Hammer I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 8 x 6 hits. 90% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Is my horn cool, or is my horn cool?!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It's a little scary.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Man, I must be pretty awesome if I can scare you. I'm gonna scare you some more!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That's a little... iffy.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Iffy? What do you mean by iffy"? Come on! You can tell me!"

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It looks really strong.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What? It does?! That makes me pretty giddy! I'm not gonna lie.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It's cool as heck!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Appreciate it! I ought to Digivolve real soon, so I can get even cooler.

tsumemon.name: Tsumemon
tsumemon.description: An In-Training Digimon that Digivolved beyond Kuramon. The tips of its feelers are shaped like talons, increasing its ferocity. Tsumemon corrodes data at frightening speed, causing networks to malfunction. Its movement speed is just as fast, making this Digimon difficult to catch once it's Digivolved to this level. It uses its special move Nail Scratch to rake the enemy with the talons on its feelers.

specialSkills.name: Nail Scratch
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 40.

attachmentSkills.name: Shadow Fang I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 20 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

tokomon.name: Tokomon
tokomon.description: A small Digimon with four limbs growing out of the bottom of its body (head?). These limbs, which are highly unusual on an In-Training Digimon, give Tokomon a unique and extremely cute look. However, that cuteness can be deceptive, and anyone who reaches out to pet Tokomon may be in for a surprise as it quickly opens its mouth and bites down with its rows of sharp teeth. Tokomon has an innocent personality, though, and doesn't mean any real harm.

specialSkills.name: Bite
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 45.

attachmentSkills.name: Sonic Shot I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind magic attack at power 40. 95% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wanna Digivolve fast into something real tough!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're already strong, you know.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That's right! I chomp down on my foes real good!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You've got my support!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Teach me, teach me, pretty please!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're nice and cute the way you are.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Really? Then maybe I won't Digivolve after all... Aw, but I really want to!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You'd better get a cool look, too!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: If my Digivolution makes me stronger, that's cool enough for me. Heck, I'm cool already!

dorimon.name: Dorimon
dorimon.description: A Lesser Digimon that can run extremely fast, but only in a straight line. Dorimon hate to be tamed, so many remain feral. Approaching it is dangerous, as it will charge in recklessly for a tackle. Dorimon's pointed ears are tough, acting as horns and inflicting a modicum of damage when it tackles. That being said, it can't turn once it has gained enough speed. Dorimon's special move is Metal Drop, spitting metal beads as it charges toward the enemy.

specialSkills.name: Metal Drop
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 40.

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 40. 95% ACU.

nyaromon.name: Nyaromon
nyaromon.description: A small Digimon with feline traits. Fickle by nature, Nyaromon has quite cat-like behavior. While curious and capricious in equal measure, it has a lonely side as well. Nyaromon uses its special move Fox Tail to whip the enemy with the wiry hairs on its tail. However, not a single foe has ever been seen flinching under this attack.

specialSkills.name: Fox Tail
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 30. 100% chance of 20% reduction to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Holy Light I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 40. 95% ACU.

pagumon.name: Pagumon
pagumon.description: A small Digimon that can perform low-altitude flight with the ear-like appendages on its head. Pagumon can use these ears deftly like hands, often pulling down its enemy's eyelids or slapping their rear with them mockingly. Particularly mean-spirited, it can often be seen teasing the likes of Koromon or Tsunomon, chasing them around and around. Pagumon may even spit Poison Bubbles from its mouth to bully other Digimon.

specialSkills.name: Poison Bubbles
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 15. 30% chance to apply Poison.

attachmentSkills.name: Power Energy I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null magic attack at power 40. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

yokomon.name: Yokomon
yokomon.description: A Bulb Digimon with a big flower blooming on its head. Yokomon moves by deftly manipulating its root-like tentacles, and is able to float softly through the air, albeit for short distances. A curious creature, its restless movements are delightful to behold. Yokomon tend to live in groups—from dozens to hundreds.

specialSkills.name: Soap Flower
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water physical attack at power 40.

attachmentSkills.name: Thorn Strike I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant magic attack at power 20 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Isn't the flower on my head just darling?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I've never seen anything like it.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'll Digivolve into a form that's just as pretty as your world's flowers. You'll see!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Is that a question mark?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hmm. I guess it kind of looks like one, huh? It's as odd as it is beautiful!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Is it wilting?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I know it's yellow, but that's just the way it looks. No need to fret. Honest!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What should I call it?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Why, any name you like. I can't wait to hear what lovely label you come up with!

bukamon.name: Bukamon
bukamon.description: Despite resembling an aquatic dinosaur infant, this playful Digimon can move as skillfully as a seahorse. Bukamon is quick to flee when others draw near, however. Its skin still isn't fit for the high pressure and low temperature of ocean depths, so it can only spend limited amounts of time submerged in the deep.

specialSkills.name: Air Bubbles
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind physical attack at power 40.

attachmentSkills.name: Frozen Bullet I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice magic attack at power 40. 95% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wish I could swim for longer periods of time in the deep ocean...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Give it a shot!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I guess I'll never learn how if I don't try, right? Okay, I'll go for it, then!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let's come up with a strategy.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Yeah, let's look up what makes it possible. I'm ready to do it by the book!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Time for some special training.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Special training? Like, something I do on my own? I sure wish you'd join me.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'll watch you while you try.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm a little scared to try alone, so I'll be glad to have you there. Okay, let's do it!

motimon.name: Motimon
motimon.description: A soft-bodied Digimon with highly elastic skin, Motimon uses the protrusions beneath its body to waggle its way around. The name "Motimon" comes from its resemblance to a mochi rice cake when it puffs up its body in excitement. Despite its appearance, Motimon possesses a surprisingly high degree of intelligence, and so is believed to have developed from a computer's dictionary feature. Capable of understanding human language, Motimon can occasionally be seen altering the shape of its body in an effort at communication. Motimon uses its mochi-like Elastic Bubbles to restrict opponents' movement.

specialSkills.name: Elastic Bubbles
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water physical attack at power 40.

attachmentSkills.name: Hydro Water I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water magic attack at power 8 x 5 hits. 95% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Want me to try puffing up my body?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'd love to see that!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Don't just watch me! If you like what you see, then let's fight together!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What's so interesting about that?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Humans seem to get a kick out of it. Take a gander anytime!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You don't have to.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Come on, no need to be so uptight! I'm ready to go anytime!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Does it hurt?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Far from it. It actually feels pretty good. Let's puff up together someday!

wanyamon.name: Wanyamon
wanyamon.description: A Digimon that fuses the data of small pet animals such as cats and dogs. Wanyamon is unexpectedly swift, so caution is warranted to prevent its escape. Even so, it gets quite attached if you fawn over it like a pet. Its special move is Smile Fang, going suddenly from an innocent-looking pose to a surprise chomp attack.

specialSkills.name: Smile Fang
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 45.

attachmentSkills.name: Wind Claw I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind physical attack at power 40. 95% ACU.

agumon.name: Agumon
agumon.description: A small, dinosaur-like Reptile Digimon that has developed the ability to walk on two legs. Since it hasn't fully matured, it still lacks strength, but its fierce disposition makes it reckless. Hard, sharp claws grow from its hands and feet, and it makes full use of them in battle. Agumon shows much potential, promising Digivolution into a great and powerful Digimon. Its special move is Pepper Breath, spitting flames at its foes.

specialSkills.name: Pepper Breath
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 50.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 40. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wanna be an adorable mascot character! How can I get everyone to like me?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Try doing a daring stunt!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Everyone likes watching those, huh? Maybe I'll do a bungie jump or play chicken!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Show off your intellectual side.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: People do love smart quiz masters, huh! Okay, time to hit the books and become a brainiac!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'll do PR for you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Huh? You'd spread the word about me? Now, that's a real friend! I'm counting on you!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: People love you the way you are now.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm fine the way I am...? You know, maybe you're right. Yay, I'm super happy!

kudamon.name: Kudamon
kudamon.description: A Holy Beast Digimon that's always wrapped around a holy ammunition cartridge. Kudamon is constantly building up holy power within the earring on its left ear, and the amount it accumulates affects the course of its next Digivolution. Calm and collected by nature, it can assess any situation—even combat —with accuracy, ensuring the advantage in battle. If things ever go south, though, Kudamon enters its cartridge to strengthen its defensive position. Its special move Blinding Ray dazzles the enemy with a glaring flash emitted from its earring.

specialSkills.name: Blinding Ray
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 100% chance of 20% reduction to ACU for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Holy Light I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 40. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Shine Burst I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 25. 90% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Riding on a human's shoulders sure is relaxing!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I bet you're real heavy.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That's just not true. Humans seem pleased to have me ride on them. You should try it.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Don't go clambering on me.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I pick and choose my rides, thank you. Whether I'll ride you is still up in the air.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hop on up, then. I'll give you a ride.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I appreciate the thought. Still, I need to get to know you better, or I can't relax.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Why not sit on their lap?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That's hardly the same, now, is it? I prefer the sensation of moving around with humans.

gomamon.name: Gomamon
gomamon.description: A Sea Beast Digimon that can move on land and that's covered in temperature-regulating fur. This short, white fur grows longer and turns brown as Gomamon ages. A busybody and a troublemaker, Gomamon loves to get involved in every situation. The streak of red fur running from its head down its back moves in accordance with its mood, bristling when Gomamon is angry. Its claws are sharp enough to cut through solid ice with ease, and anyone who underestimates Gomamon is in for a rude awakening. Its special move is Marching Fishes, with which Gomamon commands a loyal squad of small fish to attack.

specialSkills.name: Marching Fishes
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water physical attack at power 50.

attachmentSkills.name: Icicle Edge I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice physical attack at power 20 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to DEF for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Fishy, fishy, fish-fish! *sigh* I wanna eat some fish...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Then go catch some, already.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You betcha, I will! And after I catch a bunch, I'll give you some, too!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Why not set a trap?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Wouldn't it be faster if I just caught 'em? But maybe I should give the easy way a try.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Okay, let's go fishing!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That's what I wanted to hear! We're gonna catch a ton of fishies!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Want me to go find some?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Thanks. That really makes me happy! Let's find some together and then eat 'em!

coronamon.name: Coronamon
coronamon.description: A Beast Digimon born through the fusion of data obtained by observing the sun. Coronamon has a strong sense of justice and a pure, simple-minded personality. Its special move is Corona Flame, which converts all of the stamina in its body into flame power to shoot a fiery missile at the enemy from its forehead.

specialSkills.name: Corona Flame
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 45. Nullifies unfavorable compatibility.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 40. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Magma Fall I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire magic attack at power 25. 90% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Nobody's got more guts than me!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What about stuff other than guts?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The sun is on my side, so my flames are unbeatable! Let's get out there and fight!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That's impressive.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I know. It's always the guys with the least guts who say others don't have any.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let's fight, then.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Huh? But I wanted to be friends... We're in this together, right?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're a strong one.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Thanks. So you respect me, huh? I respect you back.

zubamon.name: Zubamon
zubamon.description: Zubamon is one of the Legend-Arms that can transform its body into a weapon. The fabled Legend-Arms are said to be capable of either saving the world in the hands of an angel, or destroying it in the hands of a devil. Zubamon possesses the data of the Twentiest, and often shouts "I am the Twentiest!" without knowing what that means. It dislikes anything warped or twisted, and is in constant pursuit of its ideal of sharpness. In battle and in jest, it's always trying to look sharp, and days when it succeeds put it in a good mood. Though it has its Twenty Dive attack that involves rushing headlong at an enemy, Zubamon's true strength lies in its weapon form.

specialSkills.name: Twenty Dive
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 40. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 8 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 40. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

solarmon.name: Solarmon
solarmon.description: A rare species of mechanical Machine Digimon. Some researchers believe Solarmon to be a mutation of Hagurumon, but the truth of the matter remains a mystery. Because its DigiCore generates heat, its body is hot enough to cause burns. Solarmon uses its special move Shiny Ring to throw heat-emitting gears that scorch the enemy.

specialSkills.name: Shiny Ring
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 10 x 5 hits.

attachmentSkills.name: Thruster Metal I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel magic attack at power 6 x 7 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Burst Flame I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire magic attack at power 8 x 5 hits. 95% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Gigigi! Gigigigi!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're kinda hot, aren't you?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Gigigi... That's my hot DigiCore. Sorry for the stuffiness. Just think of it as training!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Are you Hagurumon?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Gigigi! I'm Solarmon, and don't you forget it!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Your shine... It's almost angelic.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Gigi? You saying I'm divine or something? Come on. You're gonna make me blush...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're looking red in the face today.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Gigi? Yeah, my face is always like this. Hope you're not mistaking me for someone else.

terriermon.name: Terriermon
terriermon.description: An enigmatic Digimon with a massive horn growing from its head. While Terriermon's composition is enough to deem it a Beast Digimon, the form it takes after Digivolving is still unknown. Rumor has it that it's sometimes born with a twin. Terriermon's extreme cuteness and calm behavior don't give the impression that this Digimon is of the Combat Species. Still, the power it exhibits in battle belies its appearance. It uses its signature move Terrier Tornado to spin both of its ears like a propeller, creating a small tornado.

specialSkills.name: Terrier Tornado
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Wind magic attack at power 30.

attachmentSkills.name: Heal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Moderately recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: Power Energy I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null magic attack at power 40. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: We ought to take things more easy-breezy.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'd say we need to get more serious.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're something else, aren't you? Still, don't go wearing yourself out, now.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm already easy-breezy, baby!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Not from where I'm standing, but if you say so. I'll try to follow your example.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A little earnestness never hurt anyone.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Ease and earnestness are two sides of the same coin, y'know? I'm the perfect example.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Aren't you a little too easy-going?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Too much is just right for yours truly. You really know how to compliment a 'mon!

tentomon.name: Tentomon
tentomon.description: The prototypical Insectoid Digimon, Tentomon has a hard carapace but a low level of aggression. Tentomon has one claw on each of its forelegs, and four claws on its middle and hind legs. Its middle legs in particular are highly dexterous, similar to human hands. Though other Insectoid Digimon of Tentomon's Digivolution level are consumed by a strong fighting spirit, Tentomon retains a love and appreciation for nature at this stage. Exhibiting a fondness for relaxation, Tentomon stops to smell flowers and nap in the shade of trees. Even so, it does have the special move Super Shocker, which involves using its wings to shoot out amplified bolts of static electricity.

specialSkills.name: Super Shocker
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 50.

attachmentSkills.name: Thorn Strike I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant magic attack at power 20 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Thunder Fall I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 8 x 3 hits. 90% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The good ol' sol is nice and toasty! Sooo soothin'!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm ready to burn bright!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Yer rarin' to go, ain't ya? Ya even got me in a tizzy over here!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The sol? What's the sol"?"

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm referrin' to the sun, pal. Hehe. This dome of mine ain't just for show, ya know!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Makes you wanna take a nap, huh?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Yup, totally... *yawn* How's about you and me take a nice little siesta next time?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Since it's so soothing, why not take a break?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Nah, I'm good. Though I appreciate ya lookin' out for me, pal.

toyagumon.name: ToyAgumon
toyagumon.description: An unusual Digimon composed of blocks made from a special plastic. ToyAgumon is said to be an imitation of Agumon made by children playing on the Internet. It's extremely cute. Unlike the bold and fearless Agumon, ToyAgumon has a skittish side, and its blocks fly apart when it's startled. Despite this, it has a strong sense of justice that won't allow for any sort of wrongdoing. It also adores children, and loves to spend time interacting with them on the Net. Its special move is Plastic Blaze, with which it shoots out a toy missile shaped like a flame. It's surprisingly powerful.

specialSkills.name: Plastic Blaze
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 50. 20% chance to apply Confusion.

attachmentSkills.name: Nanomachine Break I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 10 x 4 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Ripping Net
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Paralysis.

tapirmon.name: Tapirmon
tapirmon.description: A Digimon that resembles a "baku," a being in Japanese folklore that eats dreams. Believed to have been born from a medical computer that monitors brainwaves, Tapirmon seems to feed on human REM sleep data. In the latest round of research, it was also found to possess the ability to erase nightmares and computer viruses. Since it can also return those nightmares and viruses to a benign state, it's believed to be a Holy Digimon. The Holy Ring it wears on one of its forelegs seems likely related to both its special abilities and Holy nature. Tapirmon's special move is Nightmare Syndrome, which releases all of the nightmares it absorbed at once to terrify its adversaries. This is the same special move as that of the Perfect Digimon, Digitamamon, but how the two might be related remains a mystery.

specialSkills.name: Nightmare Syndrome
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 40. 10% chance to apply Sleep.

attachmentSkills.name: Heal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Moderately recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: Gaia Blaster I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth magic attack at power 50. 90% ACU.

hyokomon.name: Hyokomon
hyokomon.description: A Baby Bird Digimon Digivolved from samurai-related data. Hyokomon trains tirelessly to master the way of the sword and is also developing a secret technique. When it comes to swordsmanship, it talks the talk, but doesn't quite walk the walk yet. The next Digivolution of Hyokomon will only happen when it breaks out of its shell through endless sword training. Its special move is Downward Cleave, utilizing its wings and leg strength to jump up and swing its sword straight down to split its foe in two.

specialSkills.name: Downward Cleave
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 45. Nullifies unfavorable compatibility.

attachmentSkills.name: Shock Plasma I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 13 x 3 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Thunder Fall I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 8 x 3 hits. 90% ACU.

biyomon.name: Biyomon
biyomon.description: A Baby Bird Digimon with arm-like wings. Biyomon can use these to dexterously grip objects, though this limits its ability to fly. It spends most of its time on the ground, but can escape into the air when danger draws near. Since it's similar in flying ability to Patamon, Biyomon sees Patamon as a rival. Biyomon's dream is to one day Digivolve into Birdramon and fly freely through the sky. Its nightmare is becoming Kokatorimon, who can't fly at all. Possessed of an inquisitive mind, it likes to peck at the sprout growing from Tanemon's head. Biyomon's special move is Spiral Twister, an attack of spectral flames.

specialSkills.name: Spiral Twister
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire magic attack at power 50.

attachmentSkills.name: Sonic Shot I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind magic attack at power 40. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Heal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Moderately recovers HP.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wonder what lies beyond the skies...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Old ruins, maybe?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Ooh! Let's go on an adventure! Just thinking about it gets me all atwitter!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Perhaps an unknown world.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I see! Yeah, could be! I want to learn about all kinds of things I don't know yet!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: New friends await!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hee hee! I bet you're right! New friends, wait for me! I'll be there someday soon!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let's find out together.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Okay! Hey, can we hold hands? When I'm with you, I feel like I could soar!

falcomon.name: Falcomon
falcomon.description: A Bird Digimon with more developed wings that allow it to fly. In spite of this, Falcomon seems obsessed with appearing from out of the sky riding a giant kite like a ninja. Its special move is Ninja Blade, which involves firing off cross-shaped throwing stars made from its hardened feathers.

specialSkills.name: Ninja Blade
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Steel physical attack at power 25. 10% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Wind Claw I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind physical attack at power 40. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Soaring through the sky feels amazing!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wanna fly with you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: If only you had wings like me, huh?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I know.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Huh? You've flown before? No way.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Running on the ground feels great, too.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Take me with you sometime!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I can't do heights.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Must be tough being human.

salamon.name: Salamon
salamon.description: Salamon is a young, sacred-species Digimon with distinctive floppy ears. Since it's still a child, it isn't able to make full use of its holy powers, and has yet to realize its destiny. As a result, its nature is fundamentally unstable, and it's capable of becoming either good or evil. There will likely come a day, however, when Salamon will awaken to its destiny as one of the Virus Busters. After all, it was born a sacred Digimon. Salamon is also an experimental Digimon created by Digimon researchers, and since it was modeled after a human pet, it looks a great deal like a real animal. Its special move Puppy Howl involves letting out a supersonic screech that can paralyze foes.

specialSkills.name: Puppy Howl
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 30. 50% chance to apply Paralysis.

attachmentSkills.name: Holy Light I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 40. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Heal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Moderately recovers HP.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Say, what's a puppy"?"

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A mischievous little critter.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Aw, what a shame! People say I look like one. If I ever spot one, I'm going to scold it!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A lifeform that looks like you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Humans say that a lot, yeah. I'm real curious to know what they're like!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: An animal beloved by many.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: People say I look like one. I guess that's why humans are always so nice to me!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A creature that's cute as a button!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Cute?! I'm told I look like one a lot, you know. What a nice thing to say!

bearmon.name: Bearmon
bearmon.description: A Beast Digimon resembling a small bear, wearing its trademark backwards cap. Although timid at times, Bearmon gets along well with other Digimon, and even possesses uncommon pluck and stamina. Once a battle starts, it continues to fight no matter how many hits it takes, making for a reliable ally. The ability for melee fighting it possesses is so strong that it needs to wrap its fists with leather belts so it won't injure itself with the destructive power of its punches. With its special move Bear Fist, Bearmon leaps at its opponent's chest to drive home a full-force blow.

specialSkills.name: Bear Fist
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 55. 10% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Comet Hammer I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 8 x 6 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: C'mon. Let's play!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let's spar.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: But that's training! You really are serious about stuff, huh?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let's talk.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Okay, that works, too. I love listening to you!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let's have a race.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm not very fast, but you'll never beat me!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let's play tag.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Okay, then I'll be it. We could play hide and seek, but I know I'd find you right away!

penmon.name: Penmon
penmon.description: A Bird Digimon resembling a penguin found in the computer of an Antarctic base. Since Penmon lives in snow-covered regions, it doesn't do well in the heat. It does quite well with humans, conversely, and will happily waddle along behind them. Penmon's wings have degenerated, so it can't fly or walk very quickly. But when it slides across the ice on its belly, it can reach speeds close to 40 mph. When in the water, Penmon can use its small wings to skillfully swim around. Its special move is Super Slap, where it sneaks up on the enemy to smack their cheeks as hard as it can with both arms.

specialSkills.name: Super Slap
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 15 x 3 hits.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Icicle Edge I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice physical attack at power 20 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Say, is it hot, or is it just me?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Not at all.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: So it's just my heat sensitivity? All right, then. I'll try riding it out a little longer.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'd say it's cold, if anything.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Huh. No one I met at the South Pole liked the cold, either. Are all humans that way?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It's just right.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I knew it. I just can't get comfy without ice around. Let's go someplace a little cooler!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It's sweltering.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You look pretty comfortable to me. Let's go take a dip in icy water, you and me!

monodramon.name: Monodramon
monodramon.description: A Mini Dragon Digimon incapable of flight, despite the bat-like wings on both arms. Monodramon's personality is rather rough—bordering on brutal, and it gives the impression of a Digimon that enjoys a good scrap. It's often found in the middle of most Digital World brawls, causing even the likes of Ogremon to get fed up with its persistence. Monodramon's special move is Knuckle Beater, charging into the enemy with staggering force before unleashing its powerful claws in a straightforward strike.

specialSkills.name: Knuckle Beater
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 60.

attachmentSkills.name: Comet Hammer I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 8 x 6 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

ryudamon.name: Ryudamon
ryudamon.description: Because of the antiquated interface on its forehead, this Beast Digimon is presumed to be an experimental "Prototype Digimon" from the time before Digimon were discovered. Ryudamon is covered in Japanese-style armor that boasts high defense, yet its movements are quite nimble, allowing it to jump in and fight at brazenly close range. The more it fights, the more it cultivates combat prowess. Ryudamon possesses gallantry, a samurai spirit and a soul that renders it unafraid of powerful enemy Digimon. The data hidden within the deepest part of its DigiCore during the experiment contains such fierce combat data as warlords and dragons from Japanese mythology, and Ryudamon is thought to possess the potential to grow into a mighty Digimon. Its special move is Iai Blade, with which it leaps up to the opponent to fire an iron blade from its mouth at point-blank range.

specialSkills.name: Iai Blade
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 45. 10% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Lunatic Gate I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Null physical attack at power 25. 90% ACU. 10% CRT Rate.

lucemon.name: Lucemon
lucemon.description: Lucemon is an Angel Digimon resembling a child, said to have descended from on high long ago in the Ancient Digital World. It appeared in a time of chaos, and is said to have ushered in a new era of peace and order. However, due to Lucemon's subsequent rebellion, the world was then plunged into a long, dark age. Despite having the appearance of a child, Lucemon is wiser and more powerful than an Ultimate Digimon. It's said that in the modern era, Lucemon's abilities have been passed down to and divided among the Three Celestials Lucemon's special move is Grand Cross, which fires a collection of ten super-heated spheres of light arranged into the shape of a cross as if they were planets in alignment. This attack is even more destructive than Seraphimon's special move Strike of the Seven Stars.

specialSkills.name: Grand Cross
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 50.

attachmentSkills.name: Revive
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Revives from KO and moderately recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: Holy Light III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Rune Forest II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Plant magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: X-Aura
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] Moderately recovers HP.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I know I'll never get it, but... what is it about humans that makes them so frantic?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Strong feelings make people stronger.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You don't say? Surpassing your original power through emotion alone! How odd humans are.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: There's so much we wanna learn.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: My, but you humans are greedy. You wish to know what lies beyond or is out of sight.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: We wanna be with the friends we care about.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Are friends such a valuable thing? In that case, try and befriend me!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: We have things we wanna protect.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Is protecting something so important? I don't understand... yet nor I do abhor the concept.

elecmon.name: Elecmon
elecmon.description: A Mammal Digimon with a strong sense of curiosity and a love of mischief that it retained after its Digivolution from Tsunomon. Elecmon fans out its nine tails like a peacock in order to intimidate foes in battle. Its special move is Sparkling Thunder.

specialSkills.name: Sparkling Thunder
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 40. 20% chance to apply Paralysis.

attachmentSkills.name: Shock Plasma I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 13 x 3 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Thunder Fall I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 8 x 3 hits. 90% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Aren't my tails cool?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Not really.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: ...Wh-What?! You aren't even impressed by how I can fan 'em out?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: How many do you have?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I've got nine of 'em! Awesome, huh? I can't give ya any, though!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Very cool.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Feel free to copy me if ya want!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Your tails aren't all that's cool about you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Th-Thanks. I didn't expect such a nice compliment...

gaomon.name: Gaomon
gaomon.description: A Beast Digimon thought to be a subspecies of sharp-clawed Gazimon. Gaomon specializes in hit-and-run attacks using agile movements. The gloves on its hands are apparently to protect its claws until they grow in properly. Gaomon uses its powerful legs to spin and unleash its special move Double Backhand.

specialSkills.name: Double Backhand
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Wind physical attack at power 25. 10% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Wind Claw I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind physical attack at power 40. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hey, how goes it?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: No problems to report.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Okay, then time for another full-throttle day!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Feeling great!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I shoulda known. I gotta stay more on top of my health game, like you!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Can't you see for yourself?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Yeah, of course I can!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Not too great.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Gotta make sure to take breaks every now and then, huh?

crabmon.name: Crabmon
crabmon.description: A Crustacean Digimon that attached metal data that had been dissolved into the Net Ocean to its body, dramatically increasing its combat capability. Crabmon attacks with the giant blades on its left pincer and the powerful grip of its right pincer. For defense, it relies on its spiny shell to damage attackers, and is utterly self-confident in battle. Crabmon is fully aware of the weak points of its joints and underbelly, and thus rarely leaves them exposed. It enjoys trapping its opponents, and is something of a prankster. Crabmon's special move is Scissors Execution, which launches its sharp left pincer right for its adversary's throat.

specialSkills.name: Scissors Execution
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water physical attack at power 45. If target is affected by Confusion/ Chaos: 25% chance to apply Instant Death.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 40. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Tidal Stream I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Water physical attack at power 6 x 4 hits. 90% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hey, let's play that human game, rock-paper-scissors! One, two...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: No mercy... Rock!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Dang it! I lost... But I won in spirit!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: How about this...? The unbeatable hand!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: W-Wow! You did rock, paper and scissors all at once! I've still got lots to learn...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'll go for a draw... Scissors!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hey, you did scissors, just like me! That means we're friends!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Guess I'll let you win... Paper!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I won! Yay! But... I know what you did... Thanks, anyway.

gabumon.name: Gabumon
gabumon.description: A full-fledged Reptile Digimon, despite being covered in fur. Gabumon is an extremely shy, timid creature who always gathers up data left behind by Garurumon to wear like a pelt. Garurumon's pelt also serves to protect Gabumon, since other Digimon fear the original owner. Gabumon's personality makes a complete about-face when it wears the pelt. Gabumon's special move is Blue Blaster.

specialSkills.name: Blue Blaster
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 45. 100% chance of 10% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Burst Flame I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire magic attack at power 8 x 5 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Frozen Bullet I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice magic attack at power 40. 95% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm gonna have a party with my Digimon friends! What should we do for fun?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Sing a song in front of everyone!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Um... I think I'm too shy for that. But it would be cool. Maybe I'll be brave and try!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Have a trivia contest.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Wow, that would be lotsa fun! I'm gonna read lotsa books and make the questions!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Have everyone draw a big picture together.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You mean on the same piece of paper? Sounds like it'd be fun, and would make for a good memory!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: How about making some snacks?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Sounds tricky... but I'd like to show my love for everyone! Hey, can you help me practice?

kamemon.name: Kamemon
kamemon.description: An Android Digimon that wears a shell like a computer mouse. Kamemon uses its special move Pointer Arrow to fire an arrow-shaped missile that it guides to strike the enemy.

specialSkills.name: Pointer Arrow
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water physical attack at power 45. Always hits.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 40. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to DEF for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I need a makeover... What should I change to give me that wow factor?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Swap out your helmet for a new one!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I see. I ought to be brave enough to change the stuff that stands out the most!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Why not start by reading a fashion magazine?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A fashion mag...? Huh. Like a book that shows you the latest duds? Sounds interesting!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'll make you some new clothes.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You'd do all that? For little ol' me? You have no idea how happy that makes me!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're fabulous the way you are.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Aw, shucks... Thanks. I mean it. Don't mind the blushing and everything...

kokuwamon.name: Kokuwamon
kokuwamon.description: An extremely rare insect Machine Digimon that was recently discovered. No insect Machine Digimon had been discovered up to that point, and so Kokuwamon's existence wasn't even considered a possibility. Its stun gun-shaped head and arms can discharge 100 megavolts of electricity when it senses danger, so none can approach without caution. Even so, Kokuwamon lacks any aggression, sporting instead an accommodating nature that seeks peace. Kokuwamon obtains nourishment from electricity, and recharges itself with the two limbs on its midsection. Its special move is Mini Scissor Claw, which electrifies its pincers to slice through even the sturdiest of objects.

specialSkills.name: Mini Scissor Claw
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 45. 10% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 8 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You all had better appreciate the electricity you got.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Back at you! Watch what you discharge!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Oh! Yeah... I'll be careful.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I use renewable energy myself.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I don't get it, but sounds awesome!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Gimme some of your juice.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That's not really my specialty.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I keep my energy consumption to a minimum.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Glad to hear it. I'll do my part, too!

gotsumon.name: Gotsumon
gotsumon.description: An Ore Digimon with powerful defensive abilities, having armored itself using ore data from its surroundings. As spunky, mischievous and ambitious as any young tough guy, Gotsumon leads around groups of low-generation Digimon as it travels the system. It also has a selfish side, and can be a real handful when angered, rampaging like an erupting volcano. The ore data Gotsumon uses for its armor differs depending on where and how it was generated, giving Gotsumon the potential to Digivolve into a number of different forms. Gotsumon's special move is Rock Fist, which shoots extremely hard rocks from its head.

specialSkills.name: Rock Fist
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Earth physical attack at power 25.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Gaia Blaster I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth magic attack at power 50. 90% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What should we do for fun today?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Rock climbing.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Fine with me, but it's gonna hurt if you fall!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Spelunking.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm sick of rocks and boulders, but if you wanna do it, then let's go!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Play tag.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Okay, but you're it!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Go on a date.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: ...Oh, I was just thinkin' that'd be fun, too.

kotemon.name: Kotemon
kotemon.description: A Reptile Digimon that aims to become the greatest swordsman of the Digimon world. Kotemon is a hard worker that silently endeavors to train in unseen areas. It never removes its face protector, so its bare face is a total mystery. Although Kotemon is cowardly and prone to crying, it cares for its friends deeply and has a strong sense of justice, and occasionally even displays a stalwart side. With its special move Hothead, it engulfs its bamboo sword in flames before aiming for the head of its foe.

specialSkills.name: Hothead
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 50.

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 8 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to DEF for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: If you wish to get stronger, I'd be more than happy to train you. What say you?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Train me, please!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That's the spirit! Learn all the techniques you can from me.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: How can I get stronger?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Training is the only way, I'm afraid. Still, strength isn't everything.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I don't feel like training...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Yet training provides such unique insights! Perhaps even a way to read your opponent.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Strength isn't everything.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Well said. As long as those words aren't simply sour grapes.

shoutmon.name: Shoutmon
shoutmon.description: A ferocious Digimon with amazing vigor and extreme aggression. Even so, it's friendly to allies, and those recognized by Shoutmon can establish a deep bond that transcends species. A special function in Shoutmon's throat converts passion into energy, unleashing a Soul Crusher attack that uses a mic to amplify the burning passion in its chest and strike the enemy. Because passion is the source of its strength, Shoutmon won't abandon a battle no matter how much damage it receives, contributing to its savage reputation.

specialSkills.name: Rock Soul
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 40. The lower the user's HP, the greater the damage.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 40. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You wanna hear my song, or what?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Crank it up to eleven.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: All right! I'm gonna shout at full blast! Get ready, or I'll knock ya off your feet!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Use your inside voice, please.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You want a nice li'l listening party, do ya? Okay, I'll burn my ditty into your brain.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: How about a song and a dance?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: If ya insist, then I'll put on a show! A live performance, just for you!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let's make it a duet!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I won't lend ya the mic, but you can sing your heart out! This is our harmony, baby!

dracomon.name: Dracomon
dracomon.description: Dracomon is a Dragon Digimon of an old bloodline said to trace back to the progenitor of all Dramon- species Digimon. It possesses physical capabilities difficult to even imagine given its small size, with its speed and power ranking among the very best of all Rookie Digimon. Though extremely fierce by nature, it also has a softer side it only shows to those it deems worthy of its trust. Despite having wings, they're not fully developed, so Dracomon is unable to fly. One of its other defining characteristics is its drive to collect "shiny things," and it has an odd attachment to gems and certain types of metal. If it's particularly fond of some shiny object, it will eat it. Its special moves include Baby Breath, which it uses to breathe out a blast of hot air.

specialSkills.name: Baby Breath
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 50.

attachmentSkills.name: Ignition Flare I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire physical attack at power 6 x 4 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Idle Bubble
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Sleep.

dorumon.name: Dorumon
dorumon.description: Because of the antiquated interface on its forehead, this Beast Digimon is presumed to be an experimental "Prototype Digimon" from the time before Digimon were discovered. The personality characteristic of the Combat Species is particularly apparent in Dorumon. It has a strong instinct for battle, biting and roaring at anything and everything, though it apparently feels a sense of attachment to something after biting it. The strong life force data of the legendary "dragon" was found to have been hidden in the deepest part of its DigiCore during an experiment, and Dorumon apparently has the potential to grow into a mighty Digimon. Dorumon's special move is Metal Cannon, which fires an iron ball from its mouth.

specialSkills.name: Metal Cannon
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 50.

attachmentSkills.name: Comet Hammer I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 8 x 6 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Lunatic Gate I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Null physical attack at power 25. 90% ACU. 10% CRT Rate.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Don't worry. I don't bite.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'll never forgive you if you do.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: But I don't! Honest! Look. Let's just go bash some bad guys together!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Liar.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm not lying! I only bite enemies.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm not worried.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Good! Because we're friends. Thanks for believing me!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You can bite me if you want.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hey, I never bite my friends. But I suppose I could, if you really wanted me to...

patamon.name: Patamon
patamon.description: A Mammal Digimon known for its large ears. Patamon can use these to fly, but since it can only do so at a little over 0.5 mph, its its walking speed is said to be considerably faster. Even so, watching it struggle to fly is an endearing sight, making it very popular (although Patamon itself doesn't appreciate such sentiment). Patamon is extremely obedient and very good about doing what it's told. It can also use its hidden holy power without a Holy Ring—a sign that it's descended from an Ancient species of Digimon. Patamon's special move is Air Shot, taking a deep breath and then releasing a powerful blast of air.

specialSkills.name: Air Shot
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind magic attack at power 50.

attachmentSkills.name: Holy Light I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 40. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Meditator
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes status abnormalities.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
