postEvolutionDialogue.text: You have to apologize when you do something wrong, and apologize well... right?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That's right.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: ...I knew it. I'd better work up the courage to apologize. Sorry for the weird question.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Did you do something wrong?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: No! ...Well, okay, I guess I do have some regrets. Thanks for making me realize that.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Did someone do something to you?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: No biggie. It's already over and done with. Sorry for worrying you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'll apologize on their behalf.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You sure are nice, aren't you? In that case, I'll go ahead and forgive you.

huckmon.name: Huckmon
huckmon.description: A Mini Dragon Digimon with a cool white sheen. Unfettered and hating shackles, Huckmon's swashbuckling way of life is likely due to the influence of Gankoomon's DNA. It faces the harsh trials imposed by Gankoomon with composure. Huckmon's lineage gives it a keen sense for battle, and training supervised by the Sistermon siblings makes it more than evenly matched in fights against even Ultimate foes. Huckmon specializes in nimble melee combat, using Fifth Rush to cleave the opponent with its tough claws. It pursues its dream to become a Royal Knight like Gankoomon.

specialSkills.name: Fifth Rush
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 14 x 5 hits. 70% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Angel Ladder I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light physical attack at power 25. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Heal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Moderately recovers HP.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Don't treat me like a kid!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: But you are a kid.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: ...I mean, sure, but I've got more passion in my left pinky than a whole adult does!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Then act like an adult, already.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: And what's not adult about me?! ...Oh. Knee-jerk reactions like that, huh?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Cheeky little brat!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: How dare you! Just you wait. I'll get so strong, I'll make you eat those words!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Is that supposed to be cute?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Who said I wanna be cute?! One day, you'll be calling me tough and cool!

palmon.name: Palmon
palmon.description: A Vegetation Digimon with a tropical flower growing on its head. Though it Digivolved from Tanemon in a reptilian fashion, it's a rare type of Digimon classified as a Vegetation Digimon based on its appearance and characteristics. During the day, Palmon opens its flower and leaf-like appendages to enable photosynthesis. Its root-like feet are usually buried in the ground absorbing nutrients, but it can also use them to walk. The flower on Palmon's head gives off a sweet scent when it's happy or enjoying itself and a foul stench when it's angry or feels threatened. The latter is so bad it can send even larger Digimon running. Palmon's special move is Poison Ivy, with which it entangles its foe in highly poisonous vines. Anything hit by this attack is paralyzed.

specialSkills.name: Poison Ivy
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant physical attack at power 45. 20% chance to apply Poison.

attachmentSkills.name: Crescent Leaf I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant physical attack at power 6 x 7 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Idle Bubble
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Sleep.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Even if it's hot and bright, I love me some strong sunshine!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let's shine even brighter!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Yeah, of course! The more Mister Sun shines down on us, the better we'll be!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Sure helps with the photosynthesis, I bet.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Uh-huh. And I hope I make you tons of fresh oxygen to breathe!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: How's your UV protection?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Never you fear about me. Just make sure not to get too much direct sunlight yourself.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Not loving the idea of a sunburn.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You may dread the thought, but not me. All that sun makes for some fine photosynthesis!

floramon.name: Floramon
floramon.description: A rare Digimon that, like Palmon, Digivolved in reptilian fashion but is classified as a Vegetation Digimon. The entirety of Floramon's face is shaped like a flower, and it generally uses this petal-like shell like a helmet to protect its head. When no predators are around, or when in a good mood, it will spread open the petals on its head and arms. Floramon sees Palmon as a rival, and has a very high opinion of itself. Its special move is Rain of Pollen, which releases clouds of allergy-inducing pollen from the flowers on its arms. Anyone hit by this attack—even a large Digimon—will be robbed of both their composure and will to fight.

specialSkills.name: Rain of Pollen
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Plant magic attack at power 20. 20% chance to apply Confusion.

attachmentSkills.name: Thorn Strike I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant magic attack at power 20 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Meditator
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes status abnormalities.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm a little thirsty...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Tough it out!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Okay, time to be tough...! *panting* Now I'm even more thirsty.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Sipping water slowly hydrates you better.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Really? I wish I knew all kinds of stuff like you do.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Yeah, me, too...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Then can we take a break? I'm gonna dry up at this rate.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You can have some of my water.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Th-Thanks... I'll savor every drop.

muchomon.name: Muchomon
muchomon.description: A flightless Bird Digimon that's the spitting image of Penmon. Raised in tropical lands to the south, Muchomon lives a life of constant cheer. It overflows with passion, dances to a samba beat and loves its vivid, richly-colored pelt. Muchomon's special move is Tropical Beak, pecking the opponent with its colorful beak.

specialSkills.name: Tropical Beak
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 15 x 3 hits.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 40. 95% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I picked a bunch of fruit! What color do you wanna eat?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The red one looks like it'll perk me up!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Nice! The spicy red one! I bet you'll be breathing fire in no time!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wonder how the dark purple one tastes.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It sure is a weird color. Never tried it, myself. I always wondered what it tastes like.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let's eat the yellow one together.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It's tasty, but that peel is no joke. Let's try and split that bad boy open together!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'll have the pink, spongy one.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: This fruit's real, real easy to bruise. Handle it gently, okay?

lalamon.name: Lalamon
lalamon.description: A Vegetation Digimon resembling a flower bud, Lalamon drifts through the sky by rotating the leaves on its head. Despite its lack of expression, it has a great deal of charm. Its special move Seed Blast shoots hard seeds from its mouth with a surprising degree of accuracy.

specialSkills.name: Seed Blast
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant physical attack at power 15 x 3 hits. 90% ACU. 10% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Thorn Strike I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant magic attack at power 20 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Crescent Leaf I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant physical attack at power 6 x 7 hits. 95% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: La laaa, la la laaaaa! ♪

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That tune's so inspiring!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Oh, yes! I committed the bravery inside of me to song. I'm glad it resonated with you!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That's an odd little ditty.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I committed the quizzical, inquisitive nature within me to song. La la laaa! ♪

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Such a pleasant melody.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It's my song of friendship! A tune to say everyone should have fun together!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Is that a lullaby?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hoho. Not even close. But if you want one so badly, I'd be happy to croon to you gently.

lunamon.name: Lunamon
lunamon.description: A Mammal Digimon resembling a rabbit, born from the fusion of moon observation data. Its large ears can recognize sounds from any distance. Although timid, Lunamon often gets lonely and easily grows attached to others. It uses its special move Tearing Shot to concentrate power into the antenna on its forehead to shoot a beautiful orb of water at the enemy.

specialSkills.name: Tearing Shot
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water magic attack at power 50.

attachmentSkills.name: Frozen Bullet I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice magic attack at power 40. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Heal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Moderately recovers HP.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hmm? Did you say something just now?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I was cheering you on!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I thought so! Figured you might be talking to someone else... Thanks! Let's do our best!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Just talking to myself.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Yeah? Well, why not talk to me instead? I'm sure you've got tons to teach me.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I didn't say anything.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I thought I heard your voice. My mistake. My hearing works against me sometimes...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I was just saying hello!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I thought so. Appreciate it! I was confident I could pick out your voice. I'm glad I did!

renamon.name: Renamon
renamon.description: A Beast Man Digimon with the appearance of a golden fox. The relationship Renamon has with humans is directly apparent, and its In-Training form can Digivolve into a Digimon of high intelligence if raised properly. Calm and collected at all times, it trains in order to keep its cool in any situation. Renamon's tall, slender form stands out among Rookie Digimon, and it prefers the speed of its many techniques over power when it comes to fighting the enemy. Its special move Diamond Storm hurls razor-sharp wood chips at the enemy.

specialSkills.name: Diamond Storm
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant magic attack at power 50.

attachmentSkills.name: Rune Forest I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Plant magic attack at power 25. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to INT for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Who would you say is a truly strong Digimon?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I couldn't say.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Nor could I, but if I keep on beating strong Digimon, I'm sure I'll figure it out someday.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wouldn't say it was you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That's understandable. This world is full of Digimon I've never laid eyes on, after all.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You, for sure.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Thank you. Having felled strong Digimon and copied their data, I am undoubtably strong.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It could be practically any one of them.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I see. Well, no matter what strong Digimon I end up facing, I hope you will back me up.

lopmon.name: Lopmon
lopmon.description: Lopmon is the Rookie Digivolution of one sibling in a pair of extremely rare twin Digimon. Of the two, Terriermon has one horn growing from its head, while Lopmon has three. Their ecosystem is steeped in mystery, and while their composition is enough to deem them Beast Digimon, nothing else is known about them. Terriermon has a laid-back personality, albeit with a lot of energy, while Lopmon has the opposite disposition, being more of a lonely crybaby. Neither seem like Digimon of the Combat Species, but they do show unexpected power in battle. Lopmon's special move Blazing Ice fires a blast of icy bullets.

specialSkills.name: Blazing Ice
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice magic attack at power 50.

attachmentSkills.name: Gaia Blaster I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth magic attack at power 50. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Lethal Blizzard I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Ice magic attack at power 25. 90% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm... I'm not a crybaby, you know!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're the dictionary definition of one.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I told you I'm not, but you... You...! *sniff* I won't cry, darn it! You hear me?!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Only crybabies say they're not crybabies.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I see. So that's how it is... I'll strike the word from my vocabulary, then, starting now!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: In that case, don't cry.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Okay. I won't cry... I'm not crying right now, am I? That means I'm cured! Right?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Who said you were a crybaby?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Thanks for believing me! I bet no one'd call me that if you'd been around from the get-go.

impmon.name: Impmon
impmon.description: Impmon is a Rookie Digimon that looks like a devil child. It loves to pull pranks, relishing the thought of watching its victims struggle. Rumor has it that whenever Impmon appears, electrical appliances briefly go haywire, so if your screen ever shakes or freezes, it might be because Impmon is pulling a prank. But as much as Impmon delights in mischief and malice, it's not one to meekly bow down before the strong. It puts on a brave face and stands up to them instead. Deep down, it's actually quite lonely. Impmon's signature move is Summon, which calls forth fire and ice elementals.

specialSkills.name: Summon
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null magic attack at power 60.

attachmentSkills.name: Hell Crusher I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark magic attack at power 25. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Ripping Net
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Paralysis.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Anybody who makes fun of me is in for a world of hurt!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That's the wrong attitude to have.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You trying to scold yours truly? Since we're pals, I'll pretend I didn't hear that...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That goes for me, too.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I got ya. I just gotta show you respect, right? You better not poke fun at me, then.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hey, I hold you in high regard!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hehe! So you're picking up what I'm putting down, huh? I guess we'll get along just fine.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let's all just get along with each other.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: All right. Fine—just to make ya look good. Won't even prank nobody or nothing.

otamamon.name: Otamamon
otamamon.description: A larval Digimon whose epidermis has yet to solidify due to it living underwater. Otamamon swims through swamps and rivers upstream of the Net Ocean using its large tail, occasionally clambering onto rocks with its developed forelimbs to do vocal exercises. Unlike those of an average organism, its hind legs are almost completely undeveloped, acting as rudders in the stead of its propulsive tail. Unlike other Rookies, this Digimon's future Digivolution seems quite promising, but it's extremely prone to mutation, so caution is warranted when raising it. Otamamon's special move is Lullaby Bubble, which sends opponents into an eternal slumber.

specialSkills.name: Lullaby Bubble
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water magic attack at power 40. 30% chance to apply Sleep.

attachmentSkills.name: Hydro Water I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water magic attack at power 8 x 5 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Ocean Wave I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Water magic attack at power 25. 90% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What can I do to get better at singing?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Keep practicing, just like you've been doing!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I figured I couldn't improve overnight. Thanks a bunch! I'll keep up the hard work!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Why not go to a concert?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That's a good idea! Hearing others sing is important, too!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'll join you if you wanna practice.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Oh, boy! That's super nice of you! Let's sing a duet, just you and me!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Just sing your heart out!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I see what you mean! Singing's more than just skill. It's heart!

gazimon.name: Gazimon
gazimon.description: A Mammal Digimon with huge, sharp claws. Gazimon is bipedal, an unusual trait for Mammal types. The claws on its front limbs may have developed while it used them like arms, causing Gazimon to rely on its hind legs for ambulation. Despite its small stature, this Digimon has an exceedingly wild temperament, and never even attempts to get along with humans. The claws on Gazimon's forelimbs are extremely effective for attacking, but are also surprisingly well-suited to digging holes. Due to its mischievous nature, it enjoys making pitfalls for other Digimon to fall into. Gazimon's special move is Electric Stun Blast, which belches out a poisonous gas.

specialSkills.name: Electric Stun Blast
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Null physical attack at power 25. 20% chance to apply Paralysis.

attachmentSkills.name: Wind Claw I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind physical attack at power 40. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: No human is ever gonna tame me!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Oh, I'm gonna. Just you wait.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Tough talk. I look forward to seeing you try!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're already tamed.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: N-No, I'm not! Explain to me exactly how it is I'm tamed?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'd never think of trying to.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Ha! I see you get it. You're in for lots of friendly pranks!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I want you to tame me.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Wh-What the...? I didn't expect that. A tame human might not be all that bad, though...

gizamon.name: Gizamon
gizamon.description: A Sea Animal Digimon with fins on its feet with which to paddle through water. Gizamon is more suited to life underwater than on land, using its fins and strong hind legs to swim quickly through aquatic areas. On land, however, it bounces around like a frog. Gizamon acts cowardly on land, but displays a ferocious disposition once back in the water. Its special move is Spiral Edge, which attacks foes with its sharp-edged dorsal fins.

specialSkills.name: Spiral Edge
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 55. 10% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Aqua Pressure I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water physical attack at power 40. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wanna go swimming.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I can't swim.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Then I'll teach you. Might be tough since you don't have fins, though.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Well, I don't.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I figured... But hopping around on land makes me tired, so teach me how to move easier.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let's go!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Uh, really? You do know nobody can beat me in the water, right? I'm not kidding!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Be patient.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I am, because I wanna hang out with you. It's just... everything's way easier in the water!

guilmon.name: Guilmon
guilmon.description: A Digimon resembling a young dinosaur. Although Guilmon is still a Rookie Digimon, it possesses a carnivore's brutality and the great potential as a fighting species that all Digimon naturally possess The mark on its abdomen is called a DIgital Hazard, and is inscribed on any Digimon with the ability to cause serious damage to computer data. Still, if used for the sake of peace, this ability could potentially make this Digimon a guardian of the Digital World. Guilmon can use its signature move Rock Breaker to destroy even stone with its rugged front claws.

specialSkills.name: Rock Breaker
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 45. 10% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wanna dig a hole somewhere.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Do whatever you want.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Okay, then I'm digging a tunnel! I'm gonna try to make it the biggest one yet!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: No digging.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: But I love digging holes... Let me know if there's somewhere okay to dig!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Dig here! Woof!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Woof? I don't make that sound, you know.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Making a new Guilmon lair?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hey, good idea! It can be our secret Guilmon hideout!

goblimon.name: Goblimon
goblimon.description: A Digimon resembling a troublesome imp that loves mischief. Crafty creatures devoid of courage, Goblimon always move in groups, hiding in the shadows of trees or buildings while waiting in ambush. But if the situation goes south, they scatter in all directions, fleeing at full speed. Their intelligence, on the other hand, is above average for Rookie Digimon. Goblimon's special move is Goblin Strike, which hurls fireballs at Mach speed.

specialSkills.name: Goblin Strike
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 40. 100% chance of 30% reduction to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Comet Hammer I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 8 x 6 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm crazy tough, huh? So are all my pals!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're good at running and hiding.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: ...Wh-What?! Maybe you haven't heard, but it takes guts to know when to run for it!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're sneaky.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Say whatever ya want! Me and my pals are just fightin' smart, that's all!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Yeah, maybe.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Then just be glad we're on the same side. I always look out for my friends.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: More like pretty weak.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: If that's what ya think, then keep me safe. I mean, we're pals, right? Right?

shamamon.name: Shamamon
shamamon.description: A Goblimon whose duty it is to hear the will of the gods and convey it to its clan. Shamamon conducts a ritual in which it performs a strange dance, and supposedly hears divine messages once its fervor reaches its peak. Shamamon's clan uses this ritual to foretell matters of import. Shamamon uses its special move Shama Hammer to bonk the enemy on the head with the large club it also uses in its ritual.

specialSkills.name: Shama Hammer
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 50. 100% chance of 20% reduction to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Bind
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 100% chance of 20% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Hell Crusher I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark magic attack at power 25. 90% ACU.

syakomon.name: Syakomon
syakomon.description: A Digimon shaped like a clam and surrounded by a sturdy shell. Its highly developed shell protects what looks like an In-Training Slime. This deceptive Digimon uses its face to lure enemies in before attacking them. Syakomon also boasts a high defense when its shell is closed, repelling small attacks with ease. Its special move Black Pearl Blast fires jadeite formed in its body at the enemy.

specialSkills.name: Black Pearl Blast
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Water physical attack at power 30. 50% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Hydro Water I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water magic attack at power 8 x 5 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to INT for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wonder... What's the most charming thing about me?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Your powerful attacks!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Yeah! I'm so cute, you'd never imagine I could throw down. You really get me, huh!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Your tactics that throw your foes off!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A-yup. Battle starts from your noggin! And I'm all noggin!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That shell that protects my little friend!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Yeah? I thought as much! This shell of mine is pretty fine.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The fact that you're a real cutie patootie!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hehehe... You're embarrassing me, here. Thanks, though.

snowgoblimon.name: SnowGoblimon
snowgoblimon.description: A Goblimon raised in cold, snowy countries. SnowGoblimon wears a warm hat and vest, so cold places are no problem for it, and the skin on the soles of its feet is thick enough to let it traipse over snow without issue. SnowGoblimon's special move is Snow Goblin Volt, which bats rock-filled snowballs at its foe with all the fervor of a demon.

specialSkills.name: Snow Goblin Volt
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice physical attack at power 40. 100% chance of reduction to Ice resistance.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Bind
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 100% chance of 20% reduction to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Diamond Dust I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Ice physical attack at power 6 x 4 hits. 90% ACU.

chuumon.name: Chuumon
chuumon.description: A mouse-like Digimon that's always filling Sukamon's head with shady ideas. Chuumon has a solid friendship with Sukamon (although perhaps it's only Chuumon that sees things that way). The relationship started when Chuumon was nearly caught in a network system trap named "Carnivore," only to be rescued by Sukamon, who just happened to be passing by. Fundamentally a coward, Chuumon is unrivaled in its slyness and takes off like a shot at the slightest hint of danger. Its special move Cheese Bomb hurls a cheese- shaped explosive. Anyone who makes the mistake of eating one of these is in for a nasty surprise.

specialSkills.name: Cheese Bomb
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 40. 30% chance to apply Poison.

attachmentSkills.name: Gaia Blaster I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth magic attack at power 50. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Bind
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 100% chance of 20% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hey, are you happy we're friends now?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm not sure.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What's not to be sure about? I'm not scary. I'll be right here with ya forever.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: No.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: But you look super happy. C'mon. Let's get to know each other better!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A little.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: ...Huh. Do you mean you're a little happy? C'mon. No need to be shy! You can tell me!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I am!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hehe. Then we both like each other. Let's go on a date sometime!

dracmon.name: Dracmon
dracmon.description: Dracmon is the Dark Area's biggest prankster. It won't hesitate to risk life and limb if that means successfully pulling off a prank. One time, for instance, it nearly died when it decided to try to draw doodles on the faces of all Four Sovereign Digimon (whether it succeeded or not is unclear). While technically a vampiric Digimon, rumor has it that lately it's been so absorbed in pulling a prank on the Royal Knights that it's forgotten all about drinking blood. It's also said that anyone that looks directly into the Eye of Nightmares cast from the evil eyes on its palms are subject to its mind control.

specialSkills.name: Eye of Nightmares
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 45. Recovers HP equal to 10% of damage dealt.

attachmentSkills.name: Ripping Net
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Paralysis.

attachmentSkills.name: Soul Fear I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark physical attack at power 25. 90% ACU.

hagurumon.name: Hagurumon
hagurumon.description: A mutant Machine Digimon shaped like a gear. There are also countless other gears built into its body that are constantly turning. If even one gear is removed, all of the others stop spinning and Hagurumon ceases to function. Hagurumon possesses the ability to infect foes with a computer virus that allows it to control them. Thus, Digimon of wicked intent often seek to exploit Hagurumon's powers. But since it lacks any sense of self, it has no way of knowing it's being used for evil. Its special move is Cog Crusher, which implants a black gear loaded with a computer virus into its opponent's body, causing them to go berserk.

specialSkills.name: Cog Crusher
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 50.

attachmentSkills.name: Nanomachine Break I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 10 x 4 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Iron Slash I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Steel physical attack at power 4 x 6 hits. 85% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Gigigi! Gigigigi!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Wait. Does that mean you wanna fight?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Gigigi... While I do like cutting loose sometimes, I've got no beef with you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Isn't that a different sound from usual?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Gigigi... Good for you for noticing. But I just need some exercise, so I was stretching.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Feeling under the weather?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Gigigi! Is that how I look to you? I'm full of vim and vigor, let me tell you!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Are you all right? Pull yourself together!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Gigi, gigigi... I was, uh, just fixing my posture, is all. Sorry to worry you.

demidevimon.name: DemiDevimon
demidevimon.description: A small Digimon resembling a bat. DemiDevimon serves as a familiar to higher-level Digimon like Devimon and Myotismon. Despite its low status, it's rumored to have been responsible for tempting Devimon, once an Angel Digimon, over to the Dark Side. What DemiDevimon lacks in attack power, it makes up for in malicious cunning, and it's always causing trouble somewhere. Fond of darkness and typically in the company of higher-level Digimon, it's rare to see it by itself. DemiDevimon's special move is Demi Darts, which throws giant syringes at the enemy to drain its blood.

specialSkills.name: Demi Darts
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark physical attack at power 25. Recovers HP equal to 15% of damage dealt.

attachmentSkills.name: Shadow Fang I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 20 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Bind
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 100% chance of 20% reduction to ATK for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hey, boss, what can a 'mon do for ya?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Rub my shoulders.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: ...Yeah, okay, just don't blame me if I rub the blood right outta them, though.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What can you even do?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Anything you want. Honest! And underhanded shenanigans—those are my bread and butter!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Go buy me some juice.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: C'mon, boss. That's a little... How about a command worthy of my crafty cunning?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're doing more than enough already.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Don't be like that. Use me and abuse me all ya want. I'm ready and waiting, 24/7!

funbeemon.name: FunBeemon
funbeemon.description: An Insectoid Digimon affiliated with the mysterious Royal Base, a secret floating honey base. While its daily life may differ from that of other Insectoid Digimon, FunBeemon has a cheery disposition and is a hard worker of considerable strength. It always gets along with Vegetation Digimon like Palmon or Lillymon. The Royal Base is under constant construction, and Funbeemon's mission requires it to collect field data such as flowers or plants a little at a time as building materials. It's therefore classified as having the Virus attribute. The base is also guarded by powerful Digimon that prevent any from drawing near, so the purpose of the construction remains a mystery. FunBeemon's special move is Gear Stinger, an attack that fires off a rapid volley of tiny, serrated stingers.

specialSkills.name: Gear Stinger
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 20 x 3 hits.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Rune Forest I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Plant magic attack at power 25. 90% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hey there. Anything I can bee of help with?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Well, could you carry this stuff?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Sure, leave it to me! I'm good at carrying things!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What kind of flower is that?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let's see... Hmm, I don't know! But I'll check around and find out!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Bee my friend!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Huh? But I can't... beecause we're already friends, right?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You help enough just by being here.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Haha! You're so silly. But thanks. I'll always BEE here for you!

betamon.name: Betamon
betamon.description: An Amphibian Digimon that walks on four legs. Betamon is a docile Digimon with a mild temperament, although it doesn't hesitate to unleash its special move Electric Shock when angered, attacking its enemies with over a million volts of electric current.

specialSkills.name: Electric Shock
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 25.

attachmentSkills.name: Hydro Water I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water magic attack at power 8 x 5 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Shock Plasma I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 13 x 3 hits. 95% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: How awesome is my million-volt Electric Shock?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: High-voltage power lines carry 6,600 volts.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: So Electric Shock is stronger, even though power lines are way bigger then me? Wow!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Batteries have 1.5 volts.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hey, so if I wanted to power my move with batteries, how many would I need, huh? Huh?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Lightning is one hundred million volts.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Whoa! Didn't know lightning was that amazing. I got a ways to go... Cheer me on, okay?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: An electrical outlet has one hundred volts.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: So Electric Shock can't help around your house, huh? Don't kick me out, though, okay?

mushroomon.name: Mushroomon
mushroomon.description: A small Vegetation Digimon in the shape of a poisonous mushroom. Tiny but potent poisonous mushroom bombs growing from Mushroomon's body cause all kinds of afflictions. Anyone hit by one of these bombs could start laughing uncontrollably, have their body go numb, lose their memory, or worse. Mushroomon is extremely ill-tempered and enjoys picking on the weak, but also has a shy side, always hiding half of its face. Its special move is Fungus Crusher, scattering multiple mini-mushroom bombs at once.

specialSkills.name: Fungus Crusher
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Plant physical attack at power 20. 30% chance to apply Poison.

attachmentSkills.name: Crescent Leaf I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant physical attack at power 6 x 7 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Texture Blow
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Crystallization.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What kind of prank should I pull next?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: If you're gonna prank, then prank fair!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The heck does that even mean? Though, hmm... Maybe you're onto something there.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What kind of pranks have you pulled so far?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You wanna know? Then lemme give you the rundown.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Wanna have a strategy session about it?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hehehe. Oh, you're baaad! I dig it. Let's give it a nice, long think.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You can prank me, but only me.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: How weird, wanting to get pranked. But if you insist, I'll go crazy with it.

armadillomon.name: Armadillomon
armadillomon.description: A Mammal Digimon clad head-to-toe in a sturdy carapace. It is easy-going and courteous, but it sometimes pushes its luck. Armadillomon is a descendant of the same ancient species as Veemon, so it can perform a special Armor Digivolution. It uses its special move Diamond Shell to launch its curled-up body at the enemy.

specialSkills.name: Diamond Shell
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 45. 100% chance of 20% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Awesome Quake I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Earth magic attack at power 35. 85% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm hungry.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Eating too much is bad for you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Mind your own business!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A balanced diet is important.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: And quantity is better than quality.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Wanna munch on something together?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That'd be great!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Want some ChuuChuu Jelly?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Now you're talkin'! You know what I like.

veemon.name: Veemon
veemon.description: A new type of Digimon only recently discovered. Veemon is a surviving member of a species that once thrived in the dawn of the Digital World. This allows it to use Digi-Eggs to perform a type of pseudo-Digivolution known as Armor Digivolution. Of all its peers, Veemon is one of the best Combat Species. It possesses hidden power, and uses Armor Digivolution to bring out its explosive abilities. Though a troublemaker and a prankster by nature, Veemon also has a strong sense of justice. Its special move is Veemon Headbutt, which knocks down foes with a powerful blow with the top of its head.

specialSkills.name: Veemon Headbutt
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 45. 30% chance to apply Confusion.

attachmentSkills.name: Wind Claw I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind physical attack at power 40. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to DEF for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wanna do more for you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Get even stronger, then.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're right. First, I've gotta get stronger and Digivolve!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I don't wanna depend on others too much.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You being so brave like that just makes me wanna help you more.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Just you saying that is more than enough.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm glad you and I are friends!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're doing just fine now.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Okay, then I'm gonna keep going with my training, so just you watch!

hawkmon.name: Hawkmon
hawkmon.description: A calm, collected and extremely courteous Bird Digimon. Just like Veemon, it's a descendant of a unique species that prospered in ancient times, and can borrow the power of the Digi-Eggs for armored pseudo-Digivolution. Hawkmon uses its special move Feather Slash to throw the feather ornament on its head like a boomerang.

specialSkills.name: Feather Slash
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind physical attack at power 50.

attachmentSkills.name: Power Energy I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null magic attack at power 40. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What would you do if you met someone in trouble?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'd help them, of course!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Wonderful! I feel I would do the same.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'd ask what's bothering them.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Indeed, if we knew the cause, then perhaps we could do something to help.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'd try and cheer them up.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: We all get troubled from time to time. It is no wonder you would like to comfort them.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'd give them a hug!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: S-Such extreme measures...! Still, I suppose that would most easily convey your intent...

wormmon.name: Wormmon
wormmon.description: A Larva Digimon with a timid, cowardly personality. Wormmon is a descendant of the same ancient species as Veemon, so it can perform a special Armor Digivolution. Exceedingly weak on its own, Wormmon stands little chance against larger Digimon. But with the power of the Digi-Eggs, it can Armor Digivolve and display incredible power. Like a larva maturing into an adult, Wormmon will one day Digivolve into a Champion of great might. This Digimon is the very embodiment of future potential. It uses its special move Sticky Net to shoot viscous webs that bind the enemy.

specialSkills.name: Sticky Net
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant physical attack at power 40. 100% chance of 50% reduction to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Thorn Strike I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant magic attack at power 20 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Rune Forest I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Plant magic attack at power 25. 90% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Say, what do ya wanna do when ya grow up?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wanna try all sorts of challenges!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Yeah, hard to choose just one, huh? Best to have lots of dreams!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wanna learn all kinds of things!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I see! I got plenty to learn, too. I oughta follow yer example!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wanna make all sorts of friends!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A buncha friends, huh? Sure would be nice. Of course, you and me are already friends!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wanna be with you, even when we're all grown up!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: ...Heck yeah–and ya will! No matter what happens, we'll always be pals!

keramon.name: Keramon
keramon.description: Keramon is a Rookie Digimon that Digivolved from Tsumemon. Now that its body has grown larger and its mouth is bigger, it can devour more data. Keramon is capable of consuming more than 100 megabytes per second, and most data is destroyed the instant Keramon accesses it. Extremely playful by nature, it thinks of its destructive acts as a kind of game. Its special move is Crazy Giggle, with which it unleashes a highly destructive beam of light from its mouth as it laughs—if you can call it laughing.

specialSkills.name: Crazy Giggle
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 50.

attachmentSkills.name: Venom Trap
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Poison.

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Bind
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 100% chance of 20% reduction to INT for 3 turn(s).

aegiomon.name: Aegiomon
aegiomon.description: A Deity Digimon with the upper body of a human and the lower body of a mountain goat. Aegiomon is usually affiliated with the same musical troupe as Sirenmon, reveling in the music by playing the Syrinx flute hanging from his waist. He loves peace, and although he dislikes fighting, an unknown quantity of power dwells within him, and he demonstrates exceptional combat prowess when fighting to protect something he cares about. Aegiomon plays Attract Echo on his Syrinx to draw the listener's attention, stealing its sense of self and making it unable to see anything but Aegiomon as it remains fixated on the tune. This gives other Digimon the chance to escape or pursue said listener. Aegiomon's special move is Stun Beat Blow, which strikes the opponent and discharges the electricity in Aegiomon's body through his arms, numbing the enemy's nerves and rendering it unable to move.

specialSkills.name: Stun Beat Blow
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 60. 20% chance to apply Paralysis. Increased damage to targets with Titan Trait.

specialSkills.name: Attract Echo
specialSkills.description: [Target: User] Applies Taunting. 100% chance of 30% boost to EVA for 1 turn.

attachmentSkills.name: Wind Claw I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind physical attack at power 40. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Heal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Moderately recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: Shock Plasma II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 20 x 3 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Thunder Fall II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 12 x 3 hits. 90% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Make sure you look after me, okay? Otherwise, I just might have to play my pipes here...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Wanna try controlling me with them?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I dunno... For some reason, I get the feeling it wouldn't work...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What do they sound like?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Actually... I don't know. Everyone hears them differently.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Don't worry. I'll watch over you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: ...Yeah, you're right. I know you'll take good care of me.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're all I care about.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Even without playing my pipes...? Wow, thanks! I'll take good care of you, too.

ikkakumon.name: Ikkakumon
ikkakumon.description: A Sea Beast Digimon discovered in a computer at an arctic research facility. Ikkakumon's thick pelt and sturdy body are made to withstand polar temperatures. The sharp horn growing from its head is made of Mithril, a rare metal, and the skin beneath its pelt is just as hard. Ikkakumon's clawed limbs are capable of emitting blistering heat at will. As a result, Ikkakumon can always maintain a firm foothold when walking on ice, even if unable to move quickly. In combat, Ikkakumon will threaten opponents with a bold roar, much like a lion's. Its special move is Harpoon Torpedo, with which it fires the horn on its head at the enemy, as the horn can be regrown.

specialSkills.name: Harpoon Torpedo
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 75.

attachmentSkills.name: Icicle Edge II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice physical attack at power 30 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Heal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Moderately recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: Hydro Water II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water magic attack at power 12 x 5 hits. 95% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Say, am I really that chubby?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're pretty plump, yeah.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm not exactly fast, sure, but plump? It's just a little bulk for my Harpoon Torpedo.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Who said you were fat?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I knew it! If anything, I'm slimming down. I've got a lot of stress, you know.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're still the same as ever.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Right? Thanks! That's a relief. It's such a weight off my mind. I'm even feeling peckish.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Couldn't really say, myself.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're my friend, so keep a close eye on me, okay? Warn me if I start ballooning up.

airdramon.name: Airdramon
airdramon.description: A Mythical Beast Digimon with gigantic wings. Airdramon is an exceptionally valuable monster, thought to be near in stature to a god. It specializes in aerial combat, invoking storms with its roar and creating colossal whirlwinds by flapping its wings. Though quite vicious by nature, Airdramon is also very intelligent. Nevertheless, any average Tamer would find it nearly impossible to control. Airdramon beats its huge wings to unleash a cutting vacuum blade with its special move Spinning Needle.

specialSkills.name: Spinning Needle
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Wind magic attack at power 40.

attachmentSkills.name: Tempest I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Wind physical attack at power 25. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Bind
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 100% chance of 20% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Would you like me to give you a ride somewhere?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Take me somewhere I've never been before.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You feel that much at ease with me, do you...? I'll consider it, then.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wanna go somewhere far away.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You and I have different ideas of what far" is, so we should probably define that first."

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I don't wanna go anywhere.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Perhaps I was mistaken. But you should know that flying feels wonderful.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I don't want a ride.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Well, if the day ever comes that you need my aid, all you need to do is ask.

angemon.name: Angemon
angemon.description: An Angel Digimon with six shining wings and a body clad in divine white cloth. This being of absolute goodness is said to bring happiness. Angemon remains utterly composed in the face of evil, attacking relentlessly until its foe is annihilated. Legend has it that Angemon has often descended at the head of a host of other Digimon of the same species when the Digital World was in crisis. It's also said that Devimon, who was lured to the Dark Side, was originally of the same species. Angemon's special move is Heaven's Knuckle, with which it pummels its foe with a shining fist of gold.

specialSkills.name: Heaven's Knuckle
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 65. 100% chance of 20% reduction to SPI for 3 turn(s). Increased damage to targets with Evil Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Heal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Moderately recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: Saint Knuckle II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 30 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Meditator
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes status abnormalities.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I will not allow even the smallest of misdeeds to go unpunished.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Sorry for stealing your snacks.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I applaud you for having the courage to confess. However, never do it again.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Can't you give me a pass?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: If you can exercise guile, you should never have dabbled in wickedness to begin with.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Sorry about all the farts.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: ...Please do not bother me with such banal antics.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: My conscience is clean.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: And this is why you of all humans have my trust. Most admirable.

kabuterimon.name: Kabuterimon
kabuterimon.description: Even for a newly-discovered Digimon, Kabuterimon is highly unusual. Though it's unclear how it came to be an Insectoid type, it's understood to have the power of an ant and the defense system of a beetle. As you would expect from an insect, it only thinks about survival, and has no other intelligence whatsoever. Hostile toward Virus Digimon, Kabuterimon attacks on sight without mercy. Its head is made of metal, granting it impregnable defense. Its special move is Electro Shocker.

specialSkills.name: Electro Shocker
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 60. If target is Virus: 50% chance to apply Paralysis. Increased damage to targets with Insectoid Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Crescent Leaf II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant physical attack at power 9 x 7 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Shock Plasma II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 20 x 3 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Character Reversal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy or ally] 100% chance to apply Reverse.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Tell me. What I need to live long?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The courage to live on.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Courage... No understand the heart. But my chest... warm. This, courage?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The knowledge to survive.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Knowledge... I lack. That why I so curious, I think.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Friends who help each other.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Help each other... Taught me, you did. So important... friends are.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A loving heart.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Love... That hard. Teach me more. Me, still much to learn.

gargomon.name: Gargomon
gargomon.description: A Beast Man Digimon that is Digivolved from Terriermon, it's a special Hunter Digimon. Faster than its appearance suggests, Gargomon brings down its foes with unparalleled accuracy and precision. Its powerful legs let it jump high into the air, at which point it spreads its ears to glide. Cheerful by nature, Gargomon may lose control once angered. It's obsessed with its beloved "D-VI'S 503xx" jeans. It uses its special move Dumdum Uppercut to get close to the enemy and thrust up from below with its Gatling Arm.

specialSkills.name: Dumdum Uppercut
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 65. 100% chance of 10% reduction to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Meditator
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes status abnormalities.

attachmentSkills.name: Thunder Fall I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 8 x 3 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 12 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Which is faster, running or flying?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Both are fast.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I feel the same way. I want to get good at both so I don't have to worry about choosing.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I couldn't say.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Okay, then take notes next time I run and next time I fly and let's compare.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Running is faster.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'd win a race against you... But just running together sounds like it'd be fun.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Flying is faster.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It seems that way since you can't fly, but slow is better when hanging out in the sky.

garurumon.name: Garurumon
garurumon.description: A wolf-like Beast Digimon with a pale silver pelt. Garurumon's fur is said to be as hard as the legendary rare metal Mithril, and the blades extending from its shoulders are sharp enough to slice through anything they touch. Possessed of a physique honed in the frozen tundra and a fierce instinct for conflict, Garurumon is feared by other Digimon for its predatory agility and unerring accuracy in bringing down its prey. However, it's also incredibly intelligent and steadfastly loyal to any it acknowledges as its leader. Garurumon uses its special move Fox Fire to breathe out a stream of intense blue flames.

specialSkills.name: Fox Fire
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 70.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Icicle Edge II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice physical attack at power 30 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Am I cool or what? I hear there's different types of coolness, though, so what kind am I?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The wild kind of cool.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hehehe... I knew it! And I'm going to show everyone I don't just look wild, I AM wild!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The smart kind of cool.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Well, I'll be. You're really observant. My true charm is in how much I know!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The reliable kind of cool.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The cool have a different kind of heart, huh? Don't worry. I'll never turn on you!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The lovable kind of cool.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: L-Lovable...? Ugh, come on! Here I am, all embarrassed, but my tail won't stop wagging!

ginryumon.name: Ginryumon
ginryumon.description: A Beast Dragon Digimon with sturdy Japanese-style armor covering its whole body. Ginryumon is lighter than it appears, drifting gracefully through the air and fighting while parrying enemy attacks with its smooth and extremely tough armor. It has the courage to fend off enemy attacks with its own body, and the insight to accurately perceive said attacks right before they land. Ginryumon specializes in attacks with outstanding penetrative ability, and is unflinching in the face of any enemy Digimon. Because of the antiquated interface on its forehead, this Digimon is presumed to be the Digivolution of an experimental "Prototype Digimon." Ginryumon's special move is Metal Armor Blade, which impales its foe with an iron lance launched from its mouth.

specialSkills.name: Metal Armor Blade
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 65. 10% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Warrior Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Hate Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Taunting.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

grizzlymon.name: Grizzlymon
grizzlymon.description: Grizzlymon is a Beast Digimon that might seem ferocious thanks to its large frame, not to mention its deadly claws and fangs, but it has the honest and straightforward spirit of a true martial artist. It has the combat sense to match, too, relying not only on attacks but moving with a speed that belies its great bulk to avoid and deflect enemy strikes as well. Grizzlymon never starts a fight, but when angered it will draw itself up onto its hind legs and lash out with its heavyweight bear claws, "Kumazume." Grizzlymon's strength is such that just with this one strike it can critically injure most Digimon. Apparently, WaruMonzaemon wears its Bear Claw in imitation of this attack. Grizzlymon's greatest special move, Maul Attack, turns the force of an enemy's move against it, striking where it's vulnerable to defeat it in a single blow.

specialSkills.name: Maul Attack
specialSkills.description: [Target: User] Activates Counter Physical. Upon receiving a physical attack, counters with a Null physical attack at power 85.

attachmentSkills.name: Comet Hammer II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 11 x 6 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Gaia Blaster II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth magic attack at power 70. 90% ACU.

greymon.name: Greymon
greymon.description: A Dinosaur Digimon with skin hardened into a protective carapace around its skull. Aggressive by nature, Greymon uses its sharp claws and colossal horns as lethal weapons. Taming it earns you an intelligent ally of unmatched strength. Its special move is Mega Flame, with which it shoots searing flames from its mouth, incinerating all.

specialSkills.name: Mega Flame
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire physical attack at power 40.

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Magma Fall II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're always real good to me. Hehe. Guess that means you're a fan of mine!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Acting too full of yourself will make me mad.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Ooh, sooo scary! But this isn't what you're really like when you're mad, is it?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: But what if I have some ulterior motive?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Huh? I didn't think about that... Hmm. Why exactly are you so good to me?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Y-You've got the wrong idea.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hehe. Well, I'll leave it at that... But no reason not to do my best for my partner!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Yeah, you're awesome!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Uh, yeah... Thanks. It's kinda embarrassing when you just come out and say it like that.

coredramon-blue.name: Coredramon (Blue)
coredramon-blue.description: Coredramon with blue bodies are said to have Digivolved from Dracomon that ate lots of Blue Diamante, a precious gem that can only be mined from mountainous regions with the highest of peaks. Coredramon (Blue) has developed strong wings to survive amid the steep slopes, and is capable of flying at great speed. Its special move is Blue Flare Breath, with which it breathes out scorching blue flames. Blue Flare Breath breaks down a foe's surface texture data, leaving the DigiCore of a Digimon hit by this move exposed and open to attack.

specialSkills.name: Blue Flare Breath
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 65. 100% chance of 10% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s). Increased damage to targets with Pixie Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Magma Fall I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire magic attack at power 25. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Character Reversal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy or ally] 100% chance to apply Reverse.

geogreymon.name: GeoGreymon
geogreymon.description: A unique Digimon thought to be a subspecies of Greymon. GeoGreymon sports a deadlier frame than ever, with the shell on its head as well as its entire body having developed into living weapons. It can charge up a Mega Flame in its mouth to maximize its destructive power and then unleash it as a Mega Burst.

specialSkills.name: Mega Burst
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 70.

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Hate Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Taunting.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I want to come up with a new skill. What do you think it should be?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A brave, head-on, ramming attack!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: So just charge in without looking? That'll take some courage... but I like it!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A weak point attack that hits where it hurts!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That means finding the enemy's weakness... Another reminder of why it pays to be smart.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A partner attack where we strike together!
