postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You mean, you attacking with me?! Our friendship would give me even more power!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Never be reckless! An ironclad guard move!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're suggesting some defense instead of only attacks? That's real nice of you...

strikedramon.name: Strikedramon
strikedramon.description: A "Commando Dragon" that seeks to become a Virus Buster. While Strikedramon still has many vestiges of Monodramon, such as the horn jutting out of the back of its head, it has so transformed its appearance into a Commando-Mode Digimon covered in metal plating that it now resembles a completely different species. Despite being an inherently kindhearted Digimon, should it happen upon a Virus-attribute type, Strikedramon becomes consumed by an instinct to exterminate and doesn't stop fighting until its opponent's data has been reduced to dust. It uses its special move Fang Strike to heat its metal plating to red-hot levels, turning itself into a mass of flame and tackling the opponent in a fearsome maneuver.

specialSkills.name: Fang Strike
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 65. 100% chance of 20% reduction to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 12 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Full Metal Pile II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Steel magic attack at power 35. 85% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

snimon.name: Snimon
snimon.description: An experimental Digimon built in a laboratory as a Virus Hunter. Made of praying mantis data, Snimon chases after its target with machine-like precision. Its cold personality makes it feared by both Vaccine and Data-attribute types alike. The scythes on Snimon's arms are sharpened to points, allowing this Digimon to cleave cleanly through anything. It has no eyes, but the red feelers on its head act as sensors to accurately track the target's position. Snimon's special move is Shadow Sickle, which unleashes a supersonic slash invisible to the naked eye.

specialSkills.name: Shadow Sickle
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 60. Always hits. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Needle Plant I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Plant physical attack at power 4 x 6 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Crescent Leaf II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant physical attack at power 9 x 7 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Bind
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 100% chance of 20% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

zubaeagermon.name: ZubaEagermon
zubaeagermon.description: "I am the Twentiest! I won't stop! I'll keep on running!" With those words emblazoned on its soul, Zubamon Digivolved to ZubaEagermon. Its new form perfectly embodies that spirit, and ZubaEagermon is committed to constantly forging ahead, over good terrain and bad, even if it's reduced to a crawl. Its special move is Vantheon, with which it curls up into a ball and spins, slicing through enemies with the blade on its tail. In its sword form, which it's quite proud of, it cuts its way through any foe with all of its strength.

specialSkills.name: Vantheon
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 30 x 2 hits. 20% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Humanoid Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

sorcermon.name: Sorcermon
sorcermon.description: A companion of Wizardmon from the other-dimensional Digital World of Witchelny. Sorcermon uses the magics of light and ice (advanced programming languages), and also has the ability to heal wounds with the holy power of prayer. Its special move is Crystal Cloud, with which it summons storm clouds from a wand topped with crystallized ice in order to cause a massive blizzard.

specialSkills.name: Crystal Cloud
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice magic attack at power 70. Increased damage to targets with Magic Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Holy Light II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Revive
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Revives from KO and moderately recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: Shine Burst II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

gatomon.name: Gatomon
gatomon.description: A Digimon brimming with curiosity who loves to pull pranks. Gatomon may be small, but it's still a rare sacred Digimon whose appearance belies its true power. It wears its Holy Ring on its tail, proving that it's a holy Digimon, although it will lose some of its power if it ever loses this ring. Besides the Holy Ring, to protect itself, Gatomon also wears gloves with long, sharp claws copied from the data of SaberLeomon. Gatomon's special move Lightning Paw uses its claws to attack the opponent.

specialSkills.name: Lightning Paw
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 70. 50% chance to apply Confusion.

attachmentSkills.name: Holy Light II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Dispel
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes stat debuffs.

attachmentSkills.name: Revive
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Revives from KO and moderately recovers HP.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I want you to make full use of the power of my Holy Ring.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'd rather not use it if I don't have to.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You probably wouldn't have to if things stay peaceful—but that's an even taller order.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wouldn't even know how to use it.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Don't worry. I'll teach you the ins and outs of the whole thing.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Thanks. I bet it'll be very useful.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm glad! It's important to have each other's backs.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Just make sure you don't lose it!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Thanks. But if things ever get dicey, I know you'll be there to protect me.

dobermon.name: Dobermon
dobermon.description: Originally a Virus-attribute type, Dobermon is a Hunter Digimon that changed into a Vaccine type as a result of mutation. Like Snimon, however, it remains quite vicious despite its Vaccine status, living only to hunt down Virus Digimon. Dobermon is beyond the control of the average Tamer. Its special move is Grau Lärm, with which it lets out a howl that prevents its opponents from using their abilities.

specialSkills.name: Grau Lärm
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to SPI for 3 turns. 50% chance to apply Crystallization.

attachmentSkills.name: Shadow Fang II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 30 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Nightmare II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Ripping Net
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Paralysis.

birdramon.name: Birdramon
birdramon.description: A Giant Bird Digimon wreathed in blazing flames. Like Meramon, whose body is also shrouded in crimson flames, Birdramon is a Digimon formed from the Internet's defensive Firewall. Birdramon flies through the sky using its massive wings. Despite not having a combative nature, Birdramon nevertheless launches frenzied counterattacks in the face of enemy assaults. Birdramon's special move is Meteor Wing, flapping its wings to send feathers shooting down like meteors.

specialSkills.name: Meteor Wing
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire magic attack at power 40.

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Bind
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 100% chance of 20% reduction to INT for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Burst Flame II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire magic attack at power 12 x 5 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Revive
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Revives from KO and moderately recovers HP.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Is there anything I can do for you?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Share some of your intensity with me.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Intensity comes from within, so that's a task only you can complete.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wanna learn how to be calm like you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Do I look calm to you? I'm merely thinking of what I can do before the battle begins.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let me ride on you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wouldn't mind, but your posterior would catch fire. It may be better to grab my legs.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wanna be with you forever.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Any strong desire is bound to come true. I shall remain with you until the end of time.

firamon.name: Firamon
firamon.description: A Beast Digimon known as the "Soaring Lion." Firamon is a helpful leader among Digimon that protects certain ruins in the Digital World. Its special move is Flame Dive, with which it envelops its body in flames and dive-bombs the enemy from the skies above.

specialSkills.name: Flame Dive
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 70. Increased damage to targets with Ice Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Shine Burst II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

veedramon.name: Veedramon
veedramon.description: A mythical Ancient Digimon that, even in the vast expanse of the Digital World, is said to have only existed on the Folder Continent. Veedramon is extremely valuable to Digimon Tamers and rarely encountered, even on the Folder Continent. It's said that only one Tamer has ever been able to win this Digimon over. Other than the V-shaped mark on its chest, for which it's named, not much is known about Veedramon or its surrounding ecosystem. It's sometimes mistaken for a dog for some reason. It has extraordinary attacking power for a Champion Digimon, exhibiting strength even outstripping that of an Ultimate when the chips are down. It uses its special move V-Nova Blast to shoot out a high-temperature heat ray from its mouth.

specialSkills.name: V-Nova Blast
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 70.

attachmentSkills.name: Heal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Moderately recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: Wind Claw II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The mark on my chest looks like a V," doesn't it? What do you think it stands for?"

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Valor.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Whoa, how friggin' cool is that?! I'd better make sure to live up to this V" in combat!"

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Victory.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Victory,

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Virtue.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That's right! And that means I'll never abandon you. You can count on me!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Vitality.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Vitality? Yeah! I'll always put my vitality to work for you!

buraimon.name: Buraimon
buraimon.description: A Bird Man Digimon Digivolved through continuous training with the sword. This led to acquiring mastery over wielding two blades. Buraimon roams the Digital World to continue its training and also serves as a bodyguard, relying on its honed skills. Seemingly willing to take on any job for a reward, it's often treated as a thug. In reality, it's a gentle soul that never takes a job that hurts the weak. Buraimon's special move is Dual Swallow Reversal, a cross slash performed quickly with two swords to slice down a foe.

specialSkills.name: Dual Swallow Reversal
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 30 x 2 hits. Always hits.

attachmentSkills.name: Heal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Moderately recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: Meditator
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes status abnormalities.

attachmentSkills.name: Shine Burst II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

peckmon.name: Peckmon
peckmon.description: A Bird Digimon with powerful legs that runs faster than it can fly. Peckmon uses its special move Kunai Wing to hurl steel feathers it keeps under its wings.

specialSkills.name: Kunai Wing
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Steel physical attack at power 30. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 12 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Wind Claw II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Running is WAY faster than flying, I tell you!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Those are some sturdy legs you've got.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Yep, you know it. I can run the whole day away, no problem. No one can beat me!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That's not true.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You'll get it once you see me run. Heck, maybe I'll even give you a ride.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Running must feel great.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It sure does. Flying along the ground is the best! Join me. You'll see what I mean.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I bet flying feels even better.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Flying's cool and all, but I'll take a good run any day. Join me on the road sometime!

mojyamon.name: Mojyamon
mojyamon.description: A hairy Rare Animal Digimon covered in a thick white coat. It lives in remote snowy regions, making sightings quite rare. In spite of the various reports of Mojyamon encounters, no evidence has confirmed its existence, and so for a long time this Digimon has been considered to be a mere fantasy. Mojyamon is a gentle creature that never shows any hostility, but even so, it treats its den and territory as sacred grounds, and doesn't forgive any who invade its holy land. It hurls a massive icicle formed instantly from water in the atmosphere with its special move Icicle Rod.

specialSkills.name: Icicle Rod
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice physical attack at power 70.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Frozen Bullet II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I hear they call me a Rare Animal Digimon." What's so rare about me?"

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: People don't run into you all that often.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You can meet me anytime in the hinterland! Though it might be too harsh for you humans.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: No one knows where you live.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Deep in the snowy mountains. But it's sacred ground, so don't go trampling around.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Nothing I can think of.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Makes sense. After all, I met all of you, and now we're friends!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're a cool, curious find!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're making me blush under all this fur. Don't worry, though. I won't run and hide.

frigimon.name: Frigimon
frigimon.description: An Ice-Snow Digimon whose body is covered in snow and ice crystals. In spite of its chilly appearance, Frigimon actually has a warm and gentle personality. This Digimon calms the hearts of those who observe it through its sweet gestures and calm movements. Frigimon itself hates the idea of fighting, and is ill-suited to other Digimon who enjoy combat—Meramon in particular. It unleashes its special move Sub-zero Ice Punch from its sizable frame.

specialSkills.name: Sub-Zero Ice Punch
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Ice physical attack at power 40.

attachmentSkills.name: Frozen Bullet II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Texture Blow
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Crystallization.

attachmentSkills.name: Spell Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Magic.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I want to invite everyone out to my snow hut!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'd love to live with you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're more than welcome! Just don't catch a cold. It's a bit chilly for humans out there.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'll go for sure!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I hope you get to see what I love about living in a world of ice and snow.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I think I'll pass.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Can't stand the cold, huh? I'd better warm up the inside of my hut, then.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Don't you get cold there?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm fine, of course! Besides, my heart's filled with warmth when I'm with you.

unimon.name: Unimon
unimon.description: A Mythical Beast Digimon based on mythical creatures of legend, with the wings of Pegasus and the horn of a unicorn. It travels across the Net in the blink of an eye with the large wings on its back, and stabs foes with the sharp horn on its forehead. A "wild" Unimon is as hot-blooded as any untamed horse, but once trained, the Tamer can handle it with ease. Its special move is Holy Shot, which belches an energy bomb from its large mouth.

specialSkills.name: Holy Shot
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 70. Increased damage to targets with Mythical Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Heal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Moderately recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: Meditator
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes status abnormalities.

attachmentSkills.name: Shine Burst II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let's travel around the world together!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wouldn't be able to keep up.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Don't be a scaredy-cat! Besides, I can help you if you fall behind.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Can humans fly, too?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Not unassisted, no. But with the right knowledge, anything is possible.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'd love to be able to fly.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Impossible without wings. Luckily, you have me to act as your wings.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let's go right away!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It isn't that simple. We can't let our excitement get the better of us, here.

raptordramon.name: Raptordramon
raptordramon.description: An Android Digimon modeled after a feral Digimon with predatory instincts that enable it to reliably bring down prey. Raptordramon boasts an incredibly tough body as well as uncontrollable savagery, and so it has been remodeled with pure Chrondigizoid Metal of considerable weight to restrict its mobility. Nevertheless, it still possesses exceptional explosive power and flight capabilities, largely due to the feral Digimon it used to be prior to remodeling. Though small, Raptordramon is capable of taking down even ultra-large Digimon in a single blow if it can gradually unlock its abilities. It performs its special move Ambush Crunch by pouncing on the enemy and biting vitals with its sharp fangs.

specialSkills.name: Ambush Crunch
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 65. 100% chance of 10% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Nanomachine Break II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 15 x 4 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

deputymon.name: Deputymon
deputymon.description: A Mutant Digimon with a gun barrel for a body. Though the particulars of its genesis are completely unknown, Deputymon's sense of justice makes it an active member of the Virus Busters, special Digimon among Vaccine-attribute types with the ability to eradicate and delete the "evil" will of Virus Digimon. It also loves gambling—especially Russian roulette—and its fairness is beyond reproach, allowing even Virus Digimon to get away if they win at this game. Deputymon's special move is Justice Bullet, which transforms Deputymon itself into a gun that unleashes a justice-imbued round.

specialSkills.name: Justice Bullet
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 70. Increased damage to targets with Humanoid Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Full Metal Pile I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Steel magic attack at power 25. 85% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Sonic Shot II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

leomon.name: Leomon
leomon.description: This Beast Man Digimon is known as the "King of Beasts," and also the "Noble Hero." Standing out amidst the many savage Digimon out there, Leomon possesses both strength of will as well as a sense of justice, which it has wielded to defeat scores of villains. It has a rival in the "Digimon Hunter" Ogremon, which devotes itself entirely to acts of destruction. Leomon hones its formidable physique with daily training so that it can withstand all attacks, and it kills foes with its ultimate technique, the special move Fist of the Beast King. From Leomon's waist hangs Shishiou-maru, the Beast Sword with a will of its own.

specialSkills.name: Fist of the Beast King
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 70.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Hate Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Taunting.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

reppamon.name: Reppamon
reppamon.description: A Digimon resembling a kamaitachi—a mythical weasel-like creature—with a blade for a tail. This tail moves with a will of its own, allowing Reppamon to handle even surprise attacks from the rear. That will doesn't always line up with Reppamon's, though, so this Digimon has been observed quarreling with its own tail during battle. Reppamon enjoys combat in wooded areas, making good use of its claws and tail to climb nimbly among the trees. Thus, one must exercise considerable caution when battling Reppamon in wooded areas. Its special move Rolling Tackle is a forward-rolling charge.

specialSkills.name: Rolling Tackle
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 30 x 2 hits. 10% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Vegetation Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Shine Burst I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 25. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Saint Knuckle II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 30 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Curse Barrier
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Status Abnormality Immunity.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hey, pal! Where are you looking?! Over here! The tail is the one that's Reppamon!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Not the head part?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Wrong! I'm the one that cuts and cleaves. The head is just spineless window dressing!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The tail? Isn't that part just the blade?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That just the blade" part you so glibly refer to is me, Reppamon! Get it straight!"

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Whatever. It's all the same to me.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Look. I'm just a tail, with a body and head hanging off me like a tail. Get it?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Aren't both of you Reppamon, a 2-in-1 deal?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hey, if it were up to me, I'd just cut the other part off. But, sure. Have it your way.

icemon.name: Icemon
icemon.description: A Digimon with a body made of ice. Icemon's origins are currently being researched. Perhaps it Digivolved from Gotsumon, or maybe it's some sort of mutation. Its special move Iceball Bomb involves throwing ice-cold frozen bombs at foes.

specialSkills.name: Iceball Bomb
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Ice physical attack at power 15 x 2 hits.

attachmentSkills.name: Icicle Edge II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice physical attack at power 30 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Hate Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Taunting.

wizardmon.name: Wizardmon
wizardmon.description: A high-level Wizard Digimon from the Digital World of another dimension. In its home Digital World of Witchelny, it mastered the magics of fire and earth (advanced programming languages) and aims to become a great mage, but has first come to the Digimon World for training. Wizardmon is a little mischievous but also shy and always keeps its face hidden. Its special move is Thunder Cloud, which conjures up a storm cloud to launch a powerful lightning attack.

specialSkills.name: Thunder Cloud
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 70. Increased damage to targets with Magic Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Awesome Quake I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Earth magic attack at power 35. 85% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to INT for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Spell Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Magic.

witchmon.name: Witchmon
witchmon.description: A Digimon resembling a witch, who pursued its rival, Wizardmon, from Witchelny, the Digital World of another dimension. Witchmon mastered the magics of wind and water (advanced programming languages) in its home dimension Witchelny, but then pursued Wizardmon to the Digital World and now trains vigorously in order to get a leg up on this rival that aims to become a great mage. Witchmon has a bit of a cruel streak, more than a bit of pride and loathes both convention and established routines. Witchmon's special move is Baluluna Gale, which unleashes a cutting wind imbued with magic power.

specialSkills.name: Baluluna Gale
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind magic attack at power 60. 30% chance to apply Injury. Increased damage to targets with Magic Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Sonic Shot II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Ocean Wave I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Water magic attack at power 25. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Gale Storm II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Wind magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

gaogamon.name: Gaogamon
gaogamon.description: This Beast Digimon is the result of Gaomon's physique developing and the claws that were once protected by gloves finally growing in properly. Although GaoGamon is a quadruped, its hind legs are strong enough for it to stand like a bear while it attacks. GaoGamon unleashes its special move Spiral Blow to shoot a powerful vortex of wind from its mouth in one breath.

specialSkills.name: Spiral Blow
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind physical attack at power 70.

attachmentSkills.name: Gale Storm II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Wind magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Not good enough! I gotta have more!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What do you need more of?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Power, speed and fighting spirit. Help me get into gear!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're plenty strong.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Don't try to console me. Or maybe you're trying to show me another tactic...?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're more than cool enough.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Well, that really takes the wind outta my sails. You win.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Time for some special training.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're gonna join me? I knew I could count on you!

gawappamon.name: Gawappamon
gawappamon.description: An Android Digimon born from the fusion of the data from a portable music player and that of the mythical "kappa" river creature. Gawappamon is almost always cheerful as it listens to its favorite tunes, but it also sometimes weeps if the disc on top of its head gets scratched. It uses its special move DJ Shooter to spin its disc at high speed and launch it at the enemy.

specialSkills.name: DJ Shooter
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water physical attack at power 70.

attachmentSkills.name: Ocean Wave I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Water magic attack at power 25. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Hydro Water II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water magic attack at power 12 x 5 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Texture Blow
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Crystallization.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: *sigh* Gotta get me some new tunes to get this heart thumpin'...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Maybe you should make your own.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I never thought of that! My own tracks... Now, that'd be hype!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Why not hit up the clubs?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Now you're talkin'! Nothin' beats bein' there right in the middle of the music!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Want me to sing something?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You'd sing just for me? That'd be hella cool!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You really love music, huh?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A life without music ain't worth livin'! Gotta keep the tunes bumpin' every day!

kiwimon.name: Kiwimon
kiwimon.description: A mysterious Ancient Digimon said to have been hunted to extinction due to the proliferation of the Internet. The wings of this Bird Digimon have completely degenerated, preventing it from taking flight. Kiwimon also bears some aspects of a Vegetation Digimon, with leaf-like objects growing from its head that it uses to absorb nutrients through photosynthesis. It has no way to defend itself aside from the hard shell covering its head, and its docile personality makes it an easy target. Kiwimon's special move is Pummel Peck, attacking with the ChibiKiwimon hidden in its body. The beaks of the ChibiKiwimon are just as hard as Kiwimon's, and they explode when struck. Even if this explosion chars them to a crisp, ChibiKiwimon will always bounce back.

specialSkills.name: Pummel Peck
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 15 x 4 hits. Receives 1% HP damage from attack recoil.

attachmentSkills.name: Burst Flame II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire magic attack at power 12 x 5 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Dispel
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes stat debuffs.

attachmentSkills.name: Revive
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Revives from KO and moderately recovers HP.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The idea someone could attack me at any time freaks me out...!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Then fight back!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: O-Okay... I guess I have gotten tougher. If they hit me, I'll hit them right back!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Why don't you think of a way to escape?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're right. I'll think up all sorts of ways to flee if I get scared!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You can just befriend them.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Sure. I don't like fighting, anyway. I just hope everyone's friendly like you...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'll protect you, Kiwimon!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Okay... Thanks a bunch! I sure am lucky to have a pal like you!

kyubimon.name: Kyubimon
kyubimon.description: A Mysterious Beast Digimon in the shape of a giant fox with nine tails. Kyubimon is feared as a beast that brings destruction and decay, but in ancient times it was hailed as a bringer of peace. A Renamon with particularly strong abilities and a wide range of experience is said to Digivolve into a Kyubimon. This Digimon lacks attack power, but possesses incredible spiritual energy and specializes in spells. The blue flames burning on its four limbs apparently allow Kyubimon to gallop through the heavens. Its signature move Fox Tail Inferno creates and controls will-o'-the-wisps.

specialSkills.name: Fox Tail Inferno
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire magic attack at power 70.

attachmentSkills.name: Mental Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to SPI for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Spell Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Magic.

attachmentSkills.name: Reset Body
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Removes stat buffs.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I would like to get to know individuals who pray for peace.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'd like to be one of them.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: To wish for peace is the first step toward action. Let us walk this path together.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Count me out.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Do not make this more complicated than it has to be. Surely you, too, desire peace.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Get to know me better, then!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I believe you have what it takes to join me in aspiring for peace. I believe in you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A wonderful thing to aspire to.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Do not talk as if this has nothing to do with you. I wish to know you more than anyone.

clockmon.name: Clockmon
clockmon.description: A guardian of time that governs computer timers. Clockmon manages all "time" and "space" on computers and across the Net, and can move time forward and backward freely between the years 1900 and 1999. It always maintains a neutral stance due to this incredibly dangerous and terrifying ability, refusing to take part in conflict between Vaccine and Virus Digimon. Many think that if Clockmon were to lean toward either side of this equilibrium, the Digital World itself would collapse. It uses its special move Chrono Breaker to destroy the very time that flows in the enemy's body.

specialSkills.name: Chrono Breaker
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null magic attack at power 60. Removes all stat changes. 20% chance to apply Sleep.

attachmentSkills.name: Thunder Fall I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 8 x 3 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Shock Plasma II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 20 x 3 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Spell Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Magic.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You got any time to spare?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I don't have any to give.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You seem like a stickler when it comes to time. But that's not a bad thing.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I do if you pay me back later.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're really on top of it. I like people who value their time.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let's both make time for each other.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: When you say it like that, it sounds like I'll need to give some of my time, too.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'll always make time for the two of us.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Well, what a nice thing to say. I'll give you my time, too, someday.

centarumon.name: Centarumon
centarumon.description: A half-human, half-beast Digimon resembling a centaur. Centarumon's body is protected by a sturdy substance emitted from inside its body, and its right arm is fused with its weapon. It blows highly concentrated gas from the ducts sticking out of its back to move around at near-sonic speeds. It excels in attack, defense and speed. Pride means everything to Centarumon, and it hates being ordered or bound by anything with a passion. Its special move Hunting Cannon is fired from the cannon fused to its right arm. This attack is almost impossible to evade, but it consumes massive amounts of energy, so Centarumon avoids battles as much as it can.

specialSkills.name: Hunting Cannon
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 105. Immobilized next turn.

attachmentSkills.name: Awesome Quake I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Earth magic attack at power 35. 85% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Gaia Blaster II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth magic attack at power 70. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

sunflowmon.name: Sunflowmon
sunflowmon.description: A Vegetation Digimon resembling a sunflower. Sunflowmon gets a real energy boost when it's exposed to sunlight, which makes its attacks more powerful. On sunny days, it may even fly around by flapping the two leaves growing from its back. Its special move is Sunshine Beam, which releases a blast of sunlight from its petals.

specialSkills.name: Sunshine Beam
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant magic attack at power 105. Immobilized next turn.

attachmentSkills.name: Heal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Moderately recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: Thorn Strike II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant magic attack at power 30 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Holy Light II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: There's no sun at night, so it's a little boring.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: We could try spooking each other for fun.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You mean, like a test of courage? Wow... You must be pretty brave.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Why not turn on some lights?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Oh, yeah. I didn't think of that! You're a smart cookie. I could learn a thing or two.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It'd be a blast to hang out together.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Really? You mean, like, tonight? I'm in!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Just sleep. We'll pick this up tomorrow...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Yep, that's the best idea! Let's grab some sleep, and regroup in the morning!

seadramon.name: Seadramon
seadramon.description: An Aquatic Digimon with a serpentine body. When attacked, Seadramon will wrap its long body around the enemy and squeeze them until they suffocate. Fundamentally lacking any kind of intelligence, Seadramon swims through the Net Ocean wherever its instincts take it. Its special move is Ice Blast, with which it breathes out from its mouth at absolute zero, instantly freezing the water and blasting it at its opponent.

specialSkills.name: Ice Blast
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice magic attack at power 70. Increased damage to targets with Aquatic Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Hydro Water II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water magic attack at power 12 x 5 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Ocean Wave I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Water magic attack at power 25. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Idle Bubble
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Sleep.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: My tail... Me, proud. Must get stronger!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You can still get stronger!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Of course! But me, happy you say that...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Why not develop a new move?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A new move... Yes, cool. You, help me think...?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'll help you with training.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Train together... That sound fun. Me, happy...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The red on the tip of your tail is cool.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Yes! Red part, cool! You... understand good!

coelamon.name: Coelamon
coelamon.description: An Ancient Fish Digimon with tough skin and enormous claws. This Digimon is discovered in the Net Ocean whenever computer networks destroyed by malicious hackers are repaired. Coelamon's body composition is very primitive, with fins developed into limbs. Based on these facts, it's thought that primordial Digimon born in the Net Ocean underwent various evolutions in order to come onto land, growing more numerous and differentiating into various types in the process. Coelamon's special move is Fossil Bite, which attacks enemies with its massive claws.

specialSkills.name: Fossil Bite
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water physical attack at power 60. If target is affected by Confusion/ Chaos: 25% chance to apply Instant Death.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Ripping Net
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Paralysis.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to DEF for 3 turn(s).

shellmon.name: Shellmon
shellmon.description: A Digimon shaped like a hermit crab inhabiting the depths of the Net Ocean. Shellmon has a turtle-like appearance when inside its shell, but its body is actually soft like a mollusk. Its body gets bigger and bigger as it develops, and it switches dwellings each time until it's the size of a small mountain. Also, Shellmon has the custom of settling into anything it can push its whole body into. Its low intelligence and belligerent nature mean that anyone who encounters it needs to stay on guard. Its special move Hydro Blaster fires liquid at high pressure.

specialSkills.name: Hydro Blaster
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water magic attack at power 60. If user is boost to DEF: 25% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Hate Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Taunting.

attachmentSkills.name: Heal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Moderately recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: Ocean Wave II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Water magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

starmon.name: Starmon
starmon.description: A star-shaped Digimon discovered by chance in planetary analysis software at a space development center. Starmon is a space warrior with stellar armor, wearing gloves and boots emblazoned with stars. Its tattered yellow scarf speaks to the many battles it's survived, and its eyes burn with fighting spirit. Its eyes can even be used in a more advanced manner to hypnotize opponents. This hot-blooded Digimon has a fierce admiration for the brave Leomon. Starmon's special move Meteor Shower rains down small meteors upon the heads of its foes.

specialSkills.name: Meteor Shower
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Earth physical attack at power 10 x 2～5 hits.

attachmentSkills.name: Angel Ladder I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light physical attack at power 25. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Hate Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Taunting.

tankmon.name: Tankmon
tankmon.description: An Android Digimon resembling a tank. Known as the "Mercenary Digimon," Tankmon will back up Vaccine and Virus Digimon alike if there's profit to be made. It pulverizes incoming enemies to dust with its heavyweight power and the heavy ordnance covering its body. A conflict enthusiast, Tankmon heads in the direction of any strife that pops up. Wherever this lone wolf goes, conflict is sure to continue unceasingly. Tankmon's special move is Hyper Cannon, which launches a super-powerful missile from the gun barrel on its head.

specialSkills.name: Hyper Cannon
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 105. Immobilized next turn.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Nanomachine Break II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 15 x 4 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Dagnabbit! I'm just itching to run wild!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Want me to take you on?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're on! ...Hah! As if! Why would I ever throw down with you?!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You should prepare for your next fight.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hey, I'm more than good to go, you know! Battle ready, any day of the week!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I bet that's driving you crazy, huh?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I want to find someplace with a battle raging. Anywhere will do!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You deserve to relax a little more.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Nice of you to say, but relaxing just gets me ready to snooze...

mudfrigimon.name: MudFrigimon
mudfrigimon.description: A Digimon composed almost entirely of earth data. MudFrigimon is thought to be a mutant born from a mutation of Frigimon. It's friendly by nature and dislikes fighting, but when the chips are down, it can demonstrate rarely-seen power. It uses its special move Great Weight to put all of its weight behind a haymaker punch.

specialSkills.name: Great Weight
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Earth physical attack at power 40.

attachmentSkills.name: Comet Hammer II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 11 x 6 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Gaia Blaster I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth magic attack at power 50. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Meditator
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes status abnormalities.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Why's everyone always trying to fight?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Because they're strong?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: In that case, why don't they just arm wrestle or something?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Because they're weak?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: In that case, why don't they just work out or something?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Because they like it?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Welp, nothing I can say about that, then.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Because they're lonely?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: In that case, why don't they just let me be their friend?

dinohyumon.name: Dinohyumon
dinohyumon.description: A Dragon Man Digimon resembling a humanoid lizard. Dinohyumon lives in an untamed land where every member of its fierce battle dragon tribe has the makings of a warrior. Its burly muscles allow it to swing its greatsword "Akinakes" with ease. Dinohyumon's special move is Lizard Dance, which employs dance-like movements to cleave through foes with Akinakes and the blades on its arms.

specialSkills.name: Lizard Dance
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 20 x 3 hits.

attachmentSkills.name: Awesome Quake I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Earth magic attack at power 35. 85% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Hate Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Taunting.

tyrannomon.name: Tyrannomon
tyrannomon.description: A Digimon that looks like an ancient dinosaur that existed in the prehistoric world. Tyrannomon mows down everything with its two powerful arms and massive tail. It possesses intelligence and a docile personality, however, and is easy to tame. This makes Tyrannomon a hot commodity among beginning Tamers, many of whom raise theirs with care. One could say it represents what Digimon are all about. It uses its special move Fire Breath to exhale flames the same color as its deep crimson body.

specialSkills.name: Fire Breath
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 70. Increased damage to targets with Humanoid Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 12 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Have my claws gotten a little too long?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Yeah, they're too long.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I haven't whipped out Slash Claw much these days. Better put these bad boys to good use!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'd say they're too short.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What? You sure? Guess it's hard to tell on my own. I'm glad I asked!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Nah, they're just right.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Must be my imagination, then. Okay! Now I feel like slashing something up!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I didn't even notice.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Guess it doesn't matter in a scrap, huh? Still, I wish you paid closer attention...

turuiemon.name: Turuiemon
turuiemon.description: A martial artist Digimon discovered in the hinterland of a mountainous Chinese province. Turuiemon has wandered the world in pursuit of its longstanding foes—viruses that exploit e-mail for malicious aims. It's blessed with exceptional potential as a martial artist, though it has yet to develop its skills. Turuiemon is a practitioner of Togaken, a fighting style of its own creation. Its special move is Gauntlet Claw, which involves a series of blows made with the Rabbit-Horned Iron Claws on both hands. This combo attack capitalizes on its rabbit-like agility and powerful high leaps.

specialSkills.name: Gauntlet Claw
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 20 x 3 hits.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Comet Hammer II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 11 x 6 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

togemon.name: Togemon
togemon.description: A Vegetation Digimon resembling a giant cactus. Its ability to store nutrient data inside its body allows it to survive for extended periods even in barren desert regions. As is obvious from its facial expression, it's usually impossible to tell what Togemon is thinking, since it spends most days staring blankly into space. But if provoked enough, its demeanor becomes violent and unhinged. Togemon's special move is Needle Spray, with which it hardens the needles on its fists and unleashes a flurry of punches.

specialSkills.name: Needle Spray
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Plant physical attack at power 35. 25% chance to apply Poison.

attachmentSkills.name: Thorn Strike II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant magic attack at power 30 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Meditator
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes status abnormalities.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You and me, staring contest! First to smile loses!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Grr, I'm gonna mug at you good!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Ngh! Two can play at that game. Arrrrr!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The cooler head will prevail.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That sounds... pretty smart, actually. You mean, like this?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Get a load of this funny face!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Oh, boy. That's a good one. I appreciate you coming at this so seriously.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Aww, what a cutie you are.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Ack, you made me smile! It's my loss... Still, not a bad way to go out. No, indeed!

drimogemon.name: Drimogemon
drimogemon.description: A Digimon that moves through the earth at high speeds with the giant drill on its nose. Drimogemon stays deep in the ground, so only a rare few ever meet it. It's docile and easily embarrassed, yet it enjoys a good prank, often taking Garurumon's favorite bone it buried in the ground and hiding it someplace else. Its special move Drill Spin attacks foes with its giant drill.

specialSkills.name: Drill Spin
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 65. Nullifies unfavorable compatibility. Increased damage to targets with Mineral Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Mental Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to SPI for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Ripping Net
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Paralysis.

attachmentSkills.name: Awesome Quake II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Earth magic attack at power 45. 85% ACU.

dorugamon.name: Dorugamon
dorugamon.description: A savage Beast Dragon Digimon possessing the temperament of both beast and dragon, this heavyweight creature makes most Digimon flee at the mere sight of its shadow. Dorugamon can be ferocious like a wild beast in battle, but the dragon intelligence at its disposal means it's usually quite docile. Because of the antiquated interface on its forehead, this Digimon is presumed to be the Digivolution of an experimental "Prototype Digimon." Dorugamon uses the special move Power Metal to shoot a large iron ball from its mouth and crush its foe.

specialSkills.name: Power Metal
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 70.

attachmentSkills.name: Comet Hammer II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 11 x 6 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

baohuckmon.name: BaoHuckmon
baohuckmon.description: Huckmon went through strict training, refining an unparalleled combat sense and achieving mental, technical and physical strength in this form. BaoHuckmon continues to train while aiming for even greater heights, accumulating combat experience through countless battles against strong foes. The more this combat expert fights, the more it evolves. BaoHuckmon's desire to become a Royal Knight has only increased as it's grown. It doesn't allow others to determine its best course of action, believing it should observe and decide on an approach for itself. With its special move Fif Cross, BaoHuckmon cleaves its opponent with its sharp claws.

specialSkills.name: Fif Cross
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 12 x 5 hits. 15% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Meditator
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes status abnormalities.

attachmentSkills.name: Full Metal Pile II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Steel magic attack at power 35. 85% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

blimpmon.name: Blimpmon
blimpmon.description: A Vehicle-species Digimon similar to Mekanorimon, capable of leisurely flights through the sky. Blimpmon's soft balloon parts are protected by a metal coating, but it appears to still be under development, as its left flank remains exposed. Its signature move is Zeppelin Explosion, which fires cannonballs from the two cannons on top.

specialSkills.name: Zeppelin Explosion
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire physical attack at power 60. 70% ACU. Increased damage to targets with Bird Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Hate Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Taunting.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Where do ya wanna go? If I can go there, I'll take ya!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Somewhere no one's ever been to before.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You wanna go on an adventure? A brave request... but, okay!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Somewhere I don't know about yet.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The world's a big place, huh? Bet we can learn lots by going to different places!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Anywhere, if it's with you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hehe. It's kinda embarrassing when ya say it out loud... but I feel the same way!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A place where you can rest.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hehe. Thanks. Just you saying that gives me strength!

meramon.name: Meramon
meramon.description: A Fire Digimon whose body is cloaked in crimson flames. Generated of the Firewall built to defend against illegal intrusions from the Internet, this Digimon has a violent temperament that reflects its blazing appearance and seeks to incinerate anything it touches. Its flames burn more intensely than those of its kindred on File Island, making it an extremely difficult Digimon to tame. But even if tamed, there's no telling when Meramon will turn on its master. Meramon uses its special move Burning Fist to cause its arms to flare up before punching its foe.

specialSkills.name: Burning Fist
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 20 x 3 hits. Increased damage to targets with Ice Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Magma Fall I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire magic attack at power 25. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Burst Flame II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire magic attack at power 12 x 5 hits. 95% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm on FIRE, baby!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let's flare up together.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Nice! I like it! But be sure you don't get burned.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What fuels your fire?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Why, me, of course! I can keep this fire burning forever and ever!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Burn even brighter!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Heck, yeah! I'm a raging blaze!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Careful not to overdo it.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Appreciate the thought! But this flame ain't even CLOSE to my max, pal!

monochromon.name: Monochromon
monochromon.description: An Armored Dragon Digimon with a rhinoceros-like horn growing from its snout. When fully grown, this horn measures half of Monochromon's body length. The hard substance that covers its horns and half its body is as hard as diamond. They say there's nothing its horn can't pierce. Monochromon is known to excel at both offense and defense. Although it's herbivorous and comparatively docile, once it's angered, it will unleash fearsome counterattacks with its tank-like body. Its special move Volcanic Strike is a powerful flame projectile.

specialSkills.name: Volcanic Strike
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 70.

attachmentSkills.name: Hate Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Taunting.

attachmentSkills.name: Comet Hammer II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 11 x 6 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

lekismon.name: Lekismon
lekismon.description: A Beast Man Digimon with astounding jumping capabilities that likes to toy with its foes using speedy movements. Lekismon's nature is as ephemeral as the phases of the moon, and its appearance is somewhat mystical. It uses its special move Moon Night Bomb to hurl hypnotic water bubbles generated from the Moon Gloves on its hands and put the enemy to sleep.

specialSkills.name: Moon Night Bomb
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water magic attack at power 60. 30% chance to apply Sleep. Increased damage to targets with Beast Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Lethal Blizzard I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Ice magic attack at power 25. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Dispel
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes stat debuffs.

attachmentSkills.name: Frozen Bullet II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

icedevimon.name: IceDevimon
icedevimon.description: A Dark Angel Digimon with a heart as cold as ice. This is the form that a Devimon with the cruelest spirit takes after Digivolution. IceDevimon deceives its foes with its silver tongue, then envelops them in wings of ice to freeze them.

specialSkills.name: Frost Claw
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice physical attack at power 65. Recovers HP equal to 20% of damage dealt. Increased damage to targets with Fire Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Frozen Bullet II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Nightmare II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Texture Blow
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Crystallization.

wendigomon.name: Wendigomon
wendigomon.description: A brutal Beast Man Digimon formed when Lopmon underwent Dark Digivolution due to anger and hatred. Wendigomon isn't completely evil, and the kindness it had as Lopmon still resides somewhere deep in its heart. But the power of its rage overrides this kindness, making Wendigomon devote itself completely to destruction. In addition to its raw power, Wendigomon has the ability to manipulate time and space, and is able to warp by passing through other dimensions as well as create subdimensions of its own. Its special move is Howling Destroyer, which creates a shockwave capable of shattering even boulders.

specialSkills.name: Howling Destroyer
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Wind physical attack at power 35. Nullifies unfavorable compatibility.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Idle Bubble
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Sleep.

attachmentSkills.name: Ripping Net
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Paralysis.

woodmon.name: Woodmon
woodmon.description: A Vegetation Digimon resembling a great withered tree. Made of normal wood, Woodmon catches Digimon that pass by and absorbs their energy to survive. It can also use its root-like limbs to move. Brutal by nature, it attacks without rest when angered. Woodmon's sturdy wooden trunk boasts high defense, but it's extremely weak against flame and particularly Fire Digimon such as Meramon and Birdramon. It uses its special move Branch Drain to extend its branch-like appendages, pierce the opponent and absorb its energy.

specialSkills.name: Branch Drain
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant physical attack at power 65. Recovers HP equal to 20% of damage dealt.

attachmentSkills.name: Meditator
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes status abnormalities.

attachmentSkills.name: Rune Forest I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Plant magic attack at power 25. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Revive
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Revives from KO and moderately recovers HP.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Ain't nothing out there that can spook me! No way!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Not even fire?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Ugh... N-Nope, not scared! I can... I can knock it right back!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It's important to know your weak points.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Y-You think so? Maybe you're right... Guess I got a lot to learn.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Together, the two of us are untouchable!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Exactly! Nobody can get in the way of our friendship!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: So, what out there delights you?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Huh. Never even thought about it. I wonder...

ogremon.name: Ogremon
ogremon.description: A Digimon resembling an "oni," an ogre of Japanese folklore. The attacks from Ogremon's frighteningly well-developed muscles bring tremendous destructive power to bear. Extremely intelligent but just as temperamental, this rage-driven being wreaks all the havoc it can. Belligerent to a fault, it will boldly challenge even opponents with significantly higher battle strength compared to its own, and this has earned it the moniker of the "Digimon Hunter." The bone club Ogremon wields in its right hand was earned from defeating SkullGreymon in battle. It unleashes its special move Pummel Whack by swinging its massive arms.

specialSkills.name: Pummel Whack
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 60. 100% chance of 20% reduction to ACU for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Comet Hammer II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 11 x 6 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Texture Blow
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Crystallization.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What? I look pissed? I'm in a great mood, I tell ya!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: All I can see is an angry mug.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm in the best mood when I'm pissed! Rile me up more and I'll send somebody flyin'!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: In that case, let's sing.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Dummy! This ain't no time for a ditty! I fight tough guys when I'm in a good mood!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I mean, yeah, obviously.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Right? I'm so happy, it's infuriatin'! I wanna send some joker flyin'!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Then smile, why don't you?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I AM smilin', dangit! What do ya think this is comin' outta my face, a long sneeze?!

octomon.name: Octomon
octomon.description: A Mollusk Digimon discovered in a virus that a malicious hacker used when trying to crash a rival's computer. Octomon is an obsessive collector, sporting claws at the ends of its tentacles that it obtained from Devidramon's data, and covering itself in Digi-Treasure that it scavenged from the depths of the Net Ocean. Many Fujitsumon, which are a small type of shellfish Digimon, have attached themselves to the pot that Octomon wears on its head. These Fujitsumon have highly-developed senses, and it's believed that they are part of a symbiotic relationship with Octomon, warning it when they sense danger. Octomon's special move, Spurting Ink, fires out a blast of highly-poisonous ink.

specialSkills.name: Spurting Ink
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 80% chance of 30% reduction to ACU for 3 turns. 50% chance to apply Poison.

attachmentSkills.name: Hydro Water II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water magic attack at power 12 x 5 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Bind
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 100% chance of 20% reduction to INT for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Void Ray II
