attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Null magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU. 10% CRT Rate.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Arrr! 'ave ye spied any fancy booty as o' late?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wouldn't mind a treasure hunt.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Aye, a search fraught with peril. May we find lands the likes o' which ne'er been seen.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Why not read an old tome?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Yo ho! Perhaps we may find knowledge within o' plunder what been squirreled away.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let's go look for some together!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Well, ain't ye a sight for sore eyes! One's luck only grows among mates—as do the mirth!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're the real treasure.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Blow me down! I 'adn't thought o' that. Ye done pleased this ole sea dog beyond measure.

guardromon.name: Guardromon
guardromon.description: A Machine Digimon that protects computer network firewalls. Guardromon used to fight off anyone attempting to breach a firewall alongside "Net Keeper" Giromon, until malicious hackers infected it with a virus to make use of its impregnable defensive abilities. These hackers now use Guardromon to protect themselves from a certain Vaccine justice group. Since Guardromon's basic programming only involves commands to defend, it has no problem repelling invaders regardless of its new role. It uses its special move Destruction Grenade to pursue invaders to the ends of the earth and destroy them.

specialSkills.name: Destruction Grenade
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 65. Always hits.

attachmentSkills.name: Heal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Moderately recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: Hate Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Taunting.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: When it comes down to it, just leave the fighting to me.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hey, that's my line.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Too good for me, huh? Still, you seem like someone I can count on.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let's come up with a strategy first.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That sounds good. I'm big on planning, myself.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: When it's time to fight, we fight together.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Suit yourself, then.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Don't overdo it, now.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Back at you.

shellnumemon.name: ShellNumemon
shellnumemon.description: A Crustacean Digimon formed when a Numemon is smart enough to search out a shell to protect itself. This makes ShellNumemon slightly more intelligent than Numemon, but also much more skittish, causing it to flee into its shell at the slightest provocation. Its defense increases dramatically while inside its shell, allowing it to withstand kicks, stomps and the like. Its special move is Mature Poop, by which it hurls gobs of poop it's accumulated in its shell.

specialSkills.name: Mature Poop
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Deals 15% HP damage.

attachmentSkills.name: Venom Trap
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Poison.

attachmentSkills.name: Aqua Pressure II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Reflect
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Reflect Magic.

growlmon.name: Growlmon
growlmon.description: A Dark Dragon Digimon known as the "Deep Crimson Dragon." Having Digivolved into a wilder, more ferocious creature, the childishness from its time as Guilmon is now gone. Although it's a Virus Digimon, Growlmon may become loyal depending on how its Tamer raises it, perhaps even fighting for justice. Its roar is mighty enough to shake the ground, and Growlmon uses it as an aggressive display to intimidate the enemy before battle. It has the special move Exhaust Flame, which unleashes a powerful blast of fire with an explosive roar.

specialSkills.name: Exhaust Flame
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 70.

attachmentSkills.name: Magma Fall I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire magic attack at power 25. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Spirit Bind
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 100% chance of 20% reduction to SPI for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Ripping Net
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Paralysis.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: My weapons are these cool blades! What are yours?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The courage to take on any opponent.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A weapon hidden inside where no one can see is pretty darn cool!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: My Digimon knowledge.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm no good at that stuff, but I know it's important. You be the brains. I'm the brawn!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: My trustworthy companions.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That includes me, right? Because you're definitely someone I trust!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You, my partner.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hey, now! You trying to make me blush? I appreciate the thought, though!

kuwagamon.name: Kuwagamon
kuwagamon.description: An Insectoid Digimon with giant pincers on its head. Like Kabuterimon, Kuwagamon possesses combat abilities far surpassing those of its kin inhabiting File Island. While Kuwagamon enjoys the protection of its strength and sturdy shell, it uses the power of its pincers to squeeze the life out of any foe it catches. It has a completely hostile relationship with the Vaccine-attribute Kabuterimon. It can use its special move Scissor Claw to easily cut through tough objects.

specialSkills.name: Scissor Claw
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant physical attack at power 70. Increased damage to targets with Insectoid Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Nanomachine Break II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 15 x 4 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Character Reversal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy or ally] 100% chance to apply Reverse.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What aspect of mine makes me seem the toughest?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Those big, ol' pincers of yours.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hehehe. I thought as much. I'm always itching to pinch something with them.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Your keen battle strategy.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You think? I'm more of a charge in first, ask questions later" kind of 'mon."

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The way you keep foes away from your allies.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: True. Hiding behind me is one of the safest places to be.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That unyielding fighting spirit.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: To protect what needs to be protected, you need a heart that's stronger than anything.

gekomon.name: Gekomon
gekomon.description: An Amphibian Digimon that mesmerizes those around it with a cry altogether too pleasant for its strange appearance. The chords Gekomon plays with the three holes at the end of its tongue and the improvisations created on the horn wrapped around its neck can control its opponent's feelings. Rumor has it that it's born when a hit song is created in composition software, making Gekomon a kind of status symbol among musicians the world over. Its special move Symphony Crusher destroys the enemy's insides with ultra-high frequency vibrations.

specialSkills.name: Symphony Crusher
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water magic attack at power 60. If target is affected by Sleep/ Deep Slumber: Increased damage.

attachmentSkills.name: Ocean Wave I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Water magic attack at power 25. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Meditator
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes status abnormalities.

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to INT for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'll play a tune to liven things up, glurp. Got any requests, glurp?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Something bold and stirring.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You got it, glurp! Just hearing this song'll get those heroic juices flowing, glurp!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Something sophisticated.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That could be a tough one, glurp... But nothing's impossible for me, glurp!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Something fun.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Leave it to me, glurp! I've got a good-vibes number that'll get everybody dancing, glurp!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Something sad.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Say no more, glurp! There won't be a dry eye around once this tearjerker starts, glurp!

geremon.name: Geremon
geremon.description: A Mollusk Digimon of the same species as Numemon. Geremon lacks attack power but is unusually ferocious, rushing at the opponent no matter who they are. As expected, this obstinate creature gets taken out quickly, but then immediately forgets about its defeats. For this reason, it picks fights with formidable foes over and over again. Geremon uses its special move Hyper Smell to secrete a violent stench from its body.

specialSkills.name: Hyper Smell
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to SPI for 3 turns. 50% chance to apply Paralysis.

attachmentSkills.name: Nanomachine Break II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 15 x 4 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Texture Blow
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Crystallization.

attachmentSkills.name: Character Reversal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy or ally] 100% chance to apply Reverse.

coredramon-green.name: Coredramon (Green)
coredramon-green.description: Coredramon with green bodies are said to have Digivolved from Dracomon that ate lots of Green Malachite, a precious gem mined from forest regions thickly wooded with trees over 100 years old. Coredramon (Green) isn't skilled at flying, but has highly-developed leg muscles, and is capable of running at speeds seemingly impossible for a creature of its size. Its special move is Green Flare Breath, with which it breathes out scorching green flames. Green Flare Breath penetrates deep beneath surface texture data to damage the enemy's DigiCore directly.

specialSkills.name: Green Flare Breath
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 65. Nullifies unfavorable compatibility. Increased damage to targets with Pixie Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Mental Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to SPI for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Character Reversal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy or ally] 100% chance to apply Reverse.

goldnumemon.name: GoldNumemon
goldnumemon.description: A subspecies of Numemon whose entire body glitters gold, having incorporated data from gold mines into itself. GoldNumemon's special move is Goldurian Rush, by which it hurls a stream of golden poop.

specialSkills.name: Goldurian Rush
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Deals 2% HP damage x 3 hits. 100% chance of 15% reduction to SPI for 3 turns.

attachmentSkills.name: Shine Burst I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 25. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Void Ray I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Null magic attack at power 25. 90% ACU. 10% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Saint Knuckle II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 30 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

golemon.name: Golemon
golemon.description: A Rock/Mineral Digimon discovered when performing digital analysis of an ancient curse. It has forbidden incantations in an archaic script signifying "plague," "curse" and "evil" inscribed on its back, apparently meant to safeguard it from the gas it emits. Approximately 90% of its body is composed of rock data, and it survives by binding up its limbs. An emotionless Digimon that doesn't act unless so ordered.

specialSkills.name: Crimson Curse
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to DEF for 3 turns. 50% chance to apply Paralysis.

attachmentSkills.name: Stone Cleave I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Earth physical attack at power 35. 85% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Comet Hammer II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 11 x 6 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to DEF for 3 turn(s).

cyclonemon.name: Cyclonemon
cyclonemon.description: A one-eyed Dragon Man Digimon with an abnormally developed right arm. Once a brawny dragon warrior, Cyclonemon had its right eye crushed by the warrior Leomon, transforming it into a demon of revenge. It strengthens and grows its arm larger in order to defeat Leomon, and hunts for a chance at retribution. Shedding its pride as a warrior, Cyclonemon is now a maddened combatant who thinks only of slaughter, all for the sake of revenge. Its special move is Hyper Heat, which melts any and all things.

specialSkills.name: Hyper Heat
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 65. 100% chance of reduction to Fire resistance.

attachmentSkills.name: Comet Hammer II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 11 x 6 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Bind
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 100% chance of 20% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

sangloupmon.name: Sangloupmon
sangloupmon.description: Sangloupmon is a bloodsucking wolf Digimon with a noble demeanor. It's one of the oldest species of Digimon, said to have survived since the dawn of the Digital World. Digimon who have their blood sucked by Sangloupmon have all the data drained from their DigiCores, causing them to perish, as they can no longer maintain vital functions. Sangloupmon is capable of teleporting to other locations instantly by disassembling its own data into packets and sending them across the Net. Its special move is Sticker Blade, which fires off a spray of thousands of minute blades to skewer opponents in the blink of an eye.

specialSkills.name: Sticker Blade
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 20 x 3 hits. Increased damage to targets with Beast Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Ripping Net
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Paralysis.

attachmentSkills.name: Idle Bubble
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Sleep.

attachmentSkills.name: Nightmare II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

sukamon.name: Sukamon
sukamon.description: A nasty Digimon shaped like a glittering piece of golden poop. Sukamon was born from the accumulation and mutation of data scraps thrown away in the trash can of a computer desktop. It loves dark places, and being a pile of scrap data, it's just as disliked by other Digimon as Numemon. Sukamon's intelligence and attack power are both nonexistent. Its small rodent partner Chuumon can't fight, but is as crafty as they come, and always entices Sukamon into doing wicked deeds.

specialSkills.name: Poop
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Deals 1% HP damage x 5 hits. 100% chance of 10% reduction to SPI for 3 turns. 60% chance to apply Poison.

attachmentSkills.name: Idle Bubble
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Sleep.

attachmentSkills.name: Hate Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Taunting.

attachmentSkills.name: Curse Barrier
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Status Abnormality Immunity.

tuskmon.name: Tuskmon
tuskmon.description: A super heavy Dinosaur Digimon with giant horns growing from its shoulders. Tuskmon's foolhardy personality means it will charge at and destroy every obstacle in its path, earning it the nickname of the "Panzer Digimon." Specializing in charging tackles, Tuskmon has made countless Digimon fall before its attacks. The stars on its arms represent the number of Digimon that Tuskmon has defeated (one hundred per star). If its horns break, it can shed them like shark teeth and bring new horns from the back to the front, making any attempt to destroy its horns fruitless. Tuskmon's special move is Slamming Tusk, which unleashes a super dreadnought-class punch.

specialSkills.name: Slamming Tusk
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 85. 80% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Comet Hammer II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 11 x 6 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

devimon.name: Devimon
devimon.description: A Dark Angel Digimon clothed in jet-black garb. Devimon was once a radiant Digimon of the Angemon species, but it became a Dark Angel when it fell into the distorted space of the Digital World known as the Dark Area. The prominent Mark of Evil on its chest is proof of this. Though it has a cunning and malevolent personality, Devimon is also extremely intelligent. It's said that any who stare into its glowing, red eyes fall victim to its mind control and become subject to its whims. Devimon's special move is Death Claw, which uses its two extendable arms to pierce its opponent.

specialSkills.name: Death Claw
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 65. Recovers HP equal to 20% of damage dealt. Increased damage to targets with Holy Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Nightmare II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Hell Crusher I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark magic attack at power 25. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Mental Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to SPI for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The power of humans is a trifling thing.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The power of humans is limitless.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Intriguing. I should like to see a display of this power.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The power of Devimon is a trifling thing.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You have a sharp tongue. However, one day you will need my strength and intellect.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Human potential is limitless.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A valid point. Humans do at times act in a manner that defies logic. Perhaps you, too...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: But we have the power of love.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Though I will never be deceived by it, love is indeed not a force to be taken lightly...

deltamon.name: Deltamon
deltamon.description: A Composite Digimon fused from three Digimon. Each existed as a separate Digimon, but a computer ran amok after getting hit by a powerful electromagnetic storm, bugging out and fusing them together into Deltamon. A Digimon with three heads and two tails, it specializes in three-stage attacks utilizing these physical features, making it capable of taking on three Digimon at once. Still, each part of it was once a fiendish Digimon, so while they share a mindset for destruction, they have no spirit of cooperation, and are usually on bad terms. Deltamon uses its special move Triple Forces to unleash energy from all three mouths in a single blast.

specialSkills.name: Triple Forces
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 25 x 3 hits. Increased damage to targets with Unknown Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 12 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Bind
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 100% chance of 20% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Hate Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Taunting.

dokugumon.name: Dokugumon
dokugumon.description: A cursed Digimon in the shape of a spider, whose entire body is infested with a computer virus. Even though a spider-species type, Dokugumon was originally a gentle and quiet Insectoid Digimon. One day, however, it was caught in a powerful electromagnetic storm, and was infected with a computer virus that had been lurking around the Net. From that moment on, it became one big lump of venom—in other words, a nasty computer virus, corroding everything it touched. Dokugumon's eight-legged mobility is worthy of special mention, too. Even if the enemy runs from it at full speed, this Digimon will be right on its heels, pursuing it until it tires itself out. And then, as soon as it stops to take a rest, Dokugumon uses Venom Blast on it, unleashing a dreadful, venomous attack from its fiendish fangs.

specialSkills.name: Venom Blast
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant physical attack at power 60. If target is affected by Poison/ Deadly Poison/ Sleep/ Deep Slumber: 25% chance to apply Instant Death. Increased damage to targets with Insectoid Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Rune Forest I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Plant magic attack at power 25. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Thorn Strike II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant magic attack at power 30 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Bind
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 100% chance of 20% reduction to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

nanimon.name: Nanimon
nanimon.description: An unidentified Digimon that invaded from an other-dimensional Digital World. Nanimon went by the nickname of "Oyaji" in the other dimension, and was kept as a digital pet. It loves alcohol and violence, but once it invaded this Digital World (the details of which are still fuzzy), it Digivolved into an active creature. Inspired by the survival-of-the-fittest nature of the Digital World, it threw itself into battle. Its true power remains unknown. That being said, Nanimon has made it through many battles and evolved into its supreme form.

specialSkills.name: Poop Dunk
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Deals 5% HP damage. 100% chance of 15% reduction to DEF/SPI for 3 turns.

attachmentSkills.name: Venom Trap
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Poison.

attachmentSkills.name: Power Energy II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Panic Wisp
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Confusion.

numemon.name: Numemon
numemon.description: A slug-like Mollusk Digimon. Fond of damp, dark environments, Numemon lacks both offensive power and intelligence. Any Digimon can become a Numemon if it isn't raised properly, but perhaps it has hidden depths? Then again, even its attacks are bottom-tier, flinging its own poop to defend against enemies.

specialSkills.name: Poop Toss
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Deals 5% HP damage. 100% chance of 25% reduction to SPI for 3 turns.

attachmentSkills.name: Venom Trap
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Poison.

attachmentSkills.name: Ocean Wave II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Water magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Reset Body
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Removes stat buffs.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Say, let's chill somewhere nice and damp.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Not happening.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Aw, man. And I was so nervous to ask! Here I thought you'd make my heart pound even more.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Maybe next time.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You promise? I'll take you to all the best soggy places!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let's chill somewhere else.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Then I'll take you somewhere nice and slimy instead. Awesome choice!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Just for a little bit.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: ...Oh! Now I want to poop a little!

bakemon.name: Bakemon
bakemon.description: A Ghost Digimon with a cloth draped over it. Bakemon is a wicked being born of darkness, and is said to instantly destroy the systems of any computers it possesses. What lies beneath the cloth is a complete mystery, and there are theories that the shadow cast under its body is a black hole. Bakemon lacks combat power and thus prefers not to attack its foes directly. Its special move Death Charm casts a powerful curse. Those lacking strong mental fortitude die in a matter of seconds under its effect.

specialSkills.name: Death Charm
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Deals 15% HP damage. 50% chance to apply Injury.

attachmentSkills.name: Hell Crusher I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark magic attack at power 25. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Nightmare II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Venom Trap
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Poison.

hyogamon.name: Hyogamon
hyogamon.description: A species of Ogremon that lives in cold regions. Hyogamon is extremely territorial, flying off the handle and attacking anyone who takes even a step inside its domain (even getting into occasional clashes with Mojyamon over territory). Its special move is Snow Punch, which unleashes a chilling blow.

specialSkills.name: Snow Punch
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice physical attack at power 60. 100% chance of reduction to Ice resistance.

attachmentSkills.name: Void Ray I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Null magic attack at power 25. 90% ACU. 10% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Hate Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Taunting.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Bind
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 100% chance of 20% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hey, pal, youse shakin' from the chill?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It's freezing. Warm me up.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: How about youse and me have a li'l throwdown? My Snow Punch's got a spicy bite to it.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm cold, but I'm not shaking.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Then lemme tell ya somethin' nice. Runnin' wild like me gets yer blood pumpin'!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I don't mind it being a little nippy.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Nice, nice. How about youse put ice on yer shoulders like me? It makes good weapons.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Of course! This cold is bone-chilling.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What a lazybones. Why not take a jog, warm up yer body? I'll even join ya fer a few laps.

fugamon.name: Fugamon
fugamon.description: A Digimon resembling an "oni," an ogre of Japanese folklore. Fugamon is from the same clan as Ogremon, and shares its wild, battle-loving nature. Attacks unleashed from this Digimon's tremendous muscles hold terrible power, causing unadulterated destruction. Fugamon's special move is Evil Hurricane, which mows down everything with a swing of its bone club.

specialSkills.name: Evil Hurricane
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Wind physical attack at power 40.

attachmentSkills.name: Shadow Fang II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 30 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Venom Trap
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Poison.

attachmentSkills.name: Comet Hammer II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 11 x 6 hits. 90% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You workin' out?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What should I do?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: How 'bout swingin' around a bone club like me? That'll put some muscle on ya.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wanna work out with you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Ya ain't on my level, kid. Humans gotta work out human-style. Ya get me? Think about it.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I am.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Don't look that way, but I guess it ain't fair to compare anybody with my jacked bod.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Not at all.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Then how're ya gonna defend yourself? But meh. Ain't like I wouldn't jump in to help.

flymon.name: Flymon
flymon.description: A brutal Insectoid Digimon with massive wings. These wings allow Flymon to skirt through the air at ultrahigh speeds, creating sonic booms called "Howling Noise" in its wake that rob unlucky victims of their hearing. Its body is protected by a tough carapace, and it pinches foes with its huge talons before killing them with the extra-potent venomous stinger on its tail. The Digivolution process of Insectoid Digimon is still unknown, but from its face, some have surmised that Flymon originally Digivolved from a Kunemon-type creature. Its special move is Brown Stingers, which shoots a stinger from its tail that completely paralyzes the Digimon it pierces, turning it purple before ending its life. Incidentally, this nasty stinger can be regrown over and over again.

specialSkills.name: Brown Stingers
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant physical attack at power 60. 10% chance to apply Paralysis/ Immobilization. Increased damage to targets with Humanoid Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Wind Claw II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Crescent Leaf II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant physical attack at power 9 x 7 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Nanomachine Break II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 15 x 4 hits. 95% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Bzz... How do you like my wings?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: They look cool and tough!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Bzz! Right? I'll show you how I use them to fly around and take out foes!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wanna study them more closely.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: More curious than you are scared, huh? All right. Get as close a look as you want.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Scary but pretty.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Scared, huh? Bzz. How honest of ya. But relax. I'd never hurt a partner.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Very cute and charming.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Cute...? Now, that really throws me off. But... I guess not necessarily in a bad way.

platinumsukamon.name: PlatinumSukamon
platinumsukamon.description: A Digimon of glittering platinum, shaped like a piece of poop. PlatinumSukamon is a type of Sukamon that has taken in rare metal data, giving it a gorgeous appearance but the same abilities as the original. It doesn't appear to have received any sort of power-up. PlatinumSukamon uses its special move Rare Metal Poop to hurl poop with a metallic sheen at the enemy.

specialSkills.name: Rare Metal Poop
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Deals 1% HP damage x 5 hits. 100% chance of 20% reduction to SPI for 3 turns. 30% chance to apply Confusion.

attachmentSkills.name: Power Energy II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Revive
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Revives from KO and moderately recovers HP.

blackgatomon.name: BlackGatomon
blackgatomon.description: A Virus Gatomon with striking black fur. BlackGatomon is the quintessential child of evil, spendings its days wandering through eerie darkness. An extremely rare mutation of Gatomon, very few are thought to exist. BlackGatomon is malicious and prideful and loves picking on the weak—all in all a problematic Digimon. As a Dark Digimon, it generally Digivolves into a Dark Angel Digimon. Just like Gatomon, BlackGatomon's special move is Lightning Paw.

specialSkills.name: Lightning Paw
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 70. 50% chance to apply Confusion.

attachmentSkills.name: Nightmare II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Bind
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 100% chance of 20% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Spell Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Magic.

vegiemon.name: Vegiemon
vegiemon.description: A Carnivorous Vegetation Digimon with long vines and a gaping maw. This fiendish brute emits a sweet smell from its mouth to lure in smaller Digimon, then ensnares them with its long, tentacle-like vines. Still, Vegiemon lacks any offensive power, making it no match for large-scale Digimon. When it grows, it will flower and bear fruit.

specialSkills.name: Super Stinky Jet
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Null physical attack at power 30. 50% chance to apply Poison.

attachmentSkills.name: Crescent Leaf II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant physical attack at power 9 x 7 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Bind
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 100% chance of 20% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to DEF for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Kehehe. I'm bored! Tell me a good story!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Okay, here's one about fighting monsters.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Whoa, that Momotaro guy's awesome! Now I'm all fired up! Kehe!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Okay, the one about the treasure box.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: So unfair that Urashima Taro got all old just for helping that turtle! I wanna know why!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: How about The Monkey and the Crab"?"

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: So even little crabs and their friends can beat a monkey if they work together!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: How about The Tale of Princess Kaguya"?"

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: So sad she went back to the moon and left those old folks behind... *sniffle*

minotarumon.name: Minotarumon
minotarumon.description: A Dark Digimon possessing strong Dark Side Power. Minotarumon's movements are slow, but it has an extremely tough hide that leaves it unfazed by regular attacks. Its special move Darkside Quake uses the Demon Arm attached to its left arm to cause a massive earthquake. The attack sends shockwaves over a wide area, making escape impossible no matter how far enemies run.

specialSkills.name: Darkside Quake
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Earth physical attack at power 40. Increased damage to targets with Mineral Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Stone Cleave II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Earth physical attack at power 45. 85% ACU.

musyamon.name: Musyamon
musyamon.description: An armored warrior Digimon that was once the data of a video game protagonist, but then Digivolved after being infected by a computer virus. Numerous battles with other Digimon have rendered Musyamon's appearance into that of a pathetic battlefield deserter, but that's only proof of its fearsome battle prowess and vitality. A savage warrior that's survived endless battles—that's Musyamon in a nutshell. The demon sword Shiratori-maru in its right hand is engraved with a forbidden spell that absorbs the life force of those it cuts, and is said to only grow sharper with every thousand Digimon it slashes down. Musyamon also has a special move called Kirisute Gomen that it unleashes from its Shiratori-maru. One day, it will settle things with Leomon, crossing its beloved blade with Leomon's.

specialSkills.name: Kirisute Gomen
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 65. If target is KO'd: Recovers user's HP by 50%. Increased damage to targets with Warrior Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Bind
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 100% chance of 20% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

mekanorimon.name: Mekanorimon
mekanorimon.description: A power suit Digimon used by other, small-sized Digimon, making it the first Vehicle-species Digimon in the Digital World. Mekanorimon is unique in that it can't operate itself, and fails to function unless piloted by other Digimon. Given its Virus attribute, the Digimon controlling it can also be considered a Virus Digimon. Mekanorimon is still in development, meaning its DigiCore will overheat if it's used too much. Its special move is Twinkle Beam, which fires a beam from the linear lens embedded in its torso. Any enemy hit by this beam loses control of their body.

specialSkills.name: Twinkle Beam
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 60. 60% chance to apply Paralysis.

attachmentSkills.name: Lightning Claw I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 6 x 4 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 12 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Meditator
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes status abnormalities.

raremon.name: Raremon
raremon.description: An Undead Digimon whose muscles have rotted off. Raremon tried to prolong its life by mechanizing itself, but the process was unstable, causing the data composing its body to start falling apart. Even so, its machine parts grant this creature life, preventing its death and allowing it to survive in this awful state. This crumbling form affords neither attack power nor intelligence, making Raremon act according to instinct alone. Its body emits a stench awful enough to send In-Training Digimon running, and it won't fight anything below Champion level.

specialSkills.name: Sludge
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 100% chance of 10% reduction to DEF/SPI for 3 turns. 50% chance to apply Poison.

attachmentSkills.name: Aqua Pressure II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Ocean Wave II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Water magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

waspmon.name: Waspmon
waspmon.description: An Android Digimon that guards the mysterious Royal Base, a secret floating honey base. The antennae on Waspmon's head have excellent scouting capabilities, and it constantly patrols in search of Digimon approaching the base, attacking any who even draw near. The propellers on its shoulders and stabilizer on its back let it move rapidly in all directions as it defends against approaching foes, driving them off with its powerful laser cannon. Waspmon's special move is Turbo Stinger, which fires its large-caliber laser cannon in a rapid burst.

specialSkills.name: Turbo Stinger
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 15 x 5 hits. Increased damage to targets with Humanoid Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Nanomachine Break II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 15 x 4 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Idle Bubble
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Sleep.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Bind
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 100% chance of 20% reduction to SPD for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Halt! Who goes there?! Ah... Sorry. Just a habit from my patrols.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You sure are reliable!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That makes all of my vigilance worthwhile. I'll take down any suspicious parties!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Why are you so vigilant?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Why, you ask...? Force of habit, I guess. I should think for myself a little more.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'll leave it to you to keep watch.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Yes, as you should. I'll have you watch my back in return, partner.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Thanks for all your hard work.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The acknowledgment is appreciated. After all... it's you I'm working hard to protect.

aquilamon.name: Aquilamon
aquilamon.description: A Giant Bird Digimon with a pair of enormous horns on its head. Known as the "Great Eagle of the Desert," Aquilamon soars through the sky at Mach speed and can spot distant foes with its keen eyesight. Its horns display tremendous force when Aquilamon swoops down to ram into enemies. While many Bird Digimon are savagely brutal, Aquilamon values decorum and obeys those it pledges allegiance to without fail. It slams into foes from above with its special move Glide Horn.

specialSkills.name: Glide Horn
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind physical attack at power 65. 100% chance of 20% reduction to ATK for 3 turn(s). Increased damage to targets with Bird Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Gale Storm I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Wind magic attack at power 25. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Bind
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 100% chance of 20% reduction to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wonder... How do you find my performance?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're strong and reliable.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You are too kind. I will continue to give you my best efforts!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Your intelligence is a huge help.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I am honored to be of service. I will continue to hone my mental prowess!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're a very good friend.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Why, thank you! Having you think of me as an equal is a great honor!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're awesome!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: ...Thank you. I value you as well.

ankylomon.name: Ankylomon
ankylomon.description: An Armored Dragon Digimon completely sheathed in hardened skin. Tough protuberances cover it all over, giving its charge attack incredible destructive power. Although as an herbivore it lacks ferocity, Ankylomon displays a brave nature nevertheless. It uses its special move Tail Hammer to ferociously beat the enemy with the iron ball on the tip of its tail. Any Digimon hit by this technique has its entire skeleton (or wireframe) utterly obliterated.

specialSkills.name: Tail Hammer
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 65. 25% chance to apply Confusion.

attachmentSkills.name: Awesome Quake I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Earth magic attack at power 35. 85% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Hate Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Taunting.

attachmentSkills.name: Stone Cleave II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Earth physical attack at power 45. 85% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm the hardest and heaviest of 'em all!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Don't you think you eat too much?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Can't get a bod like mine by sweatin' that stuff! I chow down all I want!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Do you have trouble moving around?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I can charge and jump with the best of 'em! Watch and learn, kid!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Maybe you should lose some weight.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Don't you worry. I'm at my bulky best!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Cool!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Just you wait till I Digivolve. Then I'll be even cooler!

exveemon.name: ExVeemon
exveemon.description: A Mythical Dragon Digimon that gained Veemon's original power and Digivolved to Champion. ExVeemon is the pure breed of Veedramon, which is said to be a derivative species. Attacks with its developed arm and leg strength are capable of shattering a mountain of boulders without a trace. It's feared for this destructive power, but in truth it has a strong sense of justice, and doesn't use its might recklessly. ExVeemon's special move Vee Laser fires an energy beam from the X-shaped mark on its chest.

specialSkills.name: Vee Laser
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind physical attack at power 70.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Sonic Shot II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Dispel
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes stat debuffs.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I still need more power.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You've gotten a lot stronger.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Maybe compared to before I Digivolved, but I gotta do better than this!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're pretty cool, though.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: All that talking me up isn't gonna work! I've grown out of that stuff!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You just have to train more.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Right. All I can do is train! I wanna keep Digivolving, so cheer me on!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I like you the way you are.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: But I want you to like me even more, and that's why I'm gonna train to get stronger!

guardromon-gold.name: Guardromon (Gold)
guardromon-gold.description: Guarding a Chrondigizoit mine, Guardromon transformed itself to withstand merciless repeated raids by illegal miners. Guardromon (Gold)'s armor is said to be the result of taking in Chrondigizoit dust data floating in the air. This armor is more durable than a normal Guardromon's, and its special move Destruction Grenade succeeds in boasting slightly more output. On the other hand, Guardromon (Gold)'s armor is heavier, and this is the primary reason why its movements have dulled overall.

specialSkills.name: Destruction Grenade
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire physical attack at power 35. Always hits.

attachmentSkills.name: Shine Burst I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 25. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Spell Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Magic.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

stingmon.name: Stingmon
stingmon.description: An extremely unusual Insectoid Digimon with a humanoid shape. Stingmon possesses both the hard exoskeleton and the simple movements characteristic of Insectoid Digimon. Excelling as an assassin, it prides itself on attacks that target vitals with agile movements and precise judgment, silencing the enemy with a single strike. Stingmon possesses a calm, cool and highly intelligent personality. It uses its fearsome special move Spiking Strike to skewer foes with the spikes on its arms.

specialSkills.name: Spiking Strike
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant physical attack at power 65. If target has yet to act: 25% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Rune Forest II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Plant magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Please tell me! What do you fight to protect?!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: My own pride.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That must be some pride you have! You have my respect!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Ruins, old tomes and other precious culture.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You'll pass on history to future generations. I, too, will fight to protect the ruins!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The friends I believe in.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Yes, friends are more valuable than gold and silver! I'm happy to count among yours!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You, my dear partner.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You think of me as your partner?! I'm touched! I'll fight to protect you, partner.

kurisarimon.name: Kurisarimon
kurisarimon.description: Kurisarimon is a Champion Digimon that resembles a chrysalis. In order to Digivolve into a more powerful form, the Rookie Keramon temporarily enters a chrysalis state to store up its energy. As a result, it becomes completely unable to move, but its tough outer hide protects it while the tentacles that grow from its back allow it to attack foes. Keramon can sometimes Digivolve directly into an Ultimate Digimon without going through this Champion phase, but Digivolving into Kurisarimon allows it to reach a more powerful Ultimate form. Its special move Data Crusher involves using the tentacles that extend from its back to destroy an enemy's composition data.

specialSkills.name: Data Crusher
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 60. 30% chance to apply Crystallization.

attachmentSkills.name: Shadow Fang II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 30 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Mental Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to SPI for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Reset Body
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Removes stat buffs.

submarimon.name: Submarimon
submarimon.description: An Armor Aquatic Digimon that has Digivolved with the Digi-Egg of Reliability. The Digi-Egg of Reliability has the attribute of Water, allowing those who equip it to demonstrate their true power underwater. Submarimon swims freely through the vast oceans, and the skills it unleashes in underwater battles can only be rivaled by other Aquatic Digimon. Its special move is Oxygen Homing, which fires super-compressed oxygen.

specialSkills.name: Oxygen Homing
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Water physical attack at power 45.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Heal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Moderately recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: Reset Body
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Removes stat buffs.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

shurimon.name: Shurimon
shurimon.description: An Armor Mutant Digimon that has Digivolved with the Digi-Egg of Sincerity. The Digi-Egg of Sincerity has the attribute of Plant, allowing those who equip it to blend in with nature, hiding in wind like a floating leaf only to appear in the enemy's blind spot and land a precise attack. Shurimon is the epitome of a ninja. Its special move is Double Stars, which hurls the giant shuriken on its back at the enemy from high in the air. These moves are also the names of its shuriken.

specialSkills.name: Double Stars
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Steel physical attack at power 22 x 2 hits. Increased damage to targets with Dragon Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Rune Forest II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Plant magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Character Reversal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy or ally] 100% chance to apply Reverse.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You may leave the shuriken work to me!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Go on. Give one a throw, then.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I fear I must refuse. My shuriken always find their mark. I shall not take a life this day.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Teach me how to throw them!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It will not do much good if you cannot extend your limbs like I can. Still, observe!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Lend me one of your shuriken.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: These shuriken are my life. Even if I trust in you, I cannot hand them over so readily.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Okay. I'll leave it to you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Very good. I vow on these shuriken I shall protect my comrades until my last breath!

digmon.name: Digmon
digmon.description: An Armor Insectoid Digimon that has Digivolved with the Digi-Egg of Knowledge. The Digi-Egg of Knowledge has the attribute of Earth, allowing those who equip it to manipulate the very ground. As its unique form suggests, Digmon never loses against other Digimon in underground combat. Its special move is Gold Rush, which rotates the drills on its nose and hands at high speed to unleash a concentrated strike.

specialSkills.name: Gold Rush
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Steel physical attack at power 40. If target has already acted: Increased damage.

attachmentSkills.name: Mental Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPI for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Gaia Blaster II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth magic attack at power 70. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Awesome Quake II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Earth magic attack at power 45. 85% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Reflect
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Reflect Magic.

nefertimon.name: Nefertimon
nefertimon.description: An Armor Holy Beast Digimon that has Digivolved with the Digi-Egg of Light. The Digi-Egg of Light has the attribute of Light, allowing those who equip it to purify darkness with luminescent power. Though Gatomon isn't a descendant of an ancient species of Digimon, it's able to Armor Digivolve into Nefertimon by awakening a dormant special ability within its data composition. Its special move is Rosetta Stone, which summons an enormous stone tablet engraved with ancient DigiCode inscriptions to attack foes.

specialSkills.name: Rosetta Stone
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth magic attack at power 75. 50% chance to apply Confusion.

attachmentSkills.name: Shine Burst I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 25. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Heal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Moderately recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: Holy Light II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Safety Guard
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Guts.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Allow me to enchant you with the light of my smile.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're not upset?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Such thoughts are proof of your impurity. One day, I shall purify you with my charm.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Wait. You're smiling?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Wait. You cannot tell? One day, I shall purify you with my charm.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Oh, I'm enchanted.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: But of course. I have faith that you and I shall get along swimmingly.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I won't let you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Other humans said the same, but they, too, were mesmerized. As you shall be, I am sure.

flamedramon.name: Flamedramon
flamedramon.description: An Armored Dragon Man Digimon that has Digivolved through the Digi-Egg of Courage. The Digi-Egg of Courage has the attribute of Fire, allowing those who equip it to attack opposing Digimon with overwhelming power as their hand-to-hand fighting abilities increase to the intensity of raging flames. Flamedramon uses its signature move Flaming Fist to pummel its opponents with fists of fire.

specialSkills.name: Flaming Fist
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 75. The lower the user's HP, the greater the damage. Increased damage to targets with Dragon Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Magma Fall I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire magic attack at power 25. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Burst Flame II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire magic attack at power 12 x 5 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Normalize
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes Injury & Disease.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: My courage is a blazing inferno!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let it blaze even hotter.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Say no more. My courage is gonna blaze right there alongside my flames!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Why so much courage?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Because I've got the Digi-Egg of Courage. But I'd be full of courage even without it!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I think it's blazing a little too hot.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Oops. Really? Sometimes I don't catch that on my own, so thanks for telling me.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I feel brave now, too.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: So I set your courage ablaze, too? Guess we're the ultimate team!

pegasusmon.name: Pegasusmon
pegasusmon.description: An Armor Holy Beast Digimon that has Digivolved with the Digi-Egg of Hope. The Digi-Egg of Hope has a Holy attribute, allowing those who equip it to wield sacred power. This power allows Pegasusmon to exhibit absolute strength against evil beings. Its special move Silver Blaze, fires a holy beam from its forehead.

specialSkills.name: Silver Blaze
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 75. If target is Virus: Increased damage.

attachmentSkills.name: Heal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Moderately recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: Shine Burst I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 25. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Revive
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Revives from KO and moderately recovers HP.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Don't stand behind me. I won't be held responsible if you get a kick to the head.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Kick me if you need to.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Talk about asking for it... You'll change your tune once you see my Rodeo Gallop.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Would it really hurt that much?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hurt" wouldn't begin to describe it. Imagine it as a strike both brutal and true."

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Can I ride you?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I would prefer you didn't without reason, but for the right cause I would acquiesce.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Don't you do it, now.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It's a reflex, I assure you. Though perhaps your special presence would negate it?

halsemon.name: Halsemon
halsemon.description: An Armor Beast Digimon that has Digivolved with the Digi-Egg of Love. The Digi-Egg of Love has the attribute of Wind, allowing those who equip it to spread their wings and soar through the heavens, like a gale whipping through the ether. When it comes to aerial combat, Halsemon outclasses enemy Digimon in speed and attack power. Its special move is Tempest Wing, which generates massive tornadoes from its spinning body.

specialSkills.name: Tempest Wing
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind physical attack at power 18 x 4 hits.

attachmentSkills.name: Sonic Shot II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Dispel
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes stat debuffs.

attachmentSkills.name: Revive
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Revives from KO and moderately recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: X-Aura
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] Moderately recovers HP.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'll take a short jaunt through the skies.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Bon voyage!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I want to survey the ground safety from the air. I'll be back before you know it.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'll watch you from here.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'd be impressed if human eyes could follow me. I imagine you'll lose track real quick.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Take me with you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Flying with you would be pretty fun, but this is no time for games. Maybe next time.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: By yourself? That's not fair.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wish I could take you with me, but the skies contain their fair share of dangers.

lighdramon.name: Lighdramon
lighdramon.description: An Armor Beast Digimon that has Digivolved through the Digi-Egg of Friendship. The Digi-Egg of Friendship has the attribute of Thunder, allowing those who equip it to move with the speed of lightning to face off against their foes, then defeat them with electrically charged attacks. Lighdramon's special move is Lightning Blade, which shoots an electric sword from the lightning-imbued blade on its head.

specialSkills.name: Lightning Blade
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 75.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Shock Plasma II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 20 x 3 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Thunder Fall II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 12 x 3 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Reflect
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Reflect Physical.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I want to take a quick run around here.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Can you give me a ride?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm glad such breakneck speeds don't make you queasy, but maybe I'd better not.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let's run together!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I like your pluck! Still, I'm real fast, you know. I run at the speed of lightning itself.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I think I'll pass, myself.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: But darting across the land feels real good. I wish I could give you a ride.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let's just take it easy.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: If you insist. Let's chill for today. We can save the run for another day.

agunimon.name: Agunimon
agunimon.description: A Digimon with power over fire that bears the might of the Ten Legendary Warriors. Agunimon's DigiCore is covered in the holy blaze of the Spiritual Fire, allowing it to control fire at will. A guardian deity, it's an avatar of the Firewall that defends the Net. Agunimon gets riled up easily, so its warrior side uses yoga breathing to encourage mental discipline. Agunimon also has a somewhat old-fashioned way of speaking, akin to that of a martial artist. It fights with Eastern martial arts in battle, focusing its spirit to a point to gather flames in one place and raise its attack power. Agunimon uses its special move Pyro Punch to shoot a flame dragon from its fire-wreathed fist.

specialSkills.name: Pyro Punch
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 35 x 2 hits. Increased damage to targets with Immortal Trait.

specialSkills.name: Corona Blaster
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire physical attack at power 20 x 2 hits. Increased damage to targets with Immortal Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Hate Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Taunting.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Flames obey my bidding.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You shouldn't burn things.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: My flames are sacred, and only ever unleashed to cleanse evil from the Digital World.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Can you incinerate garbage?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I can reduce anything to ash, but I must remain mindful of the environment.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Can you put out fires, too?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That is a tall order... However, you have my word I shall deal with any blazes I create.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Can you heat up water?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: There is nothing I cannot heat up. If it is hot water you desire, then it shall be done.

lobomon.name: Lobomon
lobomon.description: A Digimon with power over light that bears the might of the Ten Legendary Warriors. The lavender parts all over Lobomon's body are made of Saint Amethyst, a crystal containing holy light. This light maintains an extraordinary durability in the amethyst when one's heart is true, but the substance turns brittle the moment negativity arises in the heart of any who wield it. Lobomon has a chivalrous spirit and puts its life on the line for what it believes in, and hates injustice. Taciturn and rarely concerning itself with others, many believe it to be an unfeeling creature, but this warrior is actually kind-hearted. Lobomon uses its special move Zwei Sieger to connect the twin swords Licht Schwert before cutting multiple opponents to pieces.

specialSkills.name: Zwei Sieger
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 75. Increased damage to targets with Evil Trait.

specialSkills.name: Speed Star
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 70. Acts first next round. Increased damage to targets with Beast Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Shine Burst II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Safety Guard
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Guts.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A warrior must always walk the path of righteousness.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're allowed to make mistakes sometimes.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: True. Happens to everyone. The most important thing is to recognize and fix your mistakes.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're always doing the right thing.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Thanks, but best not to overestimate me. If I blunder, I need you to tell me right away.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'll try to be careful.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That was not directed at you. Still, nothing better than walking the straight and narrow.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're a stand-up Digimon, you know that?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I am merely saying what a warrior should. Still, I will try to live up to those words.

lanamon.name: Lanamon
lanamon.description: A Digimon with power over water, it bears the might of the Ten Legendary Warriors. Lanamon has a sharp intuition and an changeable mood, due perhaps to the fact that it used to operate mainly in the ocean area of a weather forecasting system. Its emotions are tempestuous, acting like a lovely young lady when in a good mood, and crying like a hysterical baby when it gets upset. Lanamon uses few direct attacks in battle, relying instead on manipulated rain or other indirect methods of fighting. That being said, its battle strength swells during surges of emotion, with its combat prowess growing unfathomably strong when crying. Lanamon's special move is Rain Stream, which focuses torrential rain to crush the enemy.

specialSkills.name: Rain Stream
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water magic attack at power 70.

specialSkills.name: Titanic Charge
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 75.

attachmentSkills.name: Hydro Water I
