attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water magic attack at power 8 x 5 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Ocean Wave II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Water magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to INT for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Venom Trap
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Poison.

burninggreymon.name: BurningGreymon
burninggreymon.description: A Digimon with power over fire that bears the might of the Ten Legendary Warriors. BurningGreymon's skin withstands high temperatures, allowing it to move even through lava. This firefighter snuffs out fires with its own instantaneous, explosive flames. Said to have sprung forth from research data on active volcanoes, it's thought to contain an unknown, immeasurable energy. The fire dragon of Hindu mythology, adversary to the thunder god Indra, is embodied in BurningGreymon's ferocious personality. BurningGreymon uses its special move Corona Blaster to fire a laser rivaling solar heat rays from the Rudriya Darpana superweapons on its arms.

specialSkills.name: Corona Blaster
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire physical attack at power 20 x 2 hits. Increased damage to targets with Immortal Trait.

specialSkills.name: Pyro Punch
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 35 x 2 hits. Increased damage to targets with Immortal Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Hate Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Taunting.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The flames of the fire dragon reduce all foes to ash!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Even the really, really big foes?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The mightier the opponent, the brighter my fighting spirit burns—and my flames to match!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Even a whole slew of foes?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'll leave tactics to you. I don't care how bad things get in battle! I never back down!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You sure there's nothing left of them after?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Shoot a laser that rivals the sun, and you won't find anything in its wake! Trust me.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Well, what if they get away?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That'll never happen. I'll whip up a blazing tornado with my flame wings to protect you!

calmaramon.name: Calmaramon
calmaramon.description: A Digimon with power over water, it bears the might of the Ten Legendary Warriors. Half humanoid and half beast, Calmaramon can spin its tentacles at high speed for offense, or gather them together into a defensive wall, making for a versatile tool in combat. If it can't finish an opponent with its tentacles, Calmaramon withdraws into its mantle, increasing the power of its attacks as it takes on the form of a giant squid. This mantle is even more resilient than its tentacles, rendering external physical attacks against it harmless. Though Calmaramon is more accustomed to the seas and skies, it can skillfully maneuver its ten tentacles to move around on land like a giant hermit crab as well. Much like a witch, it's crafty and quick to anger. Its special move is Titanic Charge, which spins its hardened mantle to drill into foes.

specialSkills.name: Titanic Charge
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 75.

specialSkills.name: Rain Stream
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water magic attack at power 70.

attachmentSkills.name: Void Ray I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Null magic attack at power 25. 90% ACU. 10% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Ocean Wave II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Water magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

kendogarurumon.name: KendoGarurumon
kendogarurumon.description: A Digimon with power over light that bears the might of the Ten Legendary Warriors. KendoGarurumon's capability of moving at incredible speed is perhaps related to its discovery of a fiber optic network. Capable of dodging between bullets to close in on foes, it will mercilessly tear apart anyone it deems evil with its sharp claws and fangs. Possessed of a righteous heart and all the determination of Garmr, the wolf said to have fought with Týr in Norse mythology, KendoGarurumon has an intense hatred of evil. It will refuse to obey any with even a hint of wickedness in their heart, although once it swears loyalty to someone, it will never betray them. Its special move is Speed Star, with which it charges forward at light speed to cut through foes with the Wing Blades on its back.

specialSkills.name: Speed Star
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 70. Acts first next round. Increased damage to targets with Beast Trait.

specialSkills.name: Zwei Sieger
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 75. Increased damage to targets with Evil Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Shine Burst II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Safety Guard
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Guts.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I pledge fealty to you, my liege.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Counting on it!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wish for us to fight for justice together, so it is I who am counting on you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What are we gonna do?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Defend all that is good in the Digital World. I should like to hear your thoughts as well.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I want us to be equals.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You are a truly humble human. Even as equals, I would endeavor to follow your lead.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I feel a sense of duty now.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: And it is that sincerity that drew me to you. Let us smite evil together.

aegiochusmon.name: Aegiochusmon
aegiochusmon.description: A Deity Digimon that synthesizes the abilities of various species, using a human body as its base. This synthesis is said to have resulted from the pursuit of the ultimate goal of omnipotence, dramatically changing this Digimon's form to match its environment. This form is based on Dragon-species data, which would ordinarily lie dormant within its body, centered around the crystal in its chest, but Aegiochusmon manifested this data onto the surface of its body, establishing it as armor. This armor is a power suit that's not only for defense, but which also acts as muscle, dramatically increasing attack power. Aegiochusmon uses its special move Bolt Break Knockdown to perform a punch rush with fists coiled in lightning produced from its horn, or Lightning Pile to drive a pile-shaped bolt down on the enemy from above, driving them into the ground. If this move pierces the enemy once, subsequently released piles then connect without fail, no matter where they're thrown.

specialSkills.name: Bolt Break Knockdown
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 25 x 3 hits. 30% chance to apply Paralysis. Increased damage to targets with Deity Trait.

specialSkills.name: Lightning Pile
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 70. 100% chance of reduction to Electricity resistance. Increased damage to targets with Aquatic Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Thunder Fall II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 12 x 3 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Curse Barrier
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Status Abnormality Immunity.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Now that I can shoot lightning, you might get shocked if you touch me.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm not afraid of a little shock.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You really are a brave one, huh? I could learn a few things from you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'll wear rubber gloves.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: And that would protect you from lightning? Huh. You learn something new every day.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You'd never do anything mean like that.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Haha. There's no fooling you, huh? Yeah, don't worry. I'd never shock you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You already electrify me.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Wow, listen to you! What a character you are! Hehe!

aegiochusmon-green.name: Aegiochusmon: Green
aegiochusmon-green.description: A Deity Digimon that synthesizes the abilities of various species, using a human body as its base. This synthesis is said to have resulted from the pursuit of the ultimate goal of omnipotence, dramatically changing this Digimon's form to match its environment. This form is based on Plant-species data, which would ordinarily lie dormant within its body, centered around the crystal in its chest, but Aegiochusmon: Green has affixed the Plant data around its arms and upper body. Due to its Plant-type base, its body is dramatically lighter than other forms. Aegiochusmon: Green is capable of firing sturdy thorns from the busters equipped to both arms. It uses these for offense, defense and tricky maneuvers that utilize them like grapples on various surfaces. This form is best known for its agile movements that utilize its equipment and airy frame. Aegiochusmon: Green's special moves are Bramble Bite, which summons demonic thorns that bite into the enemy, and Plant Zone Cradle, which unleashes countless thorns from its body to surround foes over a wide area, tearing them to ribbons.

specialSkills.name: Bramble Bite
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant physical attack at power 85. Recovers HP/SP equal to 10% of damage. 100% chance to apply Plant resistance Down. Increased damage to targets with Deity Trait.

specialSkills.name: Plant Zone Cradle
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Plant magic attack at power 60. 30% chance to apply Sleep. Increased damage to targets with Mineral Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Thunder Fall II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 12 x 3 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Curse Barrier
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Status Abnormality Immunity.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The other day, I saw a flower garden full of roses. It was really beautiful.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let's make weapons out of all the thorns.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Haha. Like the ones I have? True. These thorns do pack a prickly sting!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let's gather the petals for a bath.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You mean put the petals in the water? Huh. I never thought of using them that way.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let's go see it together.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Sure, I'd love to! And I'm gonna hold you to that promise!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'd like to give all the roses to you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Um, would that really suit me...? Still, that's very nice of you to say. Thanks.

aegiochusmon-dark.name: Aegiochusmon: Dark
aegiochusmon-dark.description: A Deity Digimon that synthesizes the abilities of various species, using a human body as its base. This synthesis is said to have resulted from the pursuit of the ultimate goal of omnipotence, dramatically changing this Digimon's form to match its environment. This form is based on Evil-species data, which would ordinarily lie dormant within its body, centered around the crystal in its chest, but Aegiochusmon: Dark has allowed the Evil data to proliferate throughout its whole body. The malevolence of Evil types bubbles forth in both mind and body, causing it to treat everything it sees as prey to be hunted. A virus lurks within the red electricity discharged from its body, making this special Digimon a Vaccine-attribute type that also creates viruses. It injects the viruses it generates into the wounds it inflicts on enemies, making for a terrifying attack that destroys victims from within. Aegiochusmon: Dark uses its special moves Triangler to mince foes with three scythes and Plasmadness to shoot dark electricity gathered in both hands.

specialSkills.name: Triangler
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 25 x 3 hits. If target is Data: Increased damage. Increased damage to targets with Deity Trait.

specialSkills.name: Plasmadness
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 70. If target is Data: Increased damage. 100% chance to apply Dark resistance Down. Increased damage to targets with Angel Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Thunder Fall II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 12 x 3 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Curse Barrier
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Status Abnormality Immunity.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I think I wanna do something mean to you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Be mean to me and I'll be mean back.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Figured you'd say that. You're ready for anything, aren't you?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What are you gonna do?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm not telling. Besides, I can't just come up with these things outta nowhere, you know.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Please don't.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Doing it even if you say not to is the whole point. But I guess I can skip it for today...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That isn't like you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Trying to talk me out of it? Sorry, but once you catch my eye, it's gonna happen.

aegiochusmon-blue.name: Aegiochusmon: Blue
aegiochusmon-blue.description: A Deity Digimon that synthesizes the abilities of various species, using a human body as its base. This synthesis is said to have resulted from the pursuit of the ultimate goal of omnipotence, dramatically changing this Digimon's form to match its environment. This form is based on Android-species data, which would ordinarily lie dormant within its body, centered around the crystal in its chest, but Aegiochusmon: Blue has concentrated this data primarily into the upper left side of its body. It comes equipped with a power-unlocking mechanism characteristic of androids, and a lock-on capability that ensures targets never escape. Aegiochusmon: Blue can even detach its giant left arm, known as its mechanized power arm, to seek out and attack a locked-on enemy before reattaching the arm again. Its special move is Penetra-laser, which fires a beam from the fingertips of its mechanized power arm. When the arm is attached to Aegiochusmon: Blue's body, it can use Powered Ignition, which gathers energy into its palm to unleash at its foe in a charging blast.

specialSkills.name: Powered Ignition
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 80. 100% chance of reduction to Steel resistance. Increased damage to targets with Deity Trait.

specialSkills.name: Penetra-Laser
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 100. The lower the user's SP, the lower the damage. Increased damage to targets with Fire Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Thunder Fall II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 12 x 3 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Curse Barrier
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Status Abnormality Immunity.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: My left hand is so big now... Are you scared of me?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Not at all.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Aw, I was hoping you'd be at least a little spooked... But thanks. I'm glad I asked.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: No, but it is pretty interesting.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Oh... I guess I do have more to learn, too... about myself, and how to protect everyone.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: More like reassured that I can count on you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Really? Hehe. Well, I'm counting on you, too. Let's use this hand of mine to save everyone!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It looks cool.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What?! R-Really? Now I'm feeling kinda self-conscious. Hehe...

aegiochusmon-holy.name: Aegiochusmon: Holy
aegiochusmon-holy.description: A Deity Digimon that synthesizes the abilities of various species, using a human body as its base. This synthesis is said to have resulted from the pursuit of the ultimate goal of omnipotence, dramatically changing this Digimon's form to match its environment. This form is based on Angel-species data, which would ordinarily lie dormant within its body, centered around the crystal in its chest, but Aegiochusmon: Holy has spread this data throughout its body, and its heart is as clear as a pool of reflective water. Using the shields on its hands, it can channel the overwhelming vaccine welling up from within into weapons such as short swords or a defensive barrier that no Virus data can penetrate. Aegiochusmon: Holy's special moves are Lightning Shower, which rains a barrage of short swords down on foes from the sky, and Circlet Defense, which generates a defensive barrier that repels an enemy's attack. The attack is reflected back with an added jolt of electricity, making for a powerful counter.

specialSkills.name: Lightning Shower
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light physical attack at power 30 x 3 hits. 100% chance of reduction to Light resistance. Increased damage to targets with Evil Trait.

specialSkills.name: Circlet Defense
specialSkills.description: [Target: User] Upon receiving a physical attack, counters with an Electricity magic attack at power 90.

attachmentSkills.name: Thunder Fall II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 12 x 3 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Curse Barrier
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Status Abnormality Immunity.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Is your heart pure?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Nope. Sorry.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You might be joking, but I suggest you mend your ways. I cannot abide an impure heart.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It might be a little impure.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Very honest of you. But think carefully. If you feel that way, purity is not far off.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Probably.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: So you have some doubt within you? I shall help you rid yourself of this uncertainty.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Of course it is.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A bold claim. But do not worry. I believe you.

megakabuterimon.name: MegaKabuterimon
megakabuterimon.description: A Digivolution of Kabuterimon discovered in a tropical area of the Net. Approximately 1.5 times the size of Kabuterimon, MegaKabuterimon is quite large for an Insectoid Digimon. It has dramatically increased the power of its horn, which is the species' primary weapon, as well as grown muscles at the bases of its forelimbs, improving its hand-to-hand combat ability. MegaKabuterimon is renowned for its chivalrous nature, and is well-known for protecting weaker creatures. Its special move is Horn Buster, by which MegaKabuterimon stabs opponents with its giant horn.

specialSkills.name: Horn Buster
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant physical attack at power 80. 100% chance of 20% reduction to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Thorn Strike II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant magic attack at power 30 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Mental Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPI for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Thunder Fall II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 12 x 3 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I have a question. What is it you wish to protect?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: My principles!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Ah, so you have convictions, do you? I wish I were like you!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Maybe my memories?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Without memories, everything you have been up to now would disappear... A scary thought.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: My dear friends.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You are such a caring person. Let us protect our friends together!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You, MegaKabuterimon.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: ...Wh-Why, thank you. I would like to keep you safe as well.

andromon.name: Andromon
andromon.description: Andromon is an Android Digimon with a humanoid shape. It's powerful enough to take out any Digimon of less than Ultimate level with a single blow. Developed as a prototype for Android Digimon, Andromon was created as a machine-based model at the same time Boltmon was made to be an organic one. The same techniques were then appropriated for use in other Digimon, including MetalGreymon and Megadramon. Since Andromon is a prototype, it lacks emotions and has no will of its own, acting only in accordance with its programming. It uses its special move Spiral Sword to fire an energy blade from its arm.

specialSkills.name: Spiral Sword
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 80. 10% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Machine Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Shock Plasma II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 20 x 3 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Character Reversal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy or ally] 100% chance to apply Reverse.

attachmentSkills.name: Thruster Metal II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel magic attack at power 9 x 7 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: ALL WHO STAND IN OUR PATH SHALL BE ELIMINATED.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That's the spirit!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: LEAVE THE REST UP TO ME.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Just don't overdo it.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: OVERDOING IT

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Sometimes it's important to talk things out.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I WILL LEAVE THOSE SITUATIONS TO YOU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What about Love thy neighbor"?"

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: ...I WILL TRY.

wingdramon.name: Wingdramon
wingdramon.description: Wingdramon is a Sky Dragon Digimon that uses its large, highly-developed wings to fly freely through the air. Since its wing scales have the ability to nullify gravity, it doesn't even need to flap its wings to stay aloft. As a result, it hardly ever bothers to land, spending most of its life in the air. It's believed to be capable of flying at speeds exceeding Mach 20, meaning very few Digimon could likely survive an aerial battle with Wingdramon. Wingdramon's special move is Blaze Sonic Breath, with which it breathes out a blast of scorching hot air faster than the speed of sound.

specialSkills.name: Blaze Sonic Breath
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 80. If target has yet to act: 25% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Gale Storm II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Wind magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Magma Fall II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Wind Claw II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

aeroveedramon.name: AeroVeedramon
aeroveedramon.description: AeroVeedramon is a further-Digivolved form of Veedramon that's become capable of flight. Only the strongest of the Veedramon line can Digivolve into AeroVeedramon by making it through countless battles, and since Veedramon is a rare species to begin with, AeroVeedramon is practically a legend. It also gained more than wings in the process of Digivolving, and now boasts increased offensive and defensive capabilities. Its special move Dragon Impulse unleashes a shockwave in the shape of a dragon.

specialSkills.name: Dragon Impulse
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind physical attack at power 90. Increased damage to targets with Dragon Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Sonic Shot II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Power Energy II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Void Ray II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Null magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU. 10% CRT Rate.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hey, you can't fly, right? Well, you can hop on my back. Where do you want to fly to?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wanna go super fast!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Ha! You're a brave kid! My gliding can get pretty intense, though! Wanna give it a go?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wanna go see what's in the clouds.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hey, I've never seen the clouds up close, either. Seeing how they're made might be fun!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let's go see a rainbow together.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I heard that rainbows are like bridges that connect friends. Maybe we should have a look!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Anywhere is fine as long as we go together.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hehe... I was thinking the same thing! I'm sure we'll have fun wherever we go!

extyrannomon.name: ExTyrannomon
extyrannomon.description: A Puppet Digimon that has concealed itself inside a stuffed animal shaped like Tyrannomon. Why exactly this mysterious Digimon chose a stuffed Tyrannomon is unclear, but it probably just hid inside whatever plush toy was nearby. Whatever the explanation, this stuffed Tyrannomon has all the offensive and defensive power of Monzaemon, meaning no ordinary Digimon can stand up to it. However, just like Monzaemon, it's nothing more than an ornament without someone to pull its strings. Its special move is Pretty Attack, which emanates from its adorable body.

specialSkills.name: Pretty Attack
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Recovers HP based on user's SPI. Removes stat debuffs.

attachmentSkills.name: Comet Hammer II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 11 x 6 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Curse Barrier
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Status Abnormality Immunity.

attachmentSkills.name: Nightmare II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Awesome Quake II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Earth magic attack at power 45. 85% ACU.

angewomon.name: Angewomon
angewomon.description: A High Angel Digimon with the appearance of a beautiful woman. Though previously classified as an Angel Digimon, the great power of its abilities makes it clear that it's a High Angel Digimon. Champion-level Angels tend to have six wings, while Ultimate-level Angels have eight wings. Angewomon is calm by nature, but doesn't tolerate wickedness, and will continue to attack until its foes are reformed. Due to its strength of spirit and great power, it's regarded as a goddess-like figure of the Digital World. Angewomon's special move is Celestial Arrow—also known as Heaven's Punishment—which fires a devastating lightning attack.

specialSkills.name: Celestial Arrow
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 90. Increased damage to targets with Evil Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Shock Plasma II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 20 x 3 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Aura
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] Slightly recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: Normalize
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes Injury & Disease.

attachmentSkills.name: Shine Burst II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: One must right the world's wrongs, condoning no evil.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'll help you do that.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I want you to be the nucleus of our efforts. Thus it is I who should be helping you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I feel the same way.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: If we each act thoughtfully and do good, the world will move in the right direction.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wanna be someone like that.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Each like-minded ally I can muster makes the world a better place.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I do that even when I'm by myself.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I am here for you. I would never leave that burden to you alone.

garudamon.name: Garudamon
garudamon.description: A Bird Man Digimon with large talons and wings that allow it to fly freely through the sky. Garudamon values order and justice above all, and is also known as the nature-loving Guardian of Wind and Land. Even among Bird Digimon, Garudamon is worshiped as a Digimon that only a select, highly-intelligent, combat-adept few can Digivolve into. Whenever the Digital World is in chaos, Garudamon is said to appear, resolving the source of the disorder and guiding things back to a more peaceful course. Garudamon is also close friends with the hero Leomon, who possesses the same spirit. Garudamon's special move is Shadow Wing, with which it sends forth a vacuum blade at incredible speed to slice opponents to shreds.

specialSkills.name: Shadow Wing
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire magic attack at power 50. Increased damage to targets with Bird Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Sonic Shot II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Gale Storm II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Wind magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm the guardian of justice and order in the world!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Sorry for causing so much trouble.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: If you feel that way, then mend your ways. Now, and without troubling me further.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Are you sure things aren't a little chaotic?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That's how it appears to you, is it? Still, this bears looking into on my end as well.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Great! Good luck with that.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Of course. It's my duty, after all. However, as my companion, you'll be assisting me, too.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let's be guardians together.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That sentiment is most welcome. I'm certain there is much you can do.

grapleomon.name: GrapLeomon
grapleomon.description: GrapLeomon is a martial artist Beast Man Digimon. After taking in data from various fighting games, it developed its own super moves that it uses to crush opponents. By spinning the turbines on its arms and legs at high speeds, GrapLeomon is able to unleash a wide variety of techniques. To keep them spinning, though, it must channel its fighting spirit directly from its DigiCore into them all at once, which requires exceptional force of will. It's only because GrapLeomon has inherited the data of Leomon, the "King of Beasts," that it's able to spin its turbines at such incredible speeds, using a sheer, singlehearted devotion to justice. Its special move The King of Fists spins the turbines on its arms so quickly that it's able to distort gravity with a single blow.

specialSkills.name: The King of Fists
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind physical attack at power 80. 100% chance of 20% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s). Increased damage to targets with Beast Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Nanomachine Break II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 15 x 4 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Wind Claw II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Void Ray III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Null magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU. 10% CRT Rate.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: For the sake of greater strength, I must go out and train. What training should I do?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Journey to unseen lands.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: So tempering the heart is more important than the fist? Courage is paramount in a fight!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Read lots of books.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I didn't even think of that. The right knowledge lets you dominate any foe, huh?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let's spar together!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You'd join me in my training?! I see... Yes, we should grow stronger together, my partner.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I don't want you to go train.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Haha. Worried I wouldn't come back? Well, never fear. If I go, you're coming with.

grademon.name: Grademon
grademon.description: Grademon is a Warrior Digimon known as the "Golden Meteor," due to the courageous way it smashes through the vanguard of the enemy. It exhibits blazing speed when using its "Twin Blade of the Dragon King" in tandem, but the truth is, the swords bear an irrepressible curse that forces the wielder into a berserker frenzy. Though not as powerful overall, Grademon's swordsmanship is believed to surpass that of LordKnightmon of the Royal Knights. The royal blue cape Grademon wears is also a badge of honor bestowed for its meritorious deeds in many battles. Its special move is Cross Blade, a swift sword technique that cleaves through the enemy in a cross-shaped pattern.

specialSkills.name: Cross Blade
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 80. Acts first next round.

attachmentSkills.name: Saint Knuckle II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 30 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Full Metal Pile II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Steel magic attack at power 35. 85% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Leave the vanguard to me.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I can't do that.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I prefer to take the forefront myself, but for you, I can make an exception.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'll think about it.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I look forward to seeing what strategy you devise.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It's all yours.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: When the Golden Meteor charges forth, you will witness swordplay of unparalleled speed.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Just don't lose it when you fight.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Is that sarcasm? My swordplay is on par with a Holy Knight, but I will accept your advice.

greatgrizzlymon.name: GreatGrizzlymon
greatgrizzlymon.description: The self-proclaimed strongest hand-to-hand fighter in the Digital World, GreatGrizzlymon lives to entertain those who watch its battles. Its performance in battle captivates onlooking Digimon and enlivens the battlefield. It's a hard worker that never neglects its training so that it can live up to the audience's expectations. Any fight with PileVolcanomon, its eternal rival, is a big event that draws in large crowds. Its special move is Spirited Claws, by it which slashes its foes with its fiery claws.

specialSkills.name: Spirited Claws
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 90.

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Reflect
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Reflect Magic.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Rune Forest II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Plant magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Curse Barrier
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Status Abnormality Immunity.

cerberusmon.name: Cerberusmon
cerberusmon.description: A Dark Beast Digimon known as the "Watchdog of Hell." The claws on Cerberusmon's limbs are tough enough to easily slice through low-purity Chrondigizoid. Its body is also protected by a hard organic shell, and has the ability to heal any damage instantly. The pieces of armor on each shoulder possess wills of their own, and are able to instantly sense attacks coming from any direction and report this to Cerberusmon. It emits incandescent flames with its special move Mad Dog Fire.

specialSkills.name: Mad Dog Fire
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark physical attack at power 45. 20% chance to apply Crystallization. Increased damage to targets with Beast Trait.

specialSkills.name: Inferno Divide
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 85. Nullifies unfavorable compatibility. Increased damage to targets with Beast Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Magma Fall II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Shadow Fang II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 30 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Bind
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 100% chance of 20% reduction to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

cerberusmon-wm.name: Cerberusmon WM
cerberusmon-wm.description: Cerberusmon: Werewolf Mode is a mutant form of Cerberusmon, the Digimon known as the "Watchdog of Hell" that lives in the Dark Area. It transformed into its current form to prevent the spread of data created from human malice that permeates the Internet in the form of both images and text, because it fears this data will have an adverse effect on the Digital World overall. As a result of its transformation, its data was rewritten so that its shell-covered body can now walk on two legs and its arms can chew up any tainted data it finds. With its special move Inferno Divide, it can blast foes with firebombs at point-blank range while it holds them in place in the jaws of the massive heads on the ends of its arms. It also has Mad Dog Fire, which unleashes a blast of scorching, hellish flames that reduce all things to ash. The destructive power of this attack is leaps and bounds beyond the power of the unmutated Cerberusmon's move of the same name.

specialSkills.name: Inferno Divide
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 85. Nullifies unfavorable compatibility. Increased damage to targets with Beast Trait.

specialSkills.name: Mad Dog Fire
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark physical attack at power 45. 20% chance to apply Crystallization. Increased damage to targets with Beast Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Magma Fall II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Awesome Quake II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Earth magic attack at power 45. 85% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Gaia Blaster II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth magic attack at power 70. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Nightmare I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 40. 95% ACU.

cyberdramon.name: Cyberdramon
cyberdramon.description: A dragon-type Android Digimon protected with special rubber armor that can resist any attack. If a Virus-attribute Digimon appears on a computer network, this Digimon will show up in an instant to eradicate it. Still, Cyberdramon operates alone, never working with the justice group known as the "Virus Busters," and its identity is wrapped in mystery. Its special rubber armor offers superior defense, but also serves to multiply its offensive strength. Its special move Desolation Claw destroys enemy configuration data with a high-frequency vibration from both arms, erasing the very space around them. Anything hit with this attack has every last iota of data eradicated.

specialSkills.name: Desolation Claw
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 85. If target is Data: Increased damage.

attachmentSkills.name: Nanomachine Break II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 15 x 4 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Status Barrier
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Stat Debuff Immunity.

attachmentSkills.name: Thunder Fall II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 12 x 3 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to DEF for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Have any foes you want deleted?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Deleting

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I erase enemies without a trace. That is my calling.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: No need to delete them.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Vaccines annihilate viruses. That is the proper way of things.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I do.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Your foes are my foes. By the time you notice, they will have already been erased.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Nope.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Impossible. Your foes will be found and erased along with the space around them.

jewelbeemon.name: JewelBeemon
jewelbeemon.description: An Insectoid Digimon resembling a jewel beetle that emits a rainbow radiance. JewelBeemon's prismatic armor changes colors depending on the viewing angle, dazzling the enemy in addition to offering protection. This melee expert prefers beautiful battles. Its special move is Spike Buster, with which it swings the spear in its right hand at the speed of light and creates shockwaves.

specialSkills.name: Spike Buster
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant physical attack at power 25 x 3 hits. Nullifies unfavorable compatibility. Increased damage to targets with Insectoid Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Crescent Leaf II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant physical attack at power 9 x 7 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Reflect
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Reflect Magic.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Stone Cleave II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Earth physical attack at power 45. 85% ACU.

zudomon.name: Zudomon
zudomon.description: A powerful Sea Beast Digimon Digivolved from Ikkakumon that learned to walk on two legs. Zudomon protects its tempered muscles with armor fashioned from the skins and shells of defeated foes. Similarly, Zudomon carved its own horn into a saw blade after losing the ability to regrow it. But the most powerful weapon in Zudomon's arsenal is its Thor's Hammer, made from Chrondigizoid dug up from the ancient ice. Zudomon's special move is Vulcan's Hammer, with which it blasts opponents with the powerful shockwave and flying sparks that result from swinging Thor's Hammer down.

specialSkills.name: Vulcan's Hammer
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 90. Increased damage to targets with Weapon Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Thunder Fall II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 12 x 3 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Icicle Edge II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice physical attack at power 30 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Hydro Water II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water magic attack at power 12 x 5 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Ocean Wave II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Water magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Check out these muscles!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Too hardcore for me.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Only an adult could understand the value of muscles like these.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wish I had a body like yours.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Then you'd better hit the gym, pal.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Those sure are some awesome muscles!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Drink them in. I don't mind.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wanna touch them.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: ...Just a little would be fine, I guess.

chirinmon.name: Chirinmon
chirinmon.description: A Holy Beast Digimon said to be an Ancient born at the advent of the Digital World, Chirinmon possesses strength akin to a Mega Digimon despite being Ultimate itself. While immensely powerful, it deeply despises conflict, and never engages in cruelty. Its compassionate personality causes it to treat all things living in the Digital World with affection, but on the other hand, doesn't hesitate to punish any who indulge in pointless violence. Using its special move Wind Cutter Sword, it swoops down in an instant to run the enemy through with the horn on its head.

specialSkills.name: Wind Cutter Sword
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 90.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Shine Burst II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Dispel
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes stat debuffs.

attachmentSkills.name: X-Heal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Greatly recovers HP.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I would never condone pointless killing!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What exactly would you do about it?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I would enact punishment! And do not think to interfere!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: But you would if there were a point to it?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Killing never has a point! All life in the Digital World must be met with compassion!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Would you ever show mercy?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The offender must repent, and never take a life needlessly again.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Agreed.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Killing is born of conflict. We must aspire to a world free of strife.

duramon.name: Duramon
duramon.description: Duramon is an Ultimate Digimon that's caught a glimpse of its final destination and begun to walk toward the other side. It may not know what its future holds, but whatever obstacles it might face, it's sure to cut through them with its own blades, tempered through repeated training. When in weapon form, the hallmark greatsword on its back demonstrates incomparable power. Its special move is Blinded, a beam attack that it fires from its chest. Should this beam hit its target, it deals a huge amount of damage and brands it with the number 20.

specialSkills.name: Blinded
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 70. 20% CRT Rate. 100% chance of 20% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 12 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Saint Knuckle II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 30 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Curse Barrier
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Status Abnormality Immunity.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

parrotmon.name: Parrotmon
parrotmon.description: A Giant Bird Digimon resembling a parrot. Parrotmon is a strange bird from another Digital World that wandered in through a rift in spacetime. The claws on its feet are extremely powerful. Highly intelligent and calm, Parrotmon doesn't relish combat, but once angered, it flies out of control. Its special move Mjölnir Thunder creates an electrical current in the feathers sprouting from its head and then uses them to call down lightning on its opponent.

specialSkills.name: Mjölnir Thunder
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 90. Increased damage to targets with Machine Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Gale Storm II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Wind magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Thunder Fall II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 12 x 3 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Revive
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Revives from KO and moderately recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Which color do you prefer, red, blue, yellow or green?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Blue.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You like the shade of my legs? Some fear the hue thanks to these sharp talons, but not you, no.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Red...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You like the tint of my crest? You must be intrigued by the lightning it shoots, too.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Yellow?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You like my wings' hue? If you can take it, I'll show you how they shine at sonic speed.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Green!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You like the tone of my body? I bet you hold the trees of the forest dear as well.

iceleomon.name: IceLeomon
iceleomon.description: A proud Beast Man Digimon with a strong sense of justice. Some Leomon Digivolve into IceLeomon when, in the process of their daily training as champions of justice, their bodies become infused with the power of cold in the frozen land of the Digital World's Ice-Snow Area. IceLeomon's body and will have been tempered by the freezing cold, and it doesn't falter in the face of any attack. Its special move Fist of Ice is a punch infused with the power of cold.

specialSkills.name: Fist of Ice
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice physical attack at power 90.

attachmentSkills.name: Lethal Blizzard II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Ice magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Don't you like the cold?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm not crazy about it.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Then you ought to train in the polar frost. You'll get used to it for sure.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm fine with it.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Just make sure you can still say that even in the arctic chill.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I don't mind, as long as I've got my friends.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm glad to hear that.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It'd be nice if you'd keep me warm!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: If you mean keeping warm with some warmups together, then I'd do it gladly.

hisyaryumon.name: Hisyaryumon
hisyaryumon.description: A Beast Dragon Digimon that soars freely through the skies clad in armor of elegantly-shimmering scales. Hisyaryumon's form is the result of the interface on its forehead unlocking the data that lay dormant within its DigiCore of dragons and generals—filled with ferocious combat instincts—from Japanese myths. The orbs it clutches are the souls of its lost companions. The orb in Hisyaryumon's right hand is the soul of Kinryu, while the orb in its left hand is the soul of Kakuryu. It's said that each orb contains the data of a DigiCore hidden within it. Hisyaryumon's special move is Legendary Dragon Blade, which transforms it into a giant steel blade to slice the enemy in half with a single stroke.

specialSkills.name: Legendary Dragon Blade
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 80. 10% CRT Rate. Nullifies unfavorable compatibility.

attachmentSkills.name: Full Metal Pile II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Steel magic attack at power 35. 85% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Thruster Metal II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel magic attack at power 9 x 7 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

butenmon.name: Butenmon
butenmon.description: A Deity Digimon Digivolved with honed swordsmanship from many a battle, Butenmon wears crimson armor and wields a greatsword. In its Ultimate form, it has nearly perfected sword mastery. It possesses beautiful sword technique and the power to shatter mountains. A single Butenmon is said to be worth a thousand warriors. Its special move is Sunburst Dance, which cuts down foes in its path in a graceful motion that looks like a dance depicting the sun.

specialSkills.name: Sunburst Dance
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire physical attack at power 45. 10% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Warrior Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Venom Trap
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Poison.

attachmentSkills.name: Nightmare II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Mental Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to SPI for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Power Energy II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

flaremon.name: Flaremon
flaremon.description: Flaremon is a Beast Man Digimon. Although its impressive mane and overwhelming presence may make it seem intimidating, its strength of will makes it brave any hardship for the sake of its comrades. Its special move is Crimson Wave of the Beast King, which concentrates fierce flame and a leonine fighting spirit into its fist before unleashing a lion-shaped energy blast.

specialSkills.name: Crimson Wave of the Beast King
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 90. Increased damage to targets with Vegetation Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Saint Knuckle II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 30 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Void Ray II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Null magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU. 10% CRT Rate.

whamon.name: Whamon
whamon.description: A gigantic Digimon that dwells in the depths of the Net Ocean. Its huge size ranks it among the largest of all Digimon in the Digital World. In fact, Whamon is so enormous that normal computers can't process the sheer volume of data that it's comprised of. Similar species have been confirmed in the waters near File Island, but Whamon, which lives along the coast of the Folder Continent, boasts attack strength and vitality superior to its kin, having Digivolved to its Ultimate form. Its special move Tidal Wave creates a massive tsunami that destroys everything in its path.

specialSkills.name: Tidal Wave
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Water magic attack at power 45. 100% chance of reduction to Water resistance. Increased damage to targets with Fire Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Hydro Water II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water magic attack at power 12 x 5 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Lethal Blizzard II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Ice magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Icicle Edge II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice physical attack at power 30 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Ho, boy... My tummy doesn't feel right...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Why not gulp down some water?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Oh, I see! If I ate something funny, I could flush it out with a nice, big swallow, huh?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Should we check for a stomach bug?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Better to check than to try and deal with it blindly, for sure. Good call!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Should I take a look inside your stomach?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What? You'd be willing to go in there? For me? How thoughtful of you... Thank you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Aw, that's too bad... But I'm here for you!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Those words ease the pain better than any medicine could. Thank you for your kindness.

magnaangemon.name: MagnaAngemon
magnaangemon.description: A High Angel Digimon with eight shining, silver wings. MagnaAngemon serves as a marshal of the Digital World, supervising and surveying the many Angel Digimon within. Furthermore, it's the mouthpiece of the Essence of Light that attempts to preserve the order of the Digital World. Though MagnaAngemon usually takes the form of a priest, when the Digital World is shrouded in the Essence of Darkness, it changes into its Battle Mode to strike down evil. In this Battle Mode, MagnaAngemon consigns the opponent to oblivion with the Beam Shield on its left arm and the holy sword Excalibur equipped to its right arm. MagnaAngemon's special move is Heaven's Gate, which it uses to open a door into an inescapable pocket dimension, consigning its foe to oblivion.

specialSkills.name: Heaven's Gate
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 50. Increased damage to targets with Evil Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Holy Light II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Meditator
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes status abnormalities.

attachmentSkills.name: Aura
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] Slightly recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Reflect
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Reflect Physical.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I walk the path of righteousness. Will you move forward together with me on this path?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm not sure I'm up to it.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: In that case, I insist we walk it together. You can start by overcoming your own fears.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Yes, I'd like to.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: If your determination is set, the path ahead shall open. Then shall the learning begin!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I will. I have to!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That is what it means to be with me. I am pleased to see you understand as much.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'd like you to follow me, actually.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I had hoped you would take the lead one day. I am pleased that today is that day.

mammothmon.name: Mammothmon
mammothmon.description: An Ancient Digimon proved to have existed in ages long past, thanks to a multitude of evidence. The warming of the Digital World defrosted some hyper-compressed data, causing Mammothmon to appear in icy areas where the thaw had melted. Its whole body is covered in thick fur, and although this Digimon possesses tremendous ancient power, it's extremely susceptible to fire damage. The crest carved onto Mammothmon's face mask is a crystal of super-ancient wisdom, and it possesses a second sight that allows it to see long distances. Its large ears can discern sounds even in far-off places. Mammothmon's special move is Tusk Strikes, which stabs at the enemy with its two long tusks.

specialSkills.name: Tusk Strikes
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 90.

attachmentSkills.name: Frozen Bullet II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Comet Hammer II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 11 x 6 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Awesome Quake II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Earth magic attack at power 45. 85% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to DEF for 3 turn(s).

metalgreymon.name: MetalGreymon
metalgreymon.description: An Android Digimon with more than half of its body mechanized. The MetalGreymon of File Island was able to dramatically prolong its vital functioning through self-modification, but its biological parts couldn't withstand the strain and turned blue. By contrast, this Ultimate-level MetalGreymon is a successful Digivolution from a Greymon, and is an extremely powerful Android Digimon. MetalGreymon's attack power is said to be as powerful as a nuclear warhead, capable of completely obliterating lower-level Digimon. Its special move Giga Destryoer is an attack that fires bionic missiles from a hatch that opens in its chest.

specialSkills.name: Giga Destroyer
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 90.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 12 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Magma Fall II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm way cooler than that blue jerk, right?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: SO much cooler!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You and me think alike! I'll fight by your side forever and ever!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're both awesome!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wanted you to say me, but you're a pretty swell human, ain't you?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're pretty much the same?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You think so? All right, then. I'll have to Digivolve into an even cooler form!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I like the blue one better...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Why I oughta— Wait. Are you poking fun at me? You should just say what you really think!

monzaemon.name: Monzaemon
monzaemon.description: A Digimon shrouded in mystery, Monzaemon looks like an ordinary stuffed bear, but rumor has it that someone—or something—has climbed in through the zipper on its back. It makes its opponent feel happy by wrapping it in the love that overflows from its adorable body (although its eyes are pretty scary). Its special move Hearts Attack flings hearts at the enemy.

specialSkills.name: Hearts Attack
specialSkills.description: [Target: All allies] Recovers HP based on user's SPI.

attachmentSkills.name: Gaia Blaster II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth magic attack at power 70. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Comet Hammer II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 11 x 6 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Hate Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Taunting.

attachmentSkills.name: X-Revive
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Revives from KO and greatly recovers HP.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: People get pretty freaked out the first time they meet me. What can I do...?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Be brave and talk to them!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hmm... You're right. It all starts with talking. I'll try to work up the courage!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Try analyzing their reaction.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: So first I have to figure out what's scaring them, huh? That's a good point. Thanks!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'll help you make more friends!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm glad you're my friend! Let's make a whole bunch more buddies together!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I know just how amazing you are.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What a lovely thing to say! You might be the only friend I need, in the end.

crowmon.name: Crowmon
crowmon.description: An odd-looking Mysterious Bird Digimon with three legs. Although its jet-black body may cause those who see it to suspect it of being evil, legend has it that Crowmon is the Digimon who guides the chosen few to El Dorado, in the eastern part of the Digital World. Crowmon's special move is Savage Emperor, which channels the energy produced by the vajra on its two wings into its forelegs to fire at foes. Digimon struck by this technique have their digital cells broken down into simple ones and zeroes.

specialSkills.name: Savage Emperor
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Wind magic attack at power 50.

attachmentSkills.name: Spell Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Magic.

attachmentSkills.name: Safety Guard
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Guts.

attachmentSkills.name: Wind Claw II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Nightmare II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

rizegreymon.name: RizeGreymon
rizegreymon.description: An Android Digimon with more than half of its body mechanized. Despite RizeGreymon's massive frame, it can still take to the skies to defeat foes. The destructive force it can blast from the giant revolver on its left arm is said to be as powerful as a nuclear warhead, but the combination of this force with the recoil it generates means it generally can't fire more than one shot at a time, and to withstand the explosive power, the gun barrel has to be made of Chrondigizoid. RizeGreymon's special move Trident Revolver pushes the limits of Chrondigizoid's durability by firing a three-round burst.

specialSkills.name: Trident Revolver
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 50 x 3 hits. 60% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
