attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 12 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Burst Flame III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire magic attack at power 15 x 5 hits. 95% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I want to Digivolve and mechanize my entire body...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Sounds like you'd get really strong.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I think I'm pretty strong already, but I'd love to see just how powerful I could get.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're great the way you are.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I like my body the way it is, but I've got to pursue any possibilities I can.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I bet you'd look cool as all get-out.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Looks have nothing to do with it. I want to see just how strong I can get.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I like you, flesh and blood.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: So the look I used to have is superior? Not sure if that makes me happy or sad...

rapidmon.name: Rapidmon
rapidmon.description: An Android Digimon that Digivolved from Gargomon. Going by the nickname "Keen Hound," Rapidmon brings down foes with precise movements at near-lightspeed. It can even move around in pitch darkness by utilizing its massive ear-shaped radars, which also allow it to detect foes from a distance. Its profile is evocative of a shaved poodle. During battle, the protector on Rapidmon's neck will shut. It uses its special move Golden Triangle to unleash a beam of light from its body that breaks foes down into bits of data.

specialSkills.name: Golden Triangle
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 80. 50% chance to apply Injury. Increased damage to targets with Machine Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Mental Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to SPI for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Thunder Fall II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 12 x 3 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Nanomachine Break II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 15 x 4 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Power Energy III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I am Rapidmon," not "Rabbitmon." Don't get it twisted!"

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It's all the same to me.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: As long as I can move and fight quickly, I guess the name isn't such a huge deal...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What's the difference?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Rapid" means swift. "Rabbit" doesn't! That's a pretty big difference, pal!"

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Are you sure it's not Rabbit"?"

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Your ears clogged or what?! It's Rapidmon"! We're friends now, so you'd better remember!"

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I know, I know.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Whew, that's a relief! Humans get it twisted sometimes, you see. Be careful, okay?

loaderleomon.name: LoaderLeomon
loaderleomon.description: A Machine Digimon born when the CAD data of construction machinery leaked onto a server and fused with Beast Digimon configuration data. LoaderLeomon's mane is a pneumatic drill, and it operates primarily in tunnel construction and Chrondigizoit mining. Chrondigizoit mines are often surrounded by hard layers of bedrock. In addition to its power and stamina, it also boasts top-class abilities for a Machine Digimon. Many LoaderLeomon have stubborn personalities and take pride in their work, but others simply treat them like belligerent hotheads much of the time. One mine with the best ore deposits in the world supposedly vanished as the result of a fight between multiple LoaderLeomon. LoaderLeomon's special move is Bowling Storm, which unleashes its mane in high-speed rotation.

specialSkills.name: Bowling Storm
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 25 x 3 hits. If target has yet to act: Increased damage. Increased damage to targets with Mineral Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Full Metal Pile II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Steel magic attack at power 35. 85% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Stone Cleave II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Earth physical attack at power 45. 85% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

weregarurumon.name: WereGarurumon
weregarurumon.description: A Beast Man Digimon that Digivolved from Garurumon, and can now walk on two legs. Becoming bipedal reduced WereGarurumon's speed, but turned it into a Commando-type Digimon with enhanced offensive and defensive power, as well as a knack for tactics. Retaining the leg strength of Garurumon, its kicks are extremely powerful, and it has one of the best jumps in the world of Digimon. WereGarurumon is also extremely loyal and will do anything if ordered by its master, making it highly reliable. Its special move is Wolf Claw, which slices opponents to shreds with its sharp claws.

specialSkills.name: Wolf Claw
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 45 x 2 hits.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Comet Hammer II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 11 x 6 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Awesome Quake II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Earth magic attack at power 45. 85% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Hate Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Taunting.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: These jeans are pretty sick, aren't they?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: They look good on you, yeah.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Right? With the good mood they put me in, my kicks and jumps are sharper than ever.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That skull's a little creepy.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It's a message to my foes that I'm coming for their head. Psyches 'em out before the fight.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Talk about bad taste.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Dissing my fashion sense? Given the type of stuff I get up to, I'd say it's on point.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I think you've got a rip there?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: They're called distressed jeans." A human like you should know how dope these are."

scorpiomon.name: Scorpiomon
scorpiomon.description: A research data bank used to investigate and excavate ancient lifeforms was infected by a computer virus, which then incorporated data about these lifeforms into itself to Digivolve. Scorpiomon possesses a voracious appetite and predatory skills befitting a creature that stands at the top of an ancient food chain. It captures foes with the feelers growing from its head, then finishes them off with the sharp blade sprouting from its tail. If the tide of battle turns against Scorpiomon, it can churn up the seabed with its sharp feelers in order to hide. It uses the Radar Eyes protruding from its head like night vision goggles to ascertain foes, and then aims for a chance to strike. Scorpiomon's special move is Stinger Surprise, which launches an attack from its crossed forelimbs.

specialSkills.name: Stinger Surprise
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water physical attack at power 35 x 2 hits. If target is affected by Confusion/ Chaos: 25% chance to apply Instant Death.

attachmentSkills.name: Ripping Net
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Paralysis.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Ocean Wave II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Water magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Curse Barrier
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Status Abnormality Immunity.

enbarrmon.name: Enbarrmon
enbarrmon.description: An Undead Digimon that can traverse the sea and sky as if it were on land. Erratic and belligerent, Enbarrmon don't move in groups, making them hard to sight. Typical of the Undead type, Enbarrmon grants its rider undying protection. The only ones that can mount it are those Enbarrmon approves of as its master. When it reaches its max speed, it causes a shockwave that inflicts heavy damage to those around it. Its special move is Dead Angle Horn, with which it leaps to the sky and charges from the enemy's blind spot.

specialSkills.name: Dead Angle Horn
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 70. 100% chance of 10% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s). Increased damage to targets with Holy Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Hell Crusher II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Safety Guard
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Guts.

attachmentSkills.name: Idle Bubble
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Sleep.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Do you want to climb aboard me and travel the world?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Maybe just a little.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Curious but timid, eh? No need to commit right now. Just get ready for a long journey!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: No, thanks.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I had not thought you so cautious. They do say it is better to act than worry, you know.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm not looking to die.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Human or no, I would not let a friend die. You will not perish while astride my back.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'd love to!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Understood. Though I cannot take you now, I vow to fulfill my promise before you die.

antylamon.name: Antylamon
antylamon.description: An Ultimate Digimon resembling a rabbit, and one of the Twelve Deva Digimon. A minion of Azulongmon, one of the Four Sovereign Digimon, Antylamon has a kind heart. It's fond of small creatures, which it treats with the utmost care. As a result, should anything try to stamp out these little ones, Antylamon's entire personality shifts as it transforms its hands into Bǎo Fǔ and goes on the attack. Once enraged, it won't regain its composure again until every enemy in the area has been eliminated. Its special move Bunny Blades involves spinning itself around like a tornado, using its Bǎo Fǔ to cut through everything around it.

specialSkills.name: Bunny Blades
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind physical attack at power 40 x 2 hits. 10% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Humanoid Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Wind Claw II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Aura
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] Slightly recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: Meditator
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes status abnormalities.

meteormon.name: Meteormon
meteormon.description: Meteormon is a Digimon that for some reason has manifested meteorite data, included in Gotsumon's ore data, on its surface. Composed of a hard substance that can only be found in space, it boasts a strong defense. Its special move is Galactic Flare, by which it blasts foes with strange energy waves from the furthest reaches of the cosmos.

specialSkills.name: Galactic Flare
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Earth physical attack at power 15 x 3～6 hits.

attachmentSkills.name: Thruster Metal II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel magic attack at power 9 x 7 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to INT for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 12 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Comet Hammer II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 11 x 6 hits. 90% ACU.

omnishoutmon.name: OmniShoutmon
omnishoutmon.description: OmniShoutmon is the form obtained when Omnimon bestowed a legendary Digivolution upon SHoutmon, who had unleashed its soul's seething passion. In addition to its intense fervor, its entire body is clad in Omega inForce, a power it obtained from Omnimon, so it emits a golden glow from its sharp new form. OmniShoutmon's Flame Cannon transforms the overflowing feelings of friendship in its heart into firepower, releasing a hail of bullets that can not only attack, but also become a wall of iron to protect its allies. With Hard Rock Soul, it can concentrate its fervent courage into flames that burst from its fists to either punch enemies at close range or blast them with fire from long range.

specialSkills.name: Hard Rock Soul
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 35 x 2 hits. The lower the user's HP, the greater the damage.

specialSkills.name: Flame Cannon
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire physical attack at power 25 x 2 hits. 100% chance of 10% reduction to INT for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 12 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: If you spot a shiny afterimage, it might be me, you know!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You move at light speed?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That's only the speed of my movement. My intense zeal gushes out faster than light!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I've never seen one.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Even an afterimage would be hard to spot. Such is the speed afforded by Omni inForce.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'd love to see that!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: If you can handle me and my intense zeal, then you'll see it for certain!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You might be too fast to see.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: If you want to catch sight of me, I can slow down a little. Just a tick, though.

kimeramon.name: Kimeramon
kimeramon.description: Kimeramon is a Composite Digimon. Every part of its body, including its hands, legs, torso and tail, was made by combining various parts from other Digimon. As for the reason behind its creation, that remains shrouded in mystery. Though Kimeramon is similar to Machinedramon in that it was constructed from various parts of other Digimon, the nature of the relationship between the two has yet to be discovered. Perhaps Kimeramon was a prototype for Machinedramon, except that it used organic parts instead of metal ones. Or perhaps Kimeramon was created specifically as a countermeasure against Machinedramon. What is clear, however, is Kimeramon's frightful instinct for combat, along with its immense destructive power. It can fire a deadly heat ray, Heat Viper, from its four arms. This is a horrifying technique that cruelly tears apart anything hit by the beam with all the force of Kimeramon's ire.

specialSkills.name: Heat Viper
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 25 x 3 hits. Nullifies unfavorable compatibility. Increased damage to targets with Ice Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Crescent Leaf II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant physical attack at power 9 x 7 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Saint Knuckle II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 30 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Shadow Fang II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 30 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

catchmamemon.name: CatchMamemon
catchmamemon.description: CatchMamemon is a Mutant Digimon that Digivolved from Mamemon when it fused with data from file management software. Purposeful and sometimes obstinate, CatchMamemon considers caring for Digi-Eggs to be its chief task. If need be, it can move around without floating by using its giant arms to walk. If the slot machine on CatchMamemon's chest rolls a triple seven as it grabs onto a foe, it transforms that Digimon into a bomb using Miracle Bomb, then uses the transformed enemy to attack. The force of the resulting explosion is said to be equal to the strength of the captured Digimon.

specialSkills.name: Miracle Bomb
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Either Performs Fire physical attack at power 110, or 100% chance of 10% reduction to SPD for 3 turns.

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 12 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Magma Fall II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Thruster Metal II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel magic attack at power 9 x 7 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Mental Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to SPI for 3 turn(s).

crescemon.name: Crescemon
crescemon.description: A Wizard Digimon with a flexible body, enabling it to dispatch foes with graceful movements. It specializes in highly fluid fighting styles, and is said to double in power when bathed in the light of the moon. Its special move, Lunatic Dance, entrances opponents with rhythmic steps, allowing it to close in and deliver a two-handed slash with its weapons Nova Luna.

specialSkills.name: Lunatic Dance
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice magic attack at power 20 x 4 hits. 15% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Beast Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Lethal Blizzard II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Ice magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Hydro Water II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water magic attack at power 12 x 5 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: X-Heal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Greatly recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to INT for 3 turn(s).

superstarmon.name: SuperStarmon
superstarmon.description: A Mutant Digimon that's the Ultimate form of the space warrior Starmon. SuperStarmon made its debut dressed in a dazzling costume uniquely suited to its own exacting standards. Since it's a superstar, it tries to hide its identity by wearing sunglasses, but this doesn't make for a very effective disguise. Its special move is Haley Storm, which rains meteors down onto its opponent.

specialSkills.name: Haley Storm
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 90. Increased damage to targets with Mineral Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Comet Hammer II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 11 x 6 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to INT for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Shine Burst II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I want to show off my new superstardom in a video! What would you shoot if you were me?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A reverse bungee jump into the stratosphere!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That'd give everyone an eyeful of my pluck, huh? Got it. I'll arrange a jump right away!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Acing a super hard trivia contest?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Showing off my smarts, huh? Nice! Better swap the shades for some specs.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A two-person food tour!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A performance with us at center stage, huh? That'd be a swell show of camaraderie!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A 24-hour stream of our life together!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What? Like, a live video? Hoho! A life with you sounds like a fun time to me!

skullbaluchimon.name: SkullBaluchimon
skullbaluchimon.description: A giant Undead Digimon produced when some of the fossil data for the largest land mammal was counterfeited and recreated. Lacking intelligence and emotions, SkullBaluchimon moves entirely by reflex according to the nerve data running through its body. As a result, it continues to attack without reason or mercy until it can no longer move. The cold, black vapor endlessly overflowing from SkullBaluchimon's DigiCore is said to fill any Digimon with the fear of death—perhaps a curse wrought from its forced reanimation from a corpse's data. Its special move is Grave Bone, trampling the enemy beneath its giant feet and burying it within the earth.

specialSkills.name: Grave Bone
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 80. 100% chance of reduction to Earth resistance. Increased damage to targets with Mineral Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Shadow Fang II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 30 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Panic Wisp
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Confusion.

attachmentSkills.name: Awesome Quake II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Earth magic attack at power 45. 85% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: DO YOU FEAR DEATH?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I really can't say.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: TO FEAR DEATH IS TO BE UNABLE TO FIGHT...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Teach me about it.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I, TOO, WANT TO KNOW...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It's terrifying.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I DO NOT WANT TO FIGHT YOU, BUT ALL WHO FACE ME FACE THE THREAT OF DEATH.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm not afraid.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I AM GLAD I DO NOT HAVE TO SEE YOU SHAKEN BY THE THREAT OF DEATH.

saviorhuckmon.name: SaviorHuckmon
saviorhuckmon.description: SaviorHuckmon is a Digimon that has traveled far and wide. After repeated meetings and partings with other Digimon and surviving countless scenes of carnage, it finally Digivolved into this form. SaviorHuckmon continues to join in the endless struggles that occur throughout the Digital World, seeking to bring an end to these hostilities and aid local Digimon who have suffered under the strife. SaviorHuckmon walks on two legs despite both of them being blades, and now that its arms and tail have sprouted crimson blades as well, its attack style has become more offensive. The crystal in its chest serves as physical proof of its tireless efforts to grow stronger. SaviorHuckmon's special move Trident Saber uses the crimson blades on its arms and tail to slice mercilessly through foes, even those covered in Chrondigizoid.

specialSkills.name: Trident Saber
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 25 x 3 hits. 15% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Void Ray III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Null magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU. 10% CRT Rate.

sirenmon.name: Sirenmon
sirenmon.description: A Deity Digimon that looks like a mix between a bird and a fish. Cheerful by nature, Sirenmon is always seen singing happily in the air or sea. Its beautiful voice has a miraculous range of eight octaves, from ultra-low to ultra-high pitches. Sirenmon's song can bring peace to even the most devastated battlefields. They say a resplendent Digivolution awaits it in the future because of all the good deeds it's performed by healing those who listen to it. Sirenmon sings Symphony No. 1 in a high soprano that seeps into the listener's heart, paralyzing their will and leaving them at the Digimon's mercy. It sings the solemn Symphony No. 2 in a low bass that transforms into a heavy, low-frequency vibration, crushing the enemy from the insides of their ear canals and leaving them unable to even stand. Symphony No. 3 turns its voice into note-shaped bullets that it then fires at the enemy. These shots have a mysterious property, ricocheting on impact to always hit other foes as well. Each of these techniques increase in power for every creature that sings along with Sirenmon, turning even the weak into a great strength.

specialSkills.name: Symphony No. 1
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to DEF for 3 turns. 50% chance to apply Confusion.

specialSkills.name: Symphony No. 2
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 30% reduction to SPI & 10% reduction to ACU for 3 turns.

specialSkills.name: Symphony No. 3
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind magic attack at power 90. Increased damage to targets with Humanoid Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Gale Storm II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Wind magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Status Barrier
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Stat Debuff Immunity.

attachmentSkills.name: Holy Light II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: X-Heal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Greatly recovers HP.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Which do you prefer, birds or fish?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Both are kind of meh...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Are you perhaps not a fan of me? Once you hear my song, I bet you'll change your tune.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Fish!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A fan of the sea? You'll be happy to know it feels incredible to sing in the ocean depths.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I like both.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Then I imagine you'll like my peculiar look. I feel like singing a song, just for you!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Birds!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: In that case, allow me to serenade you from the skies with my avian trill.

taomon.name: Taomon
taomon.description: A Taoist Digimon that uses all the skills of faith to defeat opponents. Taomon is particularly talented at using curses and talismans. It's also a master of dark implements, keeping various weapons hidden in its sleeves. This Digimon doesn't say much and usually resides in the dark. Taomon can also change talismans into familiars known as shikigami. It uses its special move Talisman of Light to paint a Sanskrit character in midair while chanting before hurling it at the enemy. Any enemy hit by the Talisman of Light is annihilated in a gigantic explosion.

specialSkills.name: Talisman of Light
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 80. Removes stat buffs. Increased damage to targets with Spirit Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to INT for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Hell Crusher II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Reflect
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Reflect Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Dispel
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes stat debuffs.

digitamamon.name: Digitamamon
digitamamon.description: An Ultimate Digimon that has the appearance of a Digi-Egg and is the alpha and omega of all Digimon. Digitamamon is the apex of Digivolution, and supposedly Digivolves not from a normal Digimon, but only by fusing with data from another dimension. Its egg-shaped exoskeleton renders all attacks useless. Its special move Nightmare Syndrome is a ball of darkness.

specialSkills.name: Nightmare Syndrome
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 70. 70% chance to apply Sleep. Increased damage to targets with Unknown Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Gaia Blaster II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth magic attack at power 70. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Nightmare II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Character Reversal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy or ally] 100% chance to apply Reverse.

attachmentSkills.name: Status Barrier
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Stat Debuff Immunity.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I dream of opening a restaurant someday that serves huge portions. Think it'd succeed?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Definitely. Go for it!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You think so?! Okay... Now all I need is the guts to see my plan through!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Study the location and competition first.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Ah, I get it. You need smarts to run a successful business, huh?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'd work there, too!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That'd be a huge help! The two of us could be the friendliest foodsters around!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You can bet I'd eat there every day!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hehe. Every day? Shucks... I'd put all the love I could into the food, then!

skullmeramon.name: SkullMeramon
skullmeramon.description: A Digivolution of Meramon wreathed in intense blue fire. The flames erupting from SkullMeramon's body burn hotter than Meramon's, thus the blue coloration. Its attack and defense capabilities have increased several levels, and it wields supreme destructive power in addition to the might of its flames. Fire Digimon are weak against Water and Ice-Snow types to begin with, but any interaction on their part with SkullMeramon is like water sizzling off a heated stone. SkullMeramon uses its special move Heavy Metal Fire to melt the heavy metals in its body and spit them at the enemy.

specialSkills.name: Heavy Metal Fire
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire physical attack at power 50. Increased damage to targets with Steel Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Shadow Fang II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 30 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Panic Wisp
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Confusion.

deramon.name: Deramon
deramon.description: It seems like a typical Bird type at first glance, but this odd Digimon has lush vegetation sprouting from its back. Much like Kiwimon, Deramon has plantlike qualities and can't fly. It's extremely prideful and believes itself to be a noble being, but is secretly ashamed of not being able to soar the skies. Still, its Digivolution to Ultimate means it boasts considerable battle power. The crown atop its head and its glittering gold beak are points of pride for Deramon. Its special move Royal Nuts fires strange objects akin to eggs or nuts from the thicket on its back.

specialSkills.name: Royal Nuts
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Plant physical attack at power 50. Increased damage to targets with Insectoid Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Thorn Strike II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant magic attack at power 30 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Crescent Leaf II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant physical attack at power 9 x 7 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What do you think is inside this thicket on my back?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Weapons for taking out enemies!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Yes, that is correct! True royalty meets force with force and never yields!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Books for studying?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Qu-Quite right. Royalty must be wise... and I must do a little reading.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Snacks to share with friends!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Precisely. It is the duty of the nobility to aid those less fortunate!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Maybe handwritten poems?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Indeed. Sad love sonnets penned each night as I— Wait. What rubbish have you got me saying?

triceramon.name: Triceramon
triceramon.description: A bipedal Ceratopsian Digimon resembling a triceratops, with all the combat power of that mighty herbivorous dinosaur. Its hide is among the toughest of all biological Digimon. Similarly, the two ultra-hard horns on its forehead are much more solid than Monochromon's horn. Though generally placid by nature, Triceramon's charging attack belies its slow movements, and packs enough destructive force to shatter even the sturdy bodies of Mineral Digimon. It uses its special move Tri-Horn Attack to ram into enemies with the horns on its forehead and snout.

specialSkills.name: Tri-Horn Attack
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 105. 80% ACU. Increased damage to targets with Antibody Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Comet Hammer II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 11 x 6 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Awesome Quake II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Earth magic attack at power 45. 85% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

dorugreymon.name: DoruGreymon
dorugreymon.description: DoruGreymon is a massive Beast Dragon Digimon also known as "The Final Enemy." Its form is the result of the interface on its forehead unlocking the dragon data lying dormant deep within its DigiCore, filled with the powerful life force of that mythical beast. With its overwhelming size, it's able to utterly crush any Digimon daring enough to oppose it, and its power enables it to repel an attack from Nightmare Soldiers with a single flap of its wings. DoruGreymon is also highly intelligent, and since it only rarely reveals itself, simply being able to find it is extremely difficult. Its special move Metal Meteor unleashes a supermassive iron sphere more than ten times its own immense size, wiping out its foes all at once.

specialSkills.name: Metal Meteor
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Steel physical attack at power 50. Increased damage to targets with Machine Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Comet Hammer II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 11 x 6 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 12 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Mental Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPI for 3 turn(s).

knightmon.name: Knightmon
knightmon.description: A giant Warrior Digimon donning armor of heavy Chrondigizoid. Despite the weight of its armor, Knightmon possesses the strength to wield its beloved sword with ease. One theory claims that it wears such substantial armor in order to prevent its awesome power from causing it to go berserk. Knightmon is a faithful Digimon whose existence is founded on loyal service. It adopts the attributes of its master as its own faith, laboring either in the service of justice or wickedness. It uses its special move Berserk Sword to cleave all things in two with a rampaging swing of its blade.

specialSkills.name: Berserk Sword
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 120. 50% ACU. 50% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Knight Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Saint Knuckle II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 30 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 12 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Hate Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Taunting.

attachmentSkills.name: Curse Barrier
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Status Abnormality Immunity.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I pledge my fealty to you, my liege.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: So if I told you to die for me, you'd do it?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: My loyalty to you stems from faith that you would never bid me do something so egregious.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You'll obey my command without question?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Your orders are absolute. Please guide me, so that I may never stray from the path.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You and I should be on equal footing.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I must be devoted to my liege. I have no desire to rise to your station.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I hope you come to like me.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: But of course! And I hope my obedience is proof enough of that pledge.

divermon.name: Divermon
divermon.description: An Aquatic Beast Man Digimon clad in a wetsuit. Cheerful by nature, Divermon can always be found swimming in the Net Ocean. Underwater movement is its forte, and it uses the underwater high-speed motor on its back to engage in speedy combat. Divermon's special move is Strike Fishing, which stabs the enemy with its beloved harpoon, "Trent."

specialSkills.name: Strike Fishing
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 80. Always hits. 100% chance of 20% reduction to EVA for 3 turn(s). Increased damage to targets with Aquatic Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Ocean Wave II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Water magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Venom Trap
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Poison.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

pandamon.name: Pandamon
pandamon.description: A Puppet Digimon that resembles a panda. Pandamon's expressionless gaze, together with its abrupt and dismissive personality, rob it of any cuteness it might otherwise have. It likes to think of itself as a lone wolf, but it's secretly jealous of Monzaemon, a popular Digimon with a similar look. Still, Pandamon is surprisingly capable in battle, and is quick to send any who disturb it packing. The Pandamon population is small, making it a rare sight. Its special move is Animal Nail, an attack with the claws normally kept hidden in its paws.

specialSkills.name: Animal Nail
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 80. The more allies are KO'd, the greater the damage. Increased damage to targets with Vegetation Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Awesome Quake II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Earth magic attack at power 45. 85% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

pumpkinmon.name: Pumpkinmon
pumpkinmon.description: A stuffed animal Digimon with a pumpkin for a head. According to urban legend, Pumpkinmon was created when a computer virus commonly circulated around Halloween time suddenly mutated. The virus wasn't malicious, so this Digimon never harms people, but Pumpkinmon is quite strong despite its appearance. As one look at their blankly staring faces will tell you, Puppet Digimon tend not to express emotion very clearly, and Pumpkinmon is no exception. Its special move is Trick or Treat, which manifests a giant pumpkin in midair with which to crush its foes.

specialSkills.name: Trick or Treat
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant magic attack at power 80. 25% chance to apply Injury.

attachmentSkills.name: Nightmare II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Character Reversal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy or ally] 100% chance to apply Reverse.

attachmentSkills.name: Rune Forest II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Plant magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Spirit Bind
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 100% chance of 20% reduction to SPI for 3 turn(s).

bigmamemon.name: BigMamemon
bigmamemon.description: A Mutant Digimon that acts as the boss of the Mamemon, and sometimes referred to as the "Smiley Bomber." Some believe that BigMamemon is actually an aggregation of Mamemon. Though normal Mamemon are about the same size as In-Training Digimon, they pack more power into their small frames than appearances would imply. BigMamemon, on the other hand, lives up to its name by being dozens, if not hundreds, of times larger than its smaller kin. At this size, why it's still referred to as "Mamemon," named for its small stature, is unclear. BigMamemon has a warm, gentle personality, and isn't fond of conflict or battle. It can always be found playing with its Mamemon followers. Its special move Big Smiley Bomber uses the Mamemon under its command as weapons. BigMamemon is said to shrink in size after using this technique.

specialSkills.name: Big Smiley Bomber
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire physical attack at power 60. 100% chance of 20% reduction to user's Max HP for 3 turns. Increased damage to targets with Mineral Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Full Metal Pile II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Steel magic attack at power 35. 85% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Burst Flame II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire magic attack at power 12 x 5 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Hate Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Taunting.

piximon.name: Piximon
piximon.description: A Pixie Digimon that controls magic. Piximon can recite words in an advanced programming language from another dimension, allowing it to create wonders akin to magic. This mysterious Digimon can appear anytime, anyplace and in any space. While small, it possesses a special skill that allows it to seal off the abilities of its foes and pulverize its opponents with a single, powerful strike. Piximon loves a good prank, and enjoys making computers run amok with the beloved spear "Fairy Tale" it always wields (not that it bears any ill will). Its special move Pit Bomb compresses a computer virus, generating a super-powerful explosion. Piximon uses terrifying attacks, despite its appearance.

specialSkills.name: Pit Bomb
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire magic attack at power 70. If target is Data: Increased damage. Increased damage to targets with Magic Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Holy Light II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Aura
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] Slightly recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: Meditator
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes status abnormalities.

attachmentSkills.name: Dispel
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes stat debuffs.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm gonna prank you good if you don't train properly!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'll start now.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: For real? I'm keeping my eye on you!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm taking it seriously. Promise.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Amazing! Glad to hear it. I look forward to seeing the results!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Nuh-uh. Don't wanna.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're slacking off! Look out, because I'm gonna prank you!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: If you're gonna prank me, then prank me.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hehehe... Oh, this is gonna be good.

hippogryphonmon.name: HippoGryphonmon
hippogryphonmon.description: HippoGryphonmon is a Mythical Beast Digimon that resembles a chimera. It's said to Digivolve into Gryphonmon, but beyond that, little more about it is known. HippoGryphonmon isn't as intelligent as Gryphonmon, as it's generally more bestial, with a ferocious personality to match. Its special move is Heat Wave, spewing out a stream of scorching hot air.

specialSkills.name: Heat Wave
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire magic attack at power 50. Increased damage to targets with Ice Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Gale Storm II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Wind magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Meditator
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes status abnormalities.

attachmentSkills.name: Sonic Shot II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

brachiomon.name: Brachiomon
brachiomon.description: A Plesiosaur Digimon like the brachiosaurs that lived long ago. Brachiomon is quite the heavyweight among dinosaur Digimon, and those trampled by its humongous body pay a dear price. However, it's a gentle herbivore that won't attack indiscriminately. Brachiomon uses its special move Brachio Bubble to spit countless bubbles that attack the enemy.

specialSkills.name: Brachio Bubble
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Water physical attack at power 50.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Comet Hammer II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 11 x 6 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Status Barrier
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Stat Debuff Immunity.

attachmentSkills.name: Aqua Pressure II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

volcanomon.name: Volcanomon
volcanomon.description: An Android Digimon with a huge and powerful body. The namesake volcano on its back erupts when its anger peaks and its tension voltage exceeds its limits. Volcanomon shares a friendly rivalry with Etemon. Its booming voice shakes both heaven and earth. Its special move Big Bang Voice dazzles enemies with an ultra-deep bass mic performance.

specialSkills.name: Big Bang Voice
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to SPI for 3 turns. 60% chance to apply Paralysis. 20% chance to apply Immobilization.

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 12 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Magma Fall II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Curse Barrier
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Status Abnormality Immunity.

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

masterblimpmon.name: MasterBlimpmon
masterblimpmon.description: An airship-shaped Digimon that soars through the skies. MasterBlimpmon was Digivolved after modifying the incomplete Blimpmon through several iterations. The once-exposed flank is now completely covered in armor. The completed blimp is more aerodynamic than before, increasing its airspeed. This allows it to transport Digimon onboard to the battlefield quickly. Its special move is Daredevil Break.

specialSkills.name: Daredevil Break
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 135. 20% CRT Rate. Receives 10% HP damage from attack recoil. Increased damage to targets with Bird Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Burst Flame II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire magic attack at power 12 x 5 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Power Energy III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

machgaogamon.name: MachGaogamon
machgaogamon.description: MachGaogamon is an Android Digimon with immensely powerful rocket engines on its back. While it never stays in the air long, it excels at hit-and-run combat that can make full use of its propulsive bursts of speed. Its special move is Winning Knuckle, a single powerful punch that packs quite a wallop.

specialSkills.name: Winning Knuckle
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind physical attack at power 90.

attachmentSkills.name: Gale Storm II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Wind magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 12 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Status Barrier
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Stat Debuff Immunity.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I have confidence in my thrusters.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Show me, then.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: This isn't exactly the best place to ignite my rocket engines...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Rocket engines are risky business.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Never you fear. I've got full control over them. You'll see.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Can't wait to see what you can do with them.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I won't let you down. These rocket engines are like an extension of my own body.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Careful with them, now.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I appreciate your concern. Looking forward to the chance to show them off!

mamemon.name: Mamemon
mamemon.description: A Mutant Digimon Digivolved in a cruel environment. Mamemon's cute exterior conceals a terrifying destructive power. Apart from one other Digimon, it might be the most powerful species. The gigantic hands on its small body are detachable, and are capable of becoming powerful bombs. Its nickname is the "Smile Bomber."

specialSkills.name: Smiley Bomb
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 85. 10% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Magma Fall II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Full Metal Pile II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Steel magic attack at power 35. 85% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Hate Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Taunting.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I want to be big. I mean REAL big!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Small and strong is good enough, isn't it?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'd love to be big and strong, but I guess I can start with the strong" part!"

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Big is just easier for enemies to spot.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Huh! I guess you're right! I'm glad I'm a shrimp!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Your size is part of the Mamemon charm!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Huh. I guess I wouldn't be the Mamemon you all know and love if I were big, would I?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Smaller is cuter, you know.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Y-You really think so? Hehe!

megaseadramon.name: MegaSeadramon
megaseadramon.description: Seadramon who survive the harsh environment surrounding the Folder Continent take on this form in order to continue living in the Digital World, where only the strong endure. Through this Digivolution, MegaSeadramon's body became a size larger, the shell covering its head hardened and a lightning-shaped blade sprouted from its forehead. It's also more intelligent than Seadramon, and will relentlessly seek out and destroy foes like a homing torpedo. MegaSeadramon's special move is Lightning Javelin, which fires a powerful bolt of lightning from the blade on its forehead. Its head shell contains a generator specifically to make this special move possible.

specialSkills.name: Lightning Javelin
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 90. Increased damage to targets with Aquatic Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Ocean Wave II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Water magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Shock Plasma II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 20 x 3 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to INT for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Hydro Water II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water magic attack at power 12 x 5 hits. 95% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: My blade... amazing... Kehehe.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: And powerful, to boot!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You... get it. Blade, strong! Blade, COOL!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It'd be even better if you took care of it.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Took... care? Me, never think about that... Me, study...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Want me to polish it for you?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Yes! Me, grateful. You, good person.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're pretty amazing yourself!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Me, too? Not just blade...? You, say nice things.

metalmamemon.name: MetalMamemon
metalmamemon.description: An Android Digimon that Digivolved to become even more powerful than the "Smile Bomber" Mamemon. Its cuteness hasn't changed, nor have the painful consequences facing those tricked by its appearance. 90% of MetalMamemon's body has been mechanized. The tremendous destructive force of its special move Energy Bomb fired from the Psycho Blaster on its left arm can fell a foe with certainty.

specialSkills.name: Energy Bomb
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 90.

attachmentSkills.name: Magma Fall II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Burst Flame II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire magic attack at power 12 x 5 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 12 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm 90% machine now. Isn't that cool?!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Depends on how strong you are.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: My strength is nothing to sneeze at, of course. I want to show you how cool I can be!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Coolness is all about skills.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Then I'm plenty cool! My Energy Bomb has awesome destructive power!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A mechanical body's so cool!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You can take a closer look, if you want!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're cool, with or without machinery.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Really? You mean, like, cool on the inside?! That makes me so happy!

lilamon.name: Lilamon
lilamon.description: A Pixie Digimon resembling the beloved lilac flower. Though innocent and pure of heart, Lilamon's beauty is deceptive, as it's said to have power over death and rebirth. Its leaves are poisonous, and doing battle with this Digimon sometimes proves fatal. Lilamon's special move is Lila Shower, which fires countless slender beams from its petal-like fingers.

specialSkills.name: Lila Shower
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Plant magic attack at power 50. Increased damage to targets with Insectoid Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Thorn Strike II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant magic attack at power 30 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Venom Trap
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Poison.

attachmentSkills.name: Normalize
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes Injury & Disease.

attachmentSkills.name: Holy Light II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Every beautiful flower has its poison, you know.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A little poison doesn't scare me.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wouldn't be so flippant, if I were you. Careful not to let beauty lead you astray.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Don't you mean has its thorns"?"

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That may be true as well. If you're putting in that much thought, I guess you'll be fine.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Fine by me, as long as it's pretty.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Forgive me if I don't agree. Here's to hoping that sentiment never comes back to bite you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'll keep my distance, then.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Aren't you the careful sort? That's actually a relief to hear. I want to keep you around.

lillymon.name: Lillymon
lillymon.description: A Pixie Digimon born from beautiful flower petals. At first glance, Lillymon looks like a small child, but it's in fact an Ultimate Digimon with immeasurable power. Possessed of a mercurial and tomboyish personality, it's said to open its heart to human girls of the same disposition. Lillymon can also be a crybaby, and becomes inconsolable once it starts sobbing, making this one of the harder Digimon to tame. But Lillymon will also offer a helping hand to the small and the weak. Able to fly using the four leaf-like wings on its back, a gentle breeze is said to follow in Lillymon's wake. Its special move is Flower Cannon, with which it extends both of its arms, turns the flowers on its wrists into the mouth of a cannon and fires an energy bomb.

specialSkills.name: Flower Cannon
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant magic attack at power 80. 30% chance to apply Paralysis.

attachmentSkills.name: Rune Forest II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Plant magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Aura
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] Slightly recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: Meditator
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes status abnormalities.

attachmentSkills.name: Revive
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Revives from KO and moderately recovers HP.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Say, how do I look from your perspective?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Like a strong young woman.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That's because you keep me bright-eyed and bushy-tailed!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Like an adult.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hee hee. You have no idea what a fine specimen of maturity I've become.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Like a sweet, gentle girl.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: My! You really do understand me, don't you?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Like a reliable big sister.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Thanks! And I hope you'll come to rely on me more and more.

locomon.name: Locomon
locomon.description: Resembling a steam-powered locomotive, this Machine Digimon lives to stay in motion. Locomon's purpose is to carry data across the Digital World's Net. In the Digital World, where a large quantity of data must be moved around, transporting said data as quickly as possible is the ultimate reason that Vehicle-species Digimon like Locomon exist. There are times, though, when the older-model Locomon has run off the rails in its pursuit of ever-greater speeds. And although its movement is confined to the tracks, there are occasions when it's generated rifts in spacetime by continuously running in loops. Locomon can also use its special move Wheel Grinder to spin and then throw its spiked wheels.

specialSkills.name: Wheel Grinder
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 25 x 3 hits. Nullifies unfavorable compatibility.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 12 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Void Ray II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Null magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU. 10% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Curse Barrier
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Status Abnormality Immunity.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: How about it? Coming aboard?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I bet I'd get motion sickness.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'd strive to keep turbulence to a minimum, so please overcome your trepidation.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I don't do well with smoke.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm really careful with humans on board. I wouldn't blow too much smoke, you know.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Can you take me somewhere nearby?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Near or far, I promise you a smooth and pleasant journey.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let's travel to the ends of the earth!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Very well. It'll be a long journey for sure, so I won't slack off on the maintenance.

astamon.name: Astamon
astamon.description: Though Astamon is an Ultimate-level Digimon, its power exceeds that of a Mega Digimon. As a noble of the Dark Area, it leads a force of demonic Digimon. Astamon is cruel to its enemies but also kind to its allies, and many demonic Digimon are drawn to its service because of its personal charisma. The bullets Astamon fires from its beloved machine gun, "Oro Salmón," have a will of their own, and will pursue their targets literally to the farthest corners of hell. Astamon's special move, Mad Dog Fire, fires all the bullets in its Oro Salmón in a deadly barrage.

specialSkills.name: Mad Dog Fire
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 25 x 3 hits. Always hits.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Hell Crusher II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Knife or machine gun? Which should I use today...?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Use both.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Yeah, good call. I'd like to get in a dark-energy kick while I'm at it, too.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The machine gun.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Oro Salmón's bullets have a will of their own. I should charge people to watch me shoot.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The knife.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I guess a knife would do for playing around with you. Not that I'd ever stab ya.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Don't use either.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Don't see any targets around, so maybe I'll skip the weapons for today and just have fun.

arukenimon.name: Arukenimon
arukenimon.description: A Dark Beast Digimon in the form of a "Spider Queen" that appears in Greek mythology. As a Digimon of both impressive intelligence and cunning, this queen rules over all Dokugumon. Arukenimon specializes in transforming into a humanoid form, letting it approach potential prey while its guard is down. Short-tempered and ferocious, its nature elicits a sense of trepidation from a great many other Digimon. Arukenimon's special move is Spider Thread, which mangles enemies with sharp wires.

specialSkills.name: Spider Thread
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant physical attack at power 25 x 3 hits. 10% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Insectoid Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Rune Forest II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Plant magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Venom Trap
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Poison.

attachmentSkills.name: Shadow Fang II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 30 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Reset Body
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Removes stat buffs.

myotismon.name: Myotismon
myotismon.description: The king of Undead Digimon, it was resurrected through the dark arts, obtaining mighty powers in the process. Originally a malicious computer virus that demolished all the data it absorbed, Myotismon gained the ability to reanimate the data it destroyed as malignant viruses. Myotismon has an extremely cruel and cunning personality, and is an insidiously difficult Digimon to destroy. However, it can only make full use of its powers at night. During the day, Myotismon is apparently reduced to only half-strength. Its special move Night Raid commands a swarm of bats to ambush its foes.

specialSkills.name: Night Raid
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 85. Recovers HP equal to 30% of damage dealt. Increased damage to targets with Holy Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Hell Crusher II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Venom Trap
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Poison.

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Reflect
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Reflect Magic.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Have you any interest in the dark arts?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Not even a little.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hehehe. Drop the act. Any human who would befriend me would not say such a thing.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Teach me, teach me!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You certainly wear your heart on your sleeve. Pray you do enough to earn my favor.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'll admit I'm curious.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Yes. You befriended me, so you must have some interest. Still, I choose who it is I teach.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: They're evil, and have to be stopped.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You would try to reform one as wicked as me? Ludicrous! But I look forward to the attempt.

etemon.name: Etemon
etemon.description: A previously unknown Digimon that suddenly appeared in the Digital World. The self-proclaimed "King of Digimon," Etemon's combat strength is unimaginable. Rumors say it manipulates the mysterious Monzaemon from behind the scenes. Clad in a reinforced monkey suit that withstands any and all attacks, Etemon bounds all over the world for unending battles. It uses its special move Love Serenade to break the enemy's heart and sap their fighting spirit.

specialSkills.name: Love Serenade
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 30% reduction to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Gaia Blaster II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth magic attack at power 70. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Ripping Net
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Paralysis.

attachmentSkills.name: Awesome Quake II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Earth magic attack at power 45. 85% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Hate Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Taunting.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm thinking of writing a new song. What kind of music should I do?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
