postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hot and heavy rock!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Rock! I like that! My fiery heart is gonna set ya ablaze!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Sophisticated classical music!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Classical! Sounds tough, but I like a good challenge!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A rap about friendship!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Love to all my homies out there! The rap master is in the house!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Love Serenade No. 2!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hey, a follow-up could work! Everybody's gonna get a dose of heartbreak!

okuwamon.name: Okuwamon
okuwamon.description: A Digivolution of Kuwagamon, evolved into something even more sinister than a Kabuterimon-type Digimon. The predominant improvement is its defense, which Kuwagamon lacks. Okuwamon's ability to detect foes with its antennae has been boosted, and its pincer attacks have augmented precision. Furthermore, it's clear that its most prominent characteristics aren't only its survival instinct, but also its destructive impulse. Truly a Digivolution steeped in aggression. Its special move Double Scissor Claw is an upgraded version of Scissor Claw that's able to slice through even the hardest diamond.

specialSkills.name: Double Scissor Claw
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant physical attack at power 85. Nullifies unfavorable compatibility. Increased damage to targets with Antibody Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Rune Forest II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Plant magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

orochimon.name: Orochimon
orochimon.description: An enormous Dark Dragon Digimon with eight heads. Seven of these are fakes, however, with only the black one in the center actually being part of its body. Orochimon's origins date back to long ago, when it wrought havoc in the Ancient Digital World. Its strength was such that it drove an entire area to the brink of destruction, until it was sealed away by the servant of a being seeking to maintain harmony in the Digital World Orochimon's special move is Ame no Murakumo, which transforms the end of its tail into a sharp blade to rend its foes.

specialSkills.name: Ame no Murakumo
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 90. Increased damage to targets with Dragon Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Shadow Fang II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 30 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 12 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Venom Trap
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Poison.

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Bind
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 100% chance of 20% reduction to INT for 3 turn(s).

garbagemon.name: Garbagemon
garbagemon.description: This Mutant Digimon is a desktop computer trash icon that has come to life through Digivolution. Unlike Sukamon, who formed from a mutation of discarded data, Garbagemon is the garbage can itself. Filth-species Digimon were thought to be the weakest type before Garbagemon's appearance, but now that convention has been turned on its head. Its can is like a black hole, and those sucked into it disappear from the Digital World without a trace. Its special move Poop Bazooka is a vile attack fired from a bazooka Garbagemon made from empty cans.

specialSkills.name: Poop Bazooka
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Deals 5% HP damage. 100% chance of 10% reduction to ATK for 3 turns. 70% chance to apply Confusion.

attachmentSkills.name: Safety Guard
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Guts.

attachmentSkills.name: Crescent Leaf II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant physical attack at power 9 x 7 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Power Energy II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hey! I know about the mounds of trash humans are pilin' up. What're ya gonna do about it?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Keep telling everyone to be less wasteful.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Speakin' up takes courage. Good on ya fer leadin' the way!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Sort my garbage and recycle properly.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Good. With the right mindset, trash ain't trash no more, right? Ya got my support.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let's look for reusable stuff together.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Good thinkin'. What say we find some matchin' teacups as a sign of our friendship?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: There's no such thing as trash.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hohoho! I like your way of thinkin'. All things deserve to be treated with love.

gigadramon.name: Gigadramon
gigadramon.description: A Black Dragon Digimon developed at the same time as Megadramon. A combat dragon fully armed with further modifications, Gigadramon's existence is the epitome of a fiendish computer virus. Its special move Eradication Gears unleashes infinite organic missiles.

specialSkills.name: Eradication Gears
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire physical attack at power 30 x 2 hits.

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 12 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Full Metal Pile III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Steel magic attack at power 45. 85% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

cannonbeemon.name: CannonBeemon
cannonbeemon.description: CannonBeemon is an enormous Digimon that guards the secret, floating honey base known as the Royal Base, which is shrouded in mystery. This airborne base is surrounded by danger on all sides, so CannonBeemon's attacks cover a wide area, involving a simultaneous barrage from the giant munition containers on its upper body. It can also use its special move Nitro Stinger to fire its high-caliber laser cannon and pierce even heavily-armored foes.

specialSkills.name: Nitro Stinger
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 85. 30% chance to apply Paralysis. Increased damage to targets with Insectoid Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Nanomachine Break II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 15 x 4 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Thunder Fall II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 12 x 3 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Power Energy II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

groundramon.name: Groundramon
groundramon.description: An Earth Dragon Digimon with huge arms on its back. These arms, which are said to have transformed from wings, allow Groundramon to dig through the earth efficiently. It usually lies hidden in tunnels it's bored deep underground, and seldom shows its face on the surface. Groundramon likes living in veins of rare Huanglong Ore, and in fact the scales covering its body are very likely composed of the same material. Its personality is quite brutal, and most who encounter it wind up losing their lives. Groundramon uses its special move Scrapless Claw to crush enemies with its back arms.

specialSkills.name: Scrapless Claw
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 80. 50% chance to apply Injury.

attachmentSkills.name: Awesome Quake II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Earth magic attack at power 45. 85% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Magma Fall II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

sharkmon.name: Sharkmon
sharkmon.description: An enormous shark Digimon that's a Digivolution of an Aquatic Digimon with a surging desire to consume prey. Having integrated the data of battleships, over half of its body is mechanized. Sharkmon is a vicious Digimon that uses its anchor to catch and devour other Digimon dwelling in the Net Ocean or passing nearby. Its special move is All-Out Bombardment, with which it extends and fires its cannons.

specialSkills.name: All-Out Bombardment
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Steel physical attack at power 45.

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 8 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Lunatic Gate II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Null physical attack at power 35. 90% ACU. 10% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Tidal Stream II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Water physical attack at power 9 x 4 hits. 90% ACU.

shaujinmon.name: Shaujinmon
shaujinmon.description: A Wizard Digimon expelled from the heavens of the Digital World. A certain DigiCore is sealed within the nine beads of its necklace. It's usually calm and collected, but if even one bead of its necklace is lost, Shaujinmon transforms once again into a terrifying Digimon. It uses its special move Kouyoujou: Hydro Descent to strike its astonishing, super-heavyweight staff "Kouyoujou" on the ground, shattering it and releasing a raging current.

specialSkills.name: Kouyoujou: Hydro Descent
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Water magic attack at power 50. Increased damage to targets with Fire Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Hydro Water II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water magic attack at power 12 x 5 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Shine Burst II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Character Reversal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy or ally] 100% chance to apply Reverse.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I want to live the slow life on a river with clean waters.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Why don't we go look for that river of yours?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That sounds like a great time! I might actually take you up on that.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let's study how to clean up the rivers, then.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Oh! We can make rivers clean again with our own hands? I really like that idea.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: We can clean up the rivers together.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It might take some time, but a little river cleanup could be fun if we take it slow.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'd protect a river where you could live.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I get the feeling you'd really do it, too! You've got my trust.

cherrymon.name: Cherrymon
cherrymon.description: Cherrymon is a Digimon further Digivolved from Woodmon, gaining a high degree of intelligence and power. Known as the "Lord of the Deep Forest," it's a terrifying Digimon that lures those who wander into the depths of the dark forest ever farther inside so they can never leave again. Its body produces a hallucinogenic mist to lure Digimon deep into the forest. It then uses its branch-like tentacles and vines to capture its enemies and draw nourishment from them. Should you ever encounter an old Woodmon, it may be best to defeat it before it can Digivolve into Cherrymon. Cherrymon's special move Cherry Bomb makes use of the forbidden fruit growing in the thick branches on its head.

specialSkills.name: Cherry Bomb
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Plant physical attack at power 15 x 3 hits. 30% chance to apply Poison. Increased damage to targets with Beast Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Ripping Net
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Paralysis.

attachmentSkills.name: Thorn Strike II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant magic attack at power 30 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to INT for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to DEF for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I ask that you protect and treasure the deep green forest.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It's dangerous deep in the forest.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I would never put friends in danger, yet who knows what awaits those who tread carelessly?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Moderate logging is necessary, though.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I am heartened by your knowledge on the subject. As long as it is not to excess.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'll help any way I can.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I do not require much. Simply leave nature to her course and she will provide.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I promise to cherish the forest.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I would be thrilled if everyone thought that way. Watch over it, at a proper distance.

skullgreymon.name: SkullGreymon
skullgreymon.description: This skeleton Digimon is nothing but skin and bones—minus the skin. Singularly fixated on fighting, it extended its life through combat instinct alone, even as its body rotted away, eventually becoming SkullGreymon. Without a scrap of intelligence or reason left to restrain its instinct, SkullGreymon's existence is a threat to other Digimon. Its special move is an organic missile fired from its spinal cord. The latest research suggests that this attack eventually evolved into Oblivion Bird, which adds a new tracking function and dramatically upgrades both power and range.

specialSkills.name: Oblivion Bird
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 90.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Shadow Fang II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 30 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Hell Crusher II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

skullsatamon.name: SkullSatamon
skullsatamon.description: The decrepit ruins of what was once a Dark Angel Digimon that fell into the Dark Area in its pursuit of strength and destruction. There, SkullSatamon's wicked nature intensified, and its dark powers are now unfathomable. Its DigiCore, concentrated with these dark powers, has transformed into a DarkCore, something only possessed by Evil-species Digimon. SkullSatamon's special move Nail Bone is a horrifying technique that unleashes an intense light from the jewel on the tip of its staff, disrupting and obliterating its opponent's data.

specialSkills.name: Nail Bone
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark magic attack at power 50. Increased damage to targets with Holy Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Shadow Fang II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 30 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Venom Trap
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Poison.

attachmentSkills.name: Hell Crusher II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to SPD for 3 turn(s).

skullseadramon.name: SkullSeadramon
skullseadramon.description: An Undead Seadramon that swims the Net Ocean seeking Digimon prey, driven solely by instinct despite the loss of its flesh. SkullSeadramon's skeletal state gives it reduced resistance when swimming, enabling it to pursue its quarry relentlessly to any distance at high speeds. Once SkullSeadramon gets ahold of a foe, it coils its long form around it and squeezes the life out of it with Death Roll. Its special move Lightning Javelin launches a sharp electrical shock from the blade atop its head. This attack grows in power the longer it's charged.

specialSkills.name: Lightning Javelin
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 90. Increased damage to targets with Aquatic Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Nanomachine Break I
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 10 x 4 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Hydro Water II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water magic attack at power 12 x 5 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Ocean Wave II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Water magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Soul Fear II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark physical attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

darksuperstarmon.name: DarkSuperStarmon
darksuperstarmon.description: DarkSuperStarmon is a Digimon steeped in darkness born from observational data of black holes. It apparently has a past so grim that it's given up all its hopes and dreams, donning sunglasses so that no light can reach it. Its special move is Dark Explosion, which involves attacking with the shards of a supernova.

specialSkills.name: Dark Explosion
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark physical attack at power 10 x 3～6 hits.

attachmentSkills.name: Shadow Fang II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 30 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Hate Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Taunting.

attachmentSkills.name: Safety Guard
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Guts.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

dragomon.name: Dragomon
dragomon.description: A wicked god Digimon known as the "Sinful Priest of the Ocean Floor." Dragomon is thought to be evolved from a computer virus that infects ship computers, sending their bearings and routes off-course. Dragomon bundles its countless tentacles into a humanoid shape, but its actual identity is a Digivolution of a strange Mollusk Digimon. Dragomon's special move is Forbidden Trident, with which it hurls its trident with tremendous strength. For its defeated foes, it holds the rosary around its neck and adopts a sort of mourning pose.

specialSkills.name: Forbidden Trident
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water physical attack at power 90. If target is KO'd: Recovers user's SP by 25%.

attachmentSkills.name: Hydro Water II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water magic attack at power 12 x 5 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Hell Crusher II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Venom Trap
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Poison.

attachmentSkills.name: Ocean Wave II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Water magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Darkness... is... comforting...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let's go for a stroll in the sunlight.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I do not like it... yet it may be interesting to attempt.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Where does darkness come from, I wonder...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A fair question to ask. As to the answer... Seek that for yourself.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let's go for a nighttime stroll, then.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You choose darkness as I have? Hmm. Perhaps it would not hurt to join you this once.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're easy to find even in the dark.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Finding me in the gloom is no easy task... except, perhaps, for you...

tankdramon.name: Tankdramon
tankdramon.description: Tankdramon is a Machine Digimon in charge of riot suppression and heavy assault missions for the mechanized D-Brigade. It excels at eliminating multiple targets, and boasts overwhelming firepower. Equipped with a special radar capable of locking on to 30 targets at once, an individual Tankdramon can also sync targets with others, and it's said to be impossible to escape them all. Casualty rates among Tankdramon are also extremely low, and reportedly, only one has ever been lost in the field. Tankdramon's special move Striver Cannon fires a shell equipped with a small nuclear warhead to utterly destroy everything within a 20-mile radius.

specialSkills.name: Striver Cannon
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 125. Immobilized next turn. Increased damage to targets with Humanoid Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Nanomachine Break II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 15 x 4 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Thunder Fall III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 15 x 3 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

shogungekomon.name: ShogunGekomon
shogungekomon.description: An upgrade to Gekomon, with an antenna that looks like a feudal lord's topknot. ShogunGekomon was supposedly first created in a karaoke machine's scoring system. It has two horns on its shoulders that play a melody, and it can sing several registers lower than Gekomon, giving off a lordly (?) air. Its special move Musical Fist uses its vocal chords and horns to create an ultra-low frequency wave that corrupts the data of its foes. However, these ultra-low frequencies seem to actually improve the health of some opponents.

specialSkills.name: Musical Fist
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null magic attack at power 90. If target is affected by Sleep/ Deep Slumber: Increased damage. Increased damage to targets with Amphibian Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Texture Blow
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Crystallization.

attachmentSkills.name: Hydro Water II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water magic attack at power 12 x 5 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Ocean Wave II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Water magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Hate Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Taunting.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I sang too much, and got a frog in my throat, glurp...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Clearly you need more practice.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: This isn't enough to deter me, glurp! A little break, and I'll be back at it, glurp!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It's just because the air is so dry.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wouldn't have opened up the pipes if I'd known, glurp. Tell a 'mon beforehand, glurp!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Well, you did sleep with your mouth open...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: How rude, glurp! At least my snoring sounds better than those Gekomon, glurp!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You sing too much anyway.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: But my fans are always waiting to hear me croon, glurp! I can't let them down, glurp!

datamon.name: Datamon
datamon.description: A super-mini Machine Digimon used for healing. Originally a Vaccine-attribute Digimon for repairing crashed computers, Datamon's thought processing circuits were corrupted after it was attacked by a strong Virus-attribute Digimon, causing it to go rogue. It will try—albeit poorly—to "rebuild" the data of correctly-functioning computers. Its forte is destroying any kind of data. No matter how strong the Digimon, Datamon will easily destroy the data that comprises its body. Its special move is Digital Bomb, which fires an attack from its fingertips.

specialSkills.name: Digital Bomb
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire magic attack at power 85. 100% chance to apply Reverse.

attachmentSkills.name: Shock Plasma II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 20 x 3 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Thruster Metal II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel magic attack at power 9 x 7 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Idle Bubble
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Sleep.

attachmentSkills.name: Mental Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to SPI for 3 turn(s).

phantomon.name: Phantomon
phantomon.description: A reaper-like Digimon wielding a giant sickle and chain. A Ghost Digimon more advanced than Bakemon, once Phantomon possesses an individual, their fate is almost certainly sealed. The eye-shaped crystal hanging from its neck functions like Mammothmon's crest, providing it with a second sight that allows it to see over long distances. Phantomon uses this ability to find those on the verge of death. It's said that the inside of the cloth concealing its body is connected to the Digital World of another dimension. Phantomon's special move is Soul Chopper, which uses its giant sickle and chain to slash its opponent's very soul. Anyone struck by this attack is completely obliterated, soul and all.

specialSkills.name: Soul Chopper
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Deals 15% HP damage. 100% chance to apply Injury.

attachmentSkills.name: Venom Trap
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Poison.

attachmentSkills.name: Nightmare II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Mental Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to SPI for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Power Energy II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

blackkingnumemon.name: BlackKingNumemon
blackkingnumemon.description: A Mollusk Digimon that established its position as king of the dark trash data world. BlackKingNumemon uses its special move Dark Pupil to fire a black beam of light from its round eyes.

specialSkills.name: Dark Pupil
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null magic attack at power 70. 50% chance to apply Injury.

attachmentSkills.name: Nightmare II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Reset Body
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Removes stat buffs.

attachmentSkills.name: Hell Crusher II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

bluemeramon.name: BlueMeramon
bluemeramon.description: BlueMeramon is a Fire Digimon that burns hotter than a Champion Meramon. Its special move is Cold Flame.

specialSkills.name: Cold Flame
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice physical attack at power 90. Increased damage to targets with Fire Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Lethal Blizzard II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Ice magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Bind
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 100% chance of 20% reduction to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

vademon.name: Vademon
vademon.description: An Alien Digimon shaped like a creature from the far reaches of outer space. Still, rumor says it was born of a plant seed. Vademon possesses terrifying offensive power belying its massive head and octopus-like lower frame. The abduction beam fired from the ray gun in its hand is fearsome, but its special move Unidentified Flying Kiss is even more so, as it makes fools of its opponents.

specialSkills.name: Unidentified Flying Kiss
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 70. 30% chance to apply Crystallization. Increased damage to targets with Humanoid Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Holy Light II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Character Reversal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy or ally] 100% chance to apply Reverse.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Reflect
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Reflect Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Spell Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Magic.

matadormon.name: Matadormon
matadormon.description: A bloodsucking martial artist Digimon that performs a magnificent dance. Said to have been born in the folk dance database of a certain museum, Matadormon is a master of the Bulldog Dance, performing it with a unique arrangement of rhythmic movements. It uses its fluttering garments to befuddle foes, slashing those who let their guard down with the countless rapiers hidden inside the deceptively soft cloth of its sleeves. As a vampire, Matadormon must sustain itself by drinking Digimon blood, but not just any will do, and so it wanders from land to land in search of strong Digimon to feed upon. Its special move is Earth-Shattering Stomp, a vicious kicking attack drawing upon Matadormon's own original martial arts style.

specialSkills.name: Earth-Shattering Stomp
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 25 x 3 hits. Recovers HP equal to 20% of damage dealt. Increased damage to targets with Humanoid Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Hell Crusher II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Idle Bubble
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Sleep.

mummymon.name: Mummymon
mummymon.description: An Undead Digimon wrapped head-to-toe in bandages like the mummies of ancient Egypt. Mummymon's ability to summon and control the lingering spirits (residual data) of terminated Digimon has earned it the alias of the "Necromancer." Its taciturn and expressionless nature makes it hard to read, but any who attack it will face an exhaustive onslaught from the weapon it brandishes. If cornered, this dangerous creature will start firing off its beloved gun "Obelisk" willy-nilly. Mummymon uses its signature move Snake Bandage to wrap the bandages of its arms around the enemy and constrict them like a snake.

specialSkills.name: Snake Bandage
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 100% chance of 20% reduction to SPD & applying Paralysis for 3 turns.

attachmentSkills.name: Shadow Fang II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 30 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Gaia Blaster II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth magic attack at power 70. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Revive
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Revives from KO and moderately recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: Hell Crusher II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Maybe it's about time to redo my bandages...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'll help you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: To render me defenseless, you mean? Sorry for not trusting you, but I'll pass.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'd love to see how that works.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: To observe me, you mean? No, thank you. I'll redo my wraps when you aren't looking.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You don't need to fix them.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I can't fight well with loose bandages, but if you say so, I'll deal with it.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: They're a little smelly, honestly.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: How rude! Although I guess I wouldn't have noticed unless you said something...

mistymon.name: Mistymon
mistymon.description: A Magic Warrior Digimon from Witchelny, the Digital World of another dimension. In addition to the multitudes of magic (advanced programming language) at its disposal, Mistymon is also adept at the blade, possessing masterful swordsmanship. Well-versed both in chivalry and sorcery, it can even imbue its sword with magic to attack. Its special move Blast Fire is one such form of magic by which it covers its sword in flames to slash with enhanced might.

specialSkills.name: Blast Fire
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire magic attack at power 80. 100% chance of 10% boost to DEF/SPI for 3 turn(s). Increased damage to targets with Warrior Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Nightmare II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Magma Fall II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Reset Body
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Removes stat buffs.

megadramon.name: Megadramon
megadramon.description: Megadramon is a Black Dragon Digimon said to possess the greatest and most terrible power of all the Ultimate-level Dragon Android Digimon. It was artificially modified by an unknown individual who programmed it to destroy everything. It's practically the living embodiment of a computer virus. Capable of breaching a high-security computer network with ease, Megadramon then effortlessly mods or destroys the host computer. Its special move Eradication Attack fires countless organic missiles from its arms.

specialSkills.name: Eradication Attack
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 30 x 3 hits. Increased damage to targets with Knight Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Nanomachine Break II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 15 x 4 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 12 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Thunder Fall II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 12 x 3 hits. 90% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Humans are supposed to be weak, but I sense a strength of sorts. Where does it come from?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Such courage comes from deep within one's heart.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I see. So humans fight despite their frailty. Is that what you call strength of heart"?"

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: We make up for our weaknesses with wisdom.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Wisdom can compensate for such things? Hmm... Perhaps I should expand my own knowledge.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: From joining forces with our friends.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Even small embers can create a fire, yes? Imagine how you and I could blaze together.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Our feelings for others make us stronger.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That is difficult to understand. Feelings make you stronger? Humans are fascinating.

wargrowlmon.name: WarGrowlmon
wargrowlmon.description: An Ultimate Android Digimon also known as a "Giant Growlmon." WarGrowlmon is huge, as this nickname suggests, and the upper half of its body is composed of powerful Chrondigizoid metal. It can also fly thanks to the twin vernier thrusters on its shoulders, allowing it to deal with threats both on land and in the air. The muzzle-like restraint on WarGrowlmon's jaws is there to control its immense power. The cable-like Assault Balancer that can be freely extended from its back doubles as a weapon with which to pierce foes. WarGrowlmon's special move is Atomic Blaster, which fires the twin guns on its chest to destroy enemies at the atomic level.

specialSkills.name: Atomic Blaster
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire physical attack at power 100. Immobilized next turn. Increased damage to targets with Unknown Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 12 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Void Ray II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Null magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU. 10% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Leave any aerial assaults to me.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wanna fly with you!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Just fly? I bet the idea of fighting will pique your interest once you are up there.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: How can you fly with such a huge body?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The vernier thrusters on my shoulders. I doubt anyone but me could control this power.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let's try joint assaults together.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: No need for you to lift a finger. I have more than enough power on my own.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I won't let you do anything reckless.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Your concern is unwarranted. The power within me is much greater than you think.

metaltyrannomon.name: MetalTyrannomon
metaltyrannomon.description: An Android Digimon that remodeled its body to obtain extensive power. Just like Megadramon was remodeled for anti-air use, MetalTyrannomon was remodeled into a Digimon for anti-ground interception. Any and all attacks rebound off of its strengthened body, and it possesses a terrifying attack power, busting through even the sturdiest armor with its tough chin. It uses its special move Nuclear Laser to fire an energy beam from its left arm.

specialSkills.name: Nuclear Laser
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 85. Nullifies unfavorable compatibility. Increased damage to targets with Steel Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Thunder Fall II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 12 x 3 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 12 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

lucemon-cm.name: Lucemon CM
lucemon-cm.description: Both divine and diabolical, this Ultimate Evil King Digimon is the strongest of the Seven Great Demon Lords. Lucemon: Chaos Mode instigated a rebellion in ancient times, and was sealed away in the Dark Area along with many other Evil King Digimon. Its power exceeds that of Mega Digimon, so much so that it even rivals the entity considered "God." Although it has a godlike side that cherishes all living things, it also has a demonic side that wants to annihilate the world itself. This is why it aims to destroy this world and build a new one in its stead. Its special move Paradise Lost launches its enemy high into the air with a wild barrage before it grabs its limbs and slams it into the ground, while Dead or Alive seals the enemy within a three-dimensional magic circle made from holy and evil spheres. Those caught in this magic circle have a 50/50 chance of either being completely obliterated or taking heavy damage.

specialSkills.name: Dead or Alive
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 30 or 120. Increased damage to targets with Holy Trait.

specialSkills.name: Paradise Lost
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 95. 100% chance of reduction to Null resistance. Increased damage to targets with Deity Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Nightmare III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Holy Light III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Restore
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes status abnormalities, Injury, & Disease.

attachmentSkills.name: X-Aura
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] Moderately recovers HP.

ladydevimon.name: LadyDevimon
ladydevimon.description: A feminine Dark Angel Digimon with a noble presence. LadyDevimon's Dark Side Power is strong, pure and without equal. There are almost no instances of one of these Digimon being successfully cultivated on a personal computer. LadyDevimon's special move is Darkness Wave, which releases countless, flying, batlike creatures that burn the opponent to a crisp.

specialSkills.name: Darkness Wave
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark magic attack at power 15 x 3 hits. Increased damage to targets with Holy Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Mental Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to SPI for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Nightmare II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to INT for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Spell Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Magic.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'll say this much. Fights aren't won with empty sentiment!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I don't use underhanded tricks.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Would you say that even if you were cornered? I look forward to finding out.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What's wrong with a little lip service?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Don't you get it? Lip service won't work on the wicked.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You don't have to worry.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hohoho. All right, then. I look forward to the day you come to beg for my help.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'll leave the sneaky tactics to you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Well said! I am craven, cruel and callous. I look forward to the day we fight together.

wisemon.name: Wisemon
wisemon.description: Completely shrouded in mystery, Wisemon can appear at any point in time and space via its "Book." Using this Book as a spiritual vessel, it frequently alters its form to appear in locations in spacetime connected to the Book, and so some believe that its true form must exist in a different dimension. Some researchers speculate that Wisemon is a Wizard Digimon like Piedmon. The Spacetime Stones in its hands can record and play back regions in spacetime, and have saved all the events and objects of the Digital World. Its special move Pandora Dialogue is a high-speed replay of enemy attacks stored in spacetime.

specialSkills.name: Pandora Dialogue
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null magic attack at power 90. Increased damage to targets with Magic Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Mental Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to SPI for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Nightmare II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Ripping Net
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Paralysis.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Reflect
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Reflect Physical.

waruseadramon.name: WaruSeadramon
waruseadramon.description: A Seadramon-species Digimon Digivolved into an evil entity. WaruSeadramon controls the power of darkness with the blade-like horn on its forehead. This Digimon has grown even craftier and more persistent than MegaSeadramon when it comes to chasing down prey. WaruSeadramon's special move is Darkstrom, which swallows foes up with whirlpools composed of dark power.

specialSkills.name: Darkstrom
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 90. Increased damage to targets with Fish Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to INT for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Shock Plasma II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 20 x 3 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Hydro Water II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water magic attack at power 12 x 5 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Ripping Net
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Paralysis.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Make me sound cool when you talk to me.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: All hail the hero WaruSeadramon!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You keeping talking to me like that, and I bet I can really cut loose!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Good day to you, Brave WaruSeadramon!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Makes me sound like one of those wandering samurai types. Yeah, it's got a ring to it.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What it is, my WaruSeadramon.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Sounds very... friendly. Yup, I like it.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hey, Li'l WaruSeadramon!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Li'l" is the total opposite of cool! It's cute, even! Still... Not so bad, I guess."

shakkoumon.name: Shakkoumon
shakkoumon.description: A Mutant Digimon DNA Digivolved from Ankylomon and Angemon. Shakkoumon has a shiny silver body with white wings, and according to one theory, it's actually an Angel Digimon that descended from on high into the Ancient Digital World. Since it can rotate its head and torso a full 360 degrees, it's capable of attacking in any direction. Some people find it frightening because its lack of expression makes it impossible to tell what it's thinking, but it has a warm and gentle personality. Its special move Disaster Blaster shoots destructive red laser beams from its eyes. These lasers are said to reach temperatures of over 180,000 degrees Fahrenheit at their focal point.

specialSkills.name: Disaster Blaster
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 80. 30% chance to apply Crystallization. Increased damage to targets with Aquatic Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Mental Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to SPI for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Holy Light II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Reflect
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Reflect Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Character Reversal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy or ally] 100% chance to apply Reverse.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I SHALL PROTECT THIS LAND.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'll leave it to you, then.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: YES. REST ASSURED. I CAN ATTACK IN ALL DIRECTIONS.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Nah. Don't worry about it.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: THAT WILL NOT DO. AS A GUARDIAN DEITY, I HAVE A DUTY TO PERFORM.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Looking forward to your protection.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: IT IS MERELY THE DUTY OF A GUARDIAN DEITY.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Thank you very much.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I AM PLEASED TO RECEIVE YOUR THANKS.

silphymon.name: Silphymon
silphymon.description: A Beast Man Digimon DNA Digivolved from Aquilamon and Gatomon. Silphymon has tremendously strong legs, and is said to be able to leap high into the sky. Upon reaching these heights, it then spreads its arms and sails through the air like a glider. Silphymon uses the radar devices on its ears to gather information, then visually processes this data for viewing on its head-mounted display, allowing it to pinpoint an enemy's location, day or night. It uses its special move Top Gun to extend its arms to fire an energy bomb.

specialSkills.name: Top Gun
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind magic attack at power 90. Increased damage to targets with Bird Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Sonic Shot II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Gale Storm III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Wind magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Power Energy II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null magic attack at power 60. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: These parts of mine remind you of anything?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Not at all.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: No powers of observation, huh? Focus on your friends and you'll see all kinds of things.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Gatomon's ears.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Good catch. You can have the data I get from this radar and head-mounted display anytime.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Aquilamon's wings!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The wings do stand out, huh? They let me glide freely, arriving safely by your side.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Aquilamon's legs?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Splendid, yes? I can bound into the air even without wings, so I can protect you anywhere.

dinobeemon.name: Dinobeemon
dinobeemon.description: A Mutant Digimon that DNA Digivolved from Stingmon and ExVeemon. A chimera of a dragon and an insect, this Digimon is known as the "Terrible Bee." While Dinobeemon can't be easily classified as either a Dragon or an Insectoid type, its insect qualities are quite prominent. Flying through the air on its four wings, this Digimon tracks its foes unerringly with its compound eyes before choking the life out of them with harsh certainty. Dinobeemon is also exceedingly barbaric by nature. It uses its special move Hell Masquerade to perform a “dance of Hell,” cutting through foes with movements fast enough to leave afterimages.

specialSkills.name: Hell Masquerade
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant physical attack at power 25 x 3 hits. If target has yet to act: 25% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Rune Forest II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Plant magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

paildramon.name: Paildramon
paildramon.description: A Dragon Man Digimon DNA Digivolved from an ExVeemon and a Stingmon. It retains many elements of Dragon types, with the power of a dragon and the iron-wall defense of an insect's carapace. More than just powerful, Paildramon also uses quick and agile moves to finish off opponents. It's very loyal, and will unquestioningly lay down its life for its master. Paildramon uses its special move Death Parade Blaster to fire an energy wave from two biological cannons extending from its waist.

specialSkills.name: Death Parade Blaster
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Null physical attack at power 15 x 3 hits. 10% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Humanoid Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Wind Claw II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Crescent Leaf II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant physical attack at power 9 x 7 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: See what happens when you cross the best parts of dragon and insect!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Those claws sure look sharp.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I can even launch them. Once I've sunk my spikes into a foe, they're not getting away.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You look like you have incredible power.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A dragon's might is strong within me, but don't forget an insect's agility backs it up.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What a hard shell you've got.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: An insect's carapace offers flawless defense. And I won't forget to protect you, too.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What are those things attached to your waist?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: They fire energy waves. As long as I draw breath, I'll always fight for my friends!

infermon.name: Infermon
infermon.description: An Ultimate Digimon similar in appearance to a long-legged spider. In its normal form, Infermon has its limbs and head extended, but it can also take on a cocoon form where it draws its limbs inside its body. In cocoon form, its defense increases to the point where it can repel any attack, although this limits its movement to a straight line. It can easily overcome the tightest security to infiltrate any network. Should Infermon ever be released onto the Net, the world would be plunged into chaos. Its special move Spider Shooter fires an energy bomb of incredible destructive power from the gunport in its mouth.

specialSkills.name: Spider Shooter
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 23 x 4 hits. Increased damage to targets with Unknown Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Hell Crusher II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Panic Wisp
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Confusion.

aldamon.name: Aldamon
aldamon.description: A Digimon whose power over fire exceeds that of legend due to the unknown powers it obtained by fully inheriting the might of the Ten Legendary Warriors. Aldamon is a Demon God who transforms fear and anger into a righteous power to fight. Its violent behavior earns it many enemies, but its name reflects the fused form of a god in Hindu mythology, combining the wildness of a beast with the intelligence of a human. In battle, it unleashes attacks over incredibly large areas, melting and burning everything to a crisp. This aspect is a destructive power akin to the threat of a modern nuclear weapon. Aldamon uses its special move Atomic Inferno to fire a rapid-fire stream of super-hot bullets from the Rudriya Darpana superweapons on its arms. It can also use its Rudriya Darpana for melee, and specializes in close-range combat.

specialSkills.name: Atomic Inferno
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 30 x 3 hits. 10% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Vegetation Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Saint Knuckle III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 38 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Meditator
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes status abnormalities.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm often told I resemble someone, but who could it be...?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: BurningGreymon.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Yes, our talons and tails are similar. Judge for yourself which of us is stronger, though.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Agunimon.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Our faces are similar, true, but I'd like you to look closer and see how we differ.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: AncientGreymon.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Saying I resemble a quadrupedal dragon is vexing, but at least you think I'm strong.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Flamemon.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Strangely, that does not bother me, though I don't feel I have such youthful features.

beowolfmon.name: Beowolfmon
beowolfmon.description: A Digimon whose power over light exceeds that of legend due to the unknown powers it obtained by fully inheriting the might of the Ten Legendary Warriors. Beowolfmon possesses both the instincts of a beast and the intelligence of a human. A warrior of exceptional strength, it easily wields its twin-bladed greatsword Trinität with just one hand. In battle, it always remains thoughtful and composed, although as a warrior, it believes in the virtues of fighting for its friends and facing off against greater foes. Thanks to the long-distance missile pod on its left arm, the Roland 2, it excels at both long-range and close-range combat. Its special move is Zweihänder, an attack with which it swings the greatsword Trinität down at near-lightspeed to cleave through foes.

specialSkills.name: Zweihänder
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 90. If target has yet to act: 25% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Evil Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 15 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Which is superior, a wild nature or intelligence?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A wild nature.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Yes, perhaps my wildness is the source of my unflinching fighting spirit.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Intelligence.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Yes, my intellect may be where my firm resolve to fight for my friends comes from.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: They're impossible to compare.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Yes. A true warrior must balance a wild spirit with reason, just as I do.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: No use worrying about it.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: True. No time for such thoughts when fighting for one's friends on the battlefield.

apollomon.name: Apollomon
apollomon.description: One of the Olympos XII, and a Deity Digimon that possesses flame energy equivalent to the very sun's power. This awesome strength, capable of melting down and purifying any substance, is such that even Apollomon—with all its intense fervor and pride—can barely contain it. Apollomon's special moves are Sol Blaster, which unleashes an incandescent solar orb formed from the flame sphere on its back, and Phoebus Blow, which concentrates all of its latent power into a single punch.

specialSkills.name: Sol Blaster
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire physical attack at power 60. Increased damage to targets with Immortal Trait.

specialSkills.name: Phoebus Blow
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 90. The lower the user's HP, the greater the damage. Increased damage to targets with Aquatic Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Saint Knuckle III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 38 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Shine Burst III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Am I hot?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Not really.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Perhaps I lack zeal? It seems I must redouble my training regimen.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You are.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It must be the hot blood boiling in my veins, though I do try to rein it in.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Too hot.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: In light of my role as a deity, I suppose I should take that as a compliment. My thanks.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Sweltering.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I apologize if the heat is uncomfortable, but I must not let my fervor as a deity waver.

alphamon.name: Alphamon
alphamon.description: One of the 13 Royal Knights, who are said to be the highest-ranking Digimon when it comes to Network security. Although Alphamon itself is a Holy Knight, it's said to act as a deterrent to other Holy Knights. It typically prefers to remain hidden, and is widely known as the "Aloof Hermit," identifiable by the blue cape that flutters around it. The position it occupies in the Royal Knights is known as the "Empty Seat." In battle, it has the ability to access Alpha inForce, an ultimate power that can instantly reverse what would otherwise be a lost cause. Its special moves are Blade of the Dragon King, which involves drawing out light gathered in the center of a magic circle, then using it to pierce a foe, and Soul Digitalization, which involves spreading the wings on its back to take flight, then creating a giant magic circle in the sky, which it uses to summon a legendary monster from another dimension.

specialSkills.name: Blade of the Dragon King
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 90. Acts first next round. Increased damage to targets with Knight Trait.

specialSkills.name: Soul Digitalization
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Null magic attack at power 55. If target has yet to act: 25% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Unknown Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Shine Burst III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Character Reversal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy or ally] 100% chance to apply Reverse.

attachmentSkills.name: Restore
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes status abnormalities, Injury, & Disease.

attachmentSkills.name: X-Revive
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Revives from KO and greatly recovers HP.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I am loath to stand revealed before a human as I am now...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wanna see more of you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I suppose there is no harm. But know that you are the first human to view me this closely.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wanna see you fight.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: My battles are not for amusement, and your eyes would perceive but a moment regardless.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Okay. I won't stare.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Most considerate, for a human. If only all holy warriors were like you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'll pretend I never saw you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The past can only rarely be undone, but as it is you who saw me, I am not overly troubled.

ulforceveedramon.name: UlforceVeedramon
ulforceveedramon.description: UlforceVeedramon is a legendary Holy Knight Digimon appearing only in a prophecy passed down from the Ancient Digital World. The appearance of the Royal Knights, the holy defenders of the Network, was written of in this prophecy, and it's said the members of the Royal Knights will all gather because of this prophecy when the Digital World faces its greatest crisis. Even among the Royal Knights, UlforceVeedramon's speed is exceptional, such that it's impossible to follow its movements. It has V-Bracelets on both arms, and is clad in armor made of Blue Digizoid, an extremely rare metal, allowing it to shoot through the sky and blast across the earth. Its special move is The Ray of Victory, with which it fires a beam of energy from the V-shaped armor on its chest to wipe out foes.

specialSkills.name: The Ray of Victory
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light physical attack at power 55. Always hits. 100% chance of 20% reduction to ACU for 3 turn(s). Increased damage to targets with Puppet Trait.

specialSkills.name: Victory Sword
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind physical attack at power 30 x 3 hits. 15% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Warrior Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Saint Knuckle III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 38 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Gale Storm III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Wind magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: None can surpass my divine swiftness.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I can do it with super divine swiftness.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: There is no such thing. Word games and wild delusions will not work with me.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I want divine swiftness so I can keep up.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Dreams, hopes and goals are good, but we shall see if the human mind can match my speed.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Nothing could ever be faster.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Ah, so you understand. Strive to improve, but also know your limitations.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm not trying to compete with you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Giving up without a fight? Yet it was not my intent to make you yield. Let us be friends.

varodurumon.name: Varodurumon
varodurumon.description: A mythical Holy Bird Digimon that lives in the stratosphere over 130,000 feet above ground. Varodurumon has six giant wings, with the largest pair having a nearly 100-foot wingspan. Referred to in myth as a guardian of the sky, legend has it that this ancient Digimon has existed ever since the creation of the Digital World. Varodurumon's feathers constantly give off the holy light known as "Purge Shine," which serves as a barrier that completely nullifies any attack made with evil intent. Its special move is Aurora Undulation, which amplifies the purifying light of Purge Shine to peak brightness before unleashing it upon its foes.

specialSkills.name: Aurora Undulation
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 55. Always hits. Removes stat buffs. Increased damage to targets with Evil Trait.

specialSkills.name: Purge Shine
specialSkills.description: [Target: All allies] Applies Status Abnormality Immunity. Removes status abnormalities.

attachmentSkills.name: Holy Light III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: X-Aura
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] Moderately recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Reflect
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Reflect Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Spell Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Magic.

venusmon.name: Venusmon
venusmon.description: This compassionate Digimon governs the power of love, and is one of the Olympos XII. Even in the most desolate wastelands, wherever Venusmon goes, beautiful flowers bloom and the earth around it is renewed with youthful vigor. Many Digimon worship Venusmon because of its beauty and purity. By wearing a blindfold, it's able to perceive the world as it truly is with its mind's eye, seeing through any falsehood or deceit. Hiding its eyes also suppresses its aura of glamor, doubling as an act of consideration and reducing the number of Digimon that would otherwise swoon in its presence. Venusmon has two small but constant companions, the bird Olive and the scallop Hotan, and the three friends keep up an open and lively conversation. Since Venusmon is the Digimon that governs love, its every action in battle soothes its opponents' hearts. With LOVE YOU, it can make a foe fall unconscious by blowing it a kiss and making its heart skip a beat. If its bird Olive pecks an enemy on the head, it falls under the spell of Peace Fantasia, which can soothe the heart of even the most savage of beasts.

specialSkills.name: Peace Fantasia
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Deals fixed damage at power 10 x 3 hits. 100% chance of 30% reduction to ATK/INT for 3 turns. Removes stat buffs.

specialSkills.name: LOVE YOU
specialSkills.description: [Target: All allies] Recovers HP based on user's SPI. Removes stat debuffs.

attachmentSkills.name: X-Aura
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] Moderately recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: Holy Light III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Restore
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes status abnormalities, Injury, & Disease.

attachmentSkills.name: X-Revive
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Revives from KO and greatly recovers HP.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I will never miss a single move you make.
