postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Thanks. Keep a close eye on me!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Certainly. But bear in mind that I see all—what lies on the surface, and within.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Don't look at me.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Whether I intend to look at you or not, I observe everything there is to see about you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Do you have to stare so intently?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I promise I am not staring. However, know that I am always watching over you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Can you really see me?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Perceiving you with my mind, as opposed to my eyes, allows me to see the true you.

wargreymon.name: WarGreymon
wargreymon.description: The strongest dragon warrior, wearing armor crafted from the super-metal Chrondigizoid, WarGreymon is the ultimate form of the Greymon species. It sports a more humanoid physique than the typical large bodies of other Greymon types, but possesses vastly improved power and speed. It may be impossible to defeat with the attacks of Ultimate-level Digimon. The "Dramon Killers" attached to WarGreymon's arms deal massive damage to Dramon-species Digimon, but also expose WarGreymon to danger, making them double-edged swords. WarGreymon can also combine the exoskeleton parts on its back to form the hardest of shields, "Brave Shield." It's said that even among the most battle-hardened of veterans, it's only when one of true valor realizes its own destiny that it Digivolves into a WarGreymon. WarGreymon's special move is the super dense, high temperature energy beam Terra Force, with which it concentrates all the energy in the atmosphere into a single point before blasting it forward. It also uses Great Tornado to join the Dramon Killers on its arms above its head to perform a spinning, high-speed charge that pierces the enemy.

specialSkills.name: Terra Force
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 95. Increased damage to targets with Vegetation Trait.

specialSkills.name: Great Tornado
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 30 x 3 hits. 15% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Dragon Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Saint Knuckle III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 38 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Foes employ craven tactics at times. What should I do if a friend is taken hostage?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Cowards deserve a boot to the face!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hahaha! Couldn't have put it better myself! Drive your courage down those evildoers' throats!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Fool your foes with deceptive strategies.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Oh, that's a pretty cool idea. If all went well, no one would even need to get hurt.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Set up a one-two punch with your pals!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Good call! No matter how far apart they are, real friends are one in mind and heart!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'll take the hostage's place.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Take their place? Like a hostage exchange? Wow... Such a kind answer suits you well.

ouryumon.name: Ouryumon
ouryumon.description: An imaginary Digimon born from the daydream of a DigiCore. The interface on Ouryumon's forehead miraculously unlocked the creative power of its own DigiCore, causing it to Digivolve into this form. Perhaps because this DigiCore already contained such fierce combat data as warlords and dragons from Japanese mythology, the form it dreamed up was that of a dragon warrior clad in imposing Japanese-style armor, wielding a sword in each hand. The blade in Ouryumon's left hand is called Gairyu Sadaijin, while the one in its right is named Gairyu Udaijin. The blades extending from the wings on its back are called the Gaiba Daimeijin. Ouryumon's special moves are Eiseiryuojin, which unleashes an attack from the blades in both hands, and Golden Armor, with which it rages forward with the destructive force of a mighty river overflowing its banks.

specialSkills.name: Eiseiryuojin
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 90. 10% CRT Rate. Nullifies unfavorable compatibility. Increased damage to targets with Dragon Trait.

specialSkills.name: Golden Armor
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Steel physical attack at power 60. Increased damage to targets with Mollusk Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Thunder Fall III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 15 x 3 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 15 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to DEF for 3 turn(s).

ophanimon.name: Ophanimon
ophanimon.description: A Super Angel Digimon that is the ultimate form of all feminine Angel Digimon. Together with Seraphimon and Cherubimon, Ophanimon is one of the Three Celestial Digimon who guard the area known as the Kernel (or Domain of the Gods) in the heart of the Digital World. Ophanimon represents the merciful and compassionate aspects of the gods, serving as the holy mother of the Digital World, while Seraphimon is the unforgiving marshall of the gods and Cherubimon is the steadfast defender of the gods and wisdom. Each has its own role to play. Ophanimon's special moves are EDEN's Javelin and Sefirot Crystal.

specialSkills.name: EDEN's Javelin
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 85. If target is Virus: 75% chance of 15% reduction to ATK/INT for 3 turns. Increased damage to targets with Immortal Trait.

specialSkills.name: Sefirot Crystal
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 9 x 10 hits. 10% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Spirit Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: X-Aura
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] Moderately recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Reflect
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Reflect Magic.

attachmentSkills.name: Power Energy III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I am a Super Angel, one of three Celestial Digimon guarding the Digital World's Kernel.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Can I help you in any way?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I would be happy if you spread word of my love and mercy throughout the Digital World.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What is your duty?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: My duty is to spread love and compassion throughout the Digital World. It is who I am.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What's a Super Angel?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: One of the roles among angels, and a Digimon type, much like Insectoid" or "Reptile.""

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Is it okay for you to be here?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: My presence here means there is something for me to observe, and to accomplish.

clavisangemon.name: ClavisAngemon
clavisangemon.description: An Angel Digimon protecting the Zenith Gate that connects the Digital World to the outside world. This gate is sealed by 360 doors, and ClavisAngemon holds "The Key," a master key that unlocks them all. The Key is special in that it can only be wielded by this Digimon. Some suspect that ClavisAngemon itself is a part of said key. The power embedded in The Key could apparently collapse the very Digital World itself, but is only used against foes who would destroy the doors.

specialSkills.name: The Key
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 55. If target is affected by stat buffs: Increased damage. Increased damage to targets with Unknown Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Holy Light III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: X-Heal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Greatly recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: Shock Plasma III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 25 x 3 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Restore
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes status abnormalities, Injury, & Disease.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You must remember to lock up everything.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'll leave that to you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I must safeguard the Zenith Gate. It is your responsibility to lock your own doors.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I worry about forgetting to lock up.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Then you must always double-check. It is even better to confirm it out loud.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I always do.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That is wonderful. If it ever comes to it, we can help each other.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wanna help.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I can handle the security of the Zenith Gate alone. But I appreciate the thought.

craniamon.name: Craniamon
craniamon.description: The Digimon with the greatest sense of decorum among the Royal Knights. Craniamon is a perfectionist, vying with other Royal Knights for the highest completion rate of orders from King Drasil. When fighting enemies, its policy is to eliminate them in one-on-one combat. The more formidable the foe, the more reason it has to rejoice. The code of Craniamon's armor has been manipulated by King Drasil into Black Digizoid. Craniamon uses the special move Waltz's End to spin its magic lance Claíomh Solais at a high speed, unleashing a supersonic Sonic Wave. Furthermore, it can use its magic shield Avalon to activate Breath of the Gods.

specialSkills.name: Waltz's End
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Steel magic attack at power 30 x 2 hits. If target has already acted: Increased damage. Increased damage to targets with Evil Trait.

specialSkills.name: Breath of the Gods
specialSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to nullify physical/magic damage.

attachmentSkills.name: Hate Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Taunting.

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 15 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Mental Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPI for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to DEF for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'd love you to introduce me to some human food. What would you recommend?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Spicy hellfire ramen!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The name alone tells me I'd need some pluck. What lies beyond that flavor? I must know!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A DHA-rich fish platter! Plenty of Omega-3!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A dish that feeds both the stomach and the brain? How fantastically efficient!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let's have a hotpot party!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A meal more enjoyable when eaten together! It would be an honor to share that with you!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'll make you a good home-cooked meal.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Home cooking? For me? Hoho! I imagine that would be tastier than any restaurant's fare.

eaglemon.name: Eaglemon
eaglemon.description: A Giant Bird Digimon clad in golden armor. The armor covers Eaglemon's entire body, and is made of Chrondigizoid, allowing it to repel any attack. Although its origins are unclear, some speculate that Eaglemon is the Digivolution of Parrotmon, an Ultimate-level Digimon. It's said that Eaglemon's duty is to eliminate any alien elements that invade the Digital World. It uses its special move Kaiser Phoenix to ram the enemy with its full-metal body, or Mystic Break to shoot a white ray that reduces the enemy to ash.

specialSkills.name: Kaiser Phoenix
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 95. Increased damage to targets with Bird Trait.

specialSkills.name: Mystic Break
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Null magic attack at power 65. 100% chance of 20% reduction to SPI for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Shine Burst III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Gale Storm III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Wind magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Mental Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPI for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Power Energy III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

chronomon-hm.name: Chronomon HM
chronomon-hm.description: A Deity Digimon said to be a materialization of the system that governs time. The flow of time in the Digital World is truly vague, and some conflicts between powerful Digimon or cataclysms have been known to cause space-time disturbances. It's Chronomon that appears on such occasions, bearing the responsibility of mending space-time. Once it makes such a restoration, even the fact that Chronomon appeared disappears alongside the space-time disturbance itself, thus no one has ever laid eyes on this Digimon. This is why its existence is only spoken of in a scant few legends. Chronomon's special moves are Holy Flare, a blast of holy flame that burns away the very existences of any who maliciously seek to warp space-time, and Chronos Crop, an unblockable attack in which it swings its wings like blades, cleaving its foe from the fabric of time and space itself.

specialSkills.name: Holy Flare
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire magic attack at power 85. Removes stat buffs. Increased damage to targets with Evil Trait.

specialSkills.name: Chronos Crop
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 110. Always hits. Nullifies unfavorable compatibility.

attachmentSkills.name: X-Aura
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] Moderately recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: Burst Flame III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire magic attack at power 15 x 5 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Reflect
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Reflect Magic.

attachmentSkills.name: Shine Burst III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

cherubimon-black.name: Cherubimon (Black)
cherubimon-black.description: A Cherub Digimon in the form of a beast. Just like the Seraph Digimon Seraphimon, Cherubimon (Black) is one of the Three Celestials. Its primary role is to guard the Kernel (or "the Domain of the Gods") of the Digital World. Angel Digimon are fanatically good, but this actually makes them quite susceptible to corruption. Cherubimon (Black) uses powerful lightning attacks, and each blow is considered to be divine punishment. Its special moves include Lightning Spear, with which it unleashes a lance of lightning, and Heaven's Judgment, with which it summons massive thunderclouds to rain down lightning on its foes.

specialSkills.name: Lightning Spear
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 90. Nullifies unfavorable compatibility. Increased damage to targets with Holy Trait.

specialSkills.name: Heaven's Judgment
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark magic attack at power 20 x 3 hits. Increased damage to targets with Immortal Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to INT for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Hell Crusher III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Safety Guard
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Guts.

attachmentSkills.name: Power Energy III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

cherubimon-good.name: Cherubimon (Good)
cherubimon-good.description: A Cherub Digimon in the form of a beast. Just like the Seraph Digimon Seraphimon, Cherubimon (Good) is one of the Three Celestials. Its primary role is to guard the Kernel (or "the Domain of the Gods") of the Digital World. Angel Digimon are fanatically good, but this actually makes them quite susceptible to corruption. Cherubimon (Good) uses powerful lightning attacks, and each blow is considered to be divine punishment. Its special moves include Lightning Spear, with which it unleashes a lance of lightning, and Heaven's Judgment, with which it summons massive thunderclouds to rain down lightning on its foes.

specialSkills.name: Heaven's Judgment
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 20 x 3 hits. Increased damage to targets with Spirit Trait.

specialSkills.name: Lightning Spear
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 90. Nullifies unfavorable compatibility. Increased damage to targets with Evil Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to INT for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: X-Aura
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] Moderately recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: X-Revive
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Revives from KO and greatly recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: Power Energy III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

goldramon.name: Goldramon
goldramon.description: Goldramon is a Holy Dragon Digimon with six hardened wings and a body of glittering gold. Since it wears one of the Holy Rings—the symbol of holy Digimon—upon its arm, it's believed to be a kind of sacred Digimon. Goldramon is one of the Four Great Dragons, and it wears vambraces with tiny dragon Digimon sealed within them upon its arms: Amon of Crimson Flame, which governs destruction, on its right, and Umon of Blue Thunder, which governs regeneration, on its left. Goldramon's special move is God Flame, which involves detonating its holy energy to instantly fell enemies in all directions.

specialSkills.name: God Flame
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 55. If target is KO'd: Recovers user's HP/SP by 20%. Increased damage to targets with Spirit Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Gale Storm III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Wind magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Wind Claw III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Restore
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes status abnormalities, Injury, & Disease.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Destruction or rebirth? That is the question.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Destruction.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Destroying is easy with my might. I must give due consideration to what else can be done.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What's this all about?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The foes that surround us, and this world. There are many questions that need resolving.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Rebirth.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Rebirth can only follow destruction. If you can bear this truth, let us move forward.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Both are important.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: They are the two forces that stabilize this world. Let us sculpt the future together.

shinegreymon.name: ShineGreymon
shinegreymon.description: ShineGreymon is a Shining Dragon Digimon that fights using energy gathered from the raging heat of the sun. One of its special moves is Glorious Burst, with which it spreads its giant wings while concentrating the light energy inside them to the upper limit, then unleashes it all at once. It also has the ability to summon the GeoGrey Sword, a weapon that has all of Gaia's power concentrated within its blade.

specialSkills.name: GeoGrey Sword
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 90. 100% chance of 20% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s). Increased damage to targets with Pixie Trait.

specialSkills.name: Glorious Burst
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light physical attack at power 60. Increased damage to targets with Evil Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Saint Knuckle III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 38 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Comet Hammer III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 14 x 6 hits. 90% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Can anything win against the energy of the sun?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Nope, not happening.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Exactly. None can compete with the blazing-hot energy of that star.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Your power.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: True. Without my knowledge, it would be hard to convert the sun's power into my strength.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: My power.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Putting aside whether you could beat the sun, I acknowledge your abilities, my friend.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The power of friendship.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: True. The power of friends is nothing to scorn. They let me show the sun's true worth.

justimon.name: Justimon
justimon.description: A heroic Digimon wearing a fluttering red scarf. Burning with a sense of justice, this Digimon never overlooks injustice or evil deeds, making it beloved by In-Training Digimon. Justimon comes in like the wind, swings down the iron hammer of justice, and then vanishes just as quickly. It also seems to enjoy striking a pose on a cliffside with its back to the setting sun. Swapping through the three plugs of the Extend Transmitter equipped on its back lets it alternate between the power-type Accel Arm, the electric-type Blitz Arm, and the cutter-type Critical Arm. Its signature move Trinity Arm allows Justimon to swap between its three arms, and special move Justice Kick boasts over 45 tons of destructive power.

specialSkills.name: Justice Kick
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 105. Increased damage to targets with Humanoid Trait.

specialSkills.name: Trinity Arm
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs phys. attack of random power/element/effect: - Pwr. 110 Steel; Incr. dmg. to Mineral Trait; Nullifies unfav. compat. - Pwr. 100 Null; Incr. dmg. to Weapon Trait; 20% CRT Rate. - Pwr. 105 Electricity; Incr. dmg. to Amphibian Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Saint Knuckle III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 38 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What do you think of my red scarf? It suits me quite well, wouldn't you agree?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Kind of tangled on you, isn't it?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It's just entwined around my neck. I appear and disappear like the wind, after all.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A bit long, isn't it?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: How is it supposed to flutter in the wind, otherwise? This is the length of justice.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Suits you to a tee!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Thank you kindly. Nothing says Justimon" quite like a red scarf, I must say."

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I don't think it's really you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: First I've ever heard such an opinion. Even so, I have faith it'll grow on you in time.

skullmammothmon.name: SkullMammothmon
skullmammothmon.description: Revived from ancient times, Mammothmon continuously battled Virus Digimon until its whole body became consumed by viruses, reducing it to this Undead Digimon composed entirely of bones. SkullMammothmon's survival instinct as a Vaccine-attribute type has only grown stronger after death. In order to keep fighting, it's shed all emotion and intellect that doesn't aid in the extermination of viruses. As long as the DigiCore shining in its chest remains unharmed, SkullMammothmon can maintain vital activity even as a skeleton. The moment this exposed DigiCore is attacked, however, it spells the end for this Digimon. SkullMammothmon's special move is Spiral Bone, hurling and spinning one of its vertebrae at high speed.

specialSkills.name: Spiral Bone
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Null physical attack at power 70. Increased damage to targets with Dinosaur Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Shadow Fang III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 38 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Comet Hammer III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 14 x 6 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Awesome Quake III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Earth magic attack at power 55. 85% ACU.

slashangemon.name: SlashAngemon
slashangemon.description: A Great Angel Digimon that leads the angel army and takes the lead in battle. SlashAngemon doesn't fear death when in the service of carrying out justice. From its twin arm blades to its metal wings, the razor-sharp body of this angel warrior was without a doubt born to battle wicked beings. SlashAngemon's signature move is Blade of the True, and its special move is Golden Ripper, charging at foes with tremendous force to carve them up with the blades on its body.

specialSkills.name: Golden Ripper
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 30 x 3 hits. 10% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Immortal Trait.

specialSkills.name: Blade of the True
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 90. 50% chance to apply Injury. Increased damage to targets with Evil Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: X-Aura
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] Moderately recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: Restore
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes status abnormalities, Injury, & Disease.

attachmentSkills.name: Saint Knuckle III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 38 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: X-Revive
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Revives from KO and greatly recovers HP.

kentaurosmon.name: Kentaurosmon
kentaurosmon.description: A Holy Knight Digimon and member of the Royal Knights. Kentaurosmon is an outlier among the mostly humanoid Digimon of the Royal Knights, possessing an atypical bestial form. The defensive strength of the Red Digizoid armor encasing its body makes damaging this Digimon no mean feat, even for Mega Digimon. Six legs offer Kentaurosmon superior mobility, allowing for instantaneous movement in spite of its large frame. It uses its special move Bifrost to fire an incandescent arrow of light from the holy crossbow Múspellsheimr on its left arm, or Odin's Breath to control the weather, generating a cryogenic blizzard with the holy shield Niflheimr on its right arm.

specialSkills.name: Bifrost
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 95. Increased damage to targets with Evil Trait.

specialSkills.name: Odin's Breath
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Ice magic attack at power 55. 100% chance of reduction to Ice resistance. Increased damage to targets with Dinosaur Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Mental Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to SPI for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Frozen Bullet III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Shine Burst III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Lethal Blizzard III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Ice magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Which would you rather deal with, scorching heat, or bitter cold?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Scorching heat!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: To choose the lick of flame over piercing chill—that is some respectable resolve.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Bitter cold...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: One can hardly resist flame, but a certain determination is needed to endure the cold.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It's all the same to me.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Resigned to either fate, are you? There is something noble about that. Not bad.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Can I say neither?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I would call that a natural human reaction. Worry not. I shall protect you from both.

slayerdramon.name: Slayerdramon
slayerdramon.description: A Dragon Man Digimon covered in Chrondigizoid scale armor. This form can only be achieved by those who complete the Trial of the Four Great Dragons—a test that Dragon Digimon alone can undertake. Slayerdramon carries the telescoping greatsword Fragarach, and has mastered Ryuzanken, an ultimate sword style of its own making with three forms. There's the first form, Tenryu Slash, with which it spins its body to accelerate the blade, driving it downward to bisect its foe from top to bottom. The second form is Shoryu Slash, which tempers a dragon wave with Slayerdramon's blade, unleashing it in an upward motion to mow down the enemy with sword pressure alone. The third form is Koryu Slash, which coils the Fragarach around the opponent after stepping in close, shaving away at its entire body with the wrapped blade.

specialSkills.name: Tenryu Slash
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 90. If target has yet to act: 25% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Dragon Trait.

specialSkills.name: Shoryu Slash
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire physical attack at power 55. If target has already acted: Increased damage. Increased damage to targets with Dragon Trait.

specialSkills.name: Koryu Slash
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 85. 100% chance of 20% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s). Increased damage to targets with Dragon Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Wind Claw III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Gale Storm III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Wind magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Void Ray III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Null magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU. 10% CRT Rate.

seraphimon.name: Seraphimon
seraphimon.description: A Seraph Digimon with ten golden wings and clad in glittering silver holy armor. Seraphimon is the greatest of all Angel Digimon, reigning over all of its brethren. Its true face and identity are hidden from public view behind a mask. Even so, it's the closest being to those embodiments of good known as "gods." It's said that Seraphimon will descend for a final battle against wicked beings, purifying them all. The Digimon Creepymon, which fell to the Dark Area and became an Evil King Digimon, is said to have originally been a Seraphimon. Seraphimon's special moves are Strike of the Seven Stars, which fires seven orbs of high-temperature light at the opponent, and Testament, an ultimate technique that induces a Big Bang in exchange for its life.

specialSkills.name: Strike of the Seven Stars
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 13 x 7 hits. Increased damage to targets with Evil Trait.

specialSkills.name: Testament
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 140. Consumes all SP. Causes KO from attack recoil. The lower the user's SP, the lower the damage. Increased damage to targets with Deity Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Holy Light III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: X-Heal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Greatly recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: Restore
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes status abnormalities, Injury, & Disease.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I am a Seraph Digimon, one who reigns over all Angel Digimon.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Can I help you in any way?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Do not allow evil to exist in this world.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Does that make you remarkable?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I am of the highest Angel Digimon echelon, yet that is simply the role bestowed upon me.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What's a Seraph?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The greatest of all angels, they say. That does not change the fact that we are friends.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Is it okay for you to be here?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I leave this place when the final battle is nigh. Until then, I shall stay with you.

megagargomon.name: MegaGargomon
megagargomon.description: A colossal Machine Digimon whose body is a cluster of weaponry. The sheer amount of weaponry equipped by MegaGargomon rivals that of MetalGarurumon. The former utilizes heat-based ordnance, unlike the latter's cold-based ordnance, with all sorts of weapons—such as lasers, missiles, bazookas and flamethrowers—hidden throughout its giant body. MegaGargomon is incredibly slow, but all that energy is converted directly into power, giving it unbelievable destructive capabilities. Because it compensates for its lack of speed with force, it can deal with attacks from all directions without taking a single step. It uses its special move Burst Shot to open fire with a volley of firearms.

specialSkills.name: Burst Shot
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire physical attack at power 55 x 2 hits. Immobilized next turn. Increased damage to targets with Vegetation Trait.

specialSkills.name: Giant Missile
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 48 x 2 hits. Increased damage to targets with Mineral Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Nanomachine Break III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 19 x 4 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 15 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

durandamon.name: Durandamon
durandamon.description: Durandamon is the Digimon with the ultimate holy sword. It Digivolved by improving its own sword to the utmost limit, and by taking in data on various holy swords from games and myths alike. It's said that whoever holds Durandamon's sword holds the key to victory, and Durandamon is among the most powerful of all the Legend-Arms that transform into swords. Its slashes are so fierce they can cleave any defensive barrier in two. According to record, only the strongest of the Legend-Arms that transform into shields are capable of withstanding it. Durandamon's special moves are Zwei Glänze, with which it slices through foes by channeling its fighting spirit into its blade-arms, and Thron Messer, a spinning slash capable of felling several enemies at once. Although both of these moves are strong enough to finish opponents in a single blow, Durandamon's most compelling capability remains its powerful slashing attack in weapon form.

specialSkills.name: Zwei Glänze
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 90. 20% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Knight Trait.

specialSkills.name: Thron Messer
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Steel physical attack at power 15 x 4 hits. Increased damage to targets with Knight Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Mental Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPI for 3 turn(s).

neptunemon.name: Neptunemon
neptunemon.description: One of the Olympos XII, Neptunemon is a marine god Digimon that governs all aquatic-species Digimon. The scale mail covering its body is a Chrondigizoid alloy called Blue Digizoid that facilitates mobility and speed, allowing it to move at a fearsome pace underwater. Its castle Abyss Sanctuary was built in a deep underwater trench, and only those who can withstand the water pressure of the extreme depths can enter. Its special moves include Vortex Penetration, with which it strikes with King's Bite, its sentient spear, and Wave of Depth, with which it unleashes a massive tsunami that swallows up everything in its path.

specialSkills.name: Vortex Penetration
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water physical attack at power 90. Always hits. If target has yet to act: Increased damage. Increased damage to targets with Aquatic Trait.

specialSkills.name: Wave of Depth
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Water physical attack at power 55. 100% chance of reduction to Water resistance. Increased damage to targets with Fire Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Hydro Water III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water magic attack at power 15 x 5 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Lethal Blizzard III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Ice magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to INT for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Thunder Fall III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 15 x 3 hits. 90% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: We must protect the beautiful seas.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I feel the same way.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Feelings are certainly important, but we need action. Not that I have to tell you that.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: How do we do that?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: There is much for us to do. Shall we mull over the matter together?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'd like to help.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That is reassuring. Surely a bright future awaits us, with the help of humanity.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You should leave it to me.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I appreciate the sentiment, but this is my duty. But yes, let us work together.

hiandromon.name: HiAndromon
hiandromon.description: HiAndromon is a Mega Android Digimon created by upgrading and completing the unfinished Andromon. It features a higher percentage of Chrondigizoid parts in the composition of its body, which alone should make it clear that HiAndromon has a level of offensive and defensive power that Andromon could never match. The addition of Chrondigizoid parts to the incomplete bio-synapse circuits responsible for Andromon's thought processes has given HiAndromon the ability to think for itself and pursue its own objectives. Its special move is Atomic Ray, which involves joining its hands to fuse the neutronic energy from the blue neutron control turbine in its right shoulder with the atomic energy from the red atomic control turbine in its left shoulder and firing a beam of light to obliterate foes.

specialSkills.name: Atomic Ray
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 95. Increased damage to targets with Machine Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 15 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Thunder Fall III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 15 x 3 hits. 90% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Will there be any chance to use my Atomic Ray?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Sure. Keep it always ready to fire.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Understood. I will be ready to fight anytime!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'd like to avoid it, if possible.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: In that case, I shall simply judge by the flow of each battle.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Sure, when it's time to help our allies.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Understood. I shall protect our allies to the end!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Sure, when it's time to save our loved ones.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Understood. You are the only one I would consider a loved one.

bancholeomon.name: BanchoLeomon
bancholeomon.description: BanchoLeomon is a Beast Man Digimon that answers only to its own sense of justice. It's said that only Digimon that have continued to triumph over incredibly powerful foes without having their spirits broken earn the title of "Bancho"—a term that loosely translates to "ringleader." In all the recorded history of the Digital World, only five Digimon have ever been confirmed to have this in their names. BanchoLeomon opposes anything that stands in the way of its justice. Even if it's one of the Royal Knights or one of the Three Celestial Digimon, BanchoLeomon won't hesitate to brand them as an evil foe that must be destroyed. BanchoLeomon also boasts a powerful defense, as it can use the gakuran jacket draped over its shoulders to negate 89.9 percent of the damage caused by an opponent's physical attacks. BanchoLeomon's special moves include Lion Slash, an attack with its beloved shortsword Otokodama, and Flashy Boss Punch, which involves channeling all of its considerable energy into a single punch.

specialSkills.name: Flashy Boss Punch
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 90. The lower the user's HP, the greater the damage. Increased damage to targets with Antibody Trait.

specialSkills.name: Lion Slash
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 90. If target's Generation is greater than user's: Increased damage. Increased damage to targets with Humanoid Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Comet Hammer III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 14 x 6 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Status Barrier
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Stat Debuff Immunity.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Show me what you're made of! If I stood before you as a foe, what would you do?!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Answer with my fist.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: So you have the courage to strike me, do you? I like that about you!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Talk things out and get to know you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: So you would choose words, not fists, eh? Not all battles are won with force, that's true.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Fight until we reached an understanding.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Yes, the bond between us will grow strong. To know a friend, you must fight them!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I don't wanna fight you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Heh. You don't wish me to be a foe even in parable. Soft... but I like that about you.

herculeskabuterimon.name: HerculesKabuterimon
herculeskabuterimon.description: The ultimate Insectoid Digimon, HerculesKabuterimon Digivolved by combining data from both the Kabuterimon and the Kuwagamon species. Possessing a giant horn as well as huge pincers, HerculesKabuterimon is said to perfectly compensate for the weaknesses of these two species with opposing dispositions that it Digivolved from. Its body glitters gold, and having both regained and improved upon the ability to fly it lost as MegaKabuterimon, HerculesKabuterimon zooms around the Digital World at supersonic speeds. There are few who can rival HerculesKabuterimon in this Mega form. HerculesKabuterimon uses its special move is Giga Blaster, an upgraded version of Electro Shocker. Nothing can survive a direct hit from this attack.

specialSkills.name: Giga Blaster
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 95. If target is Virus: 50% chance to apply Immobilization. Increased damage to targets with Machine Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Texture Blow
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Crystallization.

attachmentSkills.name: Thorn Strike III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant magic attack at power 37 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to INT for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Void Ray III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Null magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU. 10% CRT Rate.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A strong heart dwells within a strong body!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A strong heart is more important.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Without a strong heart, one falls prey to cowardice. You are right about that.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A strong body's more important.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: True. One cannot prevail without a strong body. Utilize your mind, certainly, but train your body first.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: And I have both!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I am envious! I should follow your example.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It's best to have at least one.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Agreed. Or you could have one, and your friend the other. It would be most unfortunate not to have either.

phoenixmon.name: Phoenixmon
phoenixmon.description: A holy Digimon with four gleaming golden wings. The leader of all Bird Digimon, Phoenixmon is said to rule over all sacred Digimon as well. Just as Magnadramon is the ultimate beast Digimon, Phoenixmon is the ultimate bird Digimon. Since it has not one but two Holy Rings, which draw out holy power and serve to identify holy Digimon, Phoenixmon evidently possesses immeasurable power. Phoenixmon's special move is Starlight Explosion, with which it flaps its four godly wings to rain down golden particles of light. Anything hit by this attack is said to be cleansed of all evil.

specialSkills.name: Starlight Explosion
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 70. Increased damage to targets with Spirit Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to INT for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Burst Flame III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire magic attack at power 15 x 5 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: X-Heal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Greatly recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: Holy Light III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I must purge you of all evil!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Don't hurt me!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: With evil purged, pain and anguish will be gone forever. What of a brief moment of pain?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hold on!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I cannot allow evil to thrive! Still, let us decide the best time to purge you together...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Don't purge me!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Do you have a guilty conscience? If so, all the more reason to do something about it!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Go ahead. Do it now!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: When the time comes, I shall purge you of evil with all haste. Leave that timing to me.

magnadramon.name: Magnadramon
magnadramon.description: The ultimate form of all beast Digimon. Thought of as the heroic king of the sky, few have ever seen Magnadramon, and its location is generally unknown. However, it's said that once, when a great dark power arose in the Digital World, Magnadramon appeared as if from nowhere and reduced that evil to nothing with its immense strength. Its special move is Fire Tornado, which blasts its opponent with a radiant beam of pure justice. Anyone struck by this attack is instantly reduced to nothingness.

specialSkills.name: Fire Tornado
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 90. 100% chance of reduction to Light resistance. Increased damage to targets with Evil Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Holy Light III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: X-Aura
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] Moderately recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Reflect
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Reflect Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Illuminating all of the darkness with holy light! That is my mission!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Yes, please do.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: This is all for the Digital World. I shall not allow any evil to lurk in the shadows!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Man, that's bright.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: On the contrary, my light is still lacking. Please tell me wherever darkness may hide.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let's shine that light together.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Please leave this to me. You lack technique suitable for the task.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You can't illuminate all the darkness.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I shall. I must! I cannot allow my friends to be swallowed by the shadows!

mastemon.name: Mastemon
mastemon.description: An Angel Digimon said to appear when an unprecedented crisis descends upon the Digital World, coming into being through the inharmonious pairing of an Angel and a Dark Angel Digimon via DNA Digivolution. It faces this predicament by controlling the might of both Angel and Dark Angel clans summoned through gates from another Digital World. Mastemon accomplishes this through a temperament that has earned it the moniker of the "Tactician from Another World," enabling these normally hostile factions to work together. It's of a single mind despite being a DNA Digivolution of two conflicting creatures, controlling both light and dark energies and lending power to Digimon in various situations. It even attacks formidable foes on its own. Mastemon uses its special move Holy Desire to destroy evildoers with arrows of light fired from its right arm, Dark Despair to grab a foe with its left arm and delete them by crushing their entire DigiCore, and Chaos Degradation to produce a gate from the fusion of light and dark energies in both arms that consigns the enemy to oblivion in another dimension.

specialSkills.name: Chaos Degradation
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Null magic attack at power 65. Increased damage to targets with Holy Trait.

specialSkills.name: Holy Desire
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 90. 100% chance of reduction to Light resistance. Increased damage to targets with Evil Trait.

specialSkills.name: Dark Despair
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 90. Nullifies unfavorable compatibility. Increased damage to targets with Holy Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Mental Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to SPI for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: X-Aura
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] Moderately recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: X-Revive
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Revives from KO and greatly recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: Nightmare III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

marineangemon.name: MarineAngemon
marineangemon.description: A seldom-seen Pixie Digimon that dwells in the Net Ocean. Despite the "Angemon" in its name, it's actually completely distinct from the Angemon species in terms of its ecosystem. The ring around MarineAngemon's neck is called a "Holy Ring," causing speculation that it has some relation to holy Digimon such as Gatomon or Angewomon, who also wear such rings. The characters inscribed on its ring have yet to be deciphered. Though MarineAngemon generally avoids combat, its special move Ocean Love causes foes to lose the will to fight, thereby guaranteeing victory.

specialSkills.name: Ocean Love
specialSkills.description: [Target: All allies] Recovers HP based on user's SPI. Removes status abnormalities/ Injury/ Disease.

attachmentSkills.name: Hydro Water III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water magic attack at power 15 x 5 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Ocean Wave III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Water magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: X-Revive
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Revives from KO and greatly recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: Holy Light III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: How can everyone live in peace, I wonder...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: By having the courage to talk to each other.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Courage... I'm sure I'm lacking that. I feel like I can get some by sticking around you, though!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Understanding each other is key.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're right. It's hard to be together, much less talk, if you lack empathy and insight.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let's think of a way together.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Having you to depend on really puts me at ease. Let's keep on keeping on, together!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: With love, peace is sure to follow.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Yeah. No matter what, I'll keep love and hope in my heart... especially for you!

marsmon.name: Marsmon
marsmon.description: This war god Digimon resembling a leopard humanoid is one of the mysterious Olympos XII, who possess abilities rivaling even the Royal Knights, guardian deities of the Net. Each of the Olympos XII protects its own region, acting in the shadows and maintaining a neutral position during incidents in the Digital World. Marsmon well understands all hand-to-hand techniques in the world—including skills utilizing foul play—and possesses absolute confidence in any one-on-one fight against those like itself. It relies mostly on wrestling moves, but its focus on victory and glory means it will whip out hidden weapons like its Tria Knuckles or Metal Cothurnus when it finds itself on its back foot. Even so, Marsmon brings its true power to bear when fighting with bare hands and feet. Its special move is Corona Sanctions, with which it engulfs itself in flames for a glorious mid-air killing technique.

specialSkills.name: Corona Sanctions
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 90. The greater the user's stat buffs, the greater the damage. Increased damage to targets with Beast Trait.

specialSkills.name: Endless Surge
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 45 x 2 hits. Nullifies unfavorable compatibility. Increased damage to targets with Mollusk Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Safety Guard
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Guts.

attachmentSkills.name: Wind Claw III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Idle Bubble
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Sleep.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm willing to go to any lengths to achieve victory.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Winning is important.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: My victories defend the peace of the Digital World. I could really use your help, too!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Sometimes you have to lose to win.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm defending the Digital World here, so your logic doesn't jive. Victory is everything.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Isn't that against the rules?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Please understand that if it means saving the Digital World, I'm prepared to break any rule.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Win or lose, it's best to try to get along.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Maybe when it comes to you, but some in this world can only be stopped with force.

jupitermon.name: Jupitermon
jupitermon.description: A member of the Olympos XII, a god that presides over the heavens, and a Digimon that governs thunder and weather. Jupitermon always judges good and evil on the battlefield, delivering divine punishment to the wicked. Such judgment is handed down indifferently, without emotion. Those who disagree with Jupitermon's decision can challenge it and overturn the judgment upon victory, but, as of now, no one has ever accomplished this feat. It can clap the hammers on both arms together to summon small thunderclouds. It uses Punish Judge to strike an opponent with its hammer, engraving a mark on its body and postponing its punishment. When Jupitermon decides to execute said punishment, the sentence is carried out by striking that foe with extremely high-voltage lightning. It uses its ultimate special move Wide Plasment to change its body into ultra-high-voltage plasma. This inflicts divine punishment in the area around Jupitermon, disintegrating any and all it touches.

specialSkills.name: Punish Judge
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 100% chance of reduction to Electricity resistance/30% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

specialSkills.name: Wide Plasment
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 55. If target's Generation is lesser than user's: Increased damage. Increased damage to targets with Evil Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Saint Knuckle III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 38 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Shine Burst III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Nanomachine Break III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 19 x 4 hits. 95% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I must inflict divine punishment upon those who commit evil deeds.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Sounds a little harsh to me...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I imagine those receiving the punishment feel the same. That is why I judge carefully.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I say condemn the offense, not the offender.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: But of course. I always judge good and evil without sentiment.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I support divine punishment!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: As well you should. I do hope you never end up being judged.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wish you didn't have to.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Perhaps I feel similar. Nothing would please me more than if my duty was no longer needed.

ravemon.name: Ravemon
ravemon.description: An Android Digimon that possesses wings made of Chrondigizoid. Ravemon served Deity Digimon as "the Silver Crow" at the creation of the Digital World, but it was struck by the gods' anger and had one of its wings dyed black as a result. The true terror of Ravemon is in its covert actions. It conceals itself with its dark wing, and slashes at foes with its white wing. Appearing out of nowhere, it takes the enemy out with a single swift attack. It uses its special move Spiral Raven Claw to unleash a spinning charge into the enemy with the sharp claws on its left arm. In addition, it defeats the enemy with its blade "Raven King Sword," which it uses with deft movements, and the black lightning blade released from this sword, Ame no Ohabari, has enormous destructive power.

specialSkills.name: Ame no Ohabari
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 55. 15% chance to apply Immobilization. Increased damage to targets with Bird Trait.

specialSkills.name: Spiral Raven Claw
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind physical attack at power 18 x 5 hits. Increased damage to targets with Bird Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Gale Storm III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Wind magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Shadow Fang III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 38 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Which do you like, white or black?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Definitely white.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I slash my foes with my white wing. I'll show you just how lethal it is someday.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Must we be so black and white about things?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Very funny... Still, I suppose you're right. Not all things can be so clearly divided.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A little of column A, a little of column B.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I, too, am fond of both my white wing and black wing. I'd say we have similar tastes.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Black, for sure.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I can conceal myself with my black wing, though I have no need to hide from you.

ultimatebrachiomon.name: UltimateBrachiomon
ultimatebrachiomon.description: UltimateBrachiomon is the largest and heaviest land-based Android Digimon. The boosters on its back fire downwards to help support the immense weight of its massive frame, and it relies on them to move. UltimateBrachiomon was remodeled to be an extreme heavyweight, and as a result it's anything but fast. Since its armor is so thick, though, it has no need to dodge enemy attacks, and any other Digimon without at least as much weight would be unable to bear the recoil of firing the superweapon that is its chest cannon. Its special moves include Ultimate Blast, which causes the energy inside its body to explode, releasing a powerful shockwave from its chest cannon, and Ultimate Quake, with which it attacks with its giant tail, striking the enemy with earthshaking force.

specialSkills.name: Ultimate Blast
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind physical attack at power 90. 100% chance of reduction to Wind resistance. Increased damage to targets with Humanoid Trait.

specialSkills.name: Ultimate Quake
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Earth physical attack at power 70. Increased damage to targets with Mineral Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 15 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Full Metal Pile III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Steel magic attack at power 45. 85% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Restore
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes status abnormalities, Injury, & Disease.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm the most gargantuan Digimon on land.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Your bulk is a little intimidating.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: No need to fear me, but do be careful not to get trampled underfoot.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: How did you even get that huge?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Repeated remodeling, I suppose? In any case, reaching my size would probably be impossible for most.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I want you to get even bigger.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'd have trouble moving if I got bigger, but, with your support, maybe I could pull it off.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let me ride on your back!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Fine by me. Just don't scald yourself with my boosters, okay?

vulcanusmon.name: Vulcanusmon
vulcanusmon.description: This Digimon god of smithing is one of the Olympos XII. Vulcanusmon is responsible for creating most of the Digital World's best-known weapons, including the infamous Beelzemon's beloved Berenjena. Vulcanusmon has the spirit of a true craftsman, along with an obstinate personality. It takes the measure of all of its clients, and if it feels they can't master or won't treasure the weapon they've requested, it denies them. Even when Vulcanusmon does agree to make a weapon, it aligns the quality of its work to its impression of the wielder. Nevertheless, Vulcanusmon was so taken with Beelzemon's strength that it worked diligently to craft an exceptional weapon when it created Berenjena. Vulcanusmon prefers to be left in peace, working away with its eight arms, but can also leverage its skill as a craftsman in battle. With its special move Pinpoint Weapon Works, it makes masterful use of its fiery "Bomber Art" welder to instantly craft the perfect weapon for any combat situation. When it really wants to go all out, though, it uses Appropriate Works, which uses Pinpoint Weapon Works repeatedly to forge weapons for each of its eight arms. Despite all this, Vulcanusmon's own combat ability isn't particularly high, and it prefers to avoid battle whenever possible.

specialSkills.name: Appropriate Works
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 25 x 4 hits. Increased damage to targets with Weapon Trait.

specialSkills.name: Pinpoint Weapon Works
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 80. If target's Attribute is anything other than No Data: Increased damage. Increased damage to targets with Mineral Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Full Metal Pile III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Steel magic attack at power 45. 85% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Character Reversal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy or ally] 100% chance to apply Reverse.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Grr...! I'm so busy I don't have enough hands to deal with it all!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Well, now you're just being greedy.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I never have enough to do my best work, but I am certainly blessed. Better put 'em to work.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Those should be more than enough.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: True. Eight might work with the right design. Better put my nose to the grindstone.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Shall I lend you a hand?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Friendship's all I really need. With eight limbs, I'll pay it back four times over!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: How many more do you even need?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The more the merrier, if you ask me! Still, you're good with the two you've got, right?

gankoomon.name: Gankoomon
gankoomon.description: A Holy Knight Digimon and successor to the position of one of the Royal Knights. Together with Huckmon, who it hopes to make its successor, Gankoomon journeys all over the Digital World, quelling chaos and disturbances before they can get out of hand. Since it intends to make Huckmon succeed it as a Royal Knight, Gankoomon puts Huckmon through a series of severe trials. Gankoomon is stubborn, which leads it to be harsh on Huckmon, although this is in fact a reflection of its kindness, since it wants to make Huckmon the equal of any other Royal Knight. Hinukamuy is the projection from its body that, while it doesn't speak, helps Gankoomon without question. Gankoomon's special move is Quake! Blast! Fire! Father! This attack involves Hinukamuy delivering divine punishment in response to a shout from Gankoomon. It also uses Table Flip, with which it flips over part of the ground as if it were a table made of Chrondigizoid.
