specialSkills.name: Quake! Blast! Fire! Father!
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 25 x 4 hits. Increased damage to targets with Humanoid Trait.

specialSkills.name: Table Flip
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Inverts all stat changes of the target.

attachmentSkills.name: Magma Fall III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Anybody who strays from the path of righteousness gets no mercy.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Bring it on.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Well, well. If you've got the guts to throw down with me, going astray won't be a worry.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Nothing to fear here.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hey, I'll be here to slap some sense into ya, so why not be a little naughty?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It might be too late.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Don't be stupid. As long as there's light in these eyes of mine, it's never too late.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'll be careful.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Gotta love that innocence. I'll always set ya straight, so do whatever ya want!

kuzuhamon.name: Kuzuhamon
kuzuhamon.description: Kuzuhamon is a Deity Digimon. It's said to be a Digimon of the fox species that lived a long life and then transformed into human form. Legend has it that only the greatest of these transforming-fox Digimon are capable of Digivolving into Sakuyamon. Normally, they Digivolve into Kuzuhamon. Kuzuhamon is well-versed in the ancient magics of Shinto, Taoism and Shugendo. A single pipe fox resides in the pipe on its belt, which can be used for attacking, gathering information, and more. Kuzuhamon's signature move Illuminator involves attacking with the pipe fox it carries on its belt. With its special move Taizoukai Mandala, Kuzuhamon creates a purifying field that exorcises evil using its Shakujou staff.

specialSkills.name: Taizoukai Mandala
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark magic attack at power 55. Removes stat debuffs. Increased damage to targets with Immortal Trait.

specialSkills.name: Illuminator
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 90. 25% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Vegetation Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Holy Light III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Spell Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Magic.

attachmentSkills.name: Shine Burst III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Mental Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to SPI for 3 turn(s).

groundlocomon.name: GroundLocomon
groundlocomon.description: A Mega vehicle-species Digimon. Foolish, headstrong and extremely competitive, GroundLocomon also possesses immense power, and anything it runs into is reduced to smithereens. GroundLocomon can lay its own track, allowing it to travel wherever it wishes. Its special move is Destruction Crush, with which it rams its spiked wheel into foes at incredible speed.

specialSkills.name: Destruction Crush
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 20 x 3 hits. Increased damage to targets with Unknown Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Thunder Fall III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 15 x 3 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Thruster Metal III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel magic attack at power 11 x 7 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Think you can keep up with my super speed?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Easily.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Glad to hear it, because racing around the Net all alone gets boring. Now, let's go!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Where are you in such a hurry to go?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I want to go from one end of the Net to the other and show you the entire Digital World!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Not interested in trying.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Then clear the way. I don't want to crash into you and smash you to smithereens.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're too fast.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Speed is everything to a machine. I'm only going to get faster, so you better keep up!

gryphonmon.name: Gryphonmon
gryphonmon.description: A fused Digimon with the head, wings and forelegs of a Bird Digimon, the body of a Beast Digimon and a serpentine creature on its tail. While capable of flying through the skies with its wings, it usually stays in deserts or mountain caves. Gryphonmon's a difficult foe to beat, and it uses its incredible power and agility to toy with its opponents. Making use of these strengths, it's employed across the Internet to prevent illegal access and to safeguard confidential information. Its special move Supersonic Voice emits super-high-frequency sound waves that destroy an enemy's data structure.

specialSkills.name: Supersonic Voice
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind physical attack at power 32 x 3 hits. Increased damage to targets with Bird Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Sonic Shot III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to SPD for 3 turn(s).

ceresmon.name: Ceresmon
ceresmon.description: One of the Olympos XII, Ceresmon is a gigantic bird Digimon that bears the forest Karpos Hulē on its back. Karpos Hulē is where the most delectable sweets in the Digital World can be found, and many famous fruits grow there as well. With a body composed of giant rocks and fertile soil, Ceresmon in flight resembles a floating island more than anything else. Ceresmon Medium, which is Ceresmon's true form, resides at the head of the island. Ceresmon Medium possesses almost no combat ability and rarely appears before others. However, on rare occasions, it apparently shows itself to those it trusts without bringing along the giant bird. Ceresmon Medium has a gentle personality and a heart overflowing with compassion. It offers hungry Digimon fruits from Karpos Hulē, and allows injured Digimon to take shelter in the forest until they've recovered. However, if any prove ungrateful for the bounty of nature, bring harm to the trees or defile the land for sport, Ceresmon Medium's nature shifts and it becomes a truly frightful forest demon. Ceresmon's special move is Island Freefall, with which it slams its massive body directly into its foe, sending powerful tremors and violent winds surging in a wide berth around the crash site. Ceresmon also has Burning Blood Shell, which shoots a huge, scorching ball of magma from its mouth.

specialSkills.name: Island Freefall
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Plant physical attack at power 55. 10% chance to apply Instant Death. Increased damage to targets with Insectoid Trait.

specialSkills.name: Burning Blood Shell
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire magic attack at power 55. 100% chance to apply Fire resistance Down. Increased damage to targets with Vegetation Trait.

specialSkills.name: Famis
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Plant magic attack at power 70. 25% chance to apply Deadly Poison. Increased damage to targets with Beast Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Thorn Strike III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant magic attack at power 37 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: X-Aura
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] Moderately recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: Restore
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes status abnormalities, Injury, & Disease.

attachmentSkills.name: X-Revive
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Revives from KO and greatly recovers HP.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Is there nowhere I can enjoy a captivating singing voice?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It's not gonna be easy.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I suppose not... But I shall not give up, so please help me search.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Why not search from the sky?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I intend to do so, naturally. Let us listen together from the heavens!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Want me to sing for you?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I appreciate the thought, but I seek a truly captivating voice, not merely human singing.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let's search together.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I thank you. We shall soar the wide heavens together.

ceresmon-medium.name: Ceresmon Medium
ceresmon-medium.description: One of the Olympos XII, Ceresmon is a gigantic bird Digimon that bears the forest Karpos Hulē on its back. Karpos Hulē is where the most delectable sweets in the Digital World can be found, and many famous fruits grow there as well. With a body composed of giant rocks and fertile soil, Ceresmon in flight resembles a floating island more than anything else. Ceresmon Medium, which is Ceresmon's true form, resides at the head of the island. Ceresmon Medium possesses almost no combat ability and rarely appears before others. However, on rare occasions, it apparently shows itself to those it trusts without bringing along the giant bird. Ceresmon Medium has a gentle personality and a heart overflowing with compassion. It offers hungry Digimon fruits from Karpos Hulē, and allows injured Digimon to take shelter in the forest until they've recovered. However, if any prove ungrateful for the bounty of nature, bring harm to the trees or defile the land for sport, Ceresmon Medium's nature shifts and it becomes a truly frightful forest demon. Ceresmon Medium can also use Fruit Flechette, which scatters the unripe fruits of Karpos Hulē over a wide area. Due to the highly concentrated poison they contain, this transforms its surroundings into a deathscape of projectiles and poison. But since this poison matures into an excellent fertilizer over the course of a few days, areas subject to this attack soon grow back in abundance.

specialSkills.name: Famis
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Plant magic attack at power 70. 25% chance to apply Deadly Poison. Increased damage to targets with Beast Trait.

specialSkills.name: Island Freefall
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Plant physical attack at power 55. 10% chance to apply Instant Death. Increased damage to targets with Insectoid Trait.

specialSkills.name: Burning Blood Shell
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire magic attack at power 55. 100% chance to apply Fire resistance Down. Increased damage to targets with Vegetation Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Thorn Strike III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant magic attack at power 37 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: X-Aura
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] Moderately recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: Restore
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes status abnormalities, Injury, & Disease.

attachmentSkills.name: X-Revive
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Revives from KO and greatly recovers HP.

saberleomon.name: SaberLeomon
saberleomon.description: An Ancient Beast Digimon said to be capable of Mach-speed movement. Even so, details of this Digimon are veiled in mystery. One theory even posits that this may be a Leomon turned feral. SaberLeomon's speed allows it to dodge even the swiftest attacks with ease. It's known as "the ultimate Digimon" due to the tremendous destructive power afforded by its two developed fangs and sharp claws. SaberLeomon's special move Infinity Arrow hardens the countless hairs on its mane before firing them at the opponent. These hairs are venomous, paralyzing anything they come in contact with. Howling Crusher is a fearsome technique with which SaberLeomon eviscerates the enemy using its giant claws.

specialSkills.name: Howling Crusher
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind physical attack at power 95. Increased damage to targets with Beast Trait.

specialSkills.name: Infinity Arrow
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Null physical attack at power 55. 15% chance to apply Immobilization. Increased damage to targets with Bird Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Wind Claw III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

sakuyamon.name: Sakuyamon
sakuyamon.description: A Digimon with the role of a priestess that acts to execute the will of the gods. Like Taomon, Sakuyamon uses Taoist skills in battle, and can command God Beast Digimon. It always carries four pipes on its belt, in which reside four pipe foxes. The pipe foxes can be used for attacking, gathering information and more. It uses its special move Amethyst Mandala to strike the ground with its Kongou Shakujou staff, creating a purifying field that exorcises evil.

specialSkills.name: Amethyst Mandala
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 55. Removes stat buffs. Increased damage to targets with Spirit Trait.

specialSkills.name: Izuna
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null magic attack at power 90. 25% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Vegetation Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Nightmare III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: X-Heal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Greatly recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: Hell Crusher III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to INT for 3 turn(s).

jesmon.name: Jesmon
jesmon.description: Huckmon's supreme Digivolution—a Holy Knight Digimon that has earned its place among the Royal Knights, the highest-ranking Digimon in network security. Jesmon has the ability to sense signs of impending chaos and other disturbances, allowing it to rush to these scenes faster than any other Royal Knight and coordinate its efforts with other Digimon nearby. Jesmon is trusting of others, and in part to keep itself from growing overconfident, prefers to work in a team. Learning by watching the Hinukamuy of its master Gankoomon, Jesmon acquired the trio Atho, René and Por during its training. It uses its special move Judgment of the Blade to instantly slice its foe with its arm blades at high speeds, and Weltgeist to perform an omnidirectional counter.

specialSkills.name: Judgment of the Blade
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 18 x 5 hits. 20% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Ancient Trait.

specialSkills.name: Weltgeist
specialSkills.description: [Target: User] Activates Counter Physical Upon receiving a physical attack, counters with a Fire physical attack at power 105. Increased damage to targets with Humanoid Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Magma Fall III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I would like a role when I fight together with everyone. What part should I play?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Lead the charge!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A role suited to my gallantry! I shall cleave a path for my compatriots to follow.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Command from behind.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A role suited to my perspicacity! My precise instructions shall guide our way to victory.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Support our allies.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A role suited to my support prowess! I shall ensure that everyone can act to their fullest.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'll trust you to guard my rear.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You would trust me to such an extent?! Of course! Consider your back unassailable!

jumbogamemon.name: JumboGamemon
jumbogamemon.description: A giant Android Digimon that added beam cannons all over its body, sacrificing the strength of its metal shell. JumboGamemon's special moves are Megaton Hydro Laser, which shoots high-speed water currents from its mouth barrel that can penetrate anything, and Jumbo Crater, which strafes with all of its beam cannons over 360 degrees, leaving a crater in the earth in its wake. This embodies the very concept of offense as the best defense.

specialSkills.name: Megaton Hydro Laser
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water physical attack at power 90. Nullifies unfavorable compatibility. Increased damage to targets with Machine Trait.

specialSkills.name: Jumbo Crater
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Null physical attack at power 20 x 3 hits. Increased damage to targets with Mollusk Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Ocean Wave III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Water magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Icicle Edge III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice physical attack at power 37 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Reflect
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Reflect Magic.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: *crash* *boom* Me, shiny, buff body! Me, super cool!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Looking swole, pal!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hehehe... Me hoped you say that. Me wanna join human bodybuildin' competition!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: And with smarts to match!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Me, brawn AND brains! Lookit me go! *crash* *bang*

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: So jealous!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You want me train you, too? We get real tough. JumboGamemon guarantee!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Your heart's practically shining, too!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Me, heart shine, but nobody else see... But you! You see. Me, take shine to YOU!

dianamon.name: Dianamon
dianamon.description: One of the Olympos XII, Dianamon is a Deity Digimon that controls water and ice, allowing it to fight even in absolute zero conditions. Its personality is two-sided, like the light and dark sides of the moon, and its beauty conceals a formidable strength. Dianamon uses its special move Arrow of Artemis to draw and fire a long arrow of dazzling ice from the protuberance on its back. It also uses Good Night Moon to bathe its foe in moonlight fired from the Goodnight Sisters on both legs, lulling it to sleep.

specialSkills.name: Good Night Moon
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 100% chance of 30% reduction to SPD for 3 turns. 80% chance to apply Deep Slumber.

specialSkills.name: Arrow of Artemis
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice magic attack at power 90. If target is affected by Sleep/ Deep Slumber: Increased damage. Increased damage to targets with Humanoid Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Status Barrier
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Stat Debuff Immunity.

attachmentSkills.name: Lethal Blizzard III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Ice magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to INT for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: X-Aura
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] Moderately recovers HP.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Am I... cold?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Not really.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Well, be forewarned, because there are times when I can be perceived as such.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You are.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Surely not all the time, though? It must seem that way because I shoot arrows of ice...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Too cold.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Is that what you think?! I embrace others with a warm heart at times, you know!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You seem cold and lifeless.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Is that how I look? That can't be helped, but please take note of my other side as well.

dynasmon.name: Dynasmon
dynasmon.description: A member of the Royal Knights with the powers of a wyvern. Even among the Royal Knights, Dynasmon is unique. Extremely loyal, it provides absolute service to its lord, who must share Dynasmon's own sense of justice. Even if others consider its master evil, Dynasmon won't hesitate to lay down its life for what it considers to be just. For this reason, it possesses a strong spirit of chivalry and bushido, and values loyalty, fidelity and courtesy above all else. Between its own draconic might and its dragon armor made of refined Chrondigizoid, it possesses matchless power. Its special moves include Dragon's Roar, with which it fires energy blasts from its palms of all the elements of the Ten Legendary Warriors, and Wyvern's Breath, with which it transforms the energy of its body into the aura of a giant wyvern.

specialSkills.name: Wyvern's Breath
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire physical attack at power 115. 100% chance to apply 30% reduction to user's DEF for 3 turns. Immobilized next turn. Increased damage to targets with Evil Trait.

specialSkills.name: Dragon's Roar
specialSkills.description: [Target: User] Activates Counter Physical. Upon receiving a physical attack, counters with a Null magic attack at power 115. Negates unfavorable compatibility. Increased damage to targets with Mythical Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Magma Fall III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Shadow Fang III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 38 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I will gladly lay down my life for my liege.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Even if your liege is evil?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Good or evil is for my liege to decide. I merely serve my liege to the end.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That's crazy talk.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I am not telling you to lay down your life. You need but act on your own beliefs.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Good for you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Many humans do not understand, but it seems you do. I see us having a lasting friendship.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You should value your life more.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: While your concern for my well-being gladdens me, my liege comes before all.

leopardmon.name: Leopardmon
leopardmon.description: Leopardmon is a Holy Knight Digimon that even the other Royal Knights acknowledge to be their leading strategist. It has the exceptional ability required to command the Royal Knights, each of which has its own unique set of beliefs. When Leopardmon must take the field itself, it rushes about in Leopard Mode. Its special moves include Extinction Wave, with which it swings its beam sword, the Sword of Annihilation, in a downward overhead arc, and Black Aura Blast, which releases explosive energy from its Sword of Destruction.

specialSkills.name: Extinction Wave
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 55. If target has already acted: Increased damage. Increased damage to targets with Machine Trait.

specialSkills.name: Black Aura Blast
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 90. If target has already acted: 50% chance to apply Chaos. Increased damage to targets with Unknown Trait.

specialSkills.name: Vulcan Crusher
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 90. If target has yet to act: 25% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Bird Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Nanomachine Break III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 19 x 4 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Nightmare III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to INT for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Strategy is everything when it comes to controlling a battle.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: My strategies are better.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Superior to mine? Interesting... Let us see what you can do, then.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It takes more than strategy to win.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The excuse of one who lacks strategic vision. I shall prove how wrong you are soon enough.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Oh, yeah? Tell me about your strategies...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Well, for instance—Wait! I nearly revealed my hand. I shall have to be more guarded...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Whatever your strategy is, count me in.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Agreeing without knowing the details is foolish, but you are right to trust me.

leopardmon-lm.name: Leopardmon LM
leopardmon-lm.description: Leopardmon: Leopard Mode uses its special move Vulcan Crusher to launch the opponent up from the earth with pillars of bedrock. It also uses Eroberung to generate ball-shaped energy mines from its round tail tip, which it uses as weapons to tactically surround its foe.

specialSkills.name: Vulcan Crusher
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 90. If target has yet to act: 25% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Bird Trait.

specialSkills.name: Eroberung
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 60. Increased damage to targets with Machine Trait.

specialSkills.name: Extinction Wave
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 55. If target has already acted: Increased damage. Increased damage to targets with Machine Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Nanomachine Break III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 19 x 4 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Nightmare III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to INT for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: My combat abilities, too, are without flaw. You may entrust everything to me.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: No, thanks.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Such bravado gains you nothing. You should at least observe my excellence in combat first.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: All right. Then, prove it.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I dislike being spoken down to, but you will change your tone once you see me in action.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'll be counting on you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A wise decision. You will not be sorry. Be thankful that you have good allies.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're really sure of yourself, huh?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I have both a strategic mind and the combat prowess to back it up. You must respect that.

dorugoramon.name: Dorugoramon
dorugoramon.description: An imaginary Digimon born from the daydream of a DigiCore. The interface on Dorugoramon's forehead miraculously unlocked the creative power of its own DigiCore, causing it to Digivolve into this form. Perhaps because this DigiCore already contained powerful draconic data, the form it dreamed up was that of an avatar of powerful destruction and the very incarnation of the "ultimate enemy." Dorugoramon uses its special move Brave Metal to unleash a dreadful charge with all the power of body and soul, and DORU-Din to release a shockwave of destruction.

specialSkills.name: Brave Metal
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 95. Increased damage to targets with Dragon Trait.

specialSkills.name: DORU-Din
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire physical attack at power 60. Increased damage to targets with Dragon Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Void Ray III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Null magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU. 10% CRT Rate.

pilevolcanomon.name: PileVolcanomon
pilevolcanomon.description: One of the rumored seven Digivolutions from Volcanomon. Possessing immense strength and destructive power, PileVolcanomon is well-versed in all manner of hand-to-hand fighting techniques, including pro wrestling moves. During the process of Digivolution, it sculpted its once-massive physique into a leaner form more suitable for melee fighting. Its special moves are Volcanic Driver, which leverages the power generated by the erupting volcanoes on its shoulders to smash opponents head-first into the ground, and Diamond Fist, an ultimate punch capable of rending even Chrondigizoid.

specialSkills.name: Volcanic Driver
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 90. The lower the user's HP, the greater the damage. Increased damage to targets with Humanoid Trait.

specialSkills.name: Diamond Fist
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 90. 100% chance of 20% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s). Increased damage to targets with Steel Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Magma Fall III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 15 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

princemamemon.name: PrinceMamemon
princemamemon.description: A prince of the Mamemon world that incorporated data related to royal families from the Net. PrinceMamemon partners with KingEtemon and pretends to be a member of Digital World royalty—hence its opulent appearance. While its personality isn't so bad, it's instigated by KingEtemon into thinking of itself as truly royal. Embarrassingly, it even believes that the Royal Knights are its subordinates. PrinceMamemon's special move is Smile Warhead, which unleashes an intense headbutt with an unwavering grin across its face. It boasts tremendous destructive power belying its looks, as one would expect from a Mega Digimon.

specialSkills.name: Smile Warhead
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 95. 20% chance to apply Confusion. Increased damage to targets with Steel Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Thruster Metal III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel magic attack at power 11 x 7 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Full Metal Pile III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Steel magic attack at power 45. 85% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Saint Knuckle III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 38 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

plesiomon.name: Plesiomon
plesiomon.description: A Digimon based on an imaginary creature found in the computer of a British cryptozoology research facility, long spoken of in rumor by its researchers. Plesiomon hardly ever reveals itself, with such rare occasions said to come only on foggy days with low visibility. The body of this mysterious creature shines with white light, impressing all who observe its elegance. Plesiomon's special move is Sorrow Blue, which unleashes a shrill, crystal-clear vocalization that plunges its listeners into a deep sadness, sapping them of their will to fight.

specialSkills.name: Sorrow Blue
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Null magic attack at power 55. Always hits. 40% chance to apply Chaos. Increased damage to targets with Humanoid Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Reflect
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Reflect Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Hydro Water III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water magic attack at power 15 x 5 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: X-Heal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Greatly recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: Frozen Bullet III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Allow me to hear your ambitions.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Traveling anywhere and everywhere!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Trek across this wide world, would you? That is a fine ambition, nay, a fine dream.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Knowing everything about the world.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You are greedier for knowledge than I ever imagined. Such hunger pleases me.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Helping you out with your ambition.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: My ambition... That is greater strength. Perhaps with you, I could pursue this goal.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Being with you forever and ever.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hmph. If that is your wish, very well. Not that I condemn such an aim.

boltmon.name: Boltmon
boltmon.description: A prototype Android Digimon built at the same time as Andromon. The flesh-based Boltmon has emotions, unlike the machine-based Andromon. While quite powerful, Boltmon was difficult to control, went berserk and ended up consigned to oblivion. This tragic Digimon roams within the darkness of its grief, its very existence disavowed. Boltmon's special move is Tomahawk Stinger, with which it swings its gigantic battle axe around with deft skill.

specialSkills.name: Tomahawk Stinger
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 130. 70% ACU. Increased damage to targets with Antibody Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Nanomachine Break III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 19 x 4 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Thunder Fall III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 15 x 3 hits. 90% ACU.

miragegaogamon.name: MirageGaogamon
miragegaogamon.description: A Beast Knight Digimon completely covered in Chrondigizoid armor. Due to the incredible speed at which MirageGaogamon moves, its enemies feel like they're seeing a mirage. MirageGaogamon's special moves include Double Crescent Mirage, dual shockwaves resembling crescent moons that it fires from its hands, and Full Moon Blaster, with which it charges up all the energy in its body, then releases it in the form of a super-dreadnought class blast from its chest cannon.

specialSkills.name: Full Moon Blaster
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 95. If user is boost to SPD: 25% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Spirit Trait.

specialSkills.name: Double Crescent Mirage
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 50 x 2 hits. Increased damage to targets with Knight Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Wind Claw III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Gale Storm III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Wind magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Curse Barrier
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Status Abnormality Immunity.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'll show you speed invisible to the naked eye!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I bet you make crazy shockwaves.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: My moves do, sure, but the ones fired from my hands and chest are way more amazing.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'd love to see it!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Even so, you may only get a glimpse of an afterimage at the speed I move at.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: If it's that fast, how can I even see it?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It's not like you can't see it at all. Even just my afterimage is something to behold.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: How fast are we talking, here?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It's hard to explain, but even if you can't see me, I'm sure you'll sense my presence.

metalgarurumon.name: MetalGarurumon
metalgarurumon.description: This final form of Garurumon has been enhanced by turning most of its body into metal. Despite this process, MetalGarurumon hasn't lost any agility, and it can destroy its foes using the countless weapons hidden all over its body. The four laser sights at the tip of its nose emit invisible beams, and MetalGarurumon makes use of a wide array of sensors, including those for infrared- and X-rays, to analyze its targets. This makes it impossible to escape from MetalGarurumon, even in perfect darkness. What's more, the mechanical arms extending from MetalGarurumon's back can emit photoelectric beam wings, allowing it to fly through Net Space at incredible speed. MetalGarurumon's special move is Freezing Breath, with which it breathes out a blast of air at absolute zero that freezes everything it touches. This move instantly suspends the vital functions of any living creature it hits. It also possesses Ice Wolf Claw, which annihilates foes by unleashing every weapon in MetalGarurumon's arsenal at once.

specialSkills.name: Ice Wolf Claw
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Ice physical attack at power 20 x 3 hits. Increased damage to targets with Fire Trait.

specialSkills.name: Freezing Breath
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice physical attack at power 90. 100% chance of reduction to Ice resistance. Increased damage to targets with Reptile Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Icicle Edge III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice physical attack at power 37 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Curse Barrier
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Status Abnormality Immunity.

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 15 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Tell me the first word that pops into your head when you hear the word metal.""

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hard!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm quite proud of my smooth moves, despite all this hard armor. Watch! I'll get your blood pumping.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Machine!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: True. I'm basically a walking, talking, weapon-toting machine. We should count up all my weapons sometime.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Cold!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I may breathe out absolute-zero blasts, but my body and soul are always burning hot.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Sturdy?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Sure, though I protected my friends with my sturdy body even before I got this metal.

metalseadramon.name: MetalSeadramon
metalseadramon.description: This final form of Seadramon is completely covered in the ultra-metal known as Chrondigizoid alloy. The fastest Aquatic Digimon out there, MetalSeadramon's metal body is capable of repelling any and all attacks. It was remodeled to be an aquatic interceptor Digimon, completing the set of interceptor Digimon for terrestrial, marine and aerial defense. MetalSeadramon's special move is River of Power, which fires an energy blast from the cannon at the end of its nose.

specialSkills.name: River of Power
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 95. Increased damage to targets with Fish Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Hydro Water III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water magic attack at power 15 x 5 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Holy Light III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Idle Bubble
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Sleep.

attachmentSkills.name: Shine Burst III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I want to take over the vast oceans, rampaging wherever I please.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You could do it right now, if you wanted.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Yes. If I felt like it, I'd rule over all the seas. Shall I show you how I'd do it?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: There are all kinds of seas around the world.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: True. And different seas require different methods of attack. I should do some research.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wanna go with you!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You want to see my glorious romp through the seas? Hmm. I'll take you along someday...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I bet you look beautiful when you swim.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You understand well. Yes, my true beauty is on full display when I'm in the ocean waves.

medievalgallantmon.name: MedievalGallantmon
medievalgallantmon.description: A Warrior Digimon extolled as the legendary hero of Witchelny, the Digital World of another dimension. Ancient Witchelny was on the path to ruin, since its magic (advanced programming language) was still in its infancy and it lacked techniques to protect the land from invasion by outside forces. It's said that MedievalGallantmon suddenly appeared and repelled invaders, and that it transcends time to exist to the present day, although the truth of this is uncertain. It fights with arms created with magic, and wields Dynas, the ultimate magic lance concealing the power of the wyvern. MedievalGallantmon is nicknamed the Whirlwind General due to its governance over the Vortex Warriors, Digimon who fight with weapons made of wind magic, one of the four magic types (fire, earth, water and wind). Practically none have seen MedievalGallantmon in the Digital World, but this Digimon is known as the Warrior of Fantasy due to its armor covered with gorgeous decoration, and is a solemn figure affixed with a coat of arms. MedievalGallantmon uses special move Rage of Wyvern to fire energy from Dynas.

specialSkills.name: Rage of Wyvern
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire magic attack at power 95. Increased damage to targets with Magic Trait.

specialSkills.name: Final Crest
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind magic attack at power 90. If target has yet to act: Increased damage. Increased damage to targets with Magic Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Sonic Shot III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to INT for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Burst Flame III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire magic attack at power 15 x 5 hits. 95% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Do you know of the Digital World in another dimension?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What kind of world is it?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: An immature world on the road to ruin, unable to protect itself from outside invaders.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I don't get what you mean.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The Digital World you know is not the only one out there. There are others, you know.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I know about it.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Then you must know of me as well: MedievalGallantmon, the Whirlwind General.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Never heard of it.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It is called Witchelny." It is my beloved world, although its magic is still somewhat unrefined."

rosemon.name: Rosemon
rosemon.description: A Pixie Digimon with rose-like features, Rosemon is known as the queen of flowers. With the appearance of a lovely woman, this Digimon desires eternal beauty. Though somewhat overly self-conscious, Rosemon's abilities are a match for the other Megas. It wears on its chest a Tifaret, a jewel engraved with the symbols for love and beauty. It's said that those who bear this Tifaret are promised eternal beauty and strength. One of Rosemon's special moves is Thorn Whip, with which it uses a whip of thorns charged with an electric current to tame even the fiercest of Digimon. It's rumored that anyone struck by this whip becomes captivated by Rosemon, body and soul. Also, any Digimon subjected to Rosemon's Forbidden Temptation is surrounded by countless rose blossoms and has its data destroyed in a flash of beauty.

specialSkills.name: Thorn Whip
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant magic attack at power 90. Recovers SP equal to 30% of damage dealt. Increased damage to targets with Insectoid Trait.

specialSkills.name: Forbidden Temptation
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Plant magic attack at power 60. Increased damage to targets with Humanoid Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: X-Aura
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] Moderately recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: Shine Burst III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Reflect
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Reflect Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Power Energy III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What's this? Were you looking it me, by any chance?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I was captivated by your beauty.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I can hardly blame you. Go on, then. Feast your eyes until you're satiated.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I was wondering how you got so gorgeous.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It must all be thanks to my desire to remain ravishing at all times.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I couldn't help myself.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Infatuated with my eternal beauty, are you? I will stay by your side forever.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I was looking because I like you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I can accept your feelings, but be ready to be ever captivated by me, body and soul.

lotosmon.name: Lotosmon
lotosmon.description: A Pixie Digimon that resembles a lotus, a flower which is said to bloom even in heaven. Lotosmon has all the dignity of a quiet and refined young lady, as well as the ability to bestow peaceful dreams upon others—visions so sweet that they're able to forget all the cares of this world. However, it's utterly merciless to those who spurn its goodwill. Using the Caduceus staff in its left hand, said to have power over both healing and harm, Lotosmon can generate either a white aura with Serpent Cure or a black aura with Serpent Ruin. It can also create a multicolored aura with the staff in its right hand, which is topped with a rainbow-colored flower. This is the special move Seven's Fantasia, with which Lotosmon saps away an enemy's will to fight by luring them into a world of pleasing visions.

specialSkills.name: Seven's Fantasia
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 55. 20% chance to apply Chaos. Increased damage to targets with Pixie Trait.

specialSkills.name: Serpent Ruin
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 100% chance of 30% reduction to DEF/SPI for 3 turn(s).

specialSkills.name: Serpent Cure
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Recovers HP based on user's SPI. 100% chance of 20% boost to INT for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Thorn Strike III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant magic attack at power 37 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Holy Light III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Restore
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes status abnormalities, Injury, & Disease.

attachmentSkills.name: X-Revive
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Revives from KO and greatly recovers HP.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Is the aura I emit too bright for you?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Yes, but I'll try to handle it...!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: No need to force yourself. I shall invite you to a blessed world of illusion all the same.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Where does that aura come from?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: My power, one which bestows peaceful dreams that allow you to forget your cares.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Give me some of that sheen, why don't you?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Take as much as you like. All I desire is your happiness.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I can't get enough of that gleam.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I am glad. Continue to gaze upon me, and I shall grant all the happy dreams you like.

avengekidmon.name: AvengeKidmon
avengekidmon.description: The result of a sudden transformation akin to mutation that occurred when a Digimon felled by MagnaKidmon became so obsessed with revenge that the data of its own negative thoughts overwhelmed its DigiCore. To vent its rage at taking on an appearance so similar to the Digimon it hoped to destroy, AvengeKidmon has turned to mindless rampage, to the extent that its original goal of defeating MagnaKidmon has left its thoughts. One of its special moves is Destruction Trigger, which pins an enemy underfoot before firing an explosive bullet into them at point-blank range from its gun leg, regardless of the fact that this will injure AvengeKidmon as well. The other is Misery Bullet Rain, which launches its target into the air with a stream of energy blasts from its fingers, then unleashes a barrage of live ammunition while it's still in midair.

specialSkills.name: Destruction Trigger
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 35 x 3 hits. Nullifies unfavorable compatibility. Receives 20% HP damage from attack recoil. Increased damage to targets with Weapon Trait.

specialSkills.name: Misery Bullet Rain
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 18 x 5 hits. If target has already acted: Increased damage. Increased damage to targets with Weapon Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Hell Crusher III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

ebemon.name: Ebemon
ebemon.description: An Android Digimon artificially created from a captured Vademon that had its body's compositional data analyzed and improved. Ebemon is rumored to have been produced using extraterrestrial technology at a site known as Area 51, but the truth remains shrouded in mystery. Its special move Brain Rupture involves firing a cracking program from the gun in its left hand into its opponent's brain to absorb the data accumulated there. Planet Destroyer, by contrast, involves shooting out all the power Ebemon has amassed from the gun in its right hand. This move is said to be capable of instantaneously destroying an entire planet. Rumor has it that the country that created Ebemon is secretly researching Digimon so it can rule the Digital World.

specialSkills.name: Brain Rupture
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Steals all stat changes.

specialSkills.name: Planet Destroyer
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 90. The greater the user's stat buffs, the greater the damage. Increased damage to targets with Alien Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to INT for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Shock Plasma III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 25 x 3 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Thunder Fall III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 15 x 3 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Character Reversal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy or ally] 100% chance to apply Reverse.

venommyotismon.name: VenomMyotismon
venommyotismon.description: The true, Digivolved form of the king of the undead, Myotismon. VenomMyotismon is a demon with the lower body of a beast and an insect-like carapace on its upper body. Having unleashed the full extent of its hidden power, it yearns only for death and destruction. Myotismon, retaining its reason, intellect and refined conduct, is loath to reveal this repugnant form. VenomMyotismon's special move is Venom Infusion, which injects its opponent with a destructive virus that completely destroys its configuration data, causing it to cease functioning.

specialSkills.name: Venom Infusion
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 85. 50% chance to apply Deadly Poison. 50% chance to apply Crystallization. Increased damage to targets with Unknown Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Shadow Fang III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 38 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Mental Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to SPI for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

ancientwisemon.name: AncientWisemon
ancientwisemon.description: One of the Ten Legendary Warriors that saved the Ancient Digital World, possessing the attribute of Steel. A Mega that existed in the far-distant past, AncientWisemon is the wisest being in the Digital World. Due to the Akashic Records that chronicle the superior wisdom of ancient times, there's nothing outside of AncientWisemon's comprehension. Not only does this sage possess knowledge from time immemorial, but it also discerns events of the distant future. The mirror that comprises its body is rumored to be linked to the netherworld. AncientWisemon's abilities have been subsequently passed down to Mutant Digimon. Its special moves are Laplace's Demon, which imprisons opponents for all eternity in a netherworld located by using its vast wisdom, and Elder Sign, which summons the ultimate wicked god from a separate universe.

specialSkills.name: Laplace's Demon
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null magic attack at power 105. Increased damage to targets with Unknown Trait.

specialSkills.name: Elder Sign
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Null magic attack at power 80. 50% chance to apply Immobilization. 70% chance of 20% reduction to DEF for 3 turns. Increased damage to targets with Holy Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Nightmare III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Full Metal Pile III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Steel magic attack at power 45. 85% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Thruster Metal III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel magic attack at power 11 x 7 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I have been chronicling all wisdom since the distant past. Nothing is beyond my knowledge.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: So do you know what I'm thinking right now?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That has nothing to do with wisdom. If you seek to test me, know that it is pointless.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wanna learn.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I shall teach you what I can. To build the future, you must know the past.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That's kind of scary.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The wisdom I possess can discern the future. I shall not apply that same scrutiny to you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Wish I could be like that.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Instead of wishing, I would have you learn from my wisdom and make it your own.

gaiomon.name: Gaiomon
gaiomon.description: A subspecies of Greymon, which is an excellent combat species in its own right, Gaiomon is a Dragon Man Digimon that's grown in strength through victory in battle. Found in an abandoned computer in the East, much of its strength has yet to be quantified, but it clearly has an unbelievable amount of combat experience earned through countless battles. It was in the course of all those battles that it also gained its uniquely shaped swords, the Kikurin. A strange light trails them when they're swung, and it's said that anything that touches that light is cut to pieces. Its special move is Will-O'-Wisp Slash, with which it utilizes the light trails emanating from its Kikurin swords. It can also combine its two Kikurin swords into one, concentrating their eerie light to shoot at distant foes with Phosphorus Fire Attack.

specialSkills.name: Will-O'-Wisp Slash
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 45 x 2 hits. 50% chance to apply Injury. Increased damage to targets with Humanoid Trait.

specialSkills.name: Phosphorus Fire Attack
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 85. Always hits. 100% chance of reduction to Fire resistance. Increased damage to targets with Humanoid Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Magma Fall III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Safety Guard
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Guts.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Shadow Fang III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 38 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

chaosgallantmon.name: ChaosGallantmon
chaosgallantmon.description: A darker side of Gallantmon, in which its nature as a Virus Digimon has come to the fore. ChaosGallantmon's mind and spirit have been thoroughly corrupted, transforming it into nothing more than a "Digital Hazard" bent on bringing destruction to the Digital World. It's clad in the same armor of nearly pure Chrondigizoid as Gallantmon—though dyed entirely black. ChaosGallantmon wields the demonic lance "Balmung" in its right hand, while bearing the demonic shield "Gorgon" in its left. In every way, it's Gallantmon's antithesis. ChaosGallantmon's special moves are Demonic Disaster, which makes a series of powerful thrusts with its demonic lance, and Judecca Prison, which releases a wave of corrosive dark energy from its demonic shield.

specialSkills.name: Demonic Disaster
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 30 x 3 hits. Removes stat debuffs. Increased damage to targets with Holy Trait.

specialSkills.name: Judecca Prison
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 90. If target is Vaccine: Increased damage. Increased damage to targets with Knight Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Mental Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to SPI for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Thruster Metal III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel magic attack at power 11 x 7 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Curse Barrier
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Status Abnormality Immunity.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Once you fall, the dark and gloom are not so bad.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm disappointed in you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Say what you will, but I, ChaosGallantmon, shall bring disaster upon the Digital World!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Do you do bad things?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Of course. The instincts of ChaosGallantmon compel me to bring about calamity and ruin.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Don't do anything bad.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Friend or no, ChaosGallantmon cannot comply. My instincts compel me to summon calamity.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That doesn't suit you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It may not now, but soon the darkness will claim I, ChaosGallantmon. You shall see.

chaosdramon.name: Chaosdramon
chaosdramon.description: Machinedramon, a Digimon made from the parts of countless cyborg Digimon, possesses unimaginable powers, and as such was apparently considered a successful experiment. Chaosdramon, with its crimson metal body, is an even more advanced version of Machinedramon. Its frame is made from Red Digizoid, a rare metal made by re-refining the virtual super-metal Chrondigizoid to increase its hardness. As a result, it's capable of repelling all manner of attacks, and destroying absolutely anything. Its special move Hyper Infinity Cannon fires super-dreadnought class energy blasts from both of its cannons.

specialSkills.name: Hyper Infinity Cannon
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 70. Increased damage to targets with Machine Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Reset Body
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Removes stat buffs.

attachmentSkills.name: Nanomachine Break III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 19 x 4 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Shadow Fang III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 38 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

callismon.name: Callismon
callismon.description: A Dark Beast Digimon that resembles a bear. Although it's considered to be a Digivolution from the Grizzlymon line, it's a mutant species Digivolved from Digimon with abnormal data. It's unknown whether these data anomalies that create it are spontaneous or intentional, and since its numbers are small, its ecology and Digivolution conditions remain a mystery. Callismon's enormous arms and weapons make it highly effective in combat, and it exhibits a ferocious nature that attacks hostile opponents relentlessly until they fall. Its special moves are Deep Forest, which degrades the opponent's data by slashing with its sharp claws, and Rodeo Bullet, which fires homing shots from its three cannons.

specialSkills.name: Rodeo Bullet
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Steel physical attack at power 80.

specialSkills.name: Deep Forest
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 95.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Saint Knuckle III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 38 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

gundramon.name: Gundramon
gundramon.description: A large Digimon equipped with a veritable cache of firearms. Many Digimon refer to Gundramon as one of the "Three Musketeers," along with MagnaKidmon and BeelStarmon, due to their highly developed marksmanship. It's also a member of the Crank Team, and is suited to combat much like Machinedramon. Faster than Machinedramon, though, Gundramon has all the mobility it needs to quickly get into firing position. The acrid smell of gunpowder has soaked into every bit of its fully metallic body, as is appropriate for such a bitter and hard-boiled Digimon. Gundramon's special moves are Der Blitz, which fires at an opponent's vitals with the twin six-shooters in its hands, and Gewalt Schwärmer, which fires off a volley in all directions.

specialSkills.name: Gewalt Schwärmer
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Steel physical attack at power 35 x 4 hits. The lower the user's SP, the lower the damage. Consumes all SP. Immobilized next turn. Increased damage to targets with Machine Trait.

specialSkills.name: Der Blitz
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 90. 15% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Antibody Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Magma Fall III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Thunder Fall III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 15 x 3 hits. 90% ACU.

kingetemon.name: KingEtemon
kingetemon.description: KingEtemon is a supreme being, the self-proclaimed "King of Etemon" that stands out even among its peers. It even goes so far as to refer to itself as the "King of Kings." Dressed in its dashing Monkey Suit, which prominently features the characters for "Great King" on its chest, KingEtemon struts about like a star (though other Digimon treat it as little more than a joke). KingEtemon's special move is Monkey Wrench, which puts on a performance that robs opponents of their will to fight.

specialSkills.name: Monkey Wrench
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 50% reduction to ATK/INT for 1 turn. Applies Taunting to user.

attachmentSkills.name: Void Ray III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Null magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU. 10% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Comet Hammer III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 14 x 6 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Ripping Net
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Paralysis.

attachmentSkills.name: Shadow Fang III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 38 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

grandracmon.name: GranDracmon
grandracmon.description: A Dark Beast Digimon known as "the king of all vampire Digimon." GranDracmon has long maintained its own castle in the Dark Area, and is said to boast such immense might that not even the Seven Great Demon Lords dare meddle with it. With a well-bred demeanor and a voice laced with bewitching glamor, GranDracmon can be devilishly charming, and there are numerous tales of Angel Digimon sent to slay it that ended up being seduced to the dark side. Its special moves are Crystal Revolution, which flash-freezes all foes into ice crystals, and Eye of the Gorgon, which turns its evil gaze on the enemy, trapping its heart in darkness.

specialSkills.name: Crystal Revolution
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Ice magic attack at power 55. Recovers HP equal to 15% of damage dealt. Increased damage to targets with Angel Trait.

specialSkills.name: Eye of the Gorgon
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice magic attack at power 80. 60% chance to apply Chaos. Increased damage to targets with Angel Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Frozen Bullet III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Reflect
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Reflect Magic.

attachmentSkills.name: Hell Crusher III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: X-Revive
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Revives from KO and greatly recovers HP.

chronomon-dm.name: Chronomon DM
chronomon-dm.description: The form Chronomon takes when it goes berserk, Chronomon: Destroy Mode is a legendary monster that has renounced its duty of maintaining the peaceful order of space-time and has instead risen in revolt against the very time-governing system itself. While repairing space-time, all of the variformed malice existing in the Digital World flowed into Chronomon all at once, causing it to spin out of control, much as if it had been infected with a virus.
