Exploiting the innate temporal powers Chronomon originally possessed, Chronomon: Destroy Mode hacks into the memories etched into the Digital World and downloads a diverse arsenal of skills into itself for use in its rampages. Its special move is Finger Bomb, which forces the past data of the opponent it points at to be restored within its body, causing it to explode from the sheer volume of data. Despite its berserk state, Chronomon: Destroy Mode still has the ability to burn foes to nothing with Holy Flare. It also possesses Chrono Devolution, which converts the Digital World's time data into energy that instantly ages any who touch it, reducing their data to dust.

specialSkills.name: Holy Flare
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire physical attack at power 85. Nullifies unfavorable compatibility.

specialSkills.name: Chrono Devolution
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 80. 100% chance to apply Crystallization. 70% chance of 20% reduction to ATK/DEF/INT/SPI. If target's HP is 50% or higher: Increased damage.

attachmentSkills.name: Dispel
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes stat debuffs.

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Frozen Bullet III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Soul Fear III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark physical attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

zanbamon.name: Zanbamon
zanbamon.description: A Wizard Digimon resembling a mounted warrior. Zanbamon is a valiant general that leads the Musyamon Corps. Regardless of its high rank, Zanbamon is always at the head of its force, and enjoys charging directly at its foes. Its lower half has fused with its horse in order to improve mobility on the battlefield, allowing it to wield its sword without fear of losing its balance even during the harshest of battles. One of Zanbamon's special moves, Vorpal Blade, unleashes a powerful blow with the massive sword in its right hand, Ryuzan-maru. The force of this strike is so intense that it slashes through the opponent's armor no matter how it tries to defend itself. Zanbamon's other special move is Mystic Flame, an attack performed with the magical sword in its left hand. Quickly swinging this thin-bladed weapon produces a cross-shaped shockwave that slices through the enemy.

specialSkills.name: Vorpal Blade
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 100. Nullifies unfavorable compatibility. Increased damage to targets with Demon Trait.

specialSkills.name: Mystic Flame
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 50 x 2 hits. Increased damage to targets with Demon Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Void Ray III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Null magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU. 10% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 15 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

zombieplutomon.name: ZombiePlutomon
zombieplutomon.description: Plutomon's DigiCore has shut down due to reaching the end of its lifespan, but, strangely, its body is still functioning. It no longer retains its core mission of defeating evil. It thinks of nothing but devouring the data of other beings, and endlessly wanders in search of new DigiCores. Unlike when it was alive, it is now a "terrible predator" in a completely different sense, as its decaying body will never know satisfaction, no matter how many DigiCores it consumes. Its special moves include Hazard Hold, which grabs an opponent and sucks up its DigiCore data until it decays; Hell Slicer, which shoots out X particles from its left hand in order to cut the enemy to pieces; and Marionette Abomination, with which it bites enemies and infects them with a virus that turns them into a puppet forced to do its bidding.

specialSkills.name: Hell Slicer
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark physical attack at power 70. Nullifies unfavorable compatibility. 50% chance to apply Chaos. Increased damage to targets with Holy Trait.

specialSkills.name: Marionette Abomination
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 100. Increased damage to targets with Holy Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Shadow Fang III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 38 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Soul Fear II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark physical attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Reset Body
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Removes stat buffs.

attachmentSkills.name: Lunatic Gate III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Null physical attack at power 45. 90% ACU. 10% CRT Rate.

darkdramon.name: Darkdramon
darkdramon.description: Darkdramon is an Android Digimon believed to be the D-Brigade's ultimate weapon. Rumor has it that D-Brigade researchers created Darkdramon by Digivolving a Tankdramon they recovered. Supposedly, this Tankdramon was defeated in an operation designed to eliminate a target codenamed BAN-CHO. However, none of this information is particularly reliable. A vast amount of dark matter seems to have been used in this Digivolution process. Possibly as a result, Darkdramon immediately went berserk and fled. Its current whereabouts are unknown, even to the D-Brigade, though rumor has it that it's still searching for Codename BAN-CHO. Its special move Dark Roar is a forbidden technique that involves firing an energy bomb composed of dark matter. Nothing can survive a hit from this attack, rumor has it. Darkdramon also has a weapon called the Gigastick Lance built into its right arm, said to be equal in power to Gallantmon's holy lance Gram.

specialSkills.name: Dark Roar
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 90. 90% ACU. 25% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Alien Trait.

specialSkills.name: Gigastick Lance
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 105. Nullifies unfavorable compatibility. Increased damage to targets with Immortal Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Thunder Fall III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 15 x 3 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

tigervespamon.name: TigerVespamon
tigervespamon.description: An Android Digimon that guards the mysterious Royal Base, a secret, aerial honey base. In spite of its slender figure, TigerVespamon still boasts astounding stamina, and never stops moving in battle. The top 0.08 percent of its kind join the Covert Honey Corps: Royal Commandos, and are given codenames. TigerVespamon's codename "Tiger" comes from its excellent solo combat ability, and it uses twin blades called Royal Meister, wielding them like tiger fangs. TigerVespamon executes its special move Mach Stinger V by stabbing foes with its Royal Meister blades.

specialSkills.name: Mach Stinger V
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 15 x 6 hits. 10% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Insectoid Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Thunder Fall III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 15 x 3 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Void Ray III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Null magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU. 10% CRT Rate.

titamon.name: Titamon
titamon.description: The counterattack titan, born from the grudge of a Digimon felled by the Olympos XII in a contest for supremacy over the Digital World. Also going by the alias "One-Man Division," Titamon harbors bottomless grudge energy within its mighty body. It runs from battlefield to battlefield, all in pursuit of the heads of the Olympos XII. Titamon's huge arms are covered in a large quantity of skulls, each formed from strength data pilfered from fallen foes. Its gigantic Zanjintou sword is carved from the bones of SkullGreymon, and the rancor dwelling within the blade emits a low growl. Titamon's special move Soul Core Attack slices straight past an enemy's armor and body, cleaving its DigiCore directly with Titamon's blade. Damage taken from a direct hit can never be healed. Phantom Blade runs a foe through with Zanjintou, plunging it into a hallucination that it remains pierced even after the blade is pulled out. The pain of this stab only subsides with the death of the enemy's spirit.

specialSkills.name: Soul Core Attack
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 90. Nullifies unfavorable compatibility. Increased damage to targets with Humanoid Trait.

specialSkills.name: Phantom Blade
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 90. 50% chance to apply Injury. Increased damage to targets with Humanoid Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Awesome Quake III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Earth magic attack at power 55. 85% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Shadow Fang III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 38 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Curse Barrier
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Status Abnormality Immunity.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The bones of the defeated are mine to claim.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: How cruel.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Just erasing the fallen may be more merciful, but it is my duty to collect their grudges.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Sounds like a nice memorial service.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Oh? I take possession of the fallen's grudges forever. Surely there is no greater disgrace.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What do you do that for?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Data remains in their bones. By collecting them, I—we, really—inherit their grudges.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That sounds like quite a chore.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I do not need your pity, human. If you must, pity the grudges left behind in these bones.

tyrantkabuterimon.name: TyrantKabuterimon
tyrantkabuterimon.description: The "Monarch of the Insects" governing all Insectoid Digimon. TyrantKabuterimon only acts at night, making a stronghold of the Under Forest deep underground below a dark forest. It can control any and all Insectoid Digimon at will, and almost never fights, itself. Its carapace is composed of high-density Chrondigizoid that can't be damaged by the average Digimon. TyrantKabuterimon uses Shine of Bee to unleash an unblockable incandescent explosion from its entire body, instantly reducing all hostiles to ash. It also uses Bee Cyclone to summon subordinate insects that form an impregnable wall of bugs.

specialSkills.name: Shine of Bee
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire physical attack at power 110. Immobilized next turn. Increased damage to targets with Insectoid Trait.

specialSkills.name: Bee Cyclone
specialSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 20% reduction to physical/magic damage taken for 2 turns. 100% chance of Steel resistance boost for 2 turns.

attachmentSkills.name: Crescent Leaf III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant physical attack at power 11 x 7 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Rune Forest III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Plant magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I am the Monarch of the Insects!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I acknowledge your strength.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Bow in veneration to the glory of my impenetrable Chrondigizoid shell.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: So you control Insectoid Digimon directly?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Remember this! A monarch never handles such matters personally.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: But we're still friends, right?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Of course. You should be honored to count such a valiant warrior among your friends.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That's what I love about you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A monarch is beloved by all.

creepymon.name: Creepymon
creepymon.description: An Evil King Digimon with many Evil-species and Dark Angel Digimon under its command. Creepymon was originally an Angel Digimon, and one of quite high rank at that. However, it resorted to rebellion—or perhaps violence—against the personifications of the Digital World's goodness (which may have been the very humans who built it), and was thus deleted to the Dark Area (the graveyard of erased data). Creepymon and its ilk have vowed to one day subjugate the Digital World and exact revenge upon these personifications of goodness. It uses its special move Flame Inferno to blast enemies with superheated hellfire. Anyone hit by this attack is incinerated without a trace.

specialSkills.name: Flame Inferno
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire magic attack at power 70. Increased damage to targets with Holy Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to INT for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Venom Trap
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Poison.

attachmentSkills.name: Shadow Fang III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 38 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Tremble before evil.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Evil will be defeated.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Pray that your lack of fear does not rush you into death's embrace, human.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I fear nothing.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Then right this erroneous thinking at once. A lack of due fear will lead to your demise.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm full of fear.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Fear me, an Evil King Digimon with many evil and Dark Angel Digimon under my command.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I despise evil.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The deepest hate springs from the strongest love, it would seem.

gallantmon.name: Gallantmon
gallantmon.description: A Holy Knight Digimon and member of the Royal Knights. The Royal Knights are the highest-ranking Digimon when it comes to network security, and no Digimon has ever been able to crack their stalwart defenses. But given Gallantmon's Virus attribute, its role as one of the chief protectors of the Net inherently conflicts with its nature. This means there's always a chance, however small, that it may slip and become a threat instead. Gallantmon is clad in holy armor made of 99.9 percent pure Chrondigizoid, and it wields the holy lance "Gram" in its right hand while bearing the holy shield "Aegis" in its left. Its special moves are Lightning Joust, which unleashes a powerful thrust from Gram, and Shield of the Just, which fires a purifying beam from Aegis.

specialSkills.name: Lightning Joust
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 90. Removes stat debuffs. Increased damage to targets with Immortal Trait.

specialSkills.name: Shield of the Just
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 90. If target is Virus: Increased damage. Increased damage to targets with Unknown Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to INT for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 15 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Status Barrier
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Stat Debuff Immunity.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Are there any evildoers afoot?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: There might be.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Then you and I, Gallantmon, must root them out and mete justice upon their wicked souls!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I don't know.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Then a thorough investigation is in order. None may escape Gallantmon's keen gaze.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: There are.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Then I, Gallantmon, shall deliver punishment forthwith. And you shall be at my side!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Nope.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I am glad. I, Gallantmon, will brook not even the tiniest of misdeeds! Peace must be kept!

bacchusmon.name: Bacchusmon
bacchusmon.description: One of the Olympos XII, this Digimon boasts that it's the heaviest drinker of the Digital World. Bacchusmon has a cheerful disposition and is well-suited to looking after others. Day or night, it always looks to gather Rookie and Champion Digimon together to throw a party. Bacchusmon has the ability to produce any form of alcohol inside its body, and if it takes a liking to another Digimon at one of these parties, it's known to offer it the drink of its choice. Bacchusmon itself has a taste for fruit wines, with its favorite variety produced from the fermented sweets of Karpos Hulē, the forest carried on Ceresmon's back. Whenever Bacchusmon has a moment to spare, it begs Ceresmon to make it some fruit wine. Because of this, the pair are on very good terms, and are often seen together. Bacchusmon's special move is Cook of the Abyss, with which it wraps its arms around a foe, alters its compositional data to a suitable finger food and then eats it. Bacchusmon also has Party of the Heavens, with which it produces a form of alcohol laced with poisons that can cause drowsiness and paralysis and then blasts enemies with the concoction to stupefy them. Furthermore, the poison data that it produces is one subject of the Crank Team's research. There are a number of credible rumors that speculate that Bacchusmon's poison data is linked to the development of bacteriological weapons and high-profile assassination plots.

specialSkills.name: Cook of the Abyss
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 90. Recovers HP equal to 30% of damage dealt. Increased damage to targets with Fish Trait.

specialSkills.name: Party of the Heavens
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Water physical attack at power 55. 30% chance to apply Immobilization. Increased damage to targets with Fire Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Aqua Pressure III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Ocean Wave III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Water magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Character Reversal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy or ally] 100% chance to apply Reverse.

attachmentSkills.name: Hate Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Taunting.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Tell me what kind of fruit you like!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Fruit with a rich aroma.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Wine from such fruit makes me drunk on the scent alone... I get quite generous as well!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Sweet fruit.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Such fruit makes mellow brews when fermented. I'd love to try a few out!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Sour fruit.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I love the crisp acidity of wines from such fruit. Let's have a drinking contest!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Juicy fruit.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Wines from juicy fruit are tangy and go down easy, especially with a good story!

bacchusmon-dm.name: Bacchusmon DM
bacchusmon-dm.description: One of the Olympos XII, and the self-proclaimed heartiest drinker of the Digital World. With its bright personality, Bacchusmon is good at taking care of others. At all times of the day it gathers Rookie and Champion Digimon and holds grand feasts. It can produce various types of beverages, and is happy to do so at the request of its favorite Digimon who have come to attend its feasts. Bacchusmon prefers fruit wines, and its favorite is made from fermented fruits taken from the Karpos Hulē forest on Ceresmon's back. Whenever it's free, it asks Ceresmon to let it brew that wine. As a result, the two Digimon are extremely close and often do things together. When Bacchusmon has had too much to drink, the pattern on its body turns blue, and it expels the data in its large stomach in a destructive beam of light called Reversal of the Dead. If the attack hits an opponent, Bacchusmon absorbs the data to become more powerful, so facing off against large groups of enemies can make it unfathomably strong. The data that Bacchusmon refines into poison is being researched by the Crack Team. There are plausible rumors that Bacchusmon's poison data is being used to produce biological weapons and in assassination plots against high-ranking figures.

specialSkills.name: Reversal of the Dead
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Water physical attack at power 90. 100% chance to apply Sleep to user. Increased damage to targets with Humanoid Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Character Reversal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy or ally] 100% chance to apply Reverse.

attachmentSkills.name: Aqua Pressure III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Tidal Stream III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Water physical attack at power 11 x 4 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Hate Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Taunting.

barbamon.name: Barbamon
barbamon.description: One of the Seven Great Demon Lords, this Evil King Digimon is shaped like an old man with a long beard. Barbamon exists in the heart of the den of evil known as the Dark Area, controlling Dark Angel Digimon and causing them to engage in all sorts of wickedness. It's obsessed with all the treasures of the network, using every means at its disposal to sate its greed. This rapacious and ruthless creature would kill a Digimon for even a scrap of treasure. The most cunning tactician of the Seven Deadly Digimon, it controls not only Dark Angel Digimon, but even the Mega-level Ghoulmon with ease. Barbamon's special moves are Death Lure, a demonic staff that tempts Digimon into an inescapable living hell and converts them to wickedness, and Pandemonium Lost, which releases all the evil energy of the Dark Area at once, burning everything with a super high-temperature explosion. Even MaloMyotismon's special move Pandemonium Flame releases only the smallest fraction of this energy.

specialSkills.name: Pandemonium Lost
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark magic attack at power 70. Increased damage to targets with Deity Trait.

specialSkills.name: Death Lure
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 100% chance of 30% reduction to SPI for 3 turns. 80% chance to apply Chaos.

attachmentSkills.name: Nightmare III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Reflect
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Reflect Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Character Reversal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy or ally] 100% chance to apply Reverse.

attachmentSkills.name: Void Ray III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Null magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU. 10% CRT Rate.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Desire stirs all to action. Human, unleash your greed!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: No one's greedier than me.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You suggest your greed could surpass that of an Evil King? Then let desire rule the day!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I rein in my desires.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: There is no need for self-restraint. Come, now. Show me your unabashed greed!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Greed isn't healthy.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Is that sarcasm? It will be amusing to see which of us succumbs to greed first.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I don't desire anything.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Impossible. One day I shall bring forth the greed buried deep within your heart!

piedmon.name: Piedmon
piedmon.description: Piedmon is an odd-looking and elusive Wizard Digimon shrouded in mystery. Wizard Digimon are strange beings, so different from evil-species and Undead types that they may as well be from another dimension. Piedmon's true identity is unknown, as are the reasons for its sudden appearance. The very reason for its existence is a mystery, and it's currently unclear how to learn more about it. What is quite evident, however, is that it possesses incomparable power. Anyone who encounters Piedmon can do little but curse their own fate. Piedmon's special move is Trump Sword, with which it teleports the four swords stuck through the magic box on its back so that they suddenly reappear, skewering the opponent—an inescapable attack.

specialSkills.name: Trump Sword
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Wind magic attack at power 70. Increased damage to targets with Unknown Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Nightmare III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Ripping Net
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Paralysis.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Reflect
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Reflect Physical.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: How would you feel about a game of cards?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: No cheating, now.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I hardly need a lecture from you. Someone as strong as me doesn't need tricks.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: No, thank you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Smart move. Avoiding ill-advised competition is the key to a long life.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That sounds fun.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Oh? But I'm the one who'll have the fun, you know. You will provide the entertainment.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Sounds like a yawn.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Oh, do pardon me. I wouldn't play so boring a game that you'd have no chance of winning.

puppetmon.name: Puppetmon
puppetmon.description: Puppetmon is a Mega Puppet Digimon made from the body of the dreaded Cherrymon. It's widely believed that a malicious hacker created Puppetmon from Cherrymon's data. Although Puppetmon may look like a simple marionette, it has a will of its own, and is fully capable of moving around by itself. Puppetmon is a liar with a twisted personality, and whenever a computer produces bad data, Puppetmon is usually involved somehow. Its most powerful attack is the special move Puppet Pummel, with which it loads gunpowder into its revolver-shaped hammer, then smashes foes with it. Anything hit by this attack has to bear the brunt not only of the hammer blow but also the explosion created by the gunpowder, meaning most of Puppetmon's targets are utterly destroyed.

specialSkills.name: Puppet Pummel
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 90. Nullifies unfavorable compatibility. Increased damage to targets with Vegetation Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Panic Wisp
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Confusion.

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 15 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Just so you know, I'm a bit of a fibber.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Even I tell a lie or two sometimes.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: My lies aren't so trite! Anyway, don't come crying to me if you end up feeling taken in.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Is that a fib, too?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Urgh, touché. You win this round...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You ought to quit all that.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're right. I'll never, ever lie again— Whoopsie! I done dood it again.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'll forgive little white lies.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Okey-dokey. I'll lie so good you won't even know you're being hoodwinked.

pharaohmon.name: Pharaohmon
pharaohmon.description: A Mega Wizard Digimon with a sinister golden sheen. Said to have Digivolved from a mummy-species Digimon, Pharaohmon ruled over many areas of the Ancient Digital World with absolute authority. It controlled many Digimon during the genesis of the Digital World, and the fact that Pharaohmon was able to build the mysterious ancient ruins scattered around the Digital World in a few days is proof of that dominion. It uses its special move Necromist to steal the will of hostile Digimon, then releases a fear gas that gradually dries out their flesh. Those who succumb to this attack face one of two fates: a full invitation to the world of the dead, or servitude under Pharaohmon as an undead creature.

specialSkills.name: Necromist
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 80. 60% chance to apply Chaos. Increased damage to targets with Holy Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Nightmare III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: X-Revive
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Revives from KO and greatly recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: Gaia Blaster III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth magic attack at power 85. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Mental Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPI for 3 turn(s).

pukumon.name: Pukumon
pukumon.description: A British punk Digimon born when the ultimate British hacker injected all of his knowledge into a computer virus, thereby causing it to mutate. Pukumon may be small, but its rebellious personality is second to none in the Digital World. It always picks fights, no matter how much stronger or weaker its potential opponent may be. Although Pukumon is the type to settle disputes with a slugfest, its special move Needle Squall acts as a trump card by launching all the super-hard thorns on its Chrondigizoid head at once.

specialSkills.name: Needle Squall
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Steel physical attack at power 30 x 2 hits. Increased damage to targets with Fish Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Aqua Pressure III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Ocean Wave III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Water magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Venom Trap
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Poison.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to DEF for 3 turn(s).

platinumnumemon.name: PlatinumNumemon
platinumnumemon.description: An extremely rare Numemon that first discovered the Platina Mine in the Digital World, taking in those components to Digivolve. From that point on, PlatinumNumemon's personality did a complete about-face as it scraped together any jewelry data it could find, decorating itself like a nouveau riche. It's quite the "gorgeous" Digimon, despite its nature. Outfitting itself with golden wings and jewelry grants it considerable defense, but its attack power is middling at best. PlatinumNumemon uses its special move Platinum Excrement to hurl the dregs(excretions) produced during the "platina" refinement process in rapid succession. It also uses Platinum Burp to release a putrid belch that saps the enemy's fighting spirit.

specialSkills.name: Platinum Excrement
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Deals 2% HP damage x 3 hits. 100% chance of 10% reduction to INT/SPI for 3 turns.

specialSkills.name: Platinum Burp
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 100% chance of 30% reduction to ATK/DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Full Metal Pile III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Steel magic attack at power 45. 85% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Reflect
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Reflect Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Thruster Metal III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel magic attack at power 11 x 7 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to ATK for 3 turn(s).

plutomon.name: Plutomon
plutomon.description: A Digimon that rules over the realm of the dead and uses fear and violence to terrorize evil. Plutomon, shrouded in deep shadow, stalks through the land in search of villains and criminals who deserve to be sent to the realm of the dead. Plutomon delights in chewing up evildoers with its mouths filled with rows of sharp fangs, and lets out a sinister chattering noise as it seeks out its prey. The combination of this and its fearsome appearance frightens even good Digimon. Plutomon's abilities all have the disquieting power to fling villains down to the realm of the dead. In one of those moves, Hell's Gate, a giant mouth appears from the darkness and swallows enemies whole, and their data is broken down into scraps. The Haggard Cluster move has the fangs of its chest release a darkness that absorbs and vaporizes any substance in its path. Plutomon shares the goal of punishing evil with Jupitermon of the Olympos XII. However, there's a longstanding animosity between the two because Jupitermon doesn't approve of Plutomon's cruel methods.

specialSkills.name: Hell's Gate
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 90. 100% chance of 20% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s). Increased damage to targets with Holy Trait.

specialSkills.name: Haggard Cluster
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark physical attack at power 55. 20% chance to apply Crystallization. Increased damage to targets with Evil Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Hell Crusher III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Are you afraid of me?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're amazing.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Too much flattery will be your ruin. Horror and violence ought to be feared properly.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Yeah, you're scary.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: If you lack sin or evil worthy of the underworld, you have nothing to fear from me.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm not afraid.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Of the underworld? I would not send a human like you to that realm in the first place.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm not scared, but you're a fearsome sight.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Though both human and Digimon would agree, an ally is an ally. You shall not be my prey.

breakdramon.name: Breakdramon
breakdramon.description: A massive Machine Dragon Digimon said to exist to destroy all things on the face of the earth. Whenever it Digivolves, Breakdramon successfully incorporates construction equipment design data into itself through hacking, obtaining power and abilities outclassing other Machine Digimon. However, its outstanding mechanical abilities come at the cost of reducing its organic parts to a practically negligible amount, robbing it of intention and emotion. As such, Breakdramon isn't afraid of damaging its own body, and is feared as the ultimate dragon of destruction that continues to wreck havoc until it crumbles to dust. Breakdramon's Destroyed Rush spins its left and right shovel arms at high speeds to rend the earth. Its Infinity Bowling activates all of the drills on its body, unleashing them in a volley capable of smashing even mountains. Gravity Crush flattens the target with Breakdramon's entire mass, crushing any and all things. Wherever Breakdramon goes, it leaves nothing in its devastating wake.

specialSkills.name: Destroyed Rush
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 30 x 3 hits. 15% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Mineral Trait.

specialSkills.name: Infinity Bowling
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 18 x 5 hits. If target's HP is 50% or higher: Increased damage. Increased damage to targets with Mineral Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Thunder Fall III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 15 x 3 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Nanomachine Break III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 19 x 4 hits. 95% ACU.

malomyotismon.name: MaloMyotismon
malomyotismon.description: An Evil King Digimon said to be the final form of Myotismon. Unlike VenomMyotismon—who pursued power in excess, becoming a bestial creature lacking intelligence—MaloMyotismon has retained its intellect, successfully surpassing VenomMyotismon in every aspect. With an atrocious and coldhearted personality, it will use any means at its disposal to satisfy its desires. The organic cannons on its shoulders are parasites known as "Sodom" and "Gomorrah." MaloMyotismon uses its special move Pandemonium Flame to launch super-high temperature beams from Sodom and Gomorrah.

specialSkills.name: Pandemonium Flame
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire magic attack at power 70. Increased damage to targets with Vegetation Trait.

specialSkills.name: Crimson Mist
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 85. 50% chance to apply Deadly Poison/ Injury. Increased damage to targets with Humanoid Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Nightmare III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Hell Crusher III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Texture Blow
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Crystallization.

beelstarmon.name: BeelStarmon
beelstarmon.description: Referred to as "Beelzemon Lady" due to its appearance, this Digimon brandishes twin pistols with flair. These beloved Rizoma de Loto guns are like little sisters to the Berenjena, Beelzemon's signature pistols. BeelStarmon opens up to anyone without hesitation—particularly gunslinger Digimon, with friends like MagnaKidmon even using the nickname "Beelko." Still, it's on bad terms with the solitary Beelzemon, keeping its distance despite recognizing the Evil King Digimon's abilities. BeelStarmon is clad in a jet-black leather suit, and wears a scarf that can transform into weapons, armor, wings or anything else the situation warrants. Its special move is Fly Bullet, which homes in on the enemy's vitals with shots from its Rizoma de Loto.

specialSkills.name: Fly Bullet
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 90. Always hits. 10% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Humanoid Trait.

specialSkills.name: Hurricane Screw Shot
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark physical attack at power 15 x 4 hits. 10% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Bird Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Burst Flame III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire magic attack at power 15 x 5 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Magma Fall III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A certain someone dares call me Beelzemon Lady." As if I'd ever partner with that fool!"

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Just be better than Beelzemon, then.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: True. I hate to admit it, but I AM the lesser-renowned of us. I must fight to change that!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Use the nickname to your advantage.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I never thought of that... Using the name could have its benefits. You're quite clever.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Your partner is standing right here.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You know... You're right! Yes... It's you who is my partner!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Nicknames don't matter. You are who you are.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hee hee. I had a feeling you'd say that!

beelzemon.name: Beelzemon
beelzemon.description: Beelzemon is an Evil King Digimon that prizes its independence, despite having the ability to rule over many Evil-species Digimon. One of the Seven Great Demon Lords, Beelzemon is said to be capable of becoming the foremost Nightmare Soldier should it so desire, but it's also rumored that there's another Evil King Digimon whose power surpasses even Beelzemon's. Beelzemon always keeps its beloved shotguns, the Berenjena, close at hand, and it rides around on its giant motorcycle machine Behemoth. It has a cruel and ruthless personality, but due to its pride, it never appears in groups or attacks the weak. Its signature move is Darkness Claw, with which it raises its sharp claws into the air and then slices through its foe. Its special move, Double Impact, involves firing twin blasts from its two shotguns.

specialSkills.name: Double Impact
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 24 x 5 hits. 70% ACU. 10% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Angel Trait.

specialSkills.name: Darkness Claw
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 90. 50% chance to apply Injury. Increased damage to targets with Holy Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Magma Fall III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Just leave me alone. I don't work well with others.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Aw, don't go. I'll miss you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I didn't say I was leaving. I'll be right here, so no need to be sad.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: But I wanna talk to you sometimes.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Fine, as long as you tell me something I don't already know.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wanna be friends.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm not saying I don't like you. I just don't want to team up with anyone.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wanna know all about you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're a weird human... But we don't need to team up for you to learn about me.

belphemon-sm.name: Belphemon SM
belphemon-sm.description: An Evil King Digimon said to be sealed in the deepest parts of the Dark Area. Because of its immense power, Belphemon's data was put into Sleep Mode by the Digital World's systems. Belphemon: Sleep Mode can't attack directly due to this deep slumber, yet its snores alone inflict damage, making this Digimon difficult to attack. Its special moves are Eternal Nightmare, which unleashes attacks through peaceful snoring, and Lampranthus, which shoots black flame from the chains coiled around its body. Eternal Nightmare is recommended for those suffering from insomnia, as everlasting slumber is practically guaranteed.

specialSkills.name: Eternal Nightmare
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Null magic attack at power 55. 30% chance to apply Deep Slumber. Increased damage to targets with Immortal Trait.

specialSkills.name: Lampranthus
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark magic attack at power 55. 100% chance of 10% reduction to SPD for 3 turn(s). Increased damage to targets with Unknown Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Frozen Bullet III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Status Barrier
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Stat Debuff Immunity.

attachmentSkills.name: Curse Barrier
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Status Abnormality Immunity.

attachmentSkills.name: Hell Crusher III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Zzz... *snore*

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Wow, talk about loud snoring!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hey...! Be quiet or you'll be in for it... Zzz...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Probably a grumpy riser, so I'll leave it be.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Wha—?! ...Oh. Guess it's not time to wake up yet... Zzz...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It's sleeping so peacefully. I'll be quiet.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Zzz... Zzz... *mumble*

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'll plug its nose to stop the snoring.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: *snort* Huh? *snort* Huh?! Zzz...

magnakidmon.name: MagnaKidmon
magnakidmon.description: A Dragon Man Digimon fortified with firearm contraptions all over its body. A wanderer traveling the Digital World in search of its scattered comrades, MagnaKidmon is a troublemaker that causes problems and gets caught up in incidents wherever it ends up. Its self-centered personality often makes it single-minded, but its sense of friendship and obligation runs deep. MagnaKidmon befriends any local Deputymon it comes upon, mistaking them for its brethren. This trigger-happy creature loves one-on-one combat, firing bullets indiscriminately once challenged to a duel. One of MagnaKidmon's special moves is Bind Red Trigger, which stabs the small machine guns attached to its hip-mounted magazines into the opponent, destroying it from within. Its ultimate special move is Happy Bullet Showering, which sends MagnaKidmon high into the skies with its winglike scarf to target the opponent with folded arms, pounding away at it with a mix of live ammo and plasma projectiles from its fingertips and gun muzzles on both legs.

specialSkills.name: Happy Bullet Showering
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 30 x 3 hits. If target's HP is 50% or less: Increased damage. Increased damage to targets with Weapon Trait.

specialSkills.name: Bind Red Trigger
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind physical attack at power 23 x 4 hits. Nullifies unfavorable compatibility. Increased damage to targets with Weapon Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Full Metal Pile III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Steel magic attack at power 45. 85% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Magma Fall III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

minervamon.name: Minervamon
minervamon.description: A Deity Digimon and member of the Olympos XII that resembles a young girl. Despite Minervamon's decidedly small frame, this incredibly strong Digimon is capable of wielding a greatsword the size of its own body. Although this Digimon is as innocent and cheerful as a young girl, its moods can fluctuate wildly. When it's in a bad mood, its behavior quickly turns upset and selfish (that is, "problematic") in a way that's out of control. Minervamon uses its special move Strike Roll to unleash a forward rolling slash from its greatsword Olympia, and Madness Merry-Go-Round to perform a horizontal spinning slash faster than the eye can see. Strike Roll can split the earth, while Madness Merry-Go-Round generates a massive tornado.

specialSkills.name: Strike Roll
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 95. Increased damage to targets with Dinosaur Trait.

specialSkills.name: Madness Merry-Go-Round
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Wind physical attack at power 20 x 4 hits. Increased damage to targets with Deity Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Awesome Quake III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Earth magic attack at power 55. 85% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Wind Claw III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to SPD for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Spending time with a human isn't too shabby.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You may think so for now.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: My, is that right? Well, if you have another side to show me, hurry up and do it already.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It doesn't tire you out?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Not at all! I enjoy learning about your daily routine. Here's to learning even more!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Aren't you just saying that to be polite?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're the one being standoffish and overly polite. Let's just be real with each other.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let's stay together forever.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I intend to do just that, of course. I can't imagine myself away from you at this point.

millenniummon.name: Millenniummon
millenniummon.description: Millenniummon is the ultimate Composite Digimon, formed when Machinedramon and its overwhelming strength fused with Kimeramon and its data from various powerful Digimon. It's said to be unbeatable, but if only the reason for the fusion of this Digimon could be determined, it might serve as a clue regarding how to defeat it. Its special move, Time Unlimited, compresses time to create a pocket dimension in which it traps its foes for all eternity.

specialSkills.name: Time Unlimited
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 100. 50% chance to apply Crystallization. Increased damage to targets with Magic Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Thunder Fall III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 15 x 3 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Nanomachine Break III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 19 x 4 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Nightmare III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

machinedramon.name: Machinedramon
machinedramon.description: The strongest Digimon in the Digital World, with a one-hundred percent metal body. Since Machinedramon consists of a combination of parts from countless cyborg Digimon, all of the cyborg Digimon produced so far are thought to have been merely prototypes for the completion of Machinedramon. Machinedramon is strong enough to overwhelm other Digimon, and boasts incredible processing power, but as a pure Machine Digimon it lacks a will of its own. Instead, someone has implanted a program loaded with malicious intentions into its DigiCore. This malevolent DigiCore provides Machinedramon with unlimited power. Its special move Infinity Cannon fires super-dreadnought class energy blasts from both cannons.

specialSkills.name: Infinity Cannon
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 48 x 2 hits. Increased damage to targets with Machine Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Nanomachine Break III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 19 x 4 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Mental Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPI for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: DO YOU WANT TO SEE AN EXAMPLE OF UNLIMITED STRENGTH?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Sure! I wanna see unlimited strength.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: THEN LOOK IN FRONT OF YOU. I AM THAT EXAMPLE.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Is it you? What makes you so strong?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I HAVE THE STRONGEST PARTS, DIGICORE AND PROGRAMMING. THEY GRANT ME INFINITE POWER.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wanna see limitless friendship.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: IF YOU ACCEPT ME, I WILL ALWAYS OFFER YOU MY UNWAVERING SUPPORT.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wanna see never-ending love.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: IF YOU ASK IT OF ME, I SHALL PROVIDE IT FOREVERMORE.

megidramon.name: Megidramon
megidramon.description: The most atrocious and evil of Dragon Digimon. Counted among the Four Great Dragons along with Azulongmon, Goldramon and Magnadramon, Megidramon's fiendish nature trumps even that of its three brethren. It's rarely encountered, to the point that its existence itself is in question. Megidramon is considered a Digital Hazard, but its power is being sealed by some unknown force. They say that awakening that power would cause the Digital World's greatest crisis. Its body is composed of Chrondigizoid. One theory states that Megidramon and ChaosGallantmon were once the same entity, and whether it appears as a dark knight or a dark dragon depends on how you observe this virtual wave of terror. Its signature move Hell Howling unleashes a powerful shockwave, while its special move Megiddo Flame turns all things to ash.

specialSkills.name: Megiddo Flame
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire physical attack at power 55. If target is KO'd: 100% chance of 20% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s). Increased damage to targets with Immortal Trait.

specialSkills.name: Hell Howling
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 80. 70% chance of 20% reduction to INT. 70% chance to apply Crystallization. Increased damage to targets with Unknown Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Void Ray III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Null magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU. 10% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 15 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Preaching the virtues of goodness to me would just be wasted effort.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Even so, I'm still gonna advocate for it.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It would amount to nothing, but you do say funny things. I applaud your pluck, at least.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: There must be good in you somewhere.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I don't know what you're misunderstanding. Never underestimate the power of darkness.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I agree wholeheartedly.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: So, you get it, do you? Sensible human.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I feel sorry for you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Your attempt to grab my attention is pointless. You're the pitiable one.

metaletemon.name: MetalEtemon
metaletemon.description: There once was a supremely strong Digimon referred to as the "King of Digimon." It sought out strong opponents, embarking on a journey of brutal encounters. Although it obtained valuable combat data, the constant battles left it with severe physical damage. It then researched its own weaknesses from the data it gained in battle, completely coated the surface of its body with Chrondigizoid metal—a substance used by metal Digimon—and was able to reinvent itself as the ultimate battle machine, MetalEtemon. Despite having maximized its combat abilities, though, it still uses a petty special move, Banana Slip, to trip up its opponent. An invincible fighter that uses both high-level combat techniques and dirty tricks has been born.

specialSkills.name: Banana Slip
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 100% chance of 30% reduction to SPD for 3 turns. 60% chance to apply Immobilized next turn.

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 15 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Bind
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 100% chance of 20% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Character Reversal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy or ally] 100% chance to apply Reverse.

attachmentSkills.name: Panic Wisp
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Confusion.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What word would ya say captures the essence of yours truly?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Sneaky...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: E-Excuse me?! Still, you ain't wrong. If anything, that's the best compliment ever!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Ultimate.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm a Mega, ya know. Get yer facts straight!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Invincible?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Man, you get it! Maybe I oughta jot that across my chest instead?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Strongest!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You just looking at my chest, or what? Still, you ain't wrong. Take a nice, long gander!

merukimon.name: Merukimon
merukimon.description: One of the Olympos XII, this Digimon is a genius god boasting the greatest speed in the Digital World. Merukimon's unrivaled speed cannot be seen with the naked eye, and so any recordings of it are said to be of its afterimages. It hates staying still and is always wandering the Digital World, making it a difficult creature to encounter. It uses its special move Thousand Fists to approach the enemy at an almost instantaneous speed before unleashing an incredible rapid-fire barrage. Merukimon is also an accomplished shaman, allowing it to use Spiritual Enchantment, cleaving the air with its beloved blade Aztec and summoning demons from another dimension.

specialSkills.name: Thousand Fists
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind physical attack at power 12 x 8 hits. If user is boost to SPD state: 10% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Bird Trait.

specialSkills.name: Spiritual Enchantment
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 80. 100% chance of 20% reduction to DEF for 3 turns. 50% chance to apply Injury. Increased damage to targets with Unknown Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Gale Storm III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Wind magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Comet Hammer III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 14 x 6 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I am not suited for a throne.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Then hand it over!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That is hardly something for a human to jest about. Foolhardy, indeed.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That's not true.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It may appear that way to you, but the vagabond life suits me. It has much to offer.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You were made for it.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Even if that were true, I am your ally now. I have no time to attend to a throne.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hand it to someone else, then?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Sure, if I meet someone worthy of it. Perhaps they will cross our path on this journey.

junomon.name: Junomon
junomon.description: Jupitermon's partner, and one of the Olympos XII. Junomon takes its place on the battlefield as Jupitermon's loving protector, and is constantly seeking to predict, detect and root out insurgents who would defy Jupitermon's will. It has a solid grasp on all of Jupitermon's tendencies, perhaps due to its overwhelmingly affectionate nature and deep love of Jupitermon. Junomon's special moves are Needle Hive, which skewers foes with the katars on its arms, and Graceful Lance, which automatically attacks foes around it with its sentient lances.

specialSkills.name: Needle Hive
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 30 x 3 hits. 100% chance to apply Deadly Poison. Increased damage to targets with Pixie Trait.

specialSkills.name: Graceful Lance
specialSkills.description: [Target: User] Activates Counter Physical. Upon receiving a physical attack, counters against all enemies with a Dark physical attack at power 105. Increased damage to targets with Unknown Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Saint Knuckle III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 38 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Hell Crusher III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Shine Burst III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Am I... the jealous type?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Not at all. You're compassionate and kind.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I am honored you think so highly of me. I shall have to keep my jealousy in check...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Of course not.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It is a relief to hear that. Still, I wonder what your basis for saying that is...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Don't worry about it.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That response only worries me more. Still, I appreciate your kindness.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're a green-eyed monster.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I see... I shall be careful not to get too attached to you.

junomon-hm.name: Junomon HM
junomon-hm.description: Another form awakened from the depths of Junomon's heart, one that is evil. Unceasing opposition to its beloved Jupitermon steals away the time the two of them spend together, causing Junomon to be consumed by envy. As the vitality gradually leaves its countenance, it's completely consumed by darkness instead. Eventually, Junomon reveals a new, masked face. Through this mask, Junomon perceives all Digimon around it to be evil and does everything it can to slaughter them. However, Jupitermon can't sense this form of Junomon, so it never has to face Jupitermon's judgment. Junomon: Hysteric Mode's special moves include Welcome Demise, with which it successively stabs the enemy with the lances of both arms, and Chain Lash, with which it wraps its enemy's entire body in chains and destroys it after forcing it to confess its sins.

specialSkills.name: Welcome Demise
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 18 x 6 hits. Increased damage to targets with Angel Trait.

specialSkills.name: Chain Lash
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 100. If target is affected by stat changes: Increased damage. Increased damage to targets with Humanoid Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Saint Knuckle III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 38 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Hell Crusher III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Shine Burst III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

rusttyrannomon.name: RustTyrannomon
rusttyrannomon.description: The Mega form of Tyrannomon, having Digivolved by fighting a string of intense battles from the time of the Digital World's creation. After surviving many long years in a harsh environment as MetalTyrannomon, RustTyrannomon's cyborg body has turned red with rust. In battle, it specializes in rapidly overwhelming enemy forces, and is capable of leveling an enemy base by itself. RustTyrannomon is a natural predator that hunts other Digimon, capable of consuming hundreds if not thousands of them in a short span of time. Its special moves are Terrors Cluster, with which it lowers the cannon on its back to fire a huge electromagnetic blast, and Rust Breath, which belches a streaming flame the same deep-crimson color as its body. Rust Breath also causes anything it touches to corrode. When it comes to hand-to-hand combat, RustTyrannomon overwhelms its opponents with some of the highest raw power and destructive capabilities of all Android Digimon.

specialSkills.name: Terrors Cluster
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 90. 25% chance to apply Immobilization. Increased damage to targets with Antibody Trait.

specialSkills.name: Rust Breath
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 30% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Magma Fall III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Void Ray III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Null magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU. 10% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 15 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I've obtained the ultimate power... but it's not enough. Can you tell what's missing?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The courage to retreat.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: ...I can respect that. Retreat requires the utmost courage, yet is sometimes necessary.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Knowledge of the opponent you face.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: So knowledge can trump even overwhelming power? Then that would make me invincible!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Friends you can trust.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hmm... Friends push each other to greater heights? Good. Become my friend, then.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Love for those you wanna protect.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Having someone to protect makes you stronger? Then I'll protect you on the road ahead.

leviamon.name: Leviamon
leviamon.description: Fear of the excessive power in Leviamon's possession has earned it the moniker of "Devil Beast," and it's counted among the Seven Great Demon Lords. A grand creature with a maw large enough to swallow the entire Digital World, it's said to sleep in the Net Ocean near the Dark Area. If awoken, Leviamon looks down on any Digimon in positions of might, causing not only other Evil King Digimon to flee in terror, but even Angel Digimon as well. There are limits to what can be determined about this Digimon, however, and it almost never appears. It's considered a primordially evil existence that has taken up residence in the Digital World. It can use its special move Biting Crush to destroy everything in its path with its massive jaws, or Tail Strike to pulverize enemies with its long tail.

specialSkills.name: Biting Crush
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Water physical attack at power 120. 80% ACU. Increased damage to targets with Ancient Trait.

specialSkills.name: Tail Strike
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Water physical attack at power 55. If target is affected by reduction to DEF: 20% chance to apply Instant Death. Increased damage to targets with Unknown Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Icicle Edge III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice physical attack at power 37 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Ocean Wave III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Water magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Lethal Blizzard III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Ice magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You should envy my strength.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
