postEvolutionDialogue.text: Oh, I'm green with envy.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Kekeke... Good answer. Wallow in that envy! Until the day I devour the Digital World...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Are you strong enough to warrant envy?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Kekeke... Such dreadful ignorance. You'll understand everything the day I consume you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: There's no point. You're just too strong.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Kekeke... That works for me. Let's see if you end up fawning over me or worshipping me.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Far from it. I think it's great!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Kekeke... If you can't beat them, join them, right? I'll pull you into the fold, then.

lilithmon.name: Lilithmon
lilithmon.description: One of the Seven Great Demon Lords, this Evil King Digimon takes the form of a woman. Believed to have at one time been an Ophanimon, Lilithmon fell from grace and became what's known as the "Goddess of Darkness." Beguiling and beautiful, it seduces its foes, with certain death said to await all who accept its invitation. In keeping with its "Goddess of Darkness" moniker, Lilithmon rewards vice with generosity and virtue with cruel indignities. The fiendish "Nazar Nails" on its right hand corrode anything they touch. Lilithmon's special move is Phantom Pain, a dark breath attack that eats away at foes' bodies. Those afflicted by this curse find their data eroding, starting with their extremities, and they suffer painfully even after their inevitable demise.

specialSkills.name: Phantom Pain
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark magic attack at power 55. 100% chance to apply Deadly Poison/ Injury. Increased damage to targets with Deity Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Mental Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to SPI for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Frozen Bullet III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Nightmare III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Restore
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes status abnormalities, Injury, & Disease.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Are you willing to fall from grace with me?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'd like to give it a shot.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You understand what it means to fall with me, don't you? Be sure you're prepared.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Oh, I'm already there.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: ...I'm not sure what that means, but perhaps you should re-examine yourself a bit more?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let's aspire to greater things, together.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: If you mean to reach greater heights through nefarious means, then I'm here for it.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Don't misjudge me, now.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hohoho! I love it when humans put up a brave front like that.

lordknightmon.name: LordKnightmon
lordknightmon.description: A Holy Knight Digimon, a member of the Royal Knights, and a king that rules over all Knightmon. More than the concepts of good and evil, LordKnightmon is loyal to its own concept of justice, which it will achieve by any means necessary. It finds value in anything that leads to lasting peace, even if that means ruling through strength. LordKnightmon executes its duties with ruthless efficiency, yet shows compassion to the weak. It uses its special move Spiral Masquerade to slash its enemies with the four blades growing from its armor, or Fist of Athena to instantly draw close to the enemy before shooting a shockwave from the Pile Bunker on its right arm.

specialSkills.name: Spiral Masquerade
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 13 x 7 hits. 10% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Mollusk Trait.

specialSkills.name: Fist of Athena
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 90. Nullifies unfavorable compatibility. Increased damage to targets with Weapon Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Hell Crusher III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 15 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Magma Fall III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I have my own system of justice. And I refuse to engage in debate about it.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That doesn't seem right.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What did I just say? Still, I suppose you're free to have whatever opinion you like.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Your way of thinking is wrong.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What did I just say? Say whatever you want. Your opinions are all just nonsense to me.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're right to think that way.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I don't remember asking your opinion. Still, at least you're not trying to argue.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I guess that's one way to think of things.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: And what other way is there? I don't condone insolence, but I admit I care what you think.

imperialdramon-dm.name: Imperialdramon DM
imperialdramon-dm.description: A Mega Ancient Dragon Digimon that has existed since ancient times. It's clearly distinguishable from other Digimon. Imperialdramon is called "Dragon Mode" in this form, but it also has a humanoid "Fighter Mode" that unleashes its full power. The latter form, however, has yet to be seen. Imperialdramon: Dragon Mode's awesome strength is extremely difficult to control, and has the potential to either save or end the world. It uses its special move Mega Death to fire high-density dark matter that swallows everything into dark space. This fearsome move completely wipes out everything within a several hundred meter radius from the point of impact.

specialSkills.name: Mega Death
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark magic attack at power 80. Increased damage to targets with Ancient Trait.

specialSkills.name: Positron Laser
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 95. Increased damage to targets with Unknown Trait.

specialSkills.name: Positron Laser
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 95. Increased damage to targets with Unknown Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to INT for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Character Reversal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy or ally] 100% chance to apply Reverse.

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

imperialdramon-fm.name: Imperialdramon FM
imperialdramon-fm.description: This Fighter Mode form is the result of the Ancient Dragon Digimon Imperialdramon: Dragon Mode unleashing all its power and transforming into a legendary dragon warrior. By changing from its unwieldy Dragon Mode to this humanoid form, it became a Mega Digimon with high intelligence. Its attacks are said to hold the power to destroy planets. Imperialdramon: Fighter Mode's special move Positron Laser fires the weapon equipped to its right arm. Rumor has it that a separate, more powerful mode can be achieved when it awakens to perfect justice.

specialSkills.name: Positron Laser
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 95. Increased damage to targets with Unknown Trait.

specialSkills.name: Giga Death
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light physical attack at power 80. Increased damage to targets with Unknown Trait.

specialSkills.name: Positron Laser
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 95. Increased damage to targets with Unknown Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to INT for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Character Reversal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy or ally] 100% chance to apply Reverse.

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Sometimes I think I'm so strong, it's scary. Is it all right for me to have such power?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I want you to have that power.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You trust I won't do anything dumb with it? I'll use it with a valiant heart, then.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Power is all about how you use it.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You mean the right way to wield it? I'll take a page out of my ancestors' book, then.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Your friends will always keep you in check.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're right. I'm not alone. Well, if I ever lose myself... I'll be counting on you, then.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'll always be by your side.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: All right, then. If you're with me, I know I'll keep using this power for good.

vikemon.name: Vikemon
vikemon.description: A Mega Beast Man Digimon that rules over the chill arctic regions of everlasting permafrost. Vikemon's fur resembles ice crystals, and is said to be as hard as Chrondigizoid. The morning star Mjölnir that Vikemon carries on its back can shatter mountains in a single blow, distorting the atmosphere itself. It leads an army of Ikkakumon and Zudomon, and fights with all the ferocity of a demon in battle, although it's also thoughtful and compassionate to its subordinates. Vikemon uses its special move Arctic Blizzard to freeze its foes by lowering the temperature of the surrounding atmosphere to absolute zero, then shattering them with Mjölnir.

specialSkills.name: Arctic Blizzard
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Ice physical attack at power 60. Increased damage to targets with Steel Trait.

specialSkills.name: Viking Axe
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 95. Increased damage to targets with Mollusk Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Full Metal Pile III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Steel magic attack at power 45. 85% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Curse Barrier
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Status Abnormality Immunity.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I just can't abide this heat.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I don't think it's hot.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Fie! Get too used to this heat, and you'll be frozen solid when the weather turns cold!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'd say it's cold, if anything.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Ya think so? Ya shouldn't come to the permafrost, then. Maybe that's for the best.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Why not take off some of those clothes?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Would if I could... But since we're friends now, I'll just try and get used to this heat.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Your fur sure looks nice and toasty.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: More like nice and cold. It's like ice crystals! Want me to cool ya off?

valkyrimon.name: Valkyrimon
valkyrimon.description: A Warrior Digimon also appearing in Norse mythology. Valkyrimon travels with the golden bird Freyja, which alerts it when danger draws near. According to legend, Valkyrimon can manifest a special aura from its shining armor. This aura regenerates the data of brave warriors that fell in battle, allowing them to be reborn as Digi-Eggs. Valkyrimon also moves with incredible speed, and is capable of appearing out of nowhere like a sudden gale and cutting down foes faster than the eye can see. Its special moves include Fenrir Sword, with which it freezes foes by slashing them with its magic sword of absolute zero, which can bring all of the victim's vital functions to a halt, and Aurvandil's Arrow, with which it fires an arrow with unerring accuracy.

specialSkills.name: Fenrir Sword
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice physical attack at power 90. 25% chance to apply Injury. Increased damage to targets with Deity Trait.

specialSkills.name: Aurvandil's Arrow
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 90. Always hits. Increased damage to targets with Bird Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Sonic Shot III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Gale Storm III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Wind magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Restore
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes status abnormalities, Injury, & Disease.

grankuwagamon.name: GranKuwagamon
grankuwagamon.description: The supreme form of the Kuwagamon species. Particularly evil even for an Insectoid Digimon, an encounter with GranKuwagamon in the Digital World spells doom. Since it normally lives deep within the forest and is only active at night, it's also known as the "Demon of the Deep Forest." It's HerculesKabuterimon's greatest rival, and the two are locked in an interminable struggle. GranKuwagamon's special move is Dimension Scissor, which cuts through everything around it, including space itself.

specialSkills.name: Dimension Scissor
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant physical attack at power 100. Increased damage to targets with Insectoid Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Hell Crusher III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

diaboromon.name: Diaboromon
diaboromon.description: Diaboromon absorbs any and all data on the Net so that it can repeatedly Digivolve and grow larger, thereby draining the Digital World and bringing it to the brink of destruction. Having absorbed a vast quantity of knowledge and data, Diaboromon sees itself as omniscient and omnipotent, and revels in carnage and slaughter. Out of the many Digimon in existence, it's one of the few with a definite purpose. Its ultimate goal is to hijack a military computer so that it can launch a nuclear strike and destroy the real world, making it a terrifying Digimon. Its special move is Catastrophe Cannon, with which it fires a destructive energy bomb from the cannon in its chest.

specialSkills.name: Catastrophe Cannon
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 35 x 3 hits. The lower the user's HP, the lower the damage. Increased damage to targets with Unknown Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Hell Crusher III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

rapidmon-armor.name: Rapidmon (Armor)
rapidmon-armor.description: A Holy Knight Digimon that has Armor-Digivolved from Terriermon with the Digi-Egg of Destiny. Rapidmon was originally an Ultimate Digimon that Digivolved from Gargomon, but the Digi-Egg of Destiny has channeled a shining golden power into it on par with a Mega Digimon. It uses its special move Golden Triangle, which equals in power to Magnamon's move.

specialSkills.name: Golden Triangle
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 85. 50% chance to apply Injury. Increased damage to targets with Machine Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Saint Knuckle II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 30 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Revive
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Revives from KO and moderately recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: Shine Burst II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Aura
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] Slightly recovers HP.

magnamon.name: Magnamon
magnamon.description: An Armor Holy Knight Digimon that has Digivolved with the Digi-Egg of Miracles. The Digi-Egg of Miracles has the element of metal and is made of the super-metal Chrondigizoid, allowing those who gain its power to overcome any crisis. Magnamon has immense defense capability and attack power that's at least on the level of a Mega Digimon, and is also a member of the Royal Knights. It uses its special move Plasma Shot to fire a ball of pure plasma, and Shining Gold Solar Storm to explode condensed air into a golden laser beam that sweeps away surrounding foes.

specialSkills.name: Shining Gold Solar Storm
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 55. Recovers user's HP by 20%. Increased damage to targets with Evil Trait.

specialSkills.name: Plasma Shot
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 45 x 2 hits. 25% chance to apply Immobilization. Increased damage to targets with Machine Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to INT for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Wind Claw III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Reset Body
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Removes stat buffs.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Do you believe in miracles?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I sure do!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: If there is any difficulty you wish to overcome, trust in me to see you through.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I mean, I'd like to...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I sense hesitation within you. Stick with me, and one day you shall believe.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Not a chance.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The power of miracles is real. You must never give up, no matter how hard the situation.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I believe in you, Magnamon.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That is good to hear. To believe in me is to believe in the power of miracles.

emperorgreymon.name: EmperorGreymon
emperorgreymon.description: A transcendent Digimon with power over flame, said to even surpass the might of the Ten Legendary Warriors. The power of the nine dragon veins flowing through Gaia resides in EmperorGreymon's body. It has been prophesied that if it can harness that power, it will demonstrate unfathomable ability and rule over Gaia. It wields the Ryuugonken, a sword with the souls of dragons sealed within, in order to control this power. Its special moves include Firedrake Strike, with which it unleashes white-hot, blazing arrows from the Ryuugonken, and Pyro Dragons, with which it releases the power of eight of the dragon veins of Gaia, taking the place of the ninth dragon itself and crushing foes with its huge sword.

specialSkills.name: Firedrake Strike
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 90. Increased damage to targets with Dragon Trait.

specialSkills.name: Pyro Dragons
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 85. 100% chance of reduction to Earth resistance. Increased damage to targets with Dragon Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Magma Fall III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Saint Knuckle III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 38 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I shall rule over Gaia!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Is that even possible?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You'll know once I've put my strength on display. I'll show you everything I've got!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: How would you even do it?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I have the might of the nine dragon veins. See for yourself what that power amounts to!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You can do it!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: But of course! Watch me add the power of eight dragon veins to my own might!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'd like to help.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I appreciate it, but I have the nine dragon veins on my side. That's more than enough!

magnagarurumon.name: MagnaGarurumon
magnagarurumon.description: A transcendent Digimon with power over light, said to even surpass the might of the Ten Legendary Warriors. Specializing in super fast movement, MagnaGarurumon is able to fly at near-lightspeed with its flight unit equipped. The Laser Sights on its chest rotate in-flight, locking on to air and ground targets from high in the sky for an all-out attack. It's all but impossible to escape from MagnaGarurumon. It uses its special move Machinegun Destroyer to unleash its arsenal onto locked targets before violently destroying the main target at high speed.

specialSkills.name: Machinegun Destroyer
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Steel physical attack at power 25 x 3 hits. 10% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Machine Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Shine Burst III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 15 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'll show you what the speed of light truly looks like.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'd love to see that!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'd be surprised if you could even see my afterimage. I shoot up to high altitude fast.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You move at light speed?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Actually, I fly at subluminal speed. Not much different, in the grand scheme of things.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I bet watching would make me queasy.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Staring at flickering light is bad for human eyes. No need to push yourself like that.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I bet it's really bright.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: When battle begins, a dazzling flash darts across the sky. That lets you know I'm here.

magnagarurumon-detached.name: MagnaGarurumon (Detached)
magnagarurumon-detached.description: A transcendent Digimon with power over light, said to even surpass the might of the Ten Legendary Warriors. Its special move is Starlight Velocity, with which it accelerates to superluminal speed, erasing anything that comes into contact with its light.

specialSkills.name: Starlight Velocity
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 85. 100% chance of 20% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s). Increased damage to targets with Ancient Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Shine Burst III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 15 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

alphamon-ouryuken.name: Alphamon: Ouryuken
alphamon-ouryuken.description: Alphamon: Ouryuken is the form Alphamon took on after it miraculously Digivolved Ouryumon into a sword known as the "Blade of the Dragon King" using a magic circle of DigiCode. Alphamon: Ouryumon is the Mega form of the Prototype Digimon that were used in an experiment to reach greater heights of power. Having been transformed into a sword, all of its combat ability is now channeled exclusively into offensive power. To swing the Blade of the Dragon King is to wield all the power of a Mega Digimon. The average Digimon would no more be able to use it than to survive an attack from it.

specialSkills.name: Ultimate Ouryuken
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 110. Increased damage to targets with Dragon Trait.

specialSkills.name: Soul Digitalization
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Null magic attack at power 60. If target has yet to act: 25% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Unknown Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Shock Plasma III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 25 x 3 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Thruster Metal III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel magic attack at power 11 x 7 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Restore
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes status abnormalities, Injury, & Disease.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Now that I am a sword, the entirety of my combat ability is devoted solely to offense!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: How did you end up like that?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A miraculous Digivolution only possible through Alphamon's magic circle of DigiCode.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Are you Alphamon?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I am not Alphamon, but formerly Ouryumon. Through Digivolution, I am now Alphamon's blade.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Can I wield you?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Only Alphamon may wield me. It is impossible for any other Digimon, much less a human.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Sorry you got turned into a sword.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It is nothing to be sorry about. This form is the greatest honor for a Prototype Digimon.

craniamon-plus-enbarrmon.name: Craniamon + Enbarrmon
craniamon-plus-enbarrmon.description: Sometimes, a select number of Royal Knights recruit local Digimon from where they are dispatched to in order to receive assistance completing their assigned mission. The methods they use to recruit these allies tend to vary by mission, but Craniamon challenges those Digimon it deems worthy to single combat and then forces them to submit. Craniamon acquired this mounted form during a mission after defeating Enbarrmon. It is believed that Craniamon, ever the perfectionist, wished to utilize Enbarrmon as a steed in order to complete its missions more efficiently. Despite many fierce battles between them, their mutual recognition of each other's strength has created a strong sense of trust, resulting in remarkable mobility and attack power. Their special move Ruthless Charge features Enbarrmon galloping at full speed while Craniamon performs a thrusting attack with its magic lance Claíomh Solais. Given the speed of Enbarrmon's charge and their combined mass, together with Craniamon's brute strength, most Digimon caught in their path are scattered like leaves. Additionally, the blessing of undying protection that Enbarrmon grants its riders also applies to Craniamon's shield, Avalon, allowing it to use Breath of the Gods without the usual three-second limitation, meaning it can nullify attacks indefinitely.

specialSkills.name: Ruthless Charge
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null magic attack at power 90. 100% chance of 10% reduction to ATK for 3 turn(s). Increased damage to targets with Dragon Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Hate Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Taunting.

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 15 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Mental Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPI for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to DEF for 3 turn(s).

imperialdramon-pm.name: Imperialdramon PM
imperialdramon-pm.description: The Dragon Warrior Digimon, Imperialdramon: Fighter Mode, powered up into this legendary Holy Knight (Paladin Mode) by obtaining the power of the Holy Knight Omnimon. This is the final, strongest form of Imperialdramon, foretold of since ancient times, that descended upon the Ancient Digital World during a great calamity in order to save it from complete destruction. All details of that time are shrouded in mystery. Continued research into Digimon and the Digital World should eventually shed light on the subject. Imperialdramon: Paladin Mode uses its special move Omni Blade to cleave the enemy in two with its ultimate sword, resetting and neutralizing its component data.

specialSkills.name: Omni Blade
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 100. If target is affected by stat changes: Increased damage. Increased damage to targets with Unknown Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to INT for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Character Reversal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy or ally] 100% chance to apply Reverse.

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

omnimon.name: Omnimon
omnimon.description: A Holy Knight Digimon and member of the Royal Knights, Omnimon was fused from the Virus Busters WarGreymon and MetalGarurumon through the will of those who wish for good. Omnimon is able to draw on the qualities of both Digimon to the fullest extent under any circumstance, making it a capable and versatile fighter. Its left arm is in the shape of WarGreymon, with a sword and shield, and its right hand takes the shape of MetalGarurumon, equipped with a cannon and missiles. The cloak on its back deploys automatically when it needs to avoid enemy attacks or to fly. Omnimon's special move is Supreme Cannon, fired from the MetalGarurumon-shaped cannon on its right arm. Omnimon's left arm is equipped with the invincible blade Transcendent Sword.

specialSkills.name: Transcendent Sword
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire physical attack at power 80. Increased damage to targets with Dragon Trait.

specialSkills.name: Supreme Cannon
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice physical attack at power 100. Increased damage to targets with Fire Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Spell Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Magic.

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to INT for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Restore
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes status abnormalities, Injury, & Disease.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Combat is a cruel, painful thing.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let's fight together.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Seems your resolve is steeled. Now that we are comrades, our hearts and minds are one.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: We should avoid it.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The battle to purge evil is unavoidable, but I would be happy to hear any plan you have.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Trust me. I know.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You, too, have seen your fair share of carnage. I would like to hear your stories someday.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It isn't cruel or painful.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I suggest you drop the bluster. Instead, allow me to support the needs of your heart.

omnimon-zwart.name: Omnimon Zwart
omnimon-zwart.description: A Holy Knight Digimon and member of the Royal Knights, Omnimon was fused from WarGreymon and MetalGarurumon by the will of those who wish for good. Omnimon is able to draw on the qualities of both Digimon to the fullest extent under any circumstances, making it a capable and versatile fighter. Its left arm is in the shape of WarGreymon, with a sword and shield, and its right hand takes the shape of MetalGarurumon, equipped with a cannon and missiles. The cloak on its back deploys automatically when it needs to avoid enemy attacks or to fly. Its special move is Supreme Cannon, by which it fires a blast of air at absolute zero from its MetalGarurumon-shaped cannon to freeze its opponent. Omnimon's left arm is also equipped with the invincible blade, Transcendent Sword.

specialSkills.name: Transcendent Sword
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark physical attack at power 80. Increased damage to targets with Dragon Trait.

specialSkills.name: Supreme Cannon
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice physical attack at power 100. Increased damage to targets with Beast Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Burst Flame III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire magic attack at power 15 x 5 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Frozen Bullet III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Nightmare III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

chaosmon.name: Chaosmon
chaosmon.description: Chaosmon is believed to have been born from the DNA Digivolution of BanchoLeomon and Darkdramon, as traces of each can be seen on its arms. Its special moves are Bancho Blade, which unleashes an unstoppable strike from the sword "Bancho Blade" on its Bancho Arm, and Dark Prominence, which fires its own digital cells from the Gigastick Cannon on its Darkdra Arm.

specialSkills.name: Bancho Blade
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light physical attack at power 60. The lower the user's HP, the greater the damage. Increased damage to targets with Demon Trait.

specialSkills.name: Dark Prominence
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 90. 30% chance to apply Crystallization. Increased damage to targets with Unknown Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Comet Hammer III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 14 x 6 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Nanomachine Break III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 19 x 4 hits. 95% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: There must be some fun, even for one as short-lived as me. Any suggestions?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Adventure to unknown worlds.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Just the word adventure" gets me excited. Adventuring right to the end might be nice."

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Read tons of books.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Yes, I can learn about many times and places, all from here. Reading is like a journey.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let's play a card game!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Heh. A game that can't be played alone, huh? If you play with me, I'm willing to try.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let's just keep on chatting together.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hmm... If my time is limited, it might be fun to spend it all with you.

chaosmon-valdur-arm.name: Chaosmon: Valdur Arm
chaosmon-valdur-arm.description: "Chaosmon" is the codename used for Digimon that shouldn't exist—bugs in the Digital World's Central Dogma that should be absolutely impossible. Chaosmon: Valdur Arm is believed to have been born from the DNA Digivolution of BanchoLeomon and Varodurumon, as traces of each can be seen on its arms. Its special moves are Bancho Blade, which unleashes an unstoppable strike from the sword "Bancho Blade" on its Bancho Arm, and Aurora Blaster, which fires a purifying blast of light from its Valdur Arm.

specialSkills.name: Bancho Blade
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light physical attack at power 60. The lower the user's HP, the greater the damage. Increased damage to targets with Beast Trait.

specialSkills.name: Aurora Blaster
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 90. Removes stat buffs. Increased damage to targets with Unknown Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Gaia Blaster III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth magic attack at power 85. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Restore
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes status abnormalities, Injury, & Disease.

attachmentSkills.name: X-Heal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Greatly recovers HP.

gracenovamon.name: GraceNovamon
gracenovamon.description: A mythical Galaxy Digimon said to have appeared when an unprecedented crisis descended upon the Digital World Iliad. The collision of the opposing forces of solar energy and lunar energy cause GraceNovamon to generate Big Bang levels of energy within its body. It came into being when Apollomon and Dianamon of the Olympos XII fused together. As a result, GraceNovamon itself is believed to be a galaxy in its own right, and the full extent of its data is impossible to measure accurately. Its special moves are Eclipse Finger, which concentrates the energy amplified within its body into its hands, causing foes to melt when it touches them, and Calydon Arcus, which fires the eight Meleagros blades on its back to seek out and destroy its foes.

specialSkills.name: Eclipse Finger
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire magic attack at power 100. Increased damage to targets with Ice Trait.

specialSkills.name: Calydon Arcus
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Ice magic attack at power 20 x 4 hits. If target is affected by status abnormalities or Injury/ Disease: Increased damage. Increased damage to targets with Fire Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Ripping Net
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Paralysis.

attachmentSkills.name: Holy Light III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: X-Aura
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] Moderately recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Have you any interest in traveling the galaxy?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'd love to.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Set your thoughts racing to new worlds, and once day your dreams will become reality.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What kind of place is it?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The superspace within me is difficult to describe, but it will show you new worlds.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Can I breathe there?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The galaxy of the Digital World may differ from that of your own, but I shall aid you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: No, I'm good.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: So you say, but I, myself, am a galaxy. Thus, you have already set forth on the journey.

shinegreymon-bm.name: ShineGreymon BM
shinegreymon-bm.description: ShineGreymon: Burst Mode is a special form of ShineGreymon that has temporarily reached the limits of its abilities with Burst Digivolution, covering it in an aura of solar-class, high-energy flames. It uses its special move Corona Blaze Sword to fuse its sword and shield of flame into a greatsword of explosive strength, or Final Shining Burst to induce a massive explosion by focusing its entire body and soul.

specialSkills.name: Final Shining Burst
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire physical attack at power 100. Consumes all SP. Increased damage to targets with Vegetation Trait.

specialSkills.name: Corona Blaze Sword
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 110. 75% chance of 10% reduction to user's DEF/SPI for 3 turns. Increased damage to targets with Ice Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Saint Knuckle III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 38 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Comet Hammer III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 14 x 6 hits. 90% ACU.

susanomon.name: Susanomon
susanomon.description: Susanomon is renowned in eastern folklore as the ultimate god of destruction and the ruler of regeneration. It's said to appear when the Net experiences abnormalities, nullifying the existing system and building a new one in its place. Susanomon's special moves are Ama no Habakiri, which cleaves anything and everything under heaven with the blade of light released from its ZERO-ARMS: Orochi, and Yakusa no Ikazuchi, the ultimate technique by which it points its ZERO-ARMS: Orochi blade of light toward the heavens, transforming the blade into destructive lightning that then rains down upon the world.

specialSkills.name: Ama no Habakiri
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light physical attack at power 60. Nullifies unfavorable compatibility. Increased damage to targets with Dragon Trait.

specialSkills.name: Yakusa no Ikazuchi
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 12 x 8 hits. Increased damage to targets with Demon Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Shock Plasma III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 25 x 3 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Burst Flame III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire magic attack at power 15 x 5 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to INT for 3 turn(s).

jupitermon-wm.name: Jupitermon WM
jupitermon-wm.description: An entirely changed version of Jupitermon, who is typically objective and in control of its emotions when dealing judgment, but has become unable to quell its anger when facing an enemy that has committed an unforgiveable sin. Jupitermon: Wrath Mode summons its godly blade Keraunos with a loud roar, and its body grows dozens of times larger in size as armor and lightning envelop it from head to toe. Its rage is made evident by the violent lightning that surrounds it, yet the efficient calm of its movements exerts an incredible pressure upon its enemy. Jupitermon: Wrath Mode's special move Lightning Beam summons lightning to strike where it points its finger. It can also call upon the heavens to cast judgment on its defeated enemy with Dios Thunder. If the attack hits, the enemy is judged as guilty, and if it misses, they're not guilty. Digimon judged as guilty by the attack have their data completely destroyed.

specialSkills.name: Keraunos Divide
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 90. If target is affected by Paralysis/ Immobilization: Increased damage. Increased damage to targets with Evil Trait.

specialSkills.name: Dios Thunder
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 85. 50% chance to apply Immobilization. Increased damage to targets with Holy Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Saint Knuckle III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 38 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Shine Burst III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Nanomachine Break III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 19 x 4 hits. 95% ACU.

ravemon-bm.name: Ravemon BM
ravemon-bm.description: Ravemon: Burst Mode is a special form of Ravemon that has temporarily reached the limits of its abilities with Burst Digivolution, covering it in an aura containing all the energy of the atmosphere. It uses its special move Mourning Dance to perform a wild dance born of rage, or Lightning Thrust to instantly stab at the enemy with a deep-purple aura like a bolt of lightning.

specialSkills.name: Mourning Dance
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind physical attack at power 18 x 5 hits. 15% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Holy Trait.

specialSkills.name: Lightning Thrust
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 95. If target has yet to act: Increased damage. Increased damage to targets with Holy Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Gale Storm III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Wind magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Shadow Fang III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 38 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: ...Can't you feel it? The vast energy crackling through the air?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wish I could.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Behold my dark purple aura. Perhaps then will you come to sense this abundant energy.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Can't feel it at all.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Is it futile for humans? You should be able to see it, though. It's my dark purple aura.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Oh, I feel it.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That shouldn't be possible for humans, but if you say so, I'll believe you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'll pass on feeling it.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Are you afraid of being overwhelmed by this energy? Don't worry. I can control it.

examon.name: Examon
examon.description: A Holy Knight Digimon and member of the Royal Knights, the holy defenders of the Digital World. Examon has an absurdly high data mass, so it could never be rendered on traditional digital devices. Its discovery only became possible when the latest digital devices finally proved powerful enough to render it. It has massive, sentient wings referred to as "Caledfwlch," along with a giant lance called "Ambrose." Examon's special move Pendragon's Glory unleashes a powerful laser beam from Ambrose. Examon can also use Dragonic Impact to plunge down from the exosphere to slam into foes while its body is still hot from the friction of reentry into the atmosphere.

specialSkills.name: Pendragon's Glory
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 100. Increased damage to targets with Ancient Trait.

specialSkills.name: Dragonic Impact
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire physical attack at power 60. Nullifies unfavorable compatibility. Increased damage to targets with Dragon Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 15 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Do not be mistaken. My form is not all that is large about me! You understand, yes?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Your strong heart is also jumbo size.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You know me well. I have a vast heart, fit for this immense body!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Your intellect is just as massive.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Precisely. This frame houses not only strength but knowledge of all things as well.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Size differences aside, our bond is huge.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Though you are small, I acknowledge your strength. Our bond of friendship is firm.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Your love is so big, it makes me dizzy.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The size of my love surpasses that of this body. Fear not. I shall always keep you safe.

miragegaogamon-bm.name: MirageGaogamon BM
miragegaogamon-bm.description: MirageGaogamon BM is a special form that temporarily reached the limits of MirageGaogamon's abilities with Burst Digivolution, equipping it with planet-class high-energy weapons and aura. Its special move Full Moon Meteor Impact flattens foes with a sphere containing planet-class energy.

specialSkills.name: Full Moon Meteor Impact
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 100. Increased damage to targets with Spirit Trait.

specialSkills.name: Final Mirage Burst
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light physical attack at power 105. 100% chance of 20% reduction to all user's stats for 3 turns. Increased damage to targets with Immortal Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Wind Claw III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Gale Storm III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Wind magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Status Barrier
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Stat Debuff Immunity.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm dangerous in this form. You shouldn't get too close...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I can tell just by looking at you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Then I suggest you step back. My planet-class energy is nothing to make light of.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What's so dangerous about you?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: My abilities have been fully released. This planet-class energy could destroy everything.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wasn't planning on it, anyway.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm glad. Once I've done what I have to do and canceled Burst Mode, let's meet again.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Even so, I still wanna be by your side.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Please don't upset me. I don't want my planet-class energy to cause you any harm...

rosemon-bm.name: Rosemon BM
rosemon-bm.description: Rosemon: Burst Mode is a special form of Rosemon that has temporarily reached the limits of its abilities with Burst Digivolution, covering it in an aura of love and beauty. It uses its special move Charité to gently envelop the enemy in its amplified aura mantle, or Aguichant Lèvres to blow a laser of kisses from its lips.

specialSkills.name: Aguichant Lèvres
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 95. Recovers HP/SP equal to 15% of damage dealt. Increased damage to targets with Insectoid Trait.

specialSkills.name: Charité
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 70. Always hits. 100% reduction to Light resistance. Increased damage to targets with Humanoid Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Shine Burst III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: X-Heal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Greatly recovers HP.

attachmentSkills.name: Power Energy III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Love or beauty, which do you desire?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I don't need either.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Surely that is nothing more than bravado. One can't live with neither love nor beauty.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I want both.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: First, think long and hard about what you need to fulfill that insatiable desire.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I want beauty.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Then I will give it to you—in exchange for your love.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I want love.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Then I will give it to you—in exchange for your beauty.

titamon-plus-skullbaluchimon.name: Titamon + SkullBaluchimon
titamon-plus-skullbaluchimon.description: SkullBaluchimon, thought to be without emotion, overpowered and made tame by Titamon. Compensating for the mobility that was Titamon's sole weakness, SkullBaluchimon (Titamon Riding) resembles nothing short of a fierce deity as it races freely about the battlefield. Normally, the black chill emanating from SkullBaluchimon's DigiCore instills the fear of death in all who touch it, rendering them powerless. Titamon, however, used its unyielding mental fortitude to absorb SkullBaluchimon's dark cold and add it to its own strength. In addition, SkullBaluchimon's data fused with Titamon's Zanjintou sword, transforming it from a long sword into a huge, double-bladed polearm. The grudge data billowing from Zanjintou was also further strengthened by the black chill of SkullBaluchimon's DigiCore, causing any foes struck by it to suffer physical and mental wounds that never heal. SkullBaluchimon (Titamon Riding) uses its special move Senjin Kishinzan to spin its polearm-form Zanjintou around and around, mincing the DigiCores of its foes into tiny particles.

specialSkills.name: Senjin Kishinzan
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 90. 100% chance to apply Injury. Increased damage to targets with Holy Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Character Reversal
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy or ally] 100% chance to apply Reverse.

attachmentSkills.name: Soul Fear III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark physical attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Status Barrier
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Stat Debuff Immunity.

gallantmon-cm.name: Gallantmon CM
gallantmon-cm.description: A hidden form of Gallantmon clad in shining crimson armor. Gallantmon: Crimson Mode unleashes its full power, heating its armored parts until they're red-hot. As a result, it can't stay in Crimson Mode for long. Gallantmon: Crimson Mode's chest contains a DigiCore with a Digital Hazard sealed within it that causes wings of energy to radiate from its back when it releases the power in its body. It wields the lance of light Gungnir and the sword of light Blutgang, which are energy weapons without form. Its special move Invincible Sword cleaves the enemy with Blutgang, and Quo Vadis tears apart foes on an atomic level with Gungnir before consigning them to another dimension.

specialSkills.name: Quo Vadis
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light physical attack at power 70. Always hits. Increased damage to targets with Machine Trait.

specialSkills.name: Invincible Sword
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 100. Always hits. Recovers user's HP by 10%. Increased damage to targets with Ancient Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Thruster Metal III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel magic attack at power 11 x 7 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Now that I possess wings and crimson armor, I, Gallantmon, am invincible!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You do look pretty strong.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: With my full power unleashed, I, Gallantmon, am most assuredly mighty.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You must be hot in all that.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: My crimson armor is evidence of the burning power surging within me.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I like the old Gallantmon better.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Such might cannot persist forever. Like it or no, I will revert to my former self in time.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I hope you stay like this forever.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Sadly, as my power wanes, I will revert to my old form. I must shine bright while I can!

beelzemon-bm.name: Beelzemon BM
beelzemon-bm.description: The supreme Evil King Digimon that has pushed its power and spirit to the utmost. Instead of Digivolving toward evil, its mind has grown more stable, and its three sinister red eyes have turned green. Beelzemon: Blast Mode commands power and speed far above its normal limits, and four jet-black wings sprout from its back. It's said that none can stand against a Beelzemon once it has reached this form. Its right arm has fused with a blaster, allowing it to fire monstrous energy waves that disintegrate anything they touch. Beelzemon: Blast Mode uses its signature move Death Slinger to fire a destructive wave from its right arm, and its special move Chaos Flare to draw a magic circle, through which it fires its destructive wave.

specialSkills.name: Chaos Flare
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 125. Consumes all SP. Increased damage to targets with Angel Trait.

specialSkills.name: Death Slinger
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 100. Increased damage to targets with Deity Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Magma Fall III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Don't be so scared. I hardly ever get angry.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wanna see what you look like angry.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The only time anyone sees me angry is right before they die.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Okay, then smile.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I do if I have a reason to. So come on. Try and make me laugh.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wanna try to make you mad.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Not possible, mainly because I like you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: But you look cool when you're angry.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You got the wrong idea. No one who sees me angry lives to talk about it.

belphemon-rm.name: Belphemon RM
belphemon-rm.description: Belphemon awakes from its constant slumber once every thousand years and returns to its original form. It transforms into an avatar of rage once awakened, and everything in its field of vision is subject to destruction. Digimon of Ultimate level or lower who hear Belphemon: Rage Mode's roar face instant death from data fragmentation, and not even Mega Digimon can escape unharmed. It uses its special move Lampranthus to shoot black flames from the chains coiled around its body, and Gift of Darkness to cleave with claws enveloped in infernal flames. Also, the data of Digimon killed by that which rules over the Seven Great Demon Lords isn't reincarnated, going instead to the Dark Area to act as flesh and blood for Evil Kings.

specialSkills.name: Gift of Darkness
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 100. Increased damage to targets with Immortal Trait.

specialSkills.name: Lampranthus
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark magic attack at power 80. 100% chance of 10% reduction to SPD for 3 turn(s). Increased damage to targets with Unknown Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Magma Fall III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Are you the one who woke me from my thousand-year slumber?!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: No.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Who woke me doesn't matter right now, but be prepared, because I always get my revenge.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: If it upsets you, why not go back to sleep?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I never thought of that... Whether it works or not, it's worth a try.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What if I am?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Normally I'd destroy you, but I'm still too drowsy. So you're off the hook for now.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Yeah.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It doesn't feel like it's been a thousand years yet. I'd like to sleep a little longer.

mervamon.name: Mervamon
mervamon.description: A Deity Digimon and member of the Olympos XII that resembles a woman. Mervamon is the form of Minervamon that has amassed experience and achievements over time, and it has a much calmer and more mature personality compared to its previous form. It has come to pursue elegance and charm—observed in abundance in both its mannerisms and conduct—and exudes sensuality into its surroundings. It even seeks charm in battle, performing a refined, graceful dance to fascinate those who behold it. That's why more than a few Digimon become fans of Mervamon upon observing this dance. The Love Poison sprayed from the mouth of the Medullia on its left arm bewitches any who inhale it, letting Mervamon wring the life out of them. Madness Merry-Go-Round DX is a spinning slash, with its greatsword Olympia Kai and Medullia creating a tornado that instantly tears any foe it touches to shreds.

specialSkills.name: Love Poison
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Null physical attack at power 60. 60% chance to apply Deadly Poison. Increased damage to targets with Humanoid Trait.

specialSkills.name: Madness Merry-Go-Round DX
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Wind physical attack at power 27 x 3 hits. 10% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Reptile Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Wind Claw III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Shadow Fang III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 38 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Reset Body
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Removes stat buffs.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You have some growing up to do.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wanna grow up.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Just thinking it won't achieve anything. Keep a level head and take it one step at a time.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I can't grow up.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Can't you? I don't mean physical maturity, but mental. It's all a matter of attitude.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Don't treat me like a kid.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Can you say with confidence that you're more grown-up than me? Something tells me no.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm already there!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Saying that just proves you're still a kid. Still, I like your innocent, childish side.

lucemon-sm.name: Lucemon SM
lucemon-sm.description: Lucemon's final form, with the appearance of a dragon that appears in Revelation. As foretold of in that text, Lucemon: Shadowlord Mode wears the Crowns of the Seven Deadly Sins, and carries an orb of darkness known as Gehenna that nullifies any and all attacks. It's been said that the world will perish once Lucemon takes this form. However, Lucemon's true form, Lucemon: Larva, exists within Gehenna, and Lucemon: Shadowlord Mode is actually no more than Lucemon's shadow. For that reason, no attack on Lucemon: Shadowlord Mode reaches the true form Lucemon: Larva. Lucemon: Shadowlord Mode's special moves are Purgatorial Flame, a flame of destruction that purifies all, and Divine Atonement, an annihilating beam fired from the seven crowns.

specialSkills.name: Divine Atonement
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 90. 15% chance to apply Instant Death. Increased damage to targets with Holy Trait.

specialSkills.name: Purgatorial Flame
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire magic attack at power 100. Increased damage to targets with Deity Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Nightmare III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Mental Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to SPI for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Power Energy III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Spell Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Magic.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Would you like to seal me away?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Yes, I would.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You certainly are candid... Still, that is impossible. I am merely a shadow of Lucemon.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I honestly don't know.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Go and revisit the ancient texts. It is up to you to believe them or not.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I want you to be my friend.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You would entice me, who bears the Crowns of the Deadly Sins? Let us see where this goes.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: How could I possibly?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Of course, it is beyond your capabilities. Still, our current coexistence is fine by me.

armageddemon.name: Armageddemon
armageddemon.description: A Mega + Digimon born from a mutation caused by fusing massive numbers of In-Training Diaboromon. Diaboromon have the ability to copy themselves en masse, but each copy is inferior to the original. The fusion of a large number of In-Training Diaboromon together, however—instead of weakening them— concentrated their abilities into this single, more powerful entity. Armageddemon's special moves are Black Rain, which scatters energy shells from its back into the air to rain down in all directions, and Ultimate Flare, which fires a beam of destructive energy from its gaping maw.

specialSkills.name: Ultimate Flare
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 40 x 3 hits. The lower the user's HP, the lower the damage. Increased damage to targets with Unknown Trait.

specialSkills.name: Black Rain
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark physical attack at power 80. 100% chance of reduction to Dark resistance. Increased damage to targets with Mythical Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Void Ray III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Null magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU. 10% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to INT for 3 turn(s).

agumon-bond-of-bravery.name: Agumon (Bond of Bravery)
agumon-bond-of-bravery.description: A final, legendary Digivolution, the end result of limitless potential realized through the deepened bond of an Agumon and its partner. The fortuitous courage of its partner becomes burning flame that erupts from its body, emerging as proof of their deep faith in each other.
