Having deepened its understanding of humans through this long relationship, its Digivolved form takes on an almost humanoid appearance. Agumon (Bond of Bravery) uses its special move Red Reamer to burn the enemy with high-density red lasers from its claw tips, Striking Salamander Slash to pierce foes with its tail lance, and Gaia Brave to unleash the flame of courage within it as a superheated energy bomb.

specialSkills.name: Red Reamer
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 100. 100% chance of reduction to Fire resistance.

specialSkills.name: Gaia Brave
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire physical attack at power 60. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Ignition Flare III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire physical attack at power 11 x 4 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Safety Guard
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Guts.

apocalymon.name: Apocalymon
apocalymon.description: A mysterious Digimon that appeared when negative thoughts were amassed by the power of darkness. No one knows Apocalymon's true nature, and it can't even be analyzed to see if it truly is a Digimon. The reason for its appearance is uncertain, but it seems to desire the purging of the chaotic Digital World back into nothingness. One theory states that its coming was foretold in ancient prophecy. Its special move Darkness-Zone unleashes an endlessly expanding darkness that returns all to the void. Those caught in this darkness lose all sense of direction, disappearing without a trace.

specialSkills.name: Darkness-Zone
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Deals 20% HP damage. Always hits.

attachmentSkills.name: Hell Crusher III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Nightmare III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Shock Plasma III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity magic attack at power 25 x 3 hits. 95% ACU.

gabumon-bond-of-friendship.name: Gabumon (Bond of Friendship)
gabumon-bond-of-friendship.description: A final, legendary Digivolution, the end result of limitless potential realized through the deepened bond of a Gabumon and its partner. The undying friendship of its partner became elegant armor that covers its body, materializing as proof of the trust coursing through both of them. The photon wings sprouting from its back allow it to fly, but it can also transform into the shape of a motorcycle, the vehicle beloved by its partner, letting them ride together. Gabumon (Bond of Friendship) uses its special move Full-Metal Machinegun to rain down iron from the cowl parts on both of its arms, and Cool Edge to jettison its cowl parts for an instantaneous strike. Furthermore, it leaves no openings at any distance, using Moon Phase to fire laser beams in all directions, and Raddle Star to unleash AI-equipped tracking weapons.

specialSkills.name: Raddle Star
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 12 x 8 hits. Always hits. 20% CRT Rate.

specialSkills.name: Cool Edge
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Null physical attack at power 60. If target has yet to act: Increased damage.

attachmentSkills.name: Burst Flame III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire magic attack at power 15 x 5 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Frozen Bullet III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: X-Revive
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Revives from KO and greatly recovers HP.

cresgarurumon.name: CresGarurumon
cresgarurumon.description: A final form of Garurumon and subspecies of MetalGarurumon that, unlike fellow final form ZeedGarurumon, has taken on a humanoid shape. Clad in Gold Digizoid armor that repels attacks, CresGarurumon wields the Yellow Beast Crescent Blade with excellent swordsmanship. It unleashes Beast Cyclone, rotating its body to turn into a blade and assault the enemy, and Fury: Ice Moon Fang, molding ice into countless Yellow Beast Crescent Blades to hurl at the enemy.

specialSkills.name: Beast Cyclone
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 90. Increased damage to targets with Beast Trait.

specialSkills.name: Fury: Ice Moon Fang
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice physical attack at power 70. Increased damage to targets with Beast Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Icicle Edge III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice physical attack at power 37 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Iron Slash III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Steel physical attack at power 8 x 6 hits. 85% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Reflect
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Reflect Physical.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: When they speak of a golden swordsman, they speak of me.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'd love to have a golden sword!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That alone will not ensure victory, and only I can wield it. Do what works best for you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That's some gaudy taste you've got there.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: This armor is made not of gold, but of golden Chrondigizoit. Calling it "gaudy" would be simply inaccurate.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That's cool as heck!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I imagine I'll soon have an opportunity to show off my sword skills. I do hope I am wrong, though.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You shine so bright, I gotta wear shades!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That is who I am. Get a good, long look at my glorious, golden sheen!

parallelmon.name: Parallelmon
parallelmon.description: A Mutant Digimon that can travel freely between Digital Worlds in different dimensions. This baleful existence devours the data of Digimon in the worlds it crosses over to, and its purpose is a mystery. Parallelmon appears in unexpected places at unexpected times, and its coming heralds pandemonium for the world. As such, research teams consider its very appearance to be a calamity. One of Parallelmon's special moves is Absorbent Bang, which fires a beam from its eyes that absorbs Digimon. Anything besides Digimon hit by this beam is flung to some other dimension. It also has Endless Trance, which attacks unilaterally from the countless gates it opens around the enemy.

specialSkills.name: Absorbent Bang
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 90. 30% chance to apply Injury. Increased damage to targets with Humanoid Trait.

specialSkills.name: Endless Trance
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 85. 100% chance of 10% reduction to ATK for 3 turn(s). Increased damage to targets with Beast Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Shadow Fang III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 38 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Texture Blow
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 60% chance to apply Crystallization.

attachmentSkills.name: Awesome Quake III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Earth magic attack at power 55. 85% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

blitzgreymon.name: BlitzGreymon
blitzgreymon.description: An ultimate form of the Greymon species and subspecies of WarGreymon, equipped with electrical cannons. BlitzGreymon charges up its formidable hand-to-hand combat techniques with electricity, sending energy through even the toughest foes with the Plasma Stakes on its arms to destroy them from inside. The Thunder Verniers on its back can be rotated to face forward and fire electricity, or fired to its rear, amplifying its propulsive power. Finally, it can release plasma particles to form a barrier around itself with Elec Guard.

specialSkills.name: Plasma Stake
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 95. Increased damage to targets with Dinosaur Trait.

specialSkills.name: Elec Guard
specialSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 20% reduction to physical/magic damage taken for 2 turns. 100% chance of Electricity resistance boost for 2 tuns.

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Lightning Claw III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 11 x 4 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Ignition Flare III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire physical attack at power 11 x 4 hits. 90% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You had better not get too close to me.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: But I want to get close to you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Do not underestimate my electric shocks. Get too close during combat, and you would not escape unscathed.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Why?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Because you may get shocked in the aftermath of my attacks... though that is not certain.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I have no intention of going near you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Good. Now I can fight without fear of you getting caught in the crossfire.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm already too close.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Then you must step further away. I do not want you to get shocked.

omnimon-alter-b.name: Omnimon Alter-B
omnimon-alter-b.description: Omnimon Alter-B is a temporary form taken on by Omnimon Alter-S after some entity had intentionally introduced Black Digitron, a sort of ooze that turns Digimon black, into its being. Omnimon is more powerful in this form, but it loses itself in a mindless rage until it changes back.

specialSkills.name: Supreme Sword
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 100. 90% ACU. 10% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Beast Trait.

specialSkills.name: Transcendent Cannon
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 100. 90% ACU. 10% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Dragon Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Shadow Fang III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 38 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Soul Fear III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark physical attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 15 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Bind
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 100% chance of 20% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I know myself better than anyone.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: So, who are you?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I will not answer that question. Do not test me, human.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: How did you turn black?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I found myself like this before I knew it. I would appreciate anything you can elucidate.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Even the part of you that rampages out of control?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I am not sure what you are talking about, but do not pry too much.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'd like to learn more about you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: That is not necessary, but I will be sure to remember you.

omnimon-alter-s.name: Omnimon Alter-S
omnimon-alter-s.description: A new form of Omnimon, born from a fusion between the WarGreymon subspecies BlitzGreymon and the MetalGarurumon subspecies CresGarurumon. Omnimon Alter-S is a different being from the Omnimon affiliated with the Royal Knights, but the multi-capable performance combining the special abilities of two Digimon remains the same, as does its strength. How the pair came to fuse is a mystery. Did someone will it into being? Or does this fusion exist solely because of someone's wish? The truth of the matter is unclear. Omnimon Alter-S uses its special move Transcendent Cannon to shoot plasma from its BlitzGreymon- shaped cannon. In addition, the slashing power of its move Supreme Sword varies depending on the energy accumulated in the blade. Nothing exists that cannot be cut by a fully charged Supreme Sword.

specialSkills.name: Supreme Sword
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 100. Increased damage to targets with Beast Trait.

specialSkills.name: Transcendent Cannon
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 100. Increased damage to targets with Dragon Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Ignition Flare III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire physical attack at power 11 x 4 hits. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Icicle Edge III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice physical attack at power 37 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The Digital World is filled with mysteries.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Indeed.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I may not be of much help, but I bet you will solve many of them along your journey.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Yeah, and you're one of them.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I am nothing in the vast scope of the Digital World. You should tackle a greater enigma.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It doesn't bother me.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It does not bother me, either. All I care about is remaining a force for good.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Not really.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: The conflict between good and evil is simple enough. If that is your focus, then that's fine by me.

omnimon-zwart-defeat.name: Omnimon Zwart Defeat
omnimon-zwart-defeat.description: The form of Omnimon Zwart transformed into a berserker after being infected with a virus program by some entity. Any Digimon that crosses Omnimon Zwart Defeat's path is viewed as a sinister foe, and any who get close face a merciless onslaught. The clash between the raging virus and the remnant vaccine program inside its body has rendered it unstable, causing it to cycle between exhaustion and rampage while unable to heal its wounds. In one of the rare moments the vaccine program was able to push back enough for Omnimon Zwart Defeat to regain its sense of self, it bound both weapons to limit the damage it could do.

specialSkills.name: Transcendent Sword
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 95. 15% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Deity Trait.

specialSkills.name: Supreme Cannon
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark magic attack at power 95. 15% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Holy Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Shadow Fang III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 38 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Charge
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance of 30% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Lunatic Gate III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Null physical attack at power 45. 90% ACU. 10% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You... should not get too close to me.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: But I want to get close to you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I suspect even you might have an idea of what would come from such an action…

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wouldn't, even if you asked me to.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A wise decision. That is a natural reaction for anyone who discerns my true nature.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What would happen if I did?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let us just say that our relationship would face a critical crossroads.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: But we're friends.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Despite that, do not forget that I am a berserker at heart. Heed my warning.

banchomamemon.name: BanchoMamemon
banchomamemon.description: One of the few bearing the title of "Bancho," this deeply chivalrous and compassionate Digimon is great in a scrap despite its small stature. BanchoMamemon lives a self-reliant existence, ignoring the laws of the Digital World. It extends a helping hand to Digimon isolated from the world like itself, going so far as to form an organization dubbed the "Mamemon Alliance" in which such Digimon live together. But going against the order of the world is no easy task. It has fought against Digimon that conform to rules under the pretense of reorganization on countless occasions. Even so, it devotes all of its energies toward the Mamemon Alliance. BanchoMamemon received the title of "Bancho" by repelling enemies without losing a single comrade, no matter what dilemma came along. Like BanchoLeomon, it wears a GAKU-RAN that guards against impacts from physical attacks. That being said, it almost always dedicates this defensive ability to its comrades. BanchoMamemon uses its special move Golden Rush to strike with its favorite cudgels, the Golden Bats, and beat foes to a pulp, and Senbon Dokkan to slam out its subordinates, the Black Hickeys, with the same Golden Bats. It also uses Bukkomi Otokodama to charge forward using the prison chains hanging from its body.

specialSkills.name: Golden Rush
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 95. Increased damage to targets with Steel Trait.

specialSkills.name: Senbon Dokkan
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 90. If target is affected by Confusion/ Chaos: Increased damage. Increased damage to targets with Evil Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Reflect
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: User] 100% chance to apply Reflect Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Awesome Quake III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Earth magic attack at power 55. 85% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Come see me if ya ever got a problem.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I need your help right now.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Okay, any trouble ya got, me and the whole Mamemon Alliance will squash it!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A problem? Like what?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Like... anythin'! Whatever! Just say the word and I'm on it.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're doing more than enough already.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Glad to hear it. The Digital World's a crazy place, but I got yer back.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wouldn't wanna bother you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hey, no need to be so formal. Lookin' out for each other is all part of bein' friends.

bancholillymon.name: BanchoLillymon
bancholillymon.description: A Pixie Digimon draped in a deep crimson tokko-fuku jacket. The florid petals from when it was Lillymon have been dyed a dark color, shedding the sweet impression it once had. BanchoLillymon has the conviction to fight for the weak in the dog-eat-dog Digital World, and has saved countless lives from assault by fiendish Digimon. Its tokko-fuku jacket and the title of "Bancho" are proof of this conviction. BanchoLillymon has several special moves that utilize its yo-yos as weapons. Absolute Territory cuts up the enemy along with the very space around them, Nightmare Assemble thrusts the yo-yos at its foe and absorbs it, and Twin Petal unleashes flash kicks from BanchoLillymon's gorgeous legs.

specialSkills.name: Absolute Territory
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant magic attack at power 90. 20% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Machine Trait.

specialSkills.name: Twin Petal
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Plant physical attack at power 85. 20% CRT Rate. If target is affected by Poison/ Deadly Poison: Increased damage. Increased damage to targets with Humanoid Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Shine Burst III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Rune Forest III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Plant magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Holy Light III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: X-Aura
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] Moderately recovers HP.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It is a grave mistake to think that being strong means you can get away with anything!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: But the strong usually do get away with it.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I will teach any who make that mistake the error of their ways! Even you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wanna be both strong and just.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: If only all Digimon thought as you do. There are many of us in need of saving.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It's wrong, but people still do it.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Exactly. That is why I must always defend the meek, even if I have to do it alone.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: We won't stand for it!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Embrace that conviction. And know that I will always fight to protect the weak!

banchogolemon.name: BanchoGolemon
banchogolemon.description: A Mineral Digimon that acts of its own free will, unlike a regular Golemon devoid of emotion. BanchoGolemon is also one of the few Digimon to bear the title of "Bancho." Utterly stolid and unflappable, it is equally harsh with everyone, never allowing even a hint of leniency into its behavior. Electing to spend its time in the harsh environment deep within Infinity Mountain, BanchoGolemon is constantly putting itself through intensive training. This Digimon is full of surprises. Though it may never lend a hand to those seeking its aid, it might suddenly show up to save a comrade with whom it has exchanged blows when said Digimon is in a pinch. With its overwhelming power, BanchoGolemon is often able to singlehandedly turn the tide of battle and claim victory. Its special moves are Kanshaku Dust, which reflects a beam fired from the Kanshakudama in its abdomen off of Falling Stones for a wide-range attack, and Yobori Claw Drill, which pierces the enemy with the drill on its left arm capable of pulverizing even Chrondigizoid to smithereens.

specialSkills.name: Yobori Claw Drill
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Earth physical attack at power 90. 100% chance of 20% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s). Increased damage to targets with Mineral Trait.

specialSkills.name: Kanshaku Dust
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Earth physical attack at power 80. Increased damage to targets with Mineral Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 15 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Safety Guard
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Guts.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Status Barrier
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Stat Debuff Immunity.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I have awakened. And you better have an iron will!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I've got an iron will.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Then take action. Push your body, your mind, and your soul to the limit to get stronger!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: What do you mean by "will"?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Stepping up and fighting for your beliefs, not waiting for the fight to come to you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I think my will's kinda weak.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Good on you for knowing that. No shame there. But, now you gotta work to get stronger!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wanna have an iron will.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Well said. Even I've got work to do. Let's both get stronger together!

banchostingmon.name: BanchoStingmon
banchostingmon.description: An absolutely conceited Insectoid Digimon that lives by overpowering those around it. Said to be the most arrogant of all Digimon, BanchoStingmon holds its pride above all else. Any act that threatens to even mar its pride will be met with ruthless retaliation, no matter who the perpetrator. This uncompromising pridefulness has earned it the title of "Bancho." The carapaces of various insects are meticulously woven into BanchoStingmon's emblematic GAKU-RAN, giving it a sturdy construction. Its special moves are Bloody Finish, skewering foes with the drills on its arms, and Depth Charge Sky, releasing mine bugs that self- destruct on contact with the enemy.

specialSkills.name: Bloody Finish
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 90. 20% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Insectoid Trait.

specialSkills.name: Depth Charge Sky
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire physical attack at power 75. 20% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Insectoid Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Saint Knuckle III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 38 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I've poured a lot of effort into growing strong. Compromise is not an option.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Hey, everyone's working hard, too.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Don't compare my efforts with those of others. No one can ever be like me.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: There are lots of strong Digimon out there.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: But for most, that's merely innate strength. My title of "Bancho" was hard-earned.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Good for you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Is that supposed to be flattery? It'd take days to list all my great deeds, you know.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I wanna be like you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: If you truly mean that, then put your actions into words. Don't expect to reach my level with a bit of effort alone

omnimon-mm.name: Omnimon MM
omnimon-mm.description: An angelic form of Omnimon with white wings that flutter like a scarf. Upon realizing that some can only be saved by fighting and defeating them, Omnimon's sadness and resolve transformed it into Omnimon: Merciful Mode. Photon Spread—pale blue lines of light that resemble tears rolling down cheeks—flows over its entire body, drastically boosting its power for a short time. This being renders judgment upon Digimon who have irrevocably strayed from their path, saving them in the process. The targets of Omnimon: Merciful Mode's attacks are always those who originally possessed hearts of virtue. Omnimon's Transcendent Sword has transformed into a katana-like shape known as "Fearsome Blade," with which Omnimon: Merciful Mode beheads its target with a single, reluctant stroke. Omnimon's special move Supreme Cannon has also transformed into Graceful Cannon, which fires a laser of absolute zero cold.

specialSkills.name: Fearsome Blade
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 110. Increased damage to targets with Dragon Trait.

specialSkills.name: Graceful Cannon
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice physical attack at power 110. Increased damage to targets with Fire Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Lethal Blizzard III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Ice magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Saint Knuckle III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 38 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: X-Revive
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Revives from KO and greatly recovers HP.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: There are some for whom the only form of salvation is swift and merciful defeat.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I understand.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It is my form of mercy. I am grateful for your understanding without interference.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Pretty ruthless, don't you think?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Defeat is salvation for such beings. I would hardly call it ruthlessness.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Isn't there any other way?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: There is not, thus do I judge. If you have some other way, I will leave judgment to you.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'd like to help.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Impossible, I fear. All you have to do is watch my work.

ulforceveedramon-x-antibody.name: UlforceVeedramon (X Antibody)
ulforceveedramon-x-antibody.description: UlforceVeedramon is a legendary Holy Knight Digimon appearing only in a prophecy passed down from the ancient Digital World. The appearance of the Royal Knights, the holy defenders of the Network, was written of in this prophecy, and it is said the members of the Royal Knights will all gather under the prophecy when the Digital World faces its greatest crisis. Even among the Royal Knights, UlforceVeedramon's speed is exceptional, such that it is impossible to follow its movements. Clad in armor of Blue Chrondigizoit—an extremely rare metal, and the lightest form of any Chrondigizoit—UlforceVeedramon shoots through the sky and blasts across the earth. Should it ever require a weapon or shield, it can deploy its Victory Sword or Tense-Great Shield from the V-Bracelets on its arms. Its special move is The Ray of Victory, which fires a beam of energy from the V-shaped armor on its chest to wipe out foes. ■Effects of the X Antibody on UlforceVeedramon's DigiCore: In addition to its godlike speed, its ultimate Ulforce power has also been drawn out further. Ulforce also has an astounding healing factor, allowing UlforceVeedramon to heal any damage it receives immediately. Even if it were to be caught and attacked, it would likely counter instantly with one hundred percent of its power.

specialSkills.name: The Ray of Victory
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Light physical attack at power 55. Always hits. 100% chance of 20% reduction to ACU for 3 turn(s). Increased damage to targets with Puppet Trait.

specialSkills.name: Victory Sword
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind physical attack at power 30 x 3 hits. 15% CRT Rate. Recovers user's HP by 10%. Increased damage to targets with Warrior Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Saint Knuckle III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 38 x 2 hits. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Gale Storm III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Wind magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Nothing can damage me.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You're really sure of yourself, huh?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I now possess both godlike speed and wondrous healing abilities. I have no weaknesses.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You must get injured sometimes, though, right?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Never. My supreme power, Ulforce, instantly heals me of all harm.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Yeah, I know.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Then you must also know you need not worry on my account. Entrust me with any task.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Somehow that worries me...

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I am fully equipped to handle any peril. I promise that you need not worry.

magnamon-x-antibody.name: Magnamon (X Antibody)
magnamon-x-antibody.description: An Armor Holy Knight Digimon that has Digivolved through the power of the Digi-Egg of Miracles. Imbued with the attribute of Metal and made of the super-metal Chrondigizoit, this Digi-Egg holds immense defensive capability and offensive might on par with, if not exceeding, that of Mega Digimon. True to its name, gaining the wondrous power of the Digi-Egg of Miracles would allow one to overcome any crisis. Magnamon uses its special move Plasma Shot to fire a ball of pure plasma, and Shining Gold Solar Storm to explode condensed air into golden laser beams that sweep away surrounding foes. ■Effects of the X Antibody on Magnamon's DigiCore: Its one-of-a-kind Chrondigizoid grows stronger the more it is tempered. Magnamon's virtual super- metal is fully integrated into the Digimon's body, growing and atrophying just like ordinary muscle tissue. This miraculous Digivolution is thought to have been achieved through the unique properties of Chrondigizoid created close to its natural state using ancient techniques (the Digi-Egg of Miracles) which allows it to integrate with living creatures, in combination with Magnamon's own power. By tensing its Chrondigizoid muscles, it can temporarily transform into a glimmering Gold Digizoid state, offering absolute defensive power capable of withstanding physical and even data-disintegrating attacks. Furthermore, this Gold Digizoid state bears properties akin to Huanglong Ore, the special mineral Chrondigizoid is formed from that boasts unparalleled, absolute hardness. Its perfect defense is accompanied by a specific gravity unsuited to Digimon, but Magnamon is able to overcome this by thoroughly tempering its Chrondigizoid.

specialSkills.name: Shining Gold Solar Storm
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 95. Recovers user's HP by 20%. Increased damage to targets with Evil Trait.

specialSkills.name: Plasma Shot
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Electricity physical attack at power 100. Increased damage to targets with Machine Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to INT for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Wind Claw III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Wind physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Reset Body
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Removes stat buffs.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I must train this body of mine to perfection.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Don't you think you've done enough?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: My armor gets stronger as I train it, turning into Gold Digizoid. I must do even more!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Is that stuff... flesh?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: My Chrondigizoid grows and atrophies as I do. It makes sense to call it flesh, no?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Let's train together!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: My training may differ from a human's, but I am happy to train with a like-minded spirit.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I'm rooting for you!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It goes without saying, but thank you. Your words are the greatest encouragement.

jesmon-x-antibody.name: Jesmon (X Antibody)
jesmon-x-antibody.description: When the crystal on SaviorHuckmon's chest began to glow, it Digivolved into its ultimate, transcendent form. Jesmon is a Holy Knight Digimon that has earned its place among the Royal Knights, the highest-ranking Digimon in network security. With the ability to detect signs of impending chaos and other disturbances throughout the Digital World, it is able to rush to the scene faster than any other Royal Knights. Trusting of others, it prefers to coordinate its efforts with the Sistermon siblings and other nearby Digimon rather than acting alone, in part to keep itself from growing overconfident. Such cooperative nature is a rarity among the Royal Knights. Learning by watching the Hinukamuy of its master Gankoomon, Jesmon acquired Atho, René and Por during its training. This trio boasts formidable versatility, capable of operating both under Jesmon's command as well as autonomously to attack foes directly, support Jesmon, or render aid upon other Digimon. ■Effects of the X Antibody on Jesmon's DigiCore: The X Antibody has transformed all of Jesmon's armor into blades, granting it a form even more focused on offense. Each of the many swords Jesmon is now equipped with is also capable of autonomous movement, allowing this Digimon to continually overwhelm opponents when fighting one-on-one with a constant barrage of attacks. Furthermore, the three programs Atho, René, and Por have now fused and awakened as a single being, the Tactical Arms. This allows Jesmon to make use of an entirely new combat style with which it attacks in all directions without ever leaving itself vulnerable. This Digimon's special moves include Iron-Fist Judgment, which uses its new Tactical Arms to bludgeon foes with iron fists that would do Gankoomon proud, and Weltflügel, which involves launching all the swords on its body toward the enemy while unleashing a flurry of attacks with the greatswords in its hands. Finally, it has a nonlethal ace in the hole, drawing the Ultimate Seibaken out of the DigiCore in its chest and slicing through foes. Those cut by this sword lose only their fighting instinct

specialSkills.name: Weltflügel
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 12 x 8 hits. Increased damage to targets with Beast Trait.

specialSkills.name: Ultimate Seibaken
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 100. Increased damage to targets with Evil Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Magma Fall III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Since my armor's covered in blades, give me a nickname that suits me!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Omni-Attacker!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A moniker reflecting my imperviousness! I shall unleash an assault worthy of the name.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Full-Body Weapon!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Right on the money! And remember that the swords I have equipped attack on their own.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Iron-Fist Judgment!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: My special move, is it not? Still, the term does seem to embody me perfectly.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Autonomous Blades!

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Splendidly easy to understand. I shall ensure that my attacks do the moniker justice.

gallantmon-x-antibody.name: Gallantmon (X Antibody)
gallantmon-x-antibody.description: Gallantmon is a Holy Knight Digimon counted among the Royal Knights alongside Omnimon and Magnamon. The Royal Knights are the highest- ranking Digimon in terms of network security, and no Digimon has ever been able to crack their stalwart defenses. But given Gallantmon's Virus attribute, its role as one of the chief protectors of the Net inherently conflicts with its nature. This means there is a minute chance that this balance could break and it becomes a threat instead. Gallantmon is clad in holy armor made of 99.9% pure Chrondigizoid, and it wields the holy lance Gram in its right hand while bearing the holy shield Aegis in its left. Chivalrous by nature, Gallantmon is a faithful servant of its liege. Its special moves are Lightning Joust, which unleashes a powerful thrust from Gram, and Shield of the Just, which fires a purifying beam from Aegis. ■Effects of the X Antibody on Gallantmon's DigiCore: After risking its life in countless holy battles while maintaining its fidelity as a knight, Gallantmon has at last been blessed with holy armor, a holy lance, and a holy shield of the highest quality. These arms and armor consist of a sacred hybrid of the rare metals Red Digizoid, Blue Digizoid, Gold Digizoid and the purest Chrondigizoid known to exist. Gallantmon has also transformed to better suit this holy power and acquired a new special move named Zeig Saber, which uses its newfound sacred might to amplify and greatly enlarge the spear of light that it fires from the holy lance Gram. What's more, it is said that Gallantmon gave the red cape it had before obtaining the power of the X Antibody to the hero Leomon.

specialSkills.name: Zeig Saber
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light physical attack at power 105. Increased damage to targets with Immortal Trait.

specialSkills.name: Shield of the Just
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Light magic attack at power 90. If target is Virus: Increased damage. Increased damage to targets with Unknown Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Attack Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to ATK for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to INT for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 15 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Status Barrier
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Stat Debuff Immunity.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Would you be so kind as to think of a word or words that properly describe me?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Supreme.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Suitable for one such as I, clad in sacred hybrid armor, impervious to any threat.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Loyalty.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: It is a great honor to be associated with a term so near to the tenets of chivalry.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A Holy Knight.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A tad on the nose, but... bearing holy power is a weighty task that I must see through.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: A guardian deity.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Being called such once more reminds me of the great duty I bear. My battle continues!

omnimon-x-antibody.name: Omnimon (X Antibody)
omnimon-x-antibody.description: This Digimon was fused from the Virus Busters WarGreymon and MetalGarurumon through the will of those who wish for good. Omnimon is able to draw on the qualities of both Digimon to the fullest extent under any circumstance, making it a capable and versatile fighter. Its left arm is in the shape of WarGreymon and is equipped with a sword and shield, and its right arm takes the shape of MetalGarurumon and is equipped with a cannon and missiles. The cloak on its back deploys automatically when it needs to avoid enemy attacks or to fly. Its special move is Supreme Cannon, which fires a blast of air at absolute zero from its MetalGarurumon-shaped cannon to freeze the enemy. Additionally, the sword it bears on its left arm is the invisible blade, Transcendent Sword. ■Effects of the X Antibody on Omnimon's DigiCore: Theoretically, it should be impossible for any other Digimon to defeat Omnimon. This is due to its acquisition of the ultimate power known as Omni inForce (a term coined from the words "Omni," "Gain," and "Force") which grants it the ability to instantly see and react to what is about to happen in battle. This increases Omnimon's combat sense and potential to the absolute maximum at all times. Also, in battles where the threat to network security is so severe that Omnimon cannot afford to lose, it can unleash the special move All Delete using the Transcendent Sword. While All Delete is active, anything touched by the blade is not cut, but erased.

specialSkills.name: All Delete
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Null physical attack at power 90. Nullifies unfavorable compatibility. If target's HP os 20% or less: Increased damage. Increased damage to targets with Dragon Trait.

specialSkills.name: Supreme Cannon
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice physical attack at power 100. Increased damage to targets with Fire Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Spell Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Magic.

attachmentSkills.name: Magic Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to INT for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Restore
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] Removes status abnormalities, Injury, & Disease.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Since I can predict the future, I have no blind spots in battle.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: You never, ever lose?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I cannot. That is who I am. When push comes to shove, I will wipe everything out.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: How do you predict the future?

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: With the ultimate power, Omni inForce. It allows me to read the future in an instant.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I want that power.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: Omni inForce is mine, and mine alone. It is not something a human could ever wield.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: player
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I won't let you predict my future.

postEvolutionDialogue.speaker: digimon
postEvolutionDialogue.text: I may not be able to read humans, but neither am I charged with facing them in battle.

agumon-black.name: Agumon (Black)
agumon-black.description: A small, dinosaur-like Reptile Digimon that has developed the ability to walk on two legs. Since it hasn't fully matured, it still lacks strength, but its fierce disposition makes it reckless. Hard, sharp claws grow from its hands and feet, and it makes full use of them in battle. This Digimon shows much potential, promising Digivolution into a great and powerful Digimon. Its special move is Spitfire Blast.

specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire physical attack at power 25.

gabumon-black.name: Gabumon (Black)
gabumon-black.description: A Gabumon that Digivolved into a Virus Digimon. Gabumon (Black)'s pelt appears to be made from data it collected from Virus-attribute Garurumon. Gabumon (Black) can be wild and unruly, but it turns shy and timid if its pelt is removed. Thus, its true appearance remains a mystery.

garurumon-black.name: Garurumon (Black)
garurumon-black.description: A Virus Garurumon. The blades that extend from its shoulders are so sharp that they can sever anything they touch. Garurumon (Black) loves burying bones in the ground, but the mischievous Drimogemon enjoys moving them in secret.

greymon-blue.name: Greymon (Blue)
greymon-blue.description: Greymon (Blue) is the Virus-attribute type of Greymon, with a black and blue body. Fiercer than Greymon, it's often referred to as a completely wild member of the species, but it's no lone wolf. It's cunning enough to work together with allies to achieve its goals.

specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire physical attack at power 14 x 3 hits.

attachmentSkills.name: Magma Fall II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

metalgreymon-blue.name: MetalGreymon (Blue)
metalgreymon-blue.description: The ultimate Android Digimon with more than half of its body mechanized. MetalGreymon (Virus) has braved countless battles, only surviving due to the mechanization of its body. To successfully Digivolve into MetalGreymon (Virus), a Greymon must face several mighty foes and defeat them in battle. Its attack power is said to be as powerful as a nuclear warhead. MetalGreymon (Virus) fires bionic missiles from a hatch that opens in its chest.

specialSkills.name: Trident Arm
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 90.

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

weregarurumon-black.name: WereGarurumon (Black)
weregarurumon-black.description: A Digimon that Digivolved from a Virus-attribute Garurumon. WereGarurumon (Black) is slower due to its bipedal nature, but it makes up for this by delivering powerful blows with its arms.

specialSkills.name: Full Moon Kick
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Ice physical attack at power 90.

attachmentSkills.name: Speed Field
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All allies] 100% chance of 10% boost to SPD for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Heavy Strike II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 60. 95% ACU. 15% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Bind
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] 100% chance of 20% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Lethal Blizzard II
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Ice magic attack at power 35. 90% ACU.

blackwargreymon.name: BlackWarGreymon
blackwargreymon.description: The Virus version of WarGreymon, known and feared as the "Jet-Black Dragon Warrior." Despite being opposed to the values and beliefs of the Virus Buster WarGreymon, BlackWarGreymon is devoted to its own form of justice. Loathing cruelty and deceit, it looks down on Digimon it considers dishonorable—including fellow Virus-attribute types. How it became a Virus is a mystery, and it's worth noting that the "Brave Shield" on its back lacks the Crest of Courage. Its special move Dark Terra Force, though similar to WarGreymon's Terra Force, gathers all the negative emotions in the world and concentrates them into a single point before firing.

specialSkills.name: Dark Terra Force
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Dark physical attack at power 95. Increased damage to targets with Holy Trait.

specialSkills.name: Black Tornado
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 30 x 3 hits. 15% CRT Rate. Increased damage to targets with Dragon Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Wolkenapalm III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Fire physical attack at power 75. 95% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Magma Fall III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Hell Crusher III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Dark magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Critical Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to CRT Rate for 3 turn(s).

metalgarurumon-black.name: MetalGarurumon (Black)
metalgarurumon-black.description: MetalGarurumon (Black) is a Virus-attribute MetalGarurumon equipped with freeze weapons all over its body. It has a terrifying personality, and when the laser sights in its nose pick up a target, it chases it down relentlessly without regard to whether it's friend or foe before blasting it with missiles. Its special moves include Garuru Tomahawk, which fires a huge missile called the Freeze Bomber from its chest, and Ice Wolf Claw, which fires all the weapons on its body at once to wipe out its foes.

specialSkills.name: Ice Wolf Claw
specialSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Ice physical attack at power 20 x 3 hits. Increased damage to targets with Fire Trait.

specialSkills.name: Garuru Tomahawk
specialSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Null physical attack at power 100. Always hits. Increased damage to targets with Aquatic Trait.

attachmentSkills.name: Guard Break
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] 100% chance of 10% reduction to DEF for 3 turn(s).

attachmentSkills.name: Magma Fall III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: All enemies] Performs Fire magic attack at power 45. 90% ACU.

attachmentSkills.name: Crush Blade III
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 enemy] Performs Steel physical attack at power 15 x 5 hits. 90% ACU. 20% CRT Rate.

attachmentSkills.name: Acceleration Boost
attachmentSkills.description: [Target: 1 ally] 100% chance to apply Charge Physical.
